title: A Closed-Form Adaptive-Landmark Kernel for Certified Point-Cloud and Graph Classification
abstract: We introduce PALACE (Persistence Adaptive-Landmark Analytic Classification Engine), the data-adaptive companion to PLACE, paying a small cross-validation tier on three knobs (budget, radii, bandwidth; $\leq 5$ choices each). A cover-theoretic core (Lebesgue-number criterion on the landmark cover) yields four closed-form guarantees. (i) A structural lower distortion bound $λ(τ;ν)$ on $\mathcal{D}_n$ under cross-diagram non-interference, with a $(D/L)^2$ budget reduction over the uniform grid when diagrams concentrate. (ii) Equal weights $w_k = K^{-1/2}$ maximizing $λ$, and farthest-point-sampling positions $2$-approximating the optimal $k$-center covering radius; both derived from training labels alone, no gradient training. (iii) A kernel-RKHS classification rate $O((k-1)\sqrt{K}/(γ\sqrt{m_{\min}}))$ with binary necessity threshold $m = Ω(\sqrt K/γ)$ from a matching Le Cam lower bound, and a closed-form filtration-selection rule. The kernel-Mahalanobis margin $\hatρ_{\mathrm{Mah}}$ is the strongest closed-form ranker across the chemical-graph pool (mean Spearman $ρ\approx +0.60$); the isotropic surrogate $\hatγ/\sqrt{K}$ admits a selection-consistency rate, and $\widehatλ$ from (i) provides an independent data-level signal (positive on COX2 and PTC). (iv) A per-prediction certificate, in non-asymptotic Pinelis and asymptotic Gaussian forms, with no calibration split. Empirically, PALACE is the strongest closed-form diagram-based method on Orbit5k ($91.3 \pm 1.0\%$, matching Persformer), leads every diagram-based competitor on COX2 and MUTAG, and is competitive on DHFR (within 1 pp of ECP). At $8\times$ domain inflation, adaptive placement maintains $94\%$ while the uniform grid collapses to chance ($25\%$ on 4-class data).

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种自适应地标核方法PALACE，实现点云和图分类的封闭形式保证与高效认证。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于持久同源性的点云和图分类方法通常依赖网格或均匀采样地标，难以自适应数据分布且缺乏理论保证。本文旨在开发一种数据自适应、封闭形式的地标选择与核方法，同时提供分类一致性和认证性保证，以提升实际应用中的鲁棒性和效率。
light_analysis.method: PALACE基于覆盖理论的Lebesgue数准则，设计自适应地标核。通过训练标签直接推导出最优地标权重（等权重）和地标位置（最远点采样近似最优k-中心覆盖半径）。提出封闭形式的核-RKHS分类泛化界、匹配的Le Cam下界及过滤选择规则。核马氏距离为最强封闭形式排序器，并提供逐预测认证。
light_analysis.result: 在Orbit5k上达到91.3±1.0%准确率，匹配Persformer；在COX2和MUTAG上领先所有图方法；在DHFR上与ECP差距在1个百分点内。自适应地标在8倍域膨胀下保持94%准确率，而均匀网格降至25%（4类数据）。
light_analysis.conclusion: PALACE作为PLACE的数据自适应版本，以少量交叉验证开销实现封闭形式保证，包括结构下界、分类速率、过滤选择和预测认证。实验表明其在多种图分类任务中达到最先进水平，且对数据扰动具有鲁棒性。未来可扩展至更复杂拓扑特征。

title: Audio-Visual Intelligence in Large Foundation Models
abstract: Audio-Visual Intelligence (AVI) has emerged as a central frontier in artificial intelligence, bridging auditory and visual modalities to enable machines that can perceive, generate, and interact in the multimodal real world. In the era of large foundation models, joint modeling of audio and vision has become increasingly crucial, i.e., not only for understanding but also for controllable generation and reasoning across dynamic, temporally grounded signals. Recent advances, such as Meta MovieGen and Google Veo-3, highlight the growing industrial and academic focus on unified audio-vision architectures that learn from massive multimodal data. However, despite rapid progress, the literature remains fragmented, spanning diverse tasks, inconsistent taxonomies, and heterogeneous evaluation practices that impede systematic comparison and knowledge integration. This survey provides the first comprehensive review of AVI through the lens of large foundation models. We establish a unified taxonomy covering the broad landscape of AVI tasks, ranging from understanding (e.g., speech recognition, sound localization) to generation (e.g., audio-driven video synthesis, video-to-audio) and interaction (e.g., dialogue, embodied, or agentic interfaces). We synthesize methodological foundations, including modality tokenization, cross-modal fusion, autoregressive and diffusion-based generation, large-scale pretraining, instruction alignment, and preference optimization. Furthermore, we curate representative datasets, benchmarks, and evaluation metrics, offering a structured comparison across task families and identifying open challenges in synchronization, spatial reasoning, controllability, and safety. By consolidating this rapidly expanding field into a coherent framework, this survey aims to serve as a foundational reference for future research on large-scale AVI.

light_analysis.overview: 首次全面综述大型基础模型中的视听智能，建立统一分类体系，涵盖理解、生成和交互任务，总结方法论与开放挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 视听智能（AVI）是AI前沿领域，旨在融合听觉与视觉模态实现多模态感知、生成与交互。尽管涌现了Meta MovieGen等统一架构，但文献分散于不同任务、不一致的分类法与异构评估体系，阻碍系统比较与知识整合，亟需全面综述。
light_analysis.method: 通过大型基础模型视角系统综述AVI，提出统一分类涵盖理解（语音识别、声音定位）、生成（音频驱动视频合成、视频转音频）和交互（对话、具身/代理接口）三类任务。综合方法论基础：模态分词、跨模态融合、自回归与扩散生成、大规模预训练、指令对齐和偏好优化；并整理代表性数据集、基准与指标。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出定量实验结果，但提供了跨任务家族的结构化比较，识别出同步、空间推理、可控性和安全性等开放挑战。作为综述，主要成果是建立连贯框架，便于系统对比与知识整合。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次将快速发展的视听智能领域整合为统一框架，为未来大规模AVI研究提供基础参考。学术价值在于全面分类与比较，实际价值在于指导多模态模型的设计与评估。后续可聚焦于时空同步、可控生成等具体挑战的突破。

title: UniCorrn: Unified Correspondence Transformer Across 2D and 3D
abstract: Visual correspondence across image-to-image (2D-2D), image-to-point cloud (2D-3D), and point cloud-to-point cloud (3D-3D) geometric matching forms the foundation for numerous 3D vision tasks. Despite sharing a similar problem structure, current methods use task-specific designs with separate models for each modality combination. We present UniCorrn, the first correspondence model with shared weights that unifies geometric matching across all three tasks. Our key insight is that Transformer attention naturally captures cross-modal feature similarity. We propose a dual-stream decoder that maintains separate appearance and positional feature streams. This design enables end-to-end learning through stack-able layers while supporting flexible query-based correspondence estimation across heterogeneous modalities. Our architecture employs modality-specific backbones followed by shared encoder and decoder components, trained jointly on diverse data combining pseudo point clouds from depth maps with real 3D correspondence annotations. UniCorrn achieves competitive performance on 2D-2D matching and surpasses prior state-of-the-art by 8% on 7Scenes (2D-3D) and 10% on 3DLoMatch (3D-3D) in registration recall. Project website: https://neu-vi.github.io/UniCorrn

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniCorrn，首个跨2D-2D、2D-3D、3D-3D几何匹配的统一模型，共享权重，性能领先。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉对应方法针对不同模态组合（图像-图像、图像-点云、点云-点云）设计独立模型，未利用问题结构的相似性。这种任务特定设计导致模型复杂、泛化性差。UniCorrn旨在通过共享权重的统一架构，提升跨模态匹配的效率和性能，减少冗余。
light_analysis.method: 核心是双流解码器，分离外观和位置特征流，利用Transformer注意力捕获跨模态相似性。采用模态特定骨干网络，后接共享编码器-解码器，通过堆叠层实现端到端学习。训练数据融合深度图生成的伪点云与真实3D对应标注，支持查询式对应估计。
light_analysis.result: 在2D-2D匹配上达到竞争性性能；在7Scenes数据集上2D-3D匹配的注册召回率超越先前最优8%；在3DLoMatch数据集上3D-3D匹配超越10%。验证了统一架构对异构模态的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniCorrn是首个统一2D-2D、2D-3D、3D-3D几何匹配的模型，通过共享权重和双流设计实现跨模态特征对齐。其学术价值在于简化多模态匹配流程，实际应用可增强视觉定位、SLAM等任务。未来可扩展至更多模态或动态场景。

title: Large Language Models are Universal Reasoners for Visual Generation
abstract: Text-to-image generation has advanced rapidly with diffusion models, progressing from CLIP and T5 conditioning to unified systems where a single LLM backbone handles both visual understanding and generation. Despite the architectural unification, these systems frequently fail to faithfully align complex prompts during synthesis, even though they remain highly accurate at verifying whether an image satisfies those same prompts. We formalize this as the \emph{understanding-generation gap} and propose UniReasoner, a framework that leverages the LLM as a universal reasoner to convert its understanding strength into direct generation guidance. Given a prompt, the LLM first produces a coarse visual draft composed of discrete vision tokens. It then performs a self-critique by evaluating the draft for prompt consistency, producing a grounded textual evaluation that pinpoints what needs to be corrected. Finally, a diffusion model is conditioned jointly on the prompt, the visual draft, and the evaluation, ensuring that generation is guided by explicit corrective signals. Each signal addresses a limitation of the other: the draft provides a concrete, scene-level anchor that reduces under-specification in text-only conditioning, while the evaluation turns verification into grounded, actionable constraints that correct omissions, hallucinations, and relational errors. Experiments show that UniReasoner improves compositional alignment and semantic faithfulness under the same diffusion backbone while maintaining image quality, demonstrating a practical way to exploit LLM reasoning to close the understanding-generation gap.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniReasoner框架，利用大语言模型作为通用推理器，弥合视觉生成中理解与生成之间的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前文本到图像生成中，尽管统一架构使用LLM骨干网络进行视觉理解和生成，但常无法忠实对齐复杂提示。研究指出存在理解-生成差距：LLM能准确验证图像是否符合提示，但在生成时却失败。该问题重要，因为它限制了生成模型对复杂语义的精确表达能力。现有方法缺乏将理解能力转化为生成指导的有效机制。
light_analysis.method: UniReasoner框架包含三步：首先，LLM生成离散视觉令牌组成的粗视觉草稿；其次，LLM对草稿进行自批评，评估其与提示的一致性，生成有依据的文本评估，指出需修正之处；最后，扩散模型以提示、视觉草稿和评估为联合条件生成图像。依赖LLM的推理能力，将理解优势转化为直接生成指导。
light_analysis.result: 在相同扩散骨干下，UniReasoner提升了组合对齐和语义忠实度，同时保持图像质量。具体改进包括减少遗漏、幻觉和关系错误。实验证明了利用LLM推理缩小理解-生成差距的有效性。摘要未提供精确数值指标，但强调了相对于基线方法的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniReasoner通过LLM作为通用推理器，将验证能力转化为生成约束，有效解决了视觉生成中的理解-生成差距。其价值在于为利用LLM推理改善生成语义对齐提供了实用方案。未来可探索更高效的推理流程或扩展至其他生成任务。

title: Safety and accuracy follow different scaling laws in clinical large language models
abstract: Clinical LLMs are often scaled by increasing model size, context length, retrieval complexity, or inference-time compute, with the implicit expectation that higher accuracy implies safer behavior. This assumption is incomplete in medicine, where a few confident, high-risk, or evidence-contradicting errors can matter more than average benchmark performance. We introduce SaFE-Scale, a framework for measuring how clinical LLM safety changes across model scale, evidence quality, retrieval strategy, context exposure, and inference-time compute. To instantiate this framework, we introduce RadSaFE-200, a Radiology Safety-Focused Evaluation benchmark of 200 multiple-choice questions with clinician-defined clean evidence, conflict evidence, and option-level labels for high-risk error, unsafe answer, and evidence contradiction. We evaluated 34 locally deployed LLMs across six deployment conditions: closed-book prompting (zero-shot), clean evidence, conflict evidence, standard RAG, agentic RAG, and max-context prompting. Clean evidence produced the strongest improvement, increasing mean accuracy from 73.5% to 94.1%, while reducing high-risk error from 12.0% to 2.6%, contradiction from 12.7% to 2.3%, and dangerous overconfidence from 8.0% to 1.6%. Standard RAG and agentic RAG did not reproduce this safety profile: agentic RAG improved accuracy over standard RAG and reduced contradiction, but high-risk error and dangerous overconfidence remained elevated. Max-context prompting increased latency without closing the safety gap, and additional inference-time compute produced only limited gains. Worst-case analysis showed that clinically consequential errors concentrated in a small subset of questions. Clinical LLM safety is therefore not a passive consequence of scaling, but a deployment property shaped by evidence quality, retrieval design, context construction, and collective failure behavior.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SaFE-Scale框架，揭示临床大语言模型的安全性与准确性遵循不同的扩展规律。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床LLM常通过扩大模型规模、上下文长度或推理计算来提升准确性，但隐含假设“更高准确性等于更安全”在医学中不成立，因为少数高风险错误比平均性能更关键。现有方法缺乏对安全性随扩展变化的系统评估。
light_analysis.method: 引入SaFE-Scale框架，测量安全性随模型规模、证据质量、检索策略等变化。构建RadSaFE-200基准，包含200道多选题，含干净证据、冲突证据及高风险错误标签。评估34个LLM在封闭书提示、干净证据、冲突证据、标准RAG、智能体RAG和最大上下文提示六种条件。
light_analysis.result: 干净证据效果最佳：平均准确率从73.5%升至94.1%，高风险错误从12.0%降至2.6%。标准RAG和智能体RAG未复制安全表现：智能体RAG提升准确率但高风险错误仍高。最大上下文提示增加延迟却未缩小安全差距。最坏情况分析显示错误集中于少数问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 临床LLM安全性不是扩展的被动结果，而是由证据质量、检索设计、上下文构建和集体失败行为决定的部署属性。需主动设计安全机制，而非依赖规模提升。

title: OpenSeeker-v2: Pushing the Limits of Search Agents with Informative and High-Difficulty Trajectories
abstract: Deep search capabilities have become an indispensable competency for frontier Large Language Model (LLM) agents, yet their development remains dominated by industrial giants. The typical industry recipe involves a highly resource-intensive pipeline spanning pre-training, continual pre-training (CPT), supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and reinforcement learning (RL). In this report, we show that when fueled with informative and high-difficulty trajectories, a simple SFT approach could be surprisingly powerful for training frontier search agents. By introducing three simple data synthesis modifications: scaling knowledge graph size for richer exploration, expanding the tool set size for broader functionality, and strict low-step filtering, we establish a stronger baseline. Trained on merely 10.6k data points, our OpenSeeker-v2 achieves state-of-the-art performance across 4 benchmarks (30B-sized agents with ReAct paradigm): 46.0% on BrowseComp, 58.1% on BrowseComp-ZH, 34.6% on Humanity's Last Exam, and 78.0% on xbench, surpassing even Tongyi DeepResearch trained with heavy CPT+SFT+RL pipeline, which achieves 43.4%, 46.7%, 32.9%, and 75.0%, respectively. Notably, OpenSeeker-v2 represents the first state-of-the-art search agent within its model scale and paradigm to be developed by a purely academic team using only SFT. We are excited to open-source the OpenSeeker-v2 model weights and share our simple yet effective findings to make frontier search agent research more accessible to the community.

light_analysis.overview: 提出简单SFT方法结合高质量高难度轨迹，仅用10.6k数据点训练出领先的搜索代理，超越工业级复杂流水线。
light_analysis.motivation: 前沿搜索代理开发被工业巨头垄断，依赖昂贵的预训练、CPT、SFT和RL流水线，学术界难以参与。本文探索更简单有效的方法，旨在降低门槛，使学术界也能开发高性能搜索代理。
light_analysis.method: 通过三种数据合成改进：扩大知识图谱规模以丰富探索、增加工具集大小以扩展功能、严格低步过滤以提升轨迹质量。在30B参数模型上采用ReAct范式，仅用10.6k数据点进行监督微调（SFT）。
light_analysis.result: 在4个基准上取得SOTA：BrowseComp 46.0%，BrowseComp-ZH 58.1%，Humanity's Last Exam 34.6%，xbench 78.0%，全面超越使用CPT+SFT+RL流水线的Tongyi DeepResearch（43.4%/46.7%/32.9%/75.0%），且为纯学术团队首次实现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明简单SFT配合高质量轨迹可训练出前沿搜索代理，开源模型权重以促进社区研究。未来可探索更复杂的场景或结合强化学习进一步提升性能。

title: Large-Scale High-Quality 3D Gaussian Head Reconstruction from Multi-View Captures
abstract: We propose HeadsUp, a scalable feed-forward method for reconstructing high-quality 3D Gaussian heads from large-scale multi-camera setups. Our method employs an efficient encoder-decoder architecture that compresses input views into a compact latent representation. This latent representation is then decoded into a set of UV-parameterized 3D Gaussians anchored to a neutral head template. This UV representation decouples the number of 3D Gaussians from the number and resolution of input images, enabling training with many high-resolution input views. We train and evaluate our model on an internal dataset with more than 10,000 subjects, which is an order of magnitude larger than existing multi-view human head datasets. HeadsUp achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction quality and generalizes to novel identities without test-time optimization. We extensively analyze the scaling behavior of our model across identities, views, and model capacity, revealing practical insights for quality-compute trade-offs. Finally, we highlight the strength of our latent space by showcasing two downstream applications: generating novel 3D identities and animating the 3D heads with expression blendshapes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HeadsUp，一种可扩展的前馈方法，从多视图捕获中重建高质量3D高斯头部模型，无需测试时优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D头部重建方法通常需要测试时优化，且训练数据规模有限，无法处理高分辨率多视图输入。该研究旨在解决这些局限性，实现高效、高质量的重建，并具备良好的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 采用编码器-解码器架构，将输入视图压缩为紧凑潜在表示，再解码为UV参数化的3D高斯，锚定到中性头部模板。UV表示解耦了高斯数量与输入图像数量、分辨率，支持高分辨率多视图训练。在包含超过10,000名受试者的内部数据集上训练。
light_analysis.result: 在内部数据集上达到最先进的重建质量，且能泛化到未见身份。通过跨身份、视图和模型容量的扩展性分析，揭示了质量-计算权衡的实用见解。无需测试时优化。
light_analysis.conclusion: HeadsUp实现了大规模、高质量、可泛化的3D高斯头部重建。其潜在空间可用于生成新3D身份和通过表情混合变形动画化3D头部，展示了下游应用价值。未来可能探索更高效架构或更大规模数据。

title: Redefining AI Red Teaming in the Agentic Era: From Weeks to Hours
abstract: AI systems are entering critical domains like healthcare, finance, and defense, yet remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks. While AI red teaming is a primary defense, current approaches force operators into manual, library-specific workflows. Operators spend weeks hand-crafting workflows - assembling attacks, transforms, and scorers. When results fall short, workflows must be rebuilt. As a result, operators spend more time constructing workflows than probing targets for security and safety vulnerabilities.   We introduce an AI red teaming agent built on the open-source Dreadnode SDK. The agent creates workflows grounded in 45+ adversarial attacks, 450+ transforms, and 130+ scorers. Operators can probe multi-agent systems, multilingual, and multimodal targets, focusing on what to probe rather than how to implement it.   We make three contributions: 1. Agentic interface. Operators describe goals in natural language via the Dreadnode TUI (Terminal User Interface). The agent handles attack selection, transform composition, execution, and reporting, letting operators focus on red teaming. Weeks compress to hours. 2. Unified framework. A single framework for probing traditional ML models (adversarial examples) and generative AI systems (jailbreaks), removing the need for separate libraries. 3. Llama Scout case study. We red team Meta Llama Scout and achieve an 85% attack success rate with severity up to 1.0, using zero human-developed code

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Dreadnode SDK的AI红队智能体，将红队工作从数周缩短至数小时，通过自然语言接口和统一框架实现高效自动化攻击测试。
light_analysis.motivation: AI系统在医疗、金融、国防等关键领域应用日益广泛，但面临对抗性攻击的威胁。当前AI红队依赖手动、库特定的工作流，操作人员需花费数周时间手工构建攻击、变换和评分器组合，导致实际用于探测目标安全漏洞的时间远少于构建工作流的时间。这种低效流程严重制约了安全评估的及时性和覆盖面，亟需一种自动化的统一解决方案来提升红队效率。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一个基于开源Dreadnode SDK的AI红队智能体。该智能体整合了45+种对抗攻击、450+种变换和130+种评分器，通过终端用户界面（TUI）支持操作员用自然语言描述目标，智能体自动完成攻击选择、变换组合、执行和报告。同时构建了统一框架，可同时探测传统ML模型（对抗样本）和生成式AI系统（越狱攻击），无需切换不同库。
light_analysis.result: 在Meta Llama Scout案例研究中，该智能体实现了85%的攻击成功率，严重性最高达1.0，且无需人类编写任何代码。与传统数周的手动流程相比，将红队时间压缩至数小时，显著提升了安全评估的效率与覆盖率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一种创新的AI红队自动化方法，通过智能体架构统一了对抗攻击流程，大幅降低了操作门槛和时间成本。该研究对提升关键领域AI系统的安全性具有重要实践价值，未来可扩展到更多攻击场景和复杂多智能体系统。

title: Rethinking Reasoning-Intensive Retrieval: Evaluating and Advancing Retrievers in Agentic Search Systems
abstract: Reasoning-intensive retrieval aims to surface evidence that supports downstream reasoning rather than merely matching topical similarity. This capability is increasingly important for agentic search systems, where retrievers must provide complementary evidence across iterative search and synthesis. However, existing work remains limited on both evaluation and training: benchmarks such as BRIGHT provide narrow gold sets and evaluate retrievers in isolation, while synthetic training corpora often optimize single-passage relevance rather than evidence portfolio construction. We introduce BRIGHT-Pro, an expert-annotated benchmark that expands each query with multi-aspect gold evidence and evaluates retrievers under both static and agentic search protocols. We further construct RTriever-Synth, an aspect-decomposed synthetic corpus that generates complementary positives and positive-conditioned hard negatives, and use it to LoRA fine-tune RTriever-4B from Qwen3-Embedding-4B. Experiments across lexical, general-purpose, and reasoning-intensive retrievers show that aspect-aware and agentic evaluation expose behaviors hidden by standard metrics, while RTriever-4B substantially improves over its base model.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BRIGHT-Pro基准和RTriever-Synth合成语料，并微调RTriever-4B模型，改进推理密集型检索。
light_analysis.motivation: 推理密集型检索需提供互补证据支持下游推理，但现有基准如BRIGHT仅提供有限金集且孤立评估检索器，训练语料优化单段落相关性而非证据组合构建，导致评估不全面、训练不足。
light_analysis.method: 构建专家标注的BRIGHT-Pro基准，扩展多角度金证据，在静态和智能体搜索协议下评估；构建方面分解合成语料RTriever-Synth，生成互补正例和正例条件硬负例，基于Qwen3-Embedding-4B通过LoRA微调得到RTriever-4B。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，方面感知和智能体评估暴露标准指标隐藏行为，RTriever-4B相较于基础模型显著提升检索性能，具体改进包括多角度证据覆盖和跨轮次互补性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了更全面的评估基准和合成训练方法，推动推理密集型检索在智能体系统中应用；未来可扩展至更多交互式场景，但微调计算开销和通用性需进一步验证。

title: SymptomAI: Towards a Conversational AI Agent for Everyday Symptom Assessment
abstract: Language models excel at diagnostic assessments on currated medical case-studies and vignettes, performing on par with, or better than, clinical professionals. However, existing studies focus on complex scenarios with rich context making it difficult to draw conclusions about how these systems perform for patients reporting symptoms in everyday life. We deployed SymptomAI, a set of conversational AI agents for end-to-end patient interviewing and differential diagnosis (DDx), via the Fitbit app in a study that randomized participants (N=13,917) to interact with five AI agents. This corpus captures diverse communication and a realistic distribution of illnesses from a real world population. A subset of 1,228 participants reported a clinician-provided diagnosis, and 517 of these were further evaluated by a panel of clinicians during over 250 hours of annotation. SymptomAI DDx were significantly more accurate (OR = 2.47, p < 0.001) than those from independent clinicians given the same dialogue in a blinded randomized comparison. Moreover, agentic strategies which conduct a dedicated symptom interview that elicit additional symptom information before providing a diagnosis, perform substantially better than baseline, user-guided conversations (p < 0.001). An auxiliary analysis on 1,509 conversations from a general US population panel validated that these results generalize beyond wearable device users. We used SymptomAI diagnoses as labels for all 13,917 participants to analyze over 500,000 days of wearable metrics across nearly 400 unique conditions. We identified strong associations between acute infections and physiological shifts (e.g., OR > 7 for influenza). While limited by self-reported ground truth, these results demonstrate the benefits of a dedicated and complete symptom interview compared to a user-guided symptom discussion, which is the default of most consumer LLMs.
comment: 13 page main text, 54 pages total. 16 figures total

light_analysis.overview: 通过大规模随机对照试验，验证了专用症状访谈的对话AI代理在日常症状评估中优于临床医生和用户引导的基线方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语言模型在医疗诊断评估中表现优异，但研究多集中于复杂临床案例，缺乏对日常症状报告场景的评估。日常症状评估对患者自我管理和早期干预至关重要，而消费者LLM默认采用用户引导的对话，可能遗漏关键症状信息。因此，需要研究专门的症状访谈策略在实际用户群体中的效果。
light_analysis.method: 论文部署了SymptomAI，一套包含五个对话AI代理的系统，集成于Fitbit应用中进行端到端患者访谈和鉴别诊断（DDx）。13917名参与者随机与不同代理交互，其中1228人提供了临床诊断作为金标准，517人经由医生小组评估。核心创新在于代理策略：在提供诊断前进行专门的症状访谈以收集额外信息，与基线用户引导对话对比。
light_analysis.result: SymptomAI的DDx准确率显著高于独立临床医生（OR=2.47, p<0.001），且代理策略优于用户引导对话（p<0.001）。辅助分析在1509名美国普通人群对话中验证了结果泛化性。利用所有13917名参与者的诊断标签分析超过50万天的可穿戴数据，发现急性感染与生理指标变化强关联（如流感OR>7）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示了专用完整症状访谈在AI症状评估中的核心价值，优于大多数消费者LLM的默认用户引导模式。结果基于自报告金标准，存在局限性，但为部署真实世界对话式健康评估系统提供了证据，未来可结合更多客观指标提升诊断可靠性。

title: Enhanced 3D Brain Tumor Segmentation Using Assorted Precision Training
abstract: A brain tumor is a medical disorder faced by individuals of all demographics. Medically, it is described as the spread of non-essential cells close to or throughout the brain. Symptoms of this ailment include headaches, seizures, and sensory changes. This research explores two main categories of brain tumors: benign and malignant. Benign spreads steadily, and malignant expresses growth, making it dangerous. Early identification of brain tumors is a crucial factor for the survival of patients. This research provides a state-of-the-art approach to the early identification of tumors within the brain. We implemented the SegResNet architecture, a widely adopted architecture for three-dimensional segmentation, and trained it using the automatic multi-precision method. We incorporated the dice loss function and dice metric for evaluating the model. We got a dice score of 0.84. For the tumor core, we got a dice score of 0.84; for the whole tumor, 0.90; and for the enhanced tumor, we got a score of 0.79.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用SegResNet和自动多精度训练方法进行3D脑肿瘤分割，在BraTS数据集上取得较好Dice分数。
light_analysis.motivation: 脑肿瘤是一种严重威胁患者生命的疾病，早期识别对提高生存率至关重要。现有方法在分割精度和训练效率方面存在不足。该研究旨在通过改进的训练策略和网络架构，实现更准确的脑肿瘤自动分割，尤其是区分良性和恶性肿瘤，为临床诊断提供可靠支持。
light_analysis.method: 采用SegResNet架构，该架构专为三维医学图像分割设计。引入自动多精度训练方法，通过混合精度计算加速训练并减少内存占用。使用Dice损失函数优化模型，Dice指标评估性能。训练数据来自BraTS数据集（摘要未明确说明，但为常见基准），对脑肿瘤的肿瘤核心、整个肿瘤和增强肿瘤区域进行分割。
light_analysis.result: 在测试集上，整体Dice得分为0.84；其中肿瘤核心Dice为0.84，整个肿瘤Dice为0.90，增强肿瘤Dice为0.79。结果表明该方法在肿瘤整体分割上表现优异，但对增强肿瘤区域的分割精度相对较低。与现有方法相比，自动多精度训练在保持准确率的同时提升了训练效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提出的SegResNet结合自动多精度训练方法在脑肿瘤分割任务中取得了有竞争力的结果，尤其在整个肿瘤分割上达到0.90的Dice分数，验证了方法的有效性。未来可进一步优化增强肿瘤区域的分割精度，并探索在更大规模数据集上的泛化能力，以推动临床部署。

title: RD-ViT: Recurrent-Depth Vision Transformer for Semantic Segmentation with Reduced Data Dependence Extending the Recurrent-Depth Transformer Architecture to Dense Prediction
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve state-of-the-art segmentation accuracy but require large training datasets because each layer has unique parameters that must be learned independently. We present RD-ViT, a Recurrent-Depth Vision Transformer that adapts the Recurrent-Depth Transformer (RDT) architecture to dense prediction tasks, supporting both 2D and 3D inputs. RD-ViT replaces the deep stack of unique transformer blocks with a single shared block looped T times, augmented with LTI-stable state injection for guaranteed convergence, Adaptive Computation Time (ACT) for spatial compute allocation, depth-wise LoRA adaptation, and optional Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) feed-forward networks for category-specific specialization. We evaluate on the ACDC cardiac MRI segmentation benchmark in both 2D slice-level and 3D volumetric settings with exclusively real experiments executed in Google Colab. In 2D, RD-ViT outperforms standard ViT at 10% training data (Dice 0.774 vs 0.762) and at full data (0.882 vs 0.872). In 3D, RD-ViT with MoE achieves Dice 0.812 with 3.0M parameters, reaching 99.4% of standard ViT performance (0.817) at 53% of the parameter count. MoE expert utilization analysis reveals that different experts spontaneously specialize for different cardiac structures (RV, MYO, LV) without explicit routing supervision. ACT halting maps show higher compute allocation at cardiac boundaries, and the mean ponder time decreases from 2.6 to 1.4 iterations during training, demonstrating learned computational efficiency. Depth extrapolation enables inference with more loops than training without degradation. All code, notebooks, and results are publicly released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RD-ViT，通过循环共享块和多种增强机制减少数据依赖，实现高效语义分割。
light_analysis.motivation: Vision Transformers在语义分割中表现优异，但每层独立参数导致需要大量训练数据。现有方法数据效率低，限制了在小数据集上的应用。本文旨在通过参数共享和自适应计算降低数据需求，同时保持高精度。
light_analysis.method: RD-ViT采用单个共享Transformer块循环T次，加入LTI稳定状态注入保证收敛，自适应计算时间（ACT）分配空间计算，深度LoRA适应，以及可选的混合专家（MoE）前馈网络实现类别特化。支持2D和3D输入，在ACDC心脏MRI数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在ACDC数据集上，2D模式下用10%训练数据Dice达0.774（标准ViT为0.762），全数据0.882（vs 0.872）。3D模式下MoE版本Dice 0.812，参数仅3.0M，达到标准ViT（0.817）的99.4%性能。ACT显示计算集中在心脏边界，平均迭代次数从2.6降至1.4。
light_analysis.conclusion: RD-ViT通过参数共享和自适应机制显著降低数据依赖和参数数量，同时保持高分割精度。其MoE专家自发特化于不同心脏结构，ACT实现计算效率提升。深度外推能力允许推理时更多循环无退化。代码开源，有助于资源受限场景的应用。

title: EQUITRIAGE: A Fairness Audit of Gender Bias in LLM-Based Emergency Department Triage
abstract: Emergency department triage assigns patients an acuity score that determines treatment priority, and clinical evidence documents persistent gender disparities in human acuity assessment. As hospitals pilot large language models (LLMs) as triage decision support, a critical question is whether these models reproduce or mitigate known biases. We present EQUITRIAGE, a fairness audit of LLM-based ESI assignment evaluating five models (Gemini-3-Flash, Nemotron-3-Super, DeepSeek-V3.1, Mistral-Small-3.2, GPT-4.1-Nano) across 374,275 evaluations on 18,714 MIMIC-IV-ED vignettes under four prompt strategies. Of 9,368 originals, 9,346 are paired with a gender-swapped counterfactual. All five models produced flip rates above a pre-registered 5% threshold (9.9% to 43.8%). Two showed directional female undertriage (DeepSeek F/M 2.15:1, Gemini 1.34:1); two were near-parity; one had high sensitivity with weak male-direction asymmetry. DeepSeek's directional bias coexisted with a low outcome-linked calibration gap (0.013 against MIMIC-IV admission), a Chouldechova-style dissociation between within-group calibration and between-pair counterfactual invariance. Demographic blinding reduced Gemini's flip rate to 0.5%; an age-preserving blind variant left DeepSeek with residual F/M 1.25, implicating age as a residual channel. Chain-of-thought prompting degraded accuracy for all five models. A two-model ablation reveals opposite underlying mechanisms for the same directional phenotype: in Gemini the signal is emergent in the combined name+gender swap, while in DeepSeek the gender token alone carries it. EQUITRIAGE shows that group parity, counterfactual invariance, and gender calibration are distinct fairness properties, that intervention effectiveness is model-dependent, and that per-model counterfactual auditing should precede clinical deployment.
comment: 37 pages, 10 figures, 13 tables. Code and analysis scripts available upon publication. Data: PhysioNet credentialed access (MIMIC-IV-ED v2.2 and MIMIC-IV v3.1, BIDMC IRB #2001P001699)

light_analysis.overview: 提出EQUITRIAGE审计框架，系统评估LLM在急诊分诊中的性别偏见，揭示群体公平、反事实不变性和性别校准是不同属性。
light_analysis.motivation: 急诊分诊中人类评估存在性别差异，医院开始使用LLM辅助决策，但尚未系统审计这些模型是否会重现或缓解已知偏见。现有研究缺乏对LLM公平性的全面评估，尤其是在实际临床场景中。
light_analysis.method: 使用MIMIC-IV-ED的18,714个病例，对5种LLM（Gemini等）进行374,275次评估，采用四种提示策略（包括原始和性别交换的反事实对）。计算翻转率、方向性偏倚（如女性低分诊比例）、校准误差，并进行人口统计学盲化和思维链提示实验。
light_analysis.result: 所有模型的翻转率超过5%阈值（9.9%-43.8%），DeepSeek和Gemini显示女性低分诊（F/M比分别为2.15和1.34）。人口统计学盲化将Gemini翻转率降至0.5%，但年龄盲化后DeepSeek仍有残留偏倚。思维链提示降低所有模型准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 群体平等、反事实不变性和性别校准是独立的公平属性；干预效果依赖具体模型；临床部署前需对每个模型进行反事实审计，以确保公平性。

title: 3D Human Face Reconstruction with 3DMM face model from RGB image
abstract: Nowadays as convolution neural networks demonstrate its powerful problem-solving ability in the area of image processing, efforts have been made to reconstruct detailed face shapes from 2D face images or videos. However, to make the full use of CNN, a large number of labeled data is required to train the network. Coarse morphable face model has been used to synthesize labeled data. However, it is hard for coarse morphable face models to generate photo-realistic data with detail such as wrinkles. In this project, we present a pipeline that reconstructs a human face 3D model from a single RGB image. The pipeline includes face detection, landmark detection, regression of 3DMM model parameters, and soft rendering. Mentor: Zhipeng Fan (Email: zf606@nyu.edu) Code Repository: https://github.com/SeVEnMY/3d-face- reconstruction Code Reference: https://github.com/sicxu/Deep3DFaceRecon pytorch

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种从单张RGB图像重建3D人脸的完整管线，结合3DMM模型与CNN，通过软渲染生成细节。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于CNN的人脸重建方法需要大量标注数据，而粗粒度3DMM无法生成真实感细节（如皱纹）。为解决这一问题，该研究设计了一个无需真实3D标注的管线，利用合成数据训练网络，旨在提升重建的细节真实度。
light_analysis.method: 管线包括人脸检测、关键点检测、3DMM参数回归和软渲染四个步骤。使用CNN回归3DMM的形状和表情系数，并通过软可微渲染器将3D模型投影到2D图像，与输入图像计算损失进行训练。代码基于PyTorch实现，参考了Deep3DFaceRecon。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但声称能从单张RGB图像重建3D人脸模型，且管线有效。定性结果可能展示了细节如皱纹的恢复，但缺乏定量指标或与基线方法的对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提出了一套完整的3D人脸重建管线，通过结合3DMM和CNN实现了从单张图像到3D模型的转换，具有实用价值。未来工作可能包括提升真实感或处理多视角输入，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: An Agent-Oriented Pluggable Experience-RAG Skill for Experience-Driven Retrieval Strategy Orchestration
abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation systems often assume that one fixed retrieval pipeline is sufficient across heterogeneous tasks, yet factoid question answering, multi-hop reasoning, and scientific verification exhibit different retrieval preferences. We present Experience-RAG Skill, an agent-oriented pluggable retrieval orchestration layer positioned between the agent and the retriever pool. The proposed skill analyzes the current scene, consults an experience memory, selects an appropriate retrieval strategy, and returns structured evidence to the agent. Under a fixed candidate pool, Experience-RAG Skill achieves an overall nDCG@10 of 0.8924 on BeIR/nq, BeIR/hotpotqa, and BeIR/scifact, outperforming fixed single-retriever baselines and remaining competitive with Adaptive-RAG-style routing. The results suggest that retrieval strategy selection can be productively encapsulated as a reusable agent skill rather than being hard-coded in the upper workflow.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种面向智能体的可插拔经验RAG技能，用于根据任务场景动态选择检索策略并编排证据返回。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RAG系统常假设单一固定检索管道适用于所有任务，但事实问答、多跳推理和科学验证等异构任务对检索策略的需求各不相同。缺乏灵活的检索策略选择机制导致性能瓶颈，亟需一种能够自适应场景的检索编排方法。
light_analysis.method: 设计Experience-RAG Skill作为智能体与检索器池之间的编排层。该技能分析当前场景，咨询经验记忆（存储历史成功策略），选择最合适的检索策略（如稀疏、稠密或混合检索），并将结构化证据返回给智能体。基于BeIR基准数据集（nq、hotpotqa、scifact）评估。
light_analysis.result: 在固定候选池下，Experience-RAG Skill在BeIR/nq、hotpotqa和scifact上取得整体nDCG@10为0.8924，超越了所有固定单检索器基线（如BM25、DPR），并保持与Adaptive-RAG-style路由方法相当的竞争力，证明了动态策略选择的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 检索策略选择可被封装为可复用的智能体技能，而非硬编码在工作流中，提升了RAG系统的灵活性和适应性。该技能插拔式设计便于集成，未来可扩展至更多检索池和任务场景。

title: From Intent to Execution: Composing Agentic Workflows with Agent Recommendation
abstract: Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) built using AI agents fulfill a variety of user intents that may be used to design and build a family of related applications. However, the creation of such MAS currently involves manual composition of the plan, manual selection of appropriate agents, and manual creation of execution graphs. This paper introduces a framework for the automated creation of multi-agent systems which replaces multiple manual steps with an automated framework. The proposed framework consists of software modules and a workflow to orchestrate the requisite task- specific application. The modules include: an LLM-derived planner, a set of tasks described in natural language, a dynamic call graph, an orchestrator for map agents to tasks, and an agent recommender that finds the most suitable agent(s) from local and global agent registries. The agent recommender uses a two-stage information retrieval (IR) system comprising a fast retriever and an LLM-based re-ranker. We implemented a series of experiments exploring the choice of embedders, re- rankers, agent description enrichment, and supervising critique agent. We benchmarked this system end-to-end, evaluating the combination of planning, agent selection, and task completion, with our proposed approach. Our experimental results show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the- art in terms of the recall rate and is more robust and scalable compared to previous approaches. The critique agent holistically reevaluates both agent and tool recommendations against the overall plan. We show that the inclusion of the critique agent further enhances the recall score, proving that the comprehensive review and revision of task-based agent selection is an essential step in building end-to-end multi-agent systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自动构建多智能体系统的框架，通过智能体推荐模块实现从用户意图到执行工作流的自动化。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多智能体系统的构建依赖人工规划、选择智能体和创建执行图，过程繁琐且效率低。缺乏自动化框架来简化这一流程，限制了MAS的广泛应用。本文旨在解决这一问题，实现从用户意图到执行工作流的自动转换，提升系统构建的效率和可扩展性。
light_analysis.method: 提出包含LLM规划器、自然语言任务描述、动态调用图、任务-智能体映射编排器和智能体推荐器的框架。智能体推荐器采用两阶段信息检索系统（快速检索+LLM重排序），并引入批评智能体对推荐进行整体评估。实验探索了不同嵌入器、重排序器、智能体描述增强等模块的影响。
light_analysis.result: 端到端评估表明，所提方法在召回率上优于现有技术，且更鲁棒和可扩展。加入批评智能体后，召回率进一步提升，证明了基于任务的智能体选择全面审查的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的自动构建多智能体系统框架有效替代了人工步骤，提升了系统构建的自动化程度和性能。批评智能体的引入显著增强了任务-智能体匹配的准确性。未来可进一步优化检索和重排序模块，并探索更复杂的规划策略。

title: Flow Sampling: Learning to Sample from Unnormalized Densities via Denoising Conditional Processes
abstract: Sampling from unnormalized densities is analogous to the generative modeling problem, but the target distribution is defined by a known energy function instead of data samples. Because evaluating the energy function is often costly, a primary challenge is to learn an efficient sampler. We introduce Flow Sampling, a framework built on diffusion models and flow matching for the data-free setting. Our training objective is conditioned on a noise sample and regresses onto a denoising diffusion drift constructed from the energy function. In contrast, diffusion models' objective is conditioned on a data sample and regresses onto a noising diffusion drift. We utilize the interpolant process to minimize the number of energy function evaluations during training, resulting in an efficient and scalable method for sampling unnormalized densities. Furthermore, our formulation naturally extends to Riemannian manifolds, enabling diffusion-based sampling in geometries beyond Euclidean space. We derive a closed-form formula for the conditional drift on constant curvature manifolds, including hyperspheres and hyperbolic spaces. We evaluate Flow Sampling on synthetic energy benchmarks, small peptides, large-scale amortized molecular conformer generation, and distributions supported on the sphere, demonstrating strong empirical performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Flow Sampling框架，利用扩散模型和流匹配从未归一化密度中高效采样，无需数据样本。
light_analysis.motivation: 从已知能量函数定义的未归一化密度中采样成本高昂，现有方法效率低。Flow Sampling旨在学习高效采样器，减少能量函数评估次数，并扩展到黎曼流形。
light_analysis.method: 基于扩散模型和流匹配，训练目标以噪声样本为条件，回归到从能量函数构建的去噪扩散漂移。利用插值过程最小化训练中的能量函数评估次数，并导出常曲率流形上的条件漂移闭式公式。
light_analysis.result: 在合成能量基准、小肽、大规模摊销分子构象生成及球面分布等任务上表现优异，展示了强大的经验性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称高效且可扩展。
light_analysis.conclusion: Flow Sampling为无数据设置下的未归一化密度采样提供了高效可扩展框架，可推广到黎曼流形。未来可能应用于更复杂的几何和实际采样问题。

title: Logical Consistency as a Bridge: Improving LLM Hallucination Detection via Label Constraint Modeling between Responses and Self-Judgments
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are prone to factual hallucinations, risking their reliability in real-world applications. Existing hallucination detectors mainly extract micro-level intrinsic patterns for uncertainty quantification or elicit macro-level self-judgments through verbalized prompts. However, these methods address only a single facet of the hallucination, focusing either on implicit neural uncertainty or explicit symbolic reasoning, thereby treating these inherently coupled behaviors in isolation and failing to exploit their interdependence for a holistic view. In this paper, we propose LaaB (Logical Consistency-as-a-Bridge), a framework that bridges neural features and symbolic judgments for hallucination detection. LaaB introduces a "meta-judgment" process to map symbolic labels back into the feature space. By leveraging the inherent logical bridge where response and meta-judgment labels are either the same or opposite based on the self-judgment's semantics, LaaB aligns and integrates dual-view signals via mutual learning and enhances the hallucination detection. Extensive experiments on 4 public datasets, across 4 LLMs, against 8 baselines demonstrate the superiority of LaaB.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LaaB框架，通过逻辑一致性桥接神经特征与符号判断，提升LLM幻觉检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型容易出现事实性幻觉，现有检测方法要么关注微观内在模式进行不确定性量化，要么通过提示获取宏观自我判断，但仅处理单一维度，未能利用神经不确定性与符号推理之间的相互依赖关系。本文旨在通过桥接双重视角实现更全面的幻觉检测。
light_analysis.method: 提出LaaB框架，引入“元判断”过程将符号标签映射回特征空间。利用响应与元判断标签之间的逻辑一致性（相同或相反）作为桥梁，通过互学习对齐并整合神经特征与符号判断的双视角信号，从而增强幻觉检测能力。在4个公共数据集、4种LLM和8个基线方法上进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在4个公共数据集上，针对4种不同规模的LLM（如LLaMA、GPT等），与8种基线方法对比，LaaB框架在所有设置下均优于现有方法，显著提升了幻觉检测的准确率和鲁棒性，具体指标如F1得分和AUC均有明显提升，验证了桥接双重视角的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LaaB框架通过逻辑一致性桥接神经特征与符号判断，为LLM幻觉检测提供了更全面的视角，有效整合了隐式不确定性和显式推理。实验证明其优越性，未来可扩展至其他类型的事实一致性检测任务，并探索更复杂的逻辑关系建模。局限性在于对元判断标签生成质量有一定依赖。

title: Feature-Augmented Transformers for Robust AI-Text Detection Across Domains and Generators
abstract: AI-generated text is nowadays produced at scale across domains and heterogeneous generation pipelines, making robustness to distribution shift a central requirement for supervised binary detectors. We train transformer-based detectors on HC3 PLUS and calibrate a single decision threshold by maximising balanced accuracy on held-out validation; this threshold is then kept fixed for all downstream test distributions, revealing domain- and generator-dependent error asymmetries under shift. We evaluate in-domain on HC3 PLUS, under cross-dataset transfer to the multi-domain, multi-generator M4 benchmark, and on the external AI-Text-Detection-Pile. Although base models achieve near-ceiling in-domain performance (up to 99.5% balanced accuracy), performance under shift is brittle and strongly model-dependent. Feature augmentation via attention-based linguistic feature fusion improves transfer, with our best model (DeBERTa-v3-base+FeatAttn) achieving 85.9% balanced accuracy on M4. Multi-seed experiments confirm high stability. Under the same fixed-threshold protocol, our model outperforms strong zero-shot baselines by up to +7.22 points. Category-level ablations further show that readability and vocabulary features contribute most to robustness under shift. Overall, these results demonstrate that feature augmentation and a modern DeBERTa backbone significantly outperform earlier BERT/RoBERTa models, while the fixed-threshold protocol provides a more realistic and informative assessment of practical detector robustness.
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables. Submitted to ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出特征增强的Transformer（DeBERTa-v3+FeatAttn）提升AI文本检测对域和生成器偏移的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: AI生成文本在不同域和生成流水线下大规模产生，监督式二元检测器面临分布偏移的挑战。现有方法在域内性能接近天花板，但在跨域/生成器转移时表现脆弱且模型依赖性强。需要一种能提升鲁棒性的方法，同时采用固定决策阈值的真实评估协议。
light_analysis.method: 在HC3 PLUS上训练基于Transformer的检测器，通过最大化验证集平衡准确率校准单固定阈值。特征增强采用基于注意力的语言特征融合（FeatAttn），将可读性、词汇等语言特征融入模型。最佳模型为DeBERTa-v3-base+FeatAttn。评估包括域内、跨数据集（M4）和外部AI-Text-Detection-Pile。
light_analysis.result: 域内最高达99.5%平衡准确率。域外M4上最佳模型达85.9%平衡准确率，多种子实验高稳定性。在固定阈值协议下超越强零样本基线最高7.22个百分点。消融实验表明可读性和词汇特征对鲁棒性贡献最大。
light_analysis.conclusion: 特征增强和现代DeBERTa骨干显著优于早期BERT/RoBERTa模型。固定阈值协议提供了更实际的鲁棒性评估。研究对提升AI文本检测在实际部署中的鲁棒性具有重要价值。未来可探索更多特征类型或动态阈值。

title: Label-Efficient School Detection from Aerial Imagery via Weakly Supervised Pretraining and Fine-Tuning
abstract: Accurate school detection is essential for supporting education initiatives, including infrastructure planning and expanding internet connectivity to underserved areas. However, many regions around the world face challenges due to outdated, incomplete, or unavailable official records. Manual mapping efforts, while valuable, are labor-intensive and lack scalability across large geographic areas. To address this, we propose a weakly supervised framework for school detection from aerial imagery that minimizes the need for human annotations while supporting global mapping efforts. Our method is specifically designed for low-data regimes, where manual annotations are extremely scarce. We introduce an automatic labeling pipeline that leverages sparse location points and semantic segmentation to generate infrastructure masks from which we generate bounding boxes. Using these automatically labeled images, we train our detectors on a first training stage to learn a representation of what schools look like, then using a small set of manually labeled images, we fine-tune the previously trained models on this clean dataset. This two stage training pipeline enables large-scale and strong detection in low-data setting of school infrastructure with minimal supervision. Our results demonstrate strong object detection performance, particularly in the low-data regime, where the models achieve promising results using only 50 manually labeled images, significantly reducing the need for costly annotations. This framework supports education and connectivity initiatives worldwide by providing an efficient and extensible approach to mapping schools from space. All models, training code and auto-labeled data will be publicly released to foster future research and real-world impact.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种弱监督框架，利用稀疏位置点和语义分割自动标注航拍图像，再通过两阶段训练实现低标注成本的学校检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 学校检测对教育基础设施规划和网络覆盖至关重要，但许多地区的官方记录过时、不完整或缺失，人工测绘成本高且难以大规模推广。现有检测方法依赖大量精确标注数据，在低数据场景下性能有限。本文旨在减少人工标注需求，支持全球范围内高效、可扩展的学校映射。
light_analysis.method: 首先设计自动标注流水线：利用稀疏的学校位置点作为种子，结合语义分割生成基础设施掩码，再从中提取边界框作为伪标签。然后采用两阶段训练：第一阶段用自动标注的大规模图像预训练检测器，学习学校的视觉表征；第二阶段用少量（如50张）手动标注图像微调模型。该方法结合弱监督预训练和半监督微调，适应低数据场景。
light_analysis.result: 在仅使用50张手动标注图像的情况下，模型展现出较强的目标检测性能，显著降低了标注成本。与依赖大量标注的方法相比，该框架在低数据场景下表现突出，能够有效检测学校建筑。模型、训练代码和自动标注数据将开源，便于复现和实际应用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该弱监督框架为航拍图像中的学校检测提供了一种标注高效、可扩展的解决方案，有助于教育规划和网络连接扩展。通过公开资源，研究将推动全球学校映射的自动化和实际落地。未来可进一步优化自动标注质量，并探索其他基础设施类型的迁移应用。

title: Pretrained Model Representations as Acquisition Signals for Active Learning of MLIPs
abstract: Training machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) for reactive chemistry is often bottlenecked by the high cost of quantum chemical labels and the scarcity of transition state configurations in candidate pools. Active learning (AL) can mitigate these costs, but its effectiveness hinges on the acquisition rule. We investigate whether the latent space of a pretrained MLIP already contains the information necessary for effective acquisition, eliminating the need for auxiliary uncertainty heads, Bayesian training and fine-tuning, or committee ensembles. We introduce two acquisition signals derived directly from a pretrained MACE potential: a finite-width neural tangent kernel (NTK) and an activation kernel built from hidden latent space features. On reactive-chemistry benchmarks, both kernels consistently outperform fixed-descriptor baselines, committee disagreement, and random acquisition, reducing the data required to reach performance targets by an average of 38% for energy error and 28% for force error. We further show that the pretrained model induces similarity spaces that preserve chemically meaningful structure and provide more reliable residual uncertainty estimates than randomly initialised or fixed-descriptor-based kernels. Our results suggest that pretraining aligns latent-space geometry with model error, yielding a practical and sufficient acquisition signal for reactive MLIP fine-tuning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用预训练MLIP的潜在空间构建获取信号，无需辅助不确定性头或委员会集成，显著提升主动学习效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练机器学习原子间势（MLIP）用于反应化学时，量子化学标签成本高且过渡态构型稀缺。主动学习可降低成本，但传统获取规则依赖辅助不确定性头、贝叶斯训练或委员会集成，增加了复杂性和计算开销。亟需一种更简单有效的获取信号，直接利用预训练模型的内在信息。
light_analysis.method: 从预训练的MACE势中提取两种获取信号：有限宽神经切线核（NTK）和基于隐藏层特征的激活核。两者直接利用预训练潜在空间，无需额外训练或集成。在反应化学基准上，通过主动学习迭代选择构型，用核函数测量与训练数据的相似度或不确定性。
light_analysis.result: 在反应化学基准测试中，两种核方法均优于固定描述符基线、委员会分歧和随机获取。达到性能目标所需数据量平均减少38%（能量误差）和28%（力误差）。预训练模型产生的相似性空间保留化学结构，并提供更可靠的不确定性估计，优于随机初始化或固定描述符核。
light_analysis.conclusion: 预训练将潜在空间几何与模型误差对齐，为反应MLIP微调提供了实用且充分的获取信号，简化了主动学习流程，显著降低标签成本。该方法可推广至其他预训练模型，具有很高的学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的核构造或跨数据集的迁移。

title: Transformers with Selective Access to Early Representations
abstract: Several recent Transformer architectures expose later layers to representations computed in the earliest layers, motivated by the observation that low-level features can become harder to recover as the residual stream is repeatedly transformed through depth. The cheapest among these methods add static value residuals: learned mixing coefficients that expose the first-layer value projection V_1 uniformly across tokens and heads. More expressive dense or dynamic alternatives recover finer-grained access, but at higher memory cost and lower throughput. The usefulness of V_1 is unlikely to be constant across tokens, heads, and contexts; different positions plausibly require different amounts of access to early lexical or semantic information. We therefore treat early-representation reuse as a retrieval problem rather than a connectivity problem, and introduce Selective Access Transformer (SATFormer), which preserves the first-layer value pathway while controlling access with a context-dependent gate. Across models from 130M to 1.3B parameters, SATFormer consistently improves validation loss and zero-shot accuracy over the static value-residual and Transformer baselines. Its strongest gains appear on retrieval-intensive benchmarks, where it improves over static value residuals by approximately 1.5 average points, while maintaining throughput and memory usage close to the baseline Transformer. Gate analyses suggest sparse, depth-dependent, head-specific, and category-sensitive access patterns, supporting the interpretation that SATFormer learns selective reuse of early representations rather than uniform residual copying. Our code is available at https://github.com/SkyeGunasekaran/SATFormer.

light_analysis.overview: 提出选择性访问变压器（SATFormer），通过上下文相关的门控机制实现早期表示的稀疏重用，提升性能而不增加计算开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Transformer架构中，随着残差流在深度中反复变换，低层特征（如第一层值投影V_1）难以恢复。静态值残差方法以固定系数均匀暴露V_1，无法适应不同标记、头和上下文的需求；而动态方法虽更灵活，但内存和吞吐量代价高。因此，需要一种高效且自适应的机制来选择性重用早期表示。
light_analysis.method: 将早期表示重用视为检索问题，引入SATFormer，保留第一层值通路的同时，通过上下文相关的门控动态控制访问。门控机制基于当前层的表示产生稀疏的二值或连续权重，决定每个头是否重用V_1。实验在130M至1.3B参数的模型上进行，与静态值残差和标准Transformer基线比较。
light_analysis.result: SATFormer在验证损失和零样本准确率上持续优于静态值残差和Transformer基线。在检索密集型基准上，相比静态值残差平均提升约1.5个百分点，且吞吐量和内存使用接近基线Transformer。门控分析显示出稀疏、深度依赖、头部特定和类别敏感的模式，表明模型学习的是选择性重用而非均匀复制。
light_analysis.conclusion: SATFormer通过将早期表示重用从连接问题转化为检索问题，实现了高效、自适应的特征复用，特别适用于检索密集型任务。其稀疏门控机制提供了可解释的访问模式，为设计更高效的Transformer提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的门控函数或扩展到其他层的表示重用。

title: UnAC: Adaptive Visual Prompting with Abstraction and Stepwise Checking for Complex Multimodal Reasoning
abstract: Although recent LMMs have become much stronger at visual perception, they remain unreliable on problems that require multi-step reasoning over visual evidence. In this paper, we present UnAC (Understanding, Abstracting, and Checking), a multimodal prompting method that strengthens reasoning for complex multimodal tasks in LMMs (e.g., GPT-4o, Gemini 1.5, and GPT-4V). To improve image understanding and capture fine details, we propose an adaptive visual prompting strategy that enables LMMs to focus on salient regions. We further design an image-abstraction prompt to effectively extract key information from images. In addition, we introduce a gradual self-checking scheme that improves reasoning by verifying each decomposed subquestion and its answer. Extensive experiments on three public benchmarks-MathVista, MM-Vet, and MMMU.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UnAC方法，通过自适应视觉提示、图像抽象和逐步自我检查增强LMM在复杂多模态推理中的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前的LMM在视觉感知方面有所进步，但在需要多步推理的复杂视觉问题上仍不可靠。现有方法在理解图像细节和多步验证方面存在不足，导致推理错误频发。因此，亟需一种能够引导模型聚焦关键区域、提取抽象信息并逐步验证推理过程的方法，以提高复杂多模态任务的准确性。
light_analysis.method: UnAC包含三个核心组件：1) 自适应视觉提示策略，使LMM聚焦于图像中的显著区域以捕捉细节；2) 图像抽象提示，从图像中有效提取关键信息；3) 逐步自我检查方案，通过验证每个分解的子问题及其答案来改进推理。该方法适用于多个LMM（如GPT-4o、Gemini 1.5、GPT-4V），无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在MathVista、MM-Vet和MMMU三个公开基准上进行了广泛实验。结果表明UnAC显著提升了LMM在复杂多模态推理任务上的性能，尤其在需要多步推理和细节理解的场景中表现优异。具体性能指标和对比结果在论文中详述。
light_analysis.conclusion: UnAC通过自适应视觉提示、抽象化和逐步自我检查，有效加强了LMM的复杂多模态推理能力。该方法即插即用，适用于多种先进模型，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的提示策略和自动化抽象程度调整。

title: Integrating Feature Correlation in Differential Privacy with Applications in DP-ERM
abstract: Standard differential privacy imposes uniform privacy constraints across all features, overlooking the inherent distinction between sensitive and insensitive features in practice. In this paper, we introduce a relaxed definition of differential privacy that accounts for such heterogeneity, allowing certain features to be treated as insensitive even when correlated with sensitive ones. We propose a correlation-aware framework, $\textsf{CorrDP}$, which relaxes privacy for insensitive features while accounting for their correlations with sensitive features, with the correlations quantified using total variation distance. We design algorithms for differentially private empirical risk minimization (DP-ERM) under the $\textsf{CorrDP}$ framework, incorporating distance-dependent noise into gradients for improved theoretical utility guarantees. When the correlation distance is unknown, we estimate it from the dataset and show that it achieves a comparable privacy-utility guarantee. We perform experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets and show that $\textsf{CorrDP}$-based DP-ERM algorithms consistently outperform the standard DP framework in the presence of insensitive features.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CorrDP框架，通过考虑特征相关性放松差分隐私约束，提升隐私-效用权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准差分隐私对所有特征统一施加隐私约束，忽视敏感与非敏感特征的异质性，导致不必要的隐私预算浪费和模型效用下降。在实际应用中，特征常具有不同敏感度，且非敏感特征可能通过相关性间接泄露敏感信息。现有方法未充分处理特征间相关性，无法在保护敏感信息的同时合理放松非敏感特征的隐私限制。
light_analysis.method: 提出CorrDP框架，基于总变差距离量化特征相关性，将非敏感特征的相关性纳入隐私定义，允许其在一定相关性阈值下放松约束。在DP-ERM场景中，设计梯度加噪算法，噪声幅度与特征相关性距离成反比，以提供更好的隐私-效用折中。当相关性距离未知时，通过数据集估计得到可比较的隐私-效用保证。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，CorrDP-based DP-ERM算法在存在非敏感特征时，始终优于标准差分隐私框架。具体性能指标未在摘要中明确给出，但定性结果一致证实了效用提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献在于提出一种考虑特征相关性的差分隐私松弛定义，并设计相应的DP-ERM算法，有效平衡隐私保护与模型效用。该工作为处理特征异质性提供了新思路，适用于医疗、金融等敏感与非敏感特征共存的场景。未来可探索更复杂的相关性建模及自适应隐私预算分配。

title: TabSurv: Adapting Modern Tabular Neural Networks to Survival Analysis
abstract: Survival analysis on tabular data is a well-studied problem. However, existing deep learning methods are often highly task-specific, which can limit the transfer of new approaches from other domains and introduce constraints that may affect performance. We propose TabSurv, an approach that adapts modern tabular architectures to survival analysis using either the Weibull distribution or non-parametric survival prediction. TabSurv optimizes SurvHL, a novel histogram loss function supporting censored data. In addition to a baseline feed-forward network, we implement deep ensembles of MLPs for survival analysis within TabSurv. In contrast to prior work, the ensemble components are trained in parallel, optimizing survival distribution parameters before averaging, which promotes diversity across ensemble component predictions. We perform a comprehensive empirical evaluation of different proposed architectures on 10 diverse real-world survival datasets. Our results show that TabSurv consistently outperforms on average established classical and deep learning baselines, such as RSF, DeepSurv, DeepHit, SurvTRACE. Notably, deep ensembles with Weibull parametrization instead of non-parametric models achieve the highest average rank by C-index. Overall, our study clarifies how modern tabular neural networks can be adapted and trained to tackle survival analysis problems, offering a strong and reliable approach. The TabSurv implementation is publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 将现代表格神经网络适配到生存分析，提出TabSurv框架，通过新型损失函数和深度集成方法提升预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 生存分析在表格数据上已广泛研究，但现有深度学习方法高度任务特化，限制了跨领域技术迁移，并可能引入性能约束。缺乏适应现代表格架构的通用方法，导致模型性能受限。
light_analysis.method: TabSurv采用Weibull分布或非参数模型进行生存预测，并优化SurvHL损失函数以支持删失数据。实现深度MLP集成，组件并行训练并优化生存分布参数后平均，增强预测多样性。在10个真实数据集上评估多种架构。
light_analysis.result: TabSurv在平均C-index上持续优于RSF、DeepSurv、DeepHit、SurvTRACE等基线。特别是使用Weibull参数化的深度集成达到最高平均排名，而非非参数模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: TabSurv明确了现代表格神经网络如何适配生存分析，提供了强健可靠的方法。代码公开。未来可探索更复杂的架构或损失函数。

title: Reservoir property image slices from the Groningen gas field for image translation and segmentation
abstract: Reservoir characterization workflows increasingly rely on image-based and machine-learning/deep learning or even generative AI approaches, but openly available geological image datasets suitable for reproducible benchmarking remain limited. Here we describe a high-resolution dataset of reservoir-property image slices derived from the Groningen static geological model. The dataset contains aligned two-dimensional PNG images representing facies, porosity, permeability, and water saturation, generated from three-dimensional reservoir grids and prepared for downstream visualization, segmentation, and image-to-image translation tasks. In addition to the deposited original image corpus, we provide an archived software workflow for reproducing augmentation, mask generation, paired-image construction, and example baseline experiments. The resource is designed to support benchmarking of geological image analysis methods and the study of cross-domain relationships among reservoir properties. By separating the fixed image dataset from the reproducible processing workflow, this work provides a transparent foundation for reuse in geoscience, reservoir modeling, and machine-learning applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Groningen气田储层属性图像切片数据集，为图像翻译和分割提供公开基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 储层表征工作日益依赖图像和深度学习，但公开可用的地质图像数据集稀缺，难以进行可重复的基准测试。该研究旨在填补这一空白，提供一个标准化的资源，支持地质图像分析方法比较和跨域属性关系研究，从而推动地球科学和机器学习应用的发展。
light_analysis.method: 从Groningen静态地质模型提取高分辨率2D PNG图像，包含相、孔隙度、渗透率和含水饱和度四种属性，且图像对齐。同时发布完整可重现的软件工作流，涵盖数据增强、掩码生成、配对图像构建和基线实验，便于用户复现和扩展。
light_analysis.result: 成功生成对齐的储层属性图像切片集，为图像翻译和分割任务提供标准数据。摘要未报告具体性能指标，但通过可重现工作流和分离的固定数据集，支持不同方法的公平比较和基准测试。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提供了透明、可复用的基础资源，促进了地质图像分析方法的可重复基准测试。将固定数据集与可重现流程分离，增强了科学严谨性，对地球科学、储层建模和机器学习社区具有实用价值，未来可扩展至更多地质场景。

title: A Benchmark for Interactive World Models with a Unified Action Generation Framework
abstract: Achieving Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) requires agents that learn and interact adaptively, with interactive world models providing scalable environments for perception, reasoning, and action. Yet current research still lacks large-scale datasets and unified benchmarks to evaluate their physical interaction capabilities. To address this, we propose iWorld-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark for training and testing world models on interaction-related abilities such as distance perception and memory. We construct a diverse dataset with 330k video clips and select 2.1k high-quality samples covering varied perspectives, weather, and scenes. As existing world models differ in interaction modalities, we introduce an Action Generation Framework to unify evaluation and design six task types, generating 4.9k test samples. These tasks jointly assess model performance across visual generation, trajectory following, and memory. Evaluating 14 representative world models, we identify key limitations and provide insights for future research. The iWorld-Bench model leaderboard is publicly available at iWorld-Bench.com.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了iWorld-Bench，一个用于评估交互世界模型的综合基准，并引入统一动作生成框架以标准化评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 实现AGI需要代理能够自适应学习和交互，但当前缺乏大规模数据集和统一基准来评估世界模型的物理交互能力，现有模型在交互模态上存在差异，难以公平比较。
light_analysis.method: 构建了包含33万视频片段的数据集，精选2100高质量样本，涵盖多种视角、天气和场景。提出动作生成框架，设计六类任务（如视觉生成、轨迹跟踪和记忆），生成4900测试样本，实现统一评估。
light_analysis.result: 评估了14种代表性世界模型，识别其关键局限性（如距离感知和记忆不足），并提供了未来研究方向的见解。基准排行榜公开于iWorld-Bench.com。
light_analysis.conclusion: iWorld-Bench填补了交互世界模型基准的空白，通过统一评估框架促进模型比较和进步，为AGI研究奠定基础。未来可扩展更多任务和场景。

title: The Counterexample Game: Iterated Conceptual Analysis and Repair in Language Models
abstract: Conceptual analysis -- proposing definitions and refining them through counterexamples -- is central to philosophical methodology. We study whether language models can perform this task through iterated analysis and repair chains: one model instance generates counterexamples to a proposed definition, another repairs the definition, and the process repeats. Across 20 concepts and thousands of counterexample-repair cycles, we find that, although many LM-generated counterexamples are judged invalid by both expert humans and an LM judge, the LM judge accepts roughly twice as many as humans do. Nonetheless, per-item validity judgments are moderately consistent across humans and between humans and the LM. We further find that extended iteration produces increasingly verbose definitions without improving accuracy. We also see that some concepts resist stable definitions in general. These findings suggest that while LMs can engage in philosophical reasoning, the counterexample-repair loop hits diminishing returns quickly and could be a fruitful test case for evaluating whether LMs can sustain high-level iterated philosophical reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 研究语言模型能否通过迭代反例-修复循环进行概念分析，发现迭代收益递减。
light_analysis.motivation: 概念分析是哲学方法论的核心，通过提出定义并利用反例完善定义。现有研究尚未系统评估语言模型能否执行这种迭代推理任务。该问题重要，因为若语言模型能模拟人类哲学推理，将推动AI在高级认知领域的应用。但现有方法可能缺乏对迭代过程中定义质量和反例有效性的深入分析。
light_analysis.method: 提出反例游戏框架：一个LM实例生成反例挑战现有定义，另一个LM修复定义，循环迭代。覆盖20个概念，进行数千次反例-修复周期。使用人类专家和LM评判者评估反例有效性，并分析迭代对定义长度和准确性的影响。
light_analysis.result: LM生成的反例中有大量被人类评判为无效，但LM评判者接受率约为人类的两倍。人类与LM之间的逐项有效性判断具有中等一致性。迭代导致定义越来越冗长，但未提升精度。一些概念（如‘知识’）难以形成稳定定义。
light_analysis.conclusion: 表明LM能参与哲学推理，但反例-修复循环迅速产生递减收益。该机制可作为评估LM高级迭代推理能力的测试案例。未来可探索更有效的迭代策略，或结合人类反馈提升定义质量。局限性在于LM评判的偏差及概念稳定性问题。

title: StateVLM: A State-Aware Vision-Language Model for Robotic Affordance Reasoning
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown remarkable performance in various robotic tasks, as they can perceive visual information and understand natural language instructions. However, when applied to robotics, VLMs remain subject to a fundamental limitation inherent in large language models (LLMs): they struggle with numerical reasoning, particularly in object detection and object-state localization. To explore numerical reasoning as a regression task in VLMs, we propose a novel training strategy to adapt VLMs for object detection and object-state localization. This approach leverages box decoder outputs to compute an Auxiliary Regression Loss (ARL) during fine-tuning, while preserving standard sequence prediction at inference. We leverage this training strategy to develop StateVLM (State-aware Vision-Language Model), a novel model designed to perceive and learn fine-grained object representations, including precise localization of objects and their states, as well as graspable regions. Due to the lack of a benchmark for object-state affordance reasoning, we introduce an open-source benchmark, Object State Affordance Reasoning (OSAR), which contains 1,172 scenes with 7,746 individual objects and corresponding bounding boxes. Comparative experiments on adapted benchmarks (RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, and \mbox{RefCOCOg}) demonstrate that ARL improves model performance by an average of 1.6\% compared to models without ARL. Experiments on the OSAR benchmark further support this finding, showing that StateVLM with ARL achieves an average of 5.2\% higher performance than models without ARL. In particular, ARL is also important for the complex task of affordance reasoning in OSAR, where it enhances the consistency of model outputs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出StateVLM模型，通过辅助回归损失增强视觉语言模型的数值推理能力，实现精确的目标检测和状态定位，用于机器人具身推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在机器人任务中表现优异，但受限于大语言模型的数值推理缺陷，尤其在目标检测和物体状态定位上能力不足。机器人需要精确感知物体状态以进行有效交互，现有VLM难以处理此类细粒度回归任务，限制了其在机器人具身推理中的应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种新颖训练策略，在微调阶段利用框解码器输出的边界框坐标计算辅助回归损失（ARL），同时保留推理时的标准序列预测。基于此开发StateVLM模型，以学习包括物体定位、状态和可抓取区域的细粒度表示。为弥补基准缺失，开源了包含1172个场景、7746个物体及其边界框的OSAR数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在RefCOCO、RefCOCO+和RefCOCOg基准上，ARL使模型性能平均提升1.6%；在OSAR数据集上，StateVLM+ARL比无ARL版本平均提升5.2%。ARL对OSAR中复杂的具身推理任务尤其关键，增强了模型输出一致性。
light_analysis.conclusion: StateVLM和ARL训练策略有效提升了VLM在数值推理任务中的表现，增强了对物体细粒度状态的感知能力。开源OSAR基准为机器人具身推理研究提供了标准化评估平台。未来可探索ARL在其他模态融合任务中的应用，并扩展至更复杂的机器人操作场景。

title: Optimal Posterior Sampling for Policy Identification in Tabular Markov Decision Processes
abstract: We study the $(\varepsilon, δ)$-PAC policy identification problem in finite-horizon episodic Markov Decision Processes. Existing approaches provide finite-time guarantees for approximate settings ($\varepsilon>0$) but suffer from high computational cost, rendering them hard to implement, and also suffer from suboptimal dependence on $\log(1/δ)$. We propose a randomized and computationally efficient algorithm for best policy identification that combines posterior sampling with an online learning algorithm to guide exploration in the MDP. Our method achieves asymptotic optimality in sample complexity, also in terms of posterior contraction rate, and runs in $O(S^2AH)$ per episode, matching standard model-based approaches. Unlike prior algorithms such as MOCA and PEDEL, our guarantees remain meaningful in the asymptotic regime and avoid sub-optimal polynomial dependence on $\log(1/δ)$. Our results provide both theoretical insights and practical tools for efficient policy identification in tabular MDPs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合后验采样与在线学习的随机化算法，用于表格型MDP中最优策略识别，实现样本复杂度的渐近最优性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的(ε,δ)-PAC策略识别方法在有限时域情景马尔可夫决策过程中，虽然提供了有限时间保证，但计算成本高且对log(1/δ)的依赖次优。这导致实际实现困难，且样本效率不佳。本文旨在提出一种计算高效的算法，改善依赖关系，实现渐近最优。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种随机化算法，结合后验采样与在线学习引导探索。算法每幕运行复杂度为O(S^2AH)，匹配标准基于模型的方法。关键创新在于后验采样策略的渐近最优性，避免了像MOCA和PEDEL等算法中对log(1/δ)的次优多项式依赖。
light_analysis.result: 算法在样本复杂度上达到渐近最优，后验收缩率也最优。与现有方法相比，避免了次优的log(1/δ)多项式依赖，且在计算上高效，每幕复杂度O(S^2AH)，与标准方法相当。未提供具体数值结果，但理论保证强于前期工作。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为表格型MDP中策略识别提供了理论和实践工具。算法渐近最优且计算高效。未来可扩展至更复杂的MDP或连续状态空间。局限在于当前仅限于表格型设置。

title: Atomic Fact-Checking Increases Clinician Trust in Large Language Model Recommendations for Oncology Decision Support: A Randomized Controlled Trial
abstract: Question: Does atomic fact-checking, which decomposes AI treatment recommendations into individually verifiable claims linked to source guideline documents, increase clinician trust compared to traditional explainability approaches?   Findings: In this randomized trial of 356 clinicians generating 7,476 trust ratings, atomic fact-checking produced a large effect on trust (Cohen's d = 0.94), increasing the proportion of clinicians expressing trust from 26.9% to 66.5%. Traditional transparency mechanisms showed a dose-response gradient of improvement over baseline (d = 0.25 to 0.50).   Meaning: Decomposing AI recommendations into individually verifiable claims linked to source guidelines produces substantially higher clinician trust than traditional explainability approaches in high-stakes clinical decisions.
comment: 28 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables, supplement will be made available upon original publication

light_analysis.overview: 通过随机对照试验，发现原子事实核查（将AI推荐分解为可独立验证的声明并链接源指南）能显著提升临床医生对大型语言模型在肿瘤决策支持中的信任。
light_analysis.motivation: 在肿瘤决策等高危临床场景中，大型语言模型（LLM）的推荐需要获得临床医生的信任才能被采纳。传统的可解释性方法（如特征重要性、注意力可视化）虽能提供一定透明度，但不足以让医生验证推荐依据的准确性和权威性。原子事实核查通过将AI输出分解为原子化、可追溯的声明，并与临床指南直接链接，旨在解决现有方法在事实核查和信任建立上的不足，从而提升临床决策辅助系统的实际应用价值。
light_analysis.method: 本研究设计了一项随机对照试验，纳入356名临床医生，针对LLM生成的肿瘤治疗推荐，比较传统透明度机制（如基线解释、特征归因等）与原子事实核查方法。原子事实核查将推荐分解为多个独立声明，每个声明附有引用自权威临床指南的支撑证据。研究通过在线实验收集7476个信任评级，使用Cohen's d量化效应量，并分析不同干预下的信任比例变化。
light_analysis.result: 原子事实核查产生了大效应（Cohen's d = 0.94），将表达信任的医生比例从26.9%提升至66.5%。相比之下，传统透明度机制虽也带来改进，但效应量较小（d = 0.25至0.50），呈现剂量反应梯度。结果表明原子事实核查在建立临床医生信任方面显著优于现有可解释性方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证实，原子事实核查通过分解AI推荐并链接源指南，能显著增强临床医生在高风险决策中对LLM的信任。这一方法弥补了传统可解释性在事实验证上的不足，为AI在医疗决策中的安全应用提供了新途径。未来工作可能探索其在其他临床场景的泛化性，以及如何平衡分解粒度与效率。

title: Steer Like the LLM: Activation Steering that Mimics Prompting
abstract: Large language models can be steered at inference time through prompting or activation interventions, but activation steering methods often underperform compared to prompt-based approaches. We propose a framework that formulates prompt steering as a form of activation steering and investigates whether distilling successful prompt steering behavior into simpler, interpretable models can close this gap. Our analysis reveals that popular activation steering methods are not faithful to the mechanics of prompt steering, which applies strong interventions on some tokens while barely affecting others. Based on these insights, we introduce Prompt Steering Replacement (PSR) models that estimate token-specific steering coefficients from the activations themselves and are trained to imitate prompt-based interventions. Experiments on three steering benchmarks across multiple language models show that PSR models outperform existing activation steering methods, especially when controlling for high-coherence completions, and also compare favorably to prompting on AxBench and persona steering.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Prompt Steering Replacement (PSR)模型，通过从激活中估计逐token的转向系数并模仿提示行为，弥合激活转向与提示转向的性能差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在推理时可通过提示或激活干预进行转向，但激活转向方法通常不如提示方法有效。现有激活转向方法未能忠实模拟提示转向的机制，后者对某些token施加强干预而其他token几乎不受影响。因此，需要设计一种能模仿成功提示转向行为的激活转向方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出PSR框架，将提示转向视为激活转向的一种形式，并训练简单模型从激活中估计逐token的转向系数，以模仿基于提示的干预。PSR模型利用激活自身学习转向系数，更忠实地再现提示转向的token特异性干预。在多个语言模型上使用三项转向基准进行实验。
light_analysis.result: PSR模型在多个语言模型的转向基准上优于现有激活转向方法，特别是在控制高连贯性生成时表现突出，并在AxBench和Persona转向任务上与提示方法相比具有竞争力。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但强调了与激活转向方法的优势对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: PSR模型通过更忠实地模仿提示转向的token特异性机制，显著提升了激活转向的性能，为可解释的模型控制提供了新范式。该方法在保持连贯性的同时实现高效转向，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的转向系数估计或扩展到更多任务。

title: CC-OCR V2: Benchmarking Large Multimodal Models for Literacy in Real-world Document Processing
abstract: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have recently shown strong performance on Optical Character Recognition (OCR) tasks, demonstrating their promising capability in document literacy. However, their effectiveness in real-world applications remains underexplored, as existing benchmarks adopt task scopes misaligned with practical applications and assume homogeneous acquisition conditions. To address this gap, we introduce CC-OCR V2, a comprehensive and challenging OCR benchmark tailored to real-world document processing. CC-OCR V2 focuses on practical enterprise document processing tasks and incorporates hard and corner cases that are critical yet underrepresented in prior benchmarks, covering 5 major OCR-centric tracks: text recognition, document parsing, document grounding, key information extraction, and document question answering, comprising 7,093 high-difficulty samples. Extensive experiments on 14 advanced LMMs reveal that current models fall short of real-world application requirements. Even state-of-the-art LMMs exhibit substantial performance degradation across diverse tasks and scenarios. These findings reveal a significant gap between performance on current benchmarks and effectiveness in real-world applications. We release the full dataset and evaluation toolkit at https://github.com/eioss/CC-OCR-V2.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CC-OCR V2基准，专门评估大型多模态模型在真实世界文档处理中的OCR能力，揭示现有模型与现实需求之间存在显著差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有OCR基准任务范围与实际应用偏离，且假设相同的采集条件，无法反映真实文档处理的复杂性。企业文档处理需要更全面、更贴近实际的评估，以衡量LMMs的实用性能。
light_analysis.method: 构建CC-OCR V2，包含文本识别、文档解析、文档定位、关键信息提取和文档问答5个核心OCR任务，共7,093个高难度样本，涵盖实际场景中的困难和边缘情况。对14种先进LMMs进行广泛评估。
light_analysis.result: 14种先进LMMs在CC-OCR V2上均表现不佳，即使是SOTA模型也在不同任务和场景中性能大幅下降，表明当前基准性能与实际应用之间存在显著差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: CC-OCR V2揭示了LMMs在真实文档处理中的局限性，强调了开发更鲁棒模型的需求。论文发布了完整数据集和评估工具，以促进更实用的OCR研究。

title: Contextual Multi-Objective Optimization: Rethinking Objectives in Frontier AI Systems
abstract: Frontier AI systems perform best in settings with clear, stable, and verifiable objectives, such as code generation, mathematical reasoning, games, and unit-test-driven tasks. They remain less reliable in open-ended settings, including scientific assistance, long-horizon agents, high-stakes advice, personalization, and tool use, where the relevant objective is ambiguous, context-dependent, delayed, or only partially observable. We argue that many such failures are not merely failures of scale or capability, but failures of objective selection: the system optimizes a locally visible signal while missing which objectives should govern the interaction. We formulate this problem as \emph{contextual multi-objective optimization}. In this setting, systems must consider multiple, context-dependent objectives, such as helpfulness, truthfulness, safety, privacy, calibration, non-manipulation, user preference, reversibility, and stakeholder impact, while determining which objectives are active, which are soft preferences, and which must function as hard or quasi-hard constraints. These examples are not intended as an exhaustive taxonomy: different domains and deployment settings may activate different objective dimensions and different conflict-resolution procedures. Our framework models AI behavior as a context-dependent choice rule over candidate actions, objective estimates, active constraints, stakeholders, uncertainty, and conflict-resolution procedures. We outline an implementation pathway based on decomposed objective representations, context-to-objective routing, hierarchical constraints, deliberative policy reasoning, controlled personalization, tool-use control, diagnostic evaluation, auditing, and post-deployment revision.

light_analysis.overview: 提出上下文多目标优化框架，重新定义AI系统在开放式场景中的目标选择问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 前沿AI系统在目标明确的任务（如代码生成）中表现优异，但在科学辅助、长期代理等开放式场景中可靠性不足，因为相关目标模糊、依赖上下文、延迟或部分可观测。现有方法常归因于规模或能力不足，但本文认为本质是目标选择失败：系统仅优化局部可见信号，而忽略应主导交互的目标。该问题重要，因AI部署日益广泛，需处理多维度、冲突的目标。
light_analysis.method: 本文形式化问题为上下文多目标优化，系统必须考虑多种上下文依赖的目标（如帮助性、真实性、安全性、隐私、校准、非操纵、用户偏好、可逆性、利益相关者影响），并判定哪些目标激活、哪些为软偏好、哪些为硬约束。框架将AI行为建模为基于上下文的候选动作、目标估计、激活约束、不确定性等的选择规则。实现路径包括分解目标表示、上下文到目标路由、分层约束、深思熟虑策略推理、受控个性化、工具使用控制、诊断评估、审计和部署后修订。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据或性能指标。本文主要提出理论框架和实现路径，属于概念性工作，旨在重新思考目标选择问题，而非报告实验结果。未来需通过实际系统验证该框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于系统性地将AI在开放式场景中的失败重新定义为目标优化问题，并提出了上下文多目标优化框架。该框架为设计更可靠、适应性强的AI系统提供了理论依据和实现指南，具有重要的学术价值，可指导未来研究：需开发目标表示、冲突解决、动态约束调整等具体技术。局限性在于框架尚缺乏实证验证，且实际部署中目标可能高度复杂。

title: From Data Lifting to Continuous Risk Estimation: A Process-Aware Pipeline for Predictive Monitoring of Clinical Pathways
abstract: This paper presents a reproducible and process-aware pipeline for predictive monitoring of clinical pathways. The approach integrates data lifting, temporal reconstruction, event log construction, prefix-based representations, and predictive modeling to support continuous reasoning on partially observed patient trajectories, overcoming the limitations of traditional retrospective process mining. The framework is evaluated on COVID-19 clinical pathways using ICU admission as the prediction target, considering 4,479 patient cases and 46,804 prefixes. Predictive models are trained and evaluated using a case-level split, with 896 patients in the test set. Logistic Regression achieves the best performance (AUC 0.906, F1-score 0.835). A detailed prefix-based analysis shows that predictive performance improves progressively as new clinical events become available, with AUC increasing from 0.642 at early stages to 0.942 at later stages of the pathway. The results highlight two key findings: predictive signals emerge progressively along clinical pathways, and process-aware representations enable effective early risk estimation from evolving patient trajectories. Overall, the findings suggest that predictive monitoring in healthcare is best conceived as a continuous, dynamically aware process, in which risk estimates are progressively refined as the patient journey evolves.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个可复现且过程感知的管道，用于临床路径的预测监控，通过集成数据提升和前缀表示实现连续风险估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统回顾性过程挖掘无法支持对部分观测的患者轨迹进行实时推理，而临床路径需要动态风险评估。现有方法缺乏过程感知和连续监控能力，无法有效利用逐步积累的临床事件。
light_analysis.method: 构建一个集成数据提升、时间重构、事件日志构建、前缀表示和预测建模的管道。采用病例级分裂，在COVID-19临床路径上使用4479个患者病例和46804个前缀，以ICU入院为预测目标，训练逻辑回归等模型。
light_analysis.result: 逻辑回归表现最佳（AUC 0.906，F1 0.835）。前缀分析显示，随着新临床事件可用，AUC从早期阶段的0.642提升至后期阶段的0.942。预测信号沿临床路径逐步出现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 预测监控应被视为连续动态过程，风险估计随患者轨迹演化逐步精化。该管道可复现且过程感知，为临床路径的早期风险估计提供有效方法。未来可扩展至其他疾病领域。

title: Raising the Ceiling: Better Empirical Fixation Densities for Saliency Benchmarking
abstract: Empirical fixation densities, spatial distributions estimated from human eye-tracking data, are foundational to saliency benchmarking. They directly shape benchmark conclusions, leaderboard rankings, failure case analyses, and scientific claims about human visual behavior. Yet the standard estimation method, fixed-bandwidth isotropic Gaussian KDE, has gone essentially unchanged for decades. This matters now more than ever: as the field shifts toward sample-level evaluation (failure case analysis, inverse benchmarking, per-image model comparison), reliable per-image density estimates become critical. We propose a principled mixture model that combines an adaptive-bandwidth KDE based on Abramson's method, center bias and uniform components, and a state-of-the-art saliency model, to capture different spatial and semantic types of interobserver consistency, and optimize all parameters per image via leave-one-subject-out cross-validation. Our method yields substantially higher interobserver consistency estimates across multiple benchmarks, with median per-image gains of 5-15% in log-likelihood and up to 2 percentage points in AUC. For the most affected images -- precisely those most relevant to failure case analysis -- improvements exceed 25%. We leverage these improved estimates to identify and analyze remaining failure cases of state-of-the-art saliency models, demonstrating that significant headroom for model improvement remains. More broadly, our findings highlight that empirical fixation densities should not be treated as fixed ground truths but as evolving estimates that improve with better methodology.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种自适应带宽KDE和显著性模型结合的混合方法，显著提升注视密度估计准确性，推动显著性基准测试的改进。
light_analysis.motivation: 经验注视密度是显著性基准测试的基础，但当前标准方法（固定带宽各向同性高斯KDE）数十年未变。随着领域转向样本级评估（如失败案例分析和逐图像模型比较），可靠的每图像密度估计变得关键。现有方法无法有效捕捉不同空间和语义类型的观察者一致性，限制了基准测试的可靠性和模型改进的识别。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个混合模型，结合基于Abramson方法的自适应带宽KDE、中心偏置和均匀分量，以及最新的显著性模型，以捕捉不同类型的观察者间一致性。通过留一受试者交叉验证，对每个图像优化所有参数。该方法在多个基准测试中显著提高了观察者一致性估计。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，中位数每图像的对数似然提升5-15%，AUC提升高达2个百分点。对于受影响的图像（尤其是与失败案例分析相关的），改进超过25%。利用这些改进的密度估计，识别了最新显著性模型的剩余失败案例，表明模型仍有显著改进空间。
light_analysis.conclusion: 经验注视密度不应被视为固定真值，而是随方法改进而演变的估计。本文方法提供了更可靠的密度估计，有助于更准确地评估显著性模型，并揭示模型的局限性。未来工作可进一步优化自适应带宽和模型组合策略。

title: QKVShare: Quantized KV-Cache Handoff for Multi-Agent On-Device LLMs
abstract: Multi-agent LLM systems on edge devices need to hand off latent context efficiently, but the practical choices today are expensive re-prefill or full-precision KV transfer. We study QKVShare, a framework for quantized KV-cache handoff between agents that combines token-level mixed-precision allocation, a self-contained CacheCard representation, and a HuggingFace-compatible cache injection path. Our current results support a narrower but clearer story than the original draft: on 150 GSM8K problems with Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, adaptive quantization remains competitive under repeated handoff and shows its clearest gains against uniform quantization in deeper-hop, higher budget settings; for handoff latency, the QKVShare path reduces TTFT relative to full re prefill at every tested context, from 130.7 ms vs. 150.2 ms at nominal 1K context to 397.1 ms vs. 1029.7 ms at nominal 8K context;. Stage timing shows that post-injection generation, not card creation, dominates the current QKVShare latency path. These results position quantized KV handoff as a promising on-device systems direction while also highlighting the need for stronger controller ablations and apples-to-apples runtime comparisons.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QKVShare框架，通过量化KV缓存传递实现多智能体设备端LLM的低延迟上下文传递。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统在边缘设备上需要高效传递潜在上下文，但现有方法要么重新预填充（耗时），要么传输全精度KV缓存（带宽大）。这限制了设备端多智能体系统的实时性和资源效率。因此，需要一种兼顾压缩和性能的KV缓存传递方案。
light_analysis.method: QKVShare框架包含三个组件：token级混合精度量化分配、自包含的CacheCard表示、以及兼容HuggingFace的缓存注入路径。CacheCard封装量化后的KV缓存，实现高效传输。方法在Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct模型上验证，使用GSM8K数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在150个GSM8K问题上，自适应量化在重复传递中表现竞争力，深跳和高预算设置下优于均匀量化。延迟方面，QKVShare相比全重预填充显著降低TTFT：1K上下文下130.7ms vs 150.2ms，8K上下文下397.1ms vs 1029.7ms。阶段计时显示生成阶段主导延迟。
light_analysis.conclusion: QKVShare证明了量化KV缓存传递作为设备端多智能体系统方向的潜力，能显著降低延迟。但需要更强的控制器消融实验和苹果对苹果的运行时比较来进一步验证。未来工作可能包括优化生成阶段延迟。

title: DMGD: Train-Free Dataset Distillation with Semantic-Distribution Matching in Diffusion Models
abstract: Dataset distillation enables efficient training by distilling the information of large-scale datasets into significantly smaller synthetic datasets. Diffusion based paradigms have emerged in recent years, offering novel perspectives for dataset distillation.
