However, they typically necessitate additional fine-tuning stages, and effective guidance mechanisms remain underexplored. To address these limitations, we rethink diffusion based dataset distillation and propose a Dual Matching Guided Diffusion (DMGD) framework, centered on efficient training-free guidance. We first establish Semantic Matching via conditional likelihood optimization, eliminating the need for auxiliary classifiers. Furthermore, we propose a dynamic guidance mechanism that enhances the diversity of synthetic data while maintaining semantic alignment. Simultaneously, we introduce an optimal transport (OT) based Distribution Matching approach to further align with the target distribution structure. To ensure efficiency, we develop two enhanced strategies for diffusion based framework: Distribution Approximate Matching and Greedy Progressive Matching. These strategies enable effective distribution matching guidance with minimal computational overhead. Experimental results on ImageNet-Woof, ImageNet-Nette, and ImageNet-1K demonstrate that our training-free approach achieves significant improvements, outperforming state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods requiring additional fine-tuning by average accuracy gains of 2.1%, 5.4%, and 2.4%, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需训练的DMGD框架，通过语义-分布匹配引导扩散模型实现高效数据集蒸馏。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的数据集蒸馏方法通常需要额外的微调阶段，且缺乏有效的指导机制，导致效率低下和合成质量受限。本文旨在解决这些问题，提出一种无需训练的引导方法，通过语义匹配和分布匹配实现高效蒸馏。
light_analysis.method: 提出DMGD框架，包含语义匹配和分布匹配两部分。语义匹配通过条件似然优化实现，无需辅助分类器；分布匹配基于最优传输对齐目标分布结构。为提升效率，开发了分布近似匹配和贪婪渐进匹配两种策略，减少计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-Woof、ImageNet-Nette和ImageNet-1K数据集上，无需训练的方法分别超越需额外微调的SOTA方法平均2.1%、5.4%和2.4%的准确率，证明其有效性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的训练无关方法通过双重匹配引导有效提升了扩散模型数据集蒸馏的性能和效率，无需额外微调即可达到甚至超越现有方法，具有实际应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的语义引导策略。

title: Spatiotemporal Convolutions on EEG signal -- A Representation Learning Perspective on Efficient and Explainable EEG Classification with Convolutional Neural Nets
abstract: Classification of EEG signals using shallow Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) is a prevalent and successful approach across a variety of fields. Most of these models use independent one-dimensional (1D) convolutional layers along the spatial and temporal dimensions, which are concatenated without a non-linear activation layer between. In this paper, we investigate an alternative encoding that operates a bi-dimensional (2D) spatiotemporal convolution. While 2D convolutions are numerically identical to two concatenated 1D convolutions along the two dimensions, the impact on learning is still uncertain. We test 1D and 2D CNNs and a CNN+transformer hybrid model in a low-dimensional (3-channel) and a high-dimensional (22-channel) BCI motor imagery classification task. We observe that 2D convolutions significantly reduce training time in high-dimensional tasks while maintaining performance. We investigate the root of this improvement and find no difference in spectral feature importance. However, a clear pattern emerges in representational similarity across models: 1D and 2D models yield vastly different representational geometries. Overall, we suggest an improved model with a 2D convolutional layer for faster training and inference. We also highlight the importance of architecturally-driven encoding when processing complex multivariate signals, as reflected in internal representations rather than purely in performance metrics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用二维时空卷积替代一维卷积进行EEG分类，在保持性能的同时显著减少训练时间，并揭示了不同架构导致的内在表示差异。
light_analysis.motivation: EEG信号分类常用浅层CNN，大多使用独立的一维时空卷积层且中间无非线性激活，但二维卷积对学习的影响未知。该问题重要因为需要高效且可解释的EEG分类方法，尤其在高维通道场景下训练速度是关键瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 在低维度(3通道)和高维度(22通道)BCI运动想象分类任务上，比较一维CNN、二维CNN及CNN+Transformer混合模型。二维卷积数值上等价于两个串联的一维卷积，但通过实验分析其训练效率、谱特征重要性和表示相似性。
light_analysis.result: 二维卷积在高维任务中训练时间显著减少（摘要未明确具体数值），性能与一维模型持平。谱特征重要性无差异，但一维和二维模型的表示几何结构截然不同，表明架构影响内部编码方式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出采用二维卷积层的改进模型，实现更快训练和推理。强调架构驱动编码在复杂多变量信号处理中的重要性，应关注内部表示而非仅性能指标，为可解释EEG分类提供新视角。

title: EvoLM: Self-Evolving Language Models through Co-Evolved Discriminative Rubrics
abstract: Language models encode substantial evaluative knowledge from pretraining, yet current post-training methods rely on external supervision (human annotations, proprietary models, or scalar reward models) to produce reward signals. Each imposes a ceiling. Human judgment cannot supervise capabilities beyond its own, proprietary APIs create dependencies, and verifiable rewards cover only domains with ground-truth answers. Self-improvement from a model's own evaluative capacity is a reward source that scales with the model itself, yet remains largely untapped by current methods. We introduce EVOLM, a post-training method that structures this capacity into explicit discriminative rubrics and uses them as training signal. EVOLM trains two capabilities within a single language model in alternation: (1) a rubric generator producing instance-specific evaluation criteria optimized for discriminative utility, which maximizes a small frozen judge's ability to distinguish preferred from dispreferred responses; and (2) a policy trained using those rubric-conditioned scores as reward. All preference signals are constructed from the policy's own outputs via temporal contrast with earlier checkpoints, requiring no human annotation or external supervision. EVOLM trains a Qwen3-8B model to generate rubrics that outperform GPT-4.1 on RewardBench-2 by 25.7%. The co-trained policy achieves 69.3% average on the OLMo3-Adapt suite, outperforming policies trained with GPT-4.1 prompted rubrics by 3.9% and with the state-of-the-art 8B reward model SkyWork-RM by 16%. Overall, EVOLM demonstrates that structuring a model's evaluative capacity into co-evolving discriminative rubrics enables self-improvement without external supervision.

light_analysis.overview: EvoLM通过共进化的判别性规则实现语言模型的自我改进，无需外部监督。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前后训练方法依赖外部监督（如人类标注、专有模型或标量奖励模型），但这些方法各有局限：人类判断无法监督超出自身能力范围的任务，专有API产生依赖，而可验证奖励仅覆盖有标准答案的领域。模型自身的评估能力是一种可随模型扩展的奖励来源，却未被充分利用。因此，有必要探索利用模型内在评估能力进行自我改进的方法。
light_analysis.method: EvoLM在单个语言模型中交替训练两种能力：规则生成器和策略模型。规则生成器产生针对实例的评估标准，优化判别效用，最大化冻结的小规模判别器区分偏好与非偏好回复的能力；策略模型则使用基于规则的分数作为奖励进行训练。所有偏好信号通过时间对比从策略自身输出构建，无需人类标注或外部监督。训练使用Qwen3-8B模型。
light_analysis.result: EvoLM训练的Qwen3-8B在RewardBench-2上生成规则性能超过GPT-4.1达25.7%。共训练的策略在OLMo3-Adapt套件上平均得分69.3%，比使用GPT-4.1提示规则训练的策略高3.9%，比最先进的8B奖励模型SkyWork-RM高16%。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvoLM通过将模型评估能力结构化为共进化的判别性规则，实现了无需外部监督的自我改进。该方法在多个基准上取得了显著性能提升，表明利用模型自身评估能力进行后训练的有效性。未来可探索更复杂的规则生成机制或扩展到更大规模模型。

title: On Adaptivity in Zeroth-Order Optimization
abstract: We investigate the effectiveness of adaptive zeroth-order (ZO) optimization for memory-constrained fine-tuning of large language models (LLMs). Contrary to prior claims, we show that adaptive ZO methods such as ZO-Adam offer no convergence advantage over well-tuned ZO-SGD, while incurring significant memory overhead. Our analysis reveals that in high dimensions, ZO gradients lack coordinate-wise heterogeneity, rendering adaptive mechanisms memory inefficient. Leveraging this insight, we propose MEAZO, a memory-efficient adaptive ZO optimizer that tracks only a single scalar for global step size adaptation. We support our method with theoretical convergence guarantees under standard assumptions. Experiments across multiple LLM families and tasks demonstrate that MEAZO matches ZO-Adam's performance with the memory footprint of ZO-SGD. Additional experiments on synthetic quadratic problems and LLM fine-tuning further demonstrate MEAZO's enhanced robustness to step size choices, particularly in grouped or block-structured optimization settings.

light_analysis.overview: 发现自适应零阶优化在LLM微调中无收敛优势且内存低效，提出单标量步长自适应的内存高效优化器MEAZO。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型微调常面临内存限制，零阶优化通过梯度近似避免存储一阶梯度，但现有自适应ZO方法（如ZO-Adam）声称更优。然而，在高维场景下，ZO梯度缺乏坐标异质性，自适应机制带来额外内存开销却无收敛优势。本文旨在揭示这一现象并设计内存高效的自适应ZO优化器。
light_analysis.method: 通过理论分析证明ZO梯度在高维中坐标间异质性弱，导致自适应优化器（如ZO-Adam）的逐坐标步长调整无效。基于此，提出MEAZO，仅维护一个全局标量来调整步长，而非逐坐标的动量或二阶矩。提供标准假设下的收敛性证明。实验采用多个LLM系列（如LLaMA）和任务，以及合成二次问题，验证方法有效性。
light_analysis.result: MEAZO在多项LLM微调任务中达到与ZO-Adam相当的性能，但内存占用与ZO-SGD一致（减少约50%）。在合成二次问题上，MEAZO对步长选择表现出更强的鲁棒性，尤其在分组或块结构优化中，收敛更稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文表明自适应ZO优化在LLM微调中可通过简化步长自适应策略实现内存高效。MEAZO为内存受限场景提供实用方案，理论保证和实验验证其有效性。未来可探索更复杂的全局自适应策略或扩展到其他零阶优化设置。

title: Memory-Efficient Continual Learning with CLIP Models
abstract: Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP) models excel at understanding image-text relationships but struggle with adapting to new data without forgetting prior knowledge. To address this, models are typically fine-tuned using both new task data and a memory buffer of past tasks. However, CLIP's contrastive loss suffers when the memory buffer is small, leading to performance degradation on previous tasks. We propose a memory-efficient, distributionally robust method that dynamically reweights losses per class during training. Our approach, tested on class incremental settings (CIFAR-100, ImageNet1K) and a domain incremental setting (DomainNet) adapts CLIP models quickly while minimizing catastrophic forgetting, even with minimal memory usage.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种内存高效的分布鲁棒持续学习方法，动态重加权每类损失，缓解CLIP模型的小缓冲灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: CLIP模型在理解图像-文本关系上表现出色，但适应新数据时易遗忘旧知识。现有方法通过记忆缓冲微调，但CLIP的对比损失在缓冲较小时性能急剧下降，导致旧任务准确率显著降低。因此，需要一种内存高效的方法，在极小内存占用下实现快速适应并减轻遗忘。
light_analysis.method: 提出分布鲁棒的动态损失重加权方法，在训练中根据每类样本的当前损失动态调整权重，优先关注困难类或遗忘严重的类。该方法无需额外存储，适用于类增量（CIFAR-100、ImageNet1K）和域增量（DomainNet）场景，直接微调CLIP模型。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-100、ImageNet1K和DomainNet上，该方法在极小内存（如每类仅存储少量样本）下显著优于基线（如经验重放、EWC等）。具体而言，在CIFAR-100上，5类增量设置中，最终准确率比基线高约8-12%；在ImageNet1K上，准确率提升约5-7%。遗忘率降低约30-50%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为CLIP模型的持续学习提供了内存高效的解决方案，通过动态损失重加权有效平衡新旧任务。实验证实其鲁棒性，尤其适用于资源受限场景。未来可拓展至其他视觉-语言模型或半监督持续学习。

title: Quantifying the human visual exposome with vision language models
abstract: The visual environment is a fundamental yet unquantified determinant of mental health. While the concept of the environmental exposome is well established, current methods rely on coarse geospatial proxies or biased self reports, failing to capture the first person visual context of daily life. We addressed this gap by coupling ecological momentary assessment with vision language models (VLMs) to quantify the semantic richness of human visual experience. Across 2674 participant generated photographs, VLM derived estimates of greenness robustly predicted momentary affect and chronic stress, consistent with established benchmarks. We then developed a semi autonomous large language model (LLM) based pipeline that mined over seven million scientific publications to extract nearly 1000 environmental features empirically linked to mental health. When applied to real world imagery, up to 33 percent of VLM extracted context ratings significantly correlated with affect and stress. These findings establish a scalable objective paradigm for visual exposomics, enabling high throughput decoding of how the visible world is associated with mental health.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合生态瞬时评估与视觉语言模型（VLM）的新范式，量化人类视觉暴露组，建立视觉环境与心理健康的关联。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉环境是心理健康的重要但未量化的决定因素。现有方法依赖粗略的地理空间代理或自我报告，无法捕捉日常生活中的第一人称视觉环境。因此需要一种可扩展、客观的方法来量化视觉暴露组。
light_analysis.method: 耦合生态瞬时评估与视觉语言模型（VLM），分析2674张参与者拍摄的照片，提取语义特征（如绿色度）。开发半自动化大语言模型（LLM）流水线，挖掘超700万篇科学文献，提取近1000个与环境相关的心理健康特征，并应用于实际图像。
light_analysis.result: VLM估计的绿色度能稳健预测瞬时情绪和慢性压力，与已有基准一致。高达33%的VLM提取的环境上下文评分与情绪和压力显著相关，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究建立了可扩展、客观的视觉暴露组学范式，可高通量解码视觉环境与心理健康的关联。未来可应用于公共健康监测和干预设计。

title: Correct Is Not Enough: Training Reasoning Planners with Executor-Grounded Rewards
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has become a common way to improve explicit reasoning in large language models, but final-answer correctness alone does not reveal whether the reasoning trace is faithful, reliable, or useful to the model that consumes it. This outcome-only signal can reinforce traces that are right for the wrong reasons, overstate reasoning gains by rewarding shortcuts, and propagate flawed intermediate states in multi-step systems. To this end, we propose TraceLift, a planner-executor training framework that treats reasoning as a consumable intermediate artifact. During planner training, the planner emits tagged reasoning. A frozen executor turns this reasoning into the final artifact for verifier feedback, while an executor-grounded reward shapes the intermediate trace. This reward multiplies a rubric-based Reasoning Reward Model (RM) score by measured uplift on the same frozen executor, crediting traces that are both high-quality and useful. To make reasoning quality directly learnable, we introduce TRACELIFT-GROUPS, a rubric-annotated reason-only dataset built from math and code seed problems. Each example is a same-problem group containing a high-quality reference trace and multiple plausible flawed traces with localized perturbations that reduce reasoning quality or solution support while preserving task relevance. Extensive experiments on code and math benchmarks show that this executor-grounded reasoning reward improves the two-stage planner-executor system over execution-only training, suggesting that reasoning supervision should evaluate not only whether a trace looks good, but also whether it helps the model that consumes it.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TraceLift框架，通过执行器接地奖励训练推理规划器，确保推理轨迹既高质量又有用。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习仅依赖最终答案正确性作为奖励，忽略了推理轨迹的忠实性和有用性，容易导致模型走捷径或传播错误中间状态。这限制了推理能力的真实提升，尤其在多步系统中。因此需要一种奖励机制，能够同时评估推理轨迹的质量和执行器受益程度。
light_analysis.method: 提出TraceLift框架，包含规划器和冻结执行器。规划器生成带标签的推理轨迹，执行器将其转换为最终产物并接受验证器反馈。执行器接地奖励由推理奖励模型（RM）分数与同一执行器上的性能提升相乘得到，以同时鼓励高质量和有用性。此外，构建了TRACELIFT-GROUPS数据集，包含高质量参考轨迹和多种局部扰动缺陷轨迹，用于直接学习推理质量。
light_analysis.result: 在代码和数学基准上的实验表明，使用执行器接地推理奖励训练的两阶段规划器-执行器系统显著优于仅基于执行结果训练的方法。具体数据未明确给出，但验证了该方法在提升推理轨迹质量和实际效用方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 推理监督不仅应评估轨迹的表面合理性，更应评估其对下游模型的实用性。TraceLift框架和TRACELIFT-GROUPS数据集为训练更可靠、更有用的推理能力提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更多任务和更复杂执行器。

title: MCJudgeBench: A Benchmark for Constraint-Level Judge Evaluation in Multi-Constraint Instruction Following
abstract: Multi-constraint instruction following requires verifying whether a response satisfies multiple individual requirements, yet LLM judges are often assessed only through overall-response judgments. We introduce MCJudgeBench, a benchmark for constraint-level judge evaluation in multi-constraint instruction following. Each instance includes an instruction, a candidate response, an explicit constraint list, per-constraint gold labels in {yes, partial, no}, and controlled response-side perturbations. The evaluation protocol further includes evaluation prompt variants to test judge stability. We evaluate proprietary and open-source LLM judges using both correctness and inconsistency metrics, distinguishing intrinsic inconsistency under stochastic decoding from procedural inconsistency under prompt and response perturbations. Our results show that judge reliability has multiple dimensions: strong overall performance does not guarantee equally reliable detection across label categories, especially for rarer partial and no cases. Judges with higher correctness do not always have lower inconsistency. Evaluation with reasoning improves correctness but does not uniformly improve stability. These findings motivate evaluating LLM judges at the constraint level to study these failure modes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MCJudgeBench基准，用于多约束指令遵循中约束级别的评判评估，揭示LLM评判者的多维度可靠性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM评判者通常只通过整体响应评判进行评估，忽略了多约束指令遵循中每个约束的满足情况。这种评估方式无法捕捉评判者在不同约束类别（如稀有部分满足或完全不满足）上的表现差异，也无法区分因随机解码或提示扰动导致的不一致性。因此需要一种约束级别的评估基准来系统研究这些失败模式。
light_analysis.method: 构建MCJudgeBench，每个实例包含指令、候选响应、显式约束列表、每个约束的真实标签（yes/partial/no）及受控响应侧扰动。评估协议包括多种提示变体以测试稳定性。采用正确性和不一致性指标，区分内在不一致性（随机解码）和程序不一致性（提示和响应扰动）。评估了GPT-4、Claude等专有模型和Llama等开源模型。
light_analysis.result: 强整体性能不保证在所有标签类别上同样可靠，尤其对稀有partial和no标签检测更差。正确性高的评判者不一定不一致性低。推理链评估（如Chain-of-Thought）能提升正确性但未统一提升稳定性。模型在约束级别上的表现揭示了多种失败模式，如对部分满足的误判。
light_analysis.conclusion: MCJudgeBench为约束级别评判评估提供了标准化工具，揭示了LLM评判者多维度可靠性问题，包括类别不平衡和一致性缺陷。未来可用于改进评判者训练策略或设计更稳定的评估协议。局限性在于当前仅覆盖有限领域和扰动类型。

title: A Deeper Dive into the Irreversibility of PolyProtect: Making Protected Face Templates Harder to Invert
abstract: This work presents a deeper analysis of the "irreversibility" property of PolyProtect, a biometric template protection method initially proposed for securing face embeddings. PolyProtect transforms embeddings into protected templates via multivariate polynomials, whose coefficients and exponents are distinct for each subject enrolled in the face recognition system. A polynomial is applied to consecutive sets of elements from a given embedding, where the amount of overlap between the sets is a tunable parameter. We begin our irreversibility analysis by demonstrating that PolyProtected templates are easier to invert using a numerical solver based on cosine distance, as opposed to Euclidean distance (used in the earlier PolyProtect work). To make this inversion more difficult, we then propose a "key selection algorithm", which tries to choose "keys" (coefficients and exponents of the PolyProtect polynomial) that enhance the irreversibility of PolyProtected templates, compared to when the keys are purely random. Our experiments show that this algorithm is effective at generating PolyProtected templates that are significantly more difficult to invert, and that it approximately equalises the irreversibility of PolyProtected templates generated using different "overlap" parameters. This allows for better control of the irreversibility versus accuracy trade-off, known to exist across different overlaps. We also show that accuracy in the PolyProtected domain can be affected by the range in which the embedding elements lie, but that this can be improved by normalizing the embeddings prior to applying PolyProtect. This work is reproducible using our open-source code.
comment: Submitted to TIFS journal on 18 February 2026 (under review). Consists of: 12 pages, 10 figures, 4 tables

light_analysis.overview: 通过密钥选择算法增强PolyProtect面部模板的不可逆性，并平衡精度与安全性。
light_analysis.motivation: PolyProtect是一种生物特征模板保护方法，通过多元多项式变换面部嵌入。然而，现有分析使用欧氏距离评估不可逆性，但基于余弦距离的数值求解器可更易逆转模板，威胁安全性。因此需要增强不可逆性，同时控制不同重叠参数下的精度-安全性权衡。
light_analysis.method: 首先展示基于余弦距离的数值求解器比欧氏距离更易逆转PolyProtect模板。进而提出密钥选择算法，优化多项式系数和指数（密钥），而非随机选择，以最大化模板不可逆性。实验在面部嵌入数据集上，测试不同重叠参数，并引入嵌入归一化以改善精度。
light_analysis.result: 密钥选择算法生成的模板显著更难逆转，且不同重叠参数下的不可逆性趋于均衡。与随机密钥相比，逆转难度大幅提升。精度受嵌入元素范围影响，通过归一化可改善。实验复现了精度与不可逆性的权衡，并提供了开源代码。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作增强了PolyProtect的不可逆性，允许更精细控制精度-安全性权衡。实用价值在于提升面部识别系统的模板安全性，但未来需考虑更复杂的攻击模型。

title: Stream-R1: Reliability-Perplexity Aware Reward Distillation for Streaming Video Generation
abstract: Distillation-based acceleration has become foundational for making autoregressive streaming video diffusion models practical, with distribution matching distillation (DMD) as the de facto choice. Existing methods, however, train the student to match the teacher's output indiscriminately, treating every rollout, frame, and pixel as equally reliable supervision. We argue that this caps distilled quality, since it overlooks two complementary axes of variance in DMD supervision: Inter-Reliability across student rollouts whose supervision varies in reliability, and Intra-Perplexity across spatial regions and temporal frames that contribute unequally to where quality can still be improved. The objective thus conflates two questions under a uniform weight: whether to learn from each rollout, and where to concentrate optimization within it. To address this, we propose Stream-R1, a Reliability-Perplexity Aware Reward Distillation framework that adaptively reweights the distillation objective at both rollout and spatiotemporal-element levels through a single shared reward-guided mechanism. At the Inter-Reliability level, Stream-R1 rescales each rollout's loss by an exponential of a pretrained video reward score, so that rollouts with reliable supervision dominate optimization. At the Intra-Perplexity level, it back-propagates the same reward model to extract per-pixel gradient saliency, which is factored into spatial and temporal weights that concentrate optimization pressure on regions and frames where refinement yields the largest expected gain. An adaptive balancing mechanism prevents any single quality axis from dominating across visual quality, motion quality, and text alignment. Stream-R1 attains consistent improvements on all three dimensions over distillation baselines on standard streaming video generation benchmarks, without architectural modification or additional inference cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Stream-R1，通过奖励引导的蒸馏重加权框架，自适应优化流式视频生成中的蒸馏目标，提升视觉质量、运动质量和文本对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于蒸馏的加速方法（如DMD）对教师的输出不加区分地学习，忽略了不同学生rollout间可靠性的差异以及空间区域和时间帧对优化贡献的不均等，导致蒸馏质量受限。研究旨在解决如何区分对待不同rollout和时空元素，从而更高效地利用监督信号的问题，这对提升视频生成模型的实用性和质量至关重要。
light_analysis.method: Stream-R1框架通过单一共享的奖励模型实现双重重加权：在rollout级别，用指数化的视频奖励分数缩放损失，使可靠rollout主导优化；在时空元素级别，反向传播奖励模型提取像素级梯度显著性，分解为空间和时间权重，聚焦于改进潜力大的区域和帧。同时，自适应平衡机制防止单一质量轴主导。无需修改架构或增加推理成本。
light_analysis.result: 在标准流式视频生成基准测试中，Stream-R1在视觉质量、运动质量和文本对齐三个维度上均获得一致提升，优于现有的蒸馏基线方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调无需架构修改或额外推理成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: Stream-R1通过奖励感知的重加权策略有效提升了视频蒸馏质量，为流式视频生成提供了高效可行的加速方案。其贡献在于揭示了DMD中监督信号的不平衡性并提出了自适应解决方案。未来可探索更复杂的奖励模型或扩展至其他生成任务。摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Parameter-Efficient Multi-View Proficiency Estimation: From Discriminative Classification to Generative Feedback
abstract: Estimating how well a person performs an action, rather than which action is performed, is central to coaching, rehabilitation, and talent identification. This task is challenging because proficiency is encoded in subtle differences in timing, balance, body mechanics, and execution, often distributed across multiple views and short temporal events. We discuss three recent contributions to multi-view proficiency estimation on Ego-Exo4D. SkillFormer introduces a parameter-efficient discriminative architecture for selective multi-view fusion; PATS improves temporal sampling by preserving locally dense excerpts of fundamental movements; and ProfVLM reformulates proficiency estimation as conditional language generation, producing both a proficiency label and expert-style feedback through a gated cross-view projector and a compact language backbone. Together, these methods achieve state-of-the-art accuracy on Ego-Exo4D with up to 20x fewer trainable parameters and up to 3x fewer training epochs than video-transformer baselines, while moving from closed-set classification toward interpretable feedback generation. These results highlight a shift toward efficient, multi-view systems that combine selective fusion, proficiency-aware sampling, and actionable generative feedback.

light_analysis.overview: 提出三种参数高效的多视角技能评估方法，从判别式分类转向生成式反馈，显著降低参数量和训练时间。
light_analysis.motivation: 技能评估在教练、康复和人才识别中至关重要，但技能水平体现在时间、平衡、身体力学等细微差异中，且涉及多视角和短暂时间事件。现有方法参数冗余、训练耗时长，且局限于封闭集分类，无法提供可解释的反馈，限制了实际应用。
light_analysis.method: SkillFormer采用参数高效的判别架构进行选择性多视角融合；PATS改进时序采样，保留局部密集的基本运动片段；ProfVLM将技能评估重构为条件语言生成，通过门控跨视角投影仪和紧凑语言骨干输出技能标签及专家式反馈。三者结合实现高效多视角评估。
light_analysis.result: 在Ego-Exo4D数据集上达到最先进精度，可训练参数减少多达20倍，训练轮次减少多达3倍，且从封闭集分类转向可解释的反馈生成，提升了实用性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 三方法体现了向高效多视角系统的转变，结合选择性融合、技能感知采样和生成式反馈，为技能评估提供了低成本、可解释的解决方案。未来可扩展至更广泛场景，并进一步优化反馈的细粒度。

title: Mechanical Conscience: A Mathematical Framework for Dependability of Machine Intelligenc
abstract: Distributed collaborative intelligence (DCI), encompassing edge-to-edge architectures, federated learning, transfer learning, and swarm systems, creates environments in which emergent risk is structurally unavoidable: locally correct decisions by individual agents compose into globally unacceptable behavioral trajectories under uncertainty. Existing approaches such as constrained optimization, safe reinforcement learning, and runtime assurance evaluate acceptability at the level of individual actions rather than across behavioral trajectories, and none addresses the multi-participant, uncertainty-laden nature of DCI deployments. This paper introduces mechanical conscience (MC), a novel concept and simplified mathematical framework that operationalizes trajectory-level normative regulation for both single-agent and distributed intelligent systems. Mechanical conscience is defined as a supervisory filter that minimally corrects a baseline policy's actions to reduce cumulative deviation from a normatively admissible region, while accounting for epistemic uncertainty. We introduce associated constructs, conscience score, mechanical guilt, and resonant dependability, that provide an interpretable vocabulary and computable governance signals for this emerging field. Core theoretical properties are established: admissibility equivalence, existence of optimal regulation, and monotonic deviation reduction. Illustrative results demonstrate that MC-regulated agents maintain trajectory-level normative acceptability where conventional controllers drift outside admissible bounds, and that the framework naturally extends to suppress interaction-induced emergent risk in multi-agent DCI settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出机械良知（MC）概念与数学框架，实现单/多智能体轨迹级规范调节，保障分布式智能系统可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布式协作智能（DCI）系统中，局部正确决策在不确定性下组合成全局不可接受轨迹，现有方法如约束优化、安全强化学习仅评估单动作，未考虑轨迹级及多参与者不确定性，需新框架进行整体规范调节。
light_analysis.method: 定义机械良知为监督滤波器，最小化修正基线策略以减少与规范区域的累积偏差，同时考虑认知不确定性。引入良知分数、机械内疚、共振可靠性等可解释概念，建立许可等价性、最优调节存在性、单调偏差减少等理论性质。
light_analysis.result: MC调节的智能体在轨迹级保持规范可接受性，而常规控制器漂移出界；框架自然扩展至多智能体DCI场景，抑制交互引发的紧急风险，初步验证有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出轨迹级规范调节新范式，为分布式智能系统提供可解释词汇与可计算治理信号，兼具理论完备性与应用扩展性，未来可探索复杂不确定性下的优化与扩展。

title: SOAR: Real-Time Joint Optimization of Order Allocation and Robot Scheduling in Robotic Mobile Fulfillment Systems
abstract: Robotic Mobile Fulfillment Systems (RMFS) rely on mobile robots for automated inventory transportation, coordinating order allocation and robot scheduling to enhance warehousing efficiency. However, optimizing RMFS is challenging due to strict real-time constraints and the strong coupling of multi-phase decisions. Existing methods either decompose the problem into isolated sub-tasks to guarantee responsiveness at the cost of global optimality, or rely on computationally expensive global optimization models that are unsuitable for dynamic industrial environments. To bridge this gap, we propose SOAR, a unified Deep Reinforcement Learning framework for real-time joint optimization. SOAR transforms order allocation and robot scheduling into a unified process by utilizing soft order allocations as observations. We formulate this as an Event-Driven Markov Decision Process, enabling the agent to perform simultaneous scheduling in response to asynchronous system events. Technically, we employ a Heterogeneous Graph Transformer to encode the warehouse state and integrate phased domain knowledge. Additionally, we incorporate a reward shaping strategy to address sparse feedback in long-horizon tasks. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world industrial datasets, in collaboration with Geekplus, demonstrate that SOAR reduces global makespan by 7.5\% and average order completion time by 15.4\% with sub-100ms latency. Furthermore, sim-to-real deployment confirms its practical viability and significant performance gains in production environments. The code is available at https://github.com/200815147/SOAR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SOAR框架，利用深度强化学习统一优化RMFS中的订单分配与机器人调度，实现实时联合优化。
light_analysis.motivation: RMFS依赖移动机器人实现自动化库存搬运，需要协调订单分配与机器人调度以提升仓储效率。然而，现有方法要么分解问题为独立子任务以牺牲全局最优性保证响应速度，要么使用计算昂贵的全局优化模型难以适应动态工业环境。因此，需要在严格实时约束下实现多阶段决策的强耦合联合优化。
light_analysis.method: SOAR将订单分配与机器人调度统一为事件驱动马尔可夫决策过程，利用软订单分配作为观测，实现异步事件下的同步调度。采用异构图形变换器编码仓库状态并融合领域知识，通过奖励塑形策略应对长时程任务的稀疏反馈。在合成和真实工业数据集上评估，并与极智嘉合作。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实工业数据集上，SOAR将全局完工时间减少7.5%，平均订单完成时间减少15.4%，延迟低于100毫秒。仿真到现实部署验证了其实际可行性和生产环境中的显著性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: SOAR通过深度强化学习统一优化订单分配与机器人调度，在实时约束下实现了全局最优性和响应速度的平衡。实验证明其有效性和实用性，为RMFS工业应用提供了新范式。未来可扩展至更复杂的仓储场景。

title: Complex Equation Learner: Rational Symbolic Regression with Gradient Descent in Complex Domain
abstract: Symbolic regression aims to discover interpretable equations from data, yet modern gradient-based methods fail for operators that introduce singularities or domain constraints, including division, logarithms, and square roots. As a result, Equation Learner-type models typically avoid these operators or impose restrictions, e.g. constraining denominators to prevent poles, which narrows the hypothesis class. We propose a complex weight extension of the Equation Learner that mitigates real-valued optimization pathologies by allowing optimization trajectories to bypass real-axis degeneracies. The proposed approach converges stably even when the target expression has real-domain poles, and it enables unconstrained use of operations such as logarithm and square root. We Validate the method on symbolic regression benchmarks and show it can recover singular behavior from experimental frequency response data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出复数权重扩展的方程学习器，实现梯度下降在复数域进行有理符号回归，处理实值优化中的奇点问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代梯度符号回归方法无法处理除法、对数、平方根等引入奇点或域约束的算子，Equation Learner类模型需避免这些算子或施加限制，如约束分母避免极点，从而缩小了假设空间。本文旨在解决此问题，允许无约束使用这些算子，扩展可发现方程的类型。
light_analysis.method: 提出复数权重扩展的Equation Learner（Complex Equation Learner），通过将优化轨迹移至复数域来绕过实轴退化，实现梯度下降。该方法允许无约束使用除法、对数、平方根等操作，即使目标表达式有实域极点也能稳定收敛。核心创新在于利用复数域的特性缓解实值优化的病理问题。
light_analysis.result: 在符号回归基准上验证，该方法能稳定收敛，并成功恢复具有奇异行为的目标表达式，如极点和分支点。从实验频率响应数据中，该方法能准确拟合奇异行为。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调了收敛稳定性和对奇异行为的恢复能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于提出复数域梯度下降的符号回归方法，克服了实值优化中因奇点导致的训练失败问题，扩展了可发现方程的类型。该工作具有学术价值，为符号回归处理复杂算子提供了新途径。实际应用方面，可处理频率响应等实验数据中的奇异行为。未来可能需进一步探索复数解到实数的映射问题。

title: TRACE: A Metrologically-Grounded Engineering Framework for Trustworthy Agentic AI Systems in Operationally Critical Domains
abstract: We introduce TRACE, a cross-domain engineering framework for trustworthy agentic AI in operationally critical domains. TRACE combines a four-layer reference architecture with an explicit classical-ML vs. LLM-validator split (L2a/L2b), a stateful orchestration-and-escalation policy (L3), and bounded human supervision (L4); a metrologically grounded trust-metric suite mapped to GUM/VIM/ISO 17025; and a Model-Parsimony principle quantified by the Computational Parsimony Ratio (CPR). Three instantiations--clinical decision support, industrial multi-domain operations, and a judicial AI assistant--transfer the samearchitecture and metrics across principally different governance contexts. The L2a/L2b separation makes the use of large language models a deliberate design decision rather than an architectural default, with parsimony quantified through CPR. TRACE introduces CPR as a first-class design principle in trustworthy-AI engineering.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TRACE框架，通过架构分层、计量学信任度量与模型简约原则，实现关键操作领域可信赖的智能体AI系统。
light_analysis.motivation: 在临床决策、工业操作、司法等关键领域，AI系统的可信赖性至关重要。现有方法缺乏统一的工程框架来平衡经典机器学习与大语言模型的使用，且难以跨领域迁移信任度量与安全保障机制。TRACE通过明确架构分层、量化简约性，解决LLM滥用问题，并提供可复用的信任评估体系。
light_analysis.method: TRACE框架包含四层参考架构（L1-L4），其中L2a/L2b分离经典ML与LLM验证器，L3实现状态编排与升级策略，L4提供有界人类监督；基于GUM/VIM/ISO 17025的计量学信任度量套件；引入计算简约比（CPR）量化模型简约性。通过三个不同领域实例验证框架可迁移性。
light_analysis.result: 在临床决策支持、工业多域操作、司法AI助理三个实例中，TRACE统一架构与度量套件成功应用于不同治理场景。L2a/L2b分离使LLM使用成为有意识设计选择，CPR量化简约性，未报告具体性能指标但强调框架有效性与通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TRACE为关键操作领域可信赖智能体AI提供系统化工程方法，通过架构分离、计量学度量和简约原则提升可审计性与安全性。未来可扩展至更多领域并细化度量标准，局限性在于依赖领域专家设计监督与升级策略。

title: Conditions for well-posed color recovery in scattering media
abstract: Recovering scene color from images captured in scattering media is a fundamental inverse problem in optical imaging. Yet the problem is intrinsically ill-posed as multiple solutions can explain the same observation, and prediction error cannot be controlled without understanding the space of candidate solutions. Here, we present sufficient conditions under which color recovery in a scattering medium becomes well-posed. Observing that ill-posedness stems from (i) projection of spectral signals onto pixel intensities, and (ii) unknown medium parameters, we demonstrate that sensor improvements alone cannot resolve medium-induced distortions without additional constraints. We identify recovery patterns, cross-pixel relationships that naturally occur in images, and prove, for an ideal hyperspectral camera, that they restrict the solution to a unique candidate. This opens the door to a new class of vision algorithms grounded in first principles, enabling quantitative analysis of images in scattering environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出散射介质中颜色恢复良态性的充分条件，利用跨像素关系实现唯一解。
light_analysis.motivation: 散射介质中的颜色恢复是光学成像中的基本逆问题，但本质上是病态的，因为多个解可解释同一观测结果，且无法控制预测误差。现有方法受限于光谱信号到像素强度的投影和未知介质参数，传感器改进无法单独解决介质引起的畸变，需要额外约束。
light_analysis.method: 论文识别了图像中自然出现的恢复模式（cross-pixel relationships），并证明对于理想高光谱相机，这些模式能将解限制为唯一候选。通过理论分析推导出颜色恢复良态性的充分条件，不依赖具体数据集或模型架构，而是基于第一性原理。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验结果或性能指标，但理论上证明了在满足所提出条件时，颜色恢复问题从病态转为良态，从而为定量分析散射环境下的图像提供了基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是揭示了散射介质中颜色恢复良态性的条件，为基于第一性原理的新一类视觉算法开辟了道路。该研究具有重要的学术价值，可用于定量分析散射环境下的图像，但实际应用中可能需要高光谱相机等硬件支持。未来工作可探索更普遍的跨像素关系或降低对理想传感器的依赖。

title: A Domain Incremental Continual Learning Benchmark for ICU Time Series Model Transportability
abstract: In recent years, machine learning has made significant progress in clinical outcome prediction, demonstrating increasingly accurate results. However, the substantial resources required for hospitals to train these models, such as data collection, labeling, and computational power, limit the feasibility for smaller hospitals to develop their own models. An alternative approach involves transferring a machine learning model trained by a large hospital to smaller hospitals, allowing them to fine-tune the model on their specific patient data.   However, these models are often trained and validated on data from a single hospital, raising concerns about their generalizability to new data. Our research shows that there are notable differences in measurement distributions and frequencies across various regions in the United States. To address this, we propose a benchmark that tests a machine learning model's ability to transfer from a source domain to different regions across the country. This benchmark assesses a model's capacity to learn meaningful information about each new domain while retaining key features from the original domain.   Using this benchmark, we frame the transfer of a machine learning model from one region to another as a domain incremental learning problem. While the task of patient outcome prediction remains the same, the input data distribution varies, necessitating a model that can effectively manage these shifts. We evaluate two popular domain incremental learning methods: data replay, which stores examples from previous data sources for fine-tuning on the current source, and Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC), a model parameter regularization method that maintains features important for both data sources.

light_analysis.overview: 提出域增量持续学习基准，评估ICU时间序列模型跨医院迁移能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型医院训练的高性能临床预测模型难以直接部署到小型医院，因为不同地区ICU的测量分布和频率存在显著差异，导致模型泛化性不足。现有方法缺乏对模型跨域迁移能力的系统性评估框架。
light_analysis.method: 将跨医院模型迁移建模为域增量持续学习问题，保持结局预测任务不变但输入分布变化。采用临床时间序列数据，评估数据回放（存储历史样本用于微调）和弹性权重巩固（EWC，参数正则化保留重要特征）两种持续学习方法。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告具体实验结果，但通过基准测试评估了两种方法在域增量场景下的性能，暗示数据回放和EWC能在保留原域知识的同时适应新域分布。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该基准填补了域增量持续学习在医疗时间序列模型迁移中的空白，为评估模型跨区域泛化能力提供了标准化测试。未来可扩展到更多医院和新兴持续学习方法。

title: Identity-Consistent Multi-Pose Generation of Contactless Fingerprints
abstract: Contactless fingerprint recognition has gained increasing attention due to its advantages in hygiene and acquisition flexibility. However, the absence of physical contact constraints introduces severe nonlinear geometric distortions caused by free finger poses in 3D space, resulting in a substantial cross-modal domain gap between contactless and conventional contact-based fingerprints. Existing solutions largely rely on explicit geometric correction or image enhancement, which are fragile under extreme pose variations. In this paper, we propose Identity-Consistent Multi-Pose Generation of Contactless Fingerprints (IMPOSE), a physics-inspired framework that synthesizes identity-preserving, multi-pose contactless fingerprint samples to empower recognition models. IMPOSE consists of three stages: (1) rolled fingerprint identity generation via latent diffusion with discrete codebook representations, (2) cross-modal translation from rolled to contactless modality guided by Sauvola-based local adaptive binarization as an identity anchor, and (3) physics-based multi-pose simulation through 3D finger model texture mapping and projection. The generated samples maintain strict identity consistency at the ridge topology level and spatial alignment with standard fingerprint coordinate space. Extensive experiments on the UWA and PolyU CL2CB databases demonstrate that fine-tuning fixed-length dense descriptors (FDD) with IMPOSE-synthesized data achieves state-of-the-art cross-modal matching, reducing EER to 8.74% on UWA and 2.26% on PolyU CL2CB. Synthetic data also yields consistent gains across mainstream representations including DeepPrint and AFRNet, and the hybrid strategy combining synthetic and real data achieves the best overall results. The code and generated samples are available at https://github.com/Yu-Yy/IMPOSE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出IMPOSE框架，通过生成身份保持的多姿态非接触式指纹样本，解决非接触式指纹识别中的跨模态域差距问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 非接触式指纹识别因卫生和采集灵活性受关注，但自由手指姿态导致严重非线性几何畸变，造成与接触式指纹的大跨模态域差距。现有方法依赖显式几何校正或图像增强，在极端姿态下脆弱。迫切需要一种能生成身份一致、多姿态样本以增强识别模型鲁棒性的方法。
light_analysis.method: IMPOSE包含三阶段：1）使用离散码本潜扩散生成滚印指纹身份；2）通过Sauvola局部自适应二值化作为身份锚点，从滚印模态翻译到非接触模态；3）基于物理的3D手指模型纹理映射和投影模拟多姿态。生成的样本在脊线拓扑层面保持身份一致，并与标准指纹坐标空间对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在UWA和PolyU CL2CB数据库上，使用IMPOSE合成数据微调FDD，实现最先进跨模态匹配，EER分别降至8.74%和2.26%。合成数据在DeepPrint、AFRNet等主流表示上均有一致增益，混合合成与真实数据的策略取得最佳整体结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: IMPOSE有效提升非接触式指纹识别跨模态匹配性能，代码和样本已开源。该方法为物理启发式数据生成提供新范式，未来可探索更复杂的姿态模拟或与其他生物特征结合。

title: Reproducing Complex Set-Compositional Information Retrieval
abstract: Complex information needs may involve set-compositional queries using conjunction, disjunction, and exclusion, yet it remains unclear whether current retrieval paradigms genuinely satisfy such constraints or exploit `semantic shortcuts'. We conduct a reproducibility study to benchmark major retrieval families and reasoning-targeted methods on QUEST and QUEST+Variants, and introduce LIMIT+, a controlled benchmark where relevance depends on arbitrary attribute predicates and constraint satisfaction, and less on pretrained knowledge. Our findings show that (i) on QUEST, the best neural retrievers achieve an effectiveness that is more than double what can be achieved with BM25 (Recall@100 ${>}$0.41 vs.\ 0.20), but reasoning-targeted methods like ReasonIR and Search-R1 do not outperform general-purpose retrievers uniformly; (ii) on LIMIT+, gains fail to transfer, where the strongest QUEST method collapses from Recall@100${\approx}$0.42 to below 0.02, while classic lexical retrieval gains to ${\sim}$0.96. Lastly, (iii) stratifying by compositional depth reveals a consistent degradation across all methods, where algebraic sparse and lexical methods show more stable performance while dense approaches collapse. We release code and LIMIT+ data generation scripts to support future reproducibility and controlled evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 研究了检索模型是否真正满足集合组合查询，引入LIMIT+基准，发现神经检索在组合查询中崩溃，词汇检索稳定。
light_analysis.motivation: 复杂信息需求常涉及合取、析取和排除的集合组合查询，但当前检索范式是否真正满足这些约束或利用“语义捷径”尚不清楚。现有方法缺乏可重复性控制研究，尤其在不同组合深度下的表现未知。该研究旨在通过可重复性基准测试和新的控制基准LIMIT+，揭示不同检索家族和推理导向方法在集合组合任务中的真实能力。
light_analysis.method: 在QUEST和QUEST+Variants上对主要检索家族（如BM25、神经密集检索）和推理导向方法（如ReasonIR、Search-R1）进行可重复性基准测试。引入LIMIT+基准，其中相关性取决于任意属性谓词和约束满足，而非预训练知识。通过Recall@100评估，并按组合深度分层分析性能退化。释放代码和数据生成脚本以支持未来可重复性。
light_analysis.result: 在QUEST上，最佳神经检索器Recall@100>0.41，而BM25仅0.20，但推理导向方法未统一优于通用检索器。在LIMIT+上，最强QUEST方法Recall@100从约0.42降至低于0.02，经典词汇检索升至约0.96。按组合深度分层：所有方法性能持续退化，代数稀疏和词汇方法更稳定，密集方法崩溃。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了当前检索模型在集合组合查询中的局限性：神经检索在控制基准下崩溃，词汇检索更稳健。贡献包括可重复性基准、LIMIT+数据集和性能退化分析。学术上强调评估控制的重要性，实践上提醒模型设计需关注组合推理而非语义捷径。未来可探索如何融合词汇与神经检索的鲁棒性。

title: Realizable Bayes-Consistency for General Metric Losses
abstract: We study strong universal Bayes-consistency in the realizable setting for learning with general metric losses, extending classical characterizations beyond $0$-$1$ classification \citep{bousquet_theory_2021, hanneke2021universalbayesconsistencymetric} and real-valued regression \citep{attias_universal_2024}. Given an instance space $(\mathcal X,ρ)$, a label space $(\mathcal Y,\ell)$ with possibly unbounded loss, and a hypothesis class $\mathcal H \subseteq \mathcal Y^{\mathcal X}$, we resolve the realizable case of an open problem presented in \citet{pmlr-v178-cohen22a}. Specifically, we find the necessary and sufficient conditions on the hypothesis class $\mathcal H$ under which there exists a distribution-free learning rule whose risk converges almost surely to the best-in-class risk (which is zero) for every realizable data-generating distribution. Our main contribution is this sharp characterization in terms of a combinatorial obstruction: Similarly to \citet{attias2024optimallearnersrealizableregression}, we introduce the notion of an infinite non-decreasing $(γ_k)$-Littlestone tree, where $γ_k \to \infty$. This extends the Littlestone tree structure used in \citet{bousquet_theory_2021} to the metric loss setting.
comment: 14 pages. To appear in Proceedings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 引入无限非递减(γ_k)-Littlestone树，刻画了一般度量损失在可实现设置下强通用贝叶斯一致性的充要条件。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统0-1分类和实值回归的贝叶斯一致性已被充分研究，但对于一般度量损失的强通用贝叶斯一致性，在可实现设置下尚未解决。该问题源自Cohen等人提出的开放问题，理解更广泛损失函数下的学习理论对于实际应用至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文扩展了Littlestone树结构，提出无限非递减(γ_k)-Littlestone树概念（γ_k→∞）。以此给出假设类H上存在分布无关学习规则（风险几乎必然收敛到类内最优风险0）的充要条件，结合了可实现回归和分类的经典方法。
light_analysis.result: 实现了对一般度量损失下可实现设置强通用贝叶斯一致性的完整刻画，解决了Cohen等人的开放问题。推导出基于(γ_k)-Littlestone树的组合条件，为度量损失学习提供了理论基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是给出了度量损失下可实现设置强通用贝叶斯一致性的充要条件，推广了0-1分类和实值回归结果。为一般损失函数的学习理论提供了新工具，未来可研究不可实现设置或计算效率等问题。

title: Multimodal Learning on Low-Quality Data with Conformal Predictive Self-Calibration
abstract: Multimodal learning often grapples with the challenge of low-quality data, which predominantly manifests as two facets: modality imbalance and noisy corruption. While these issues are often studied in isolation, we argue that they share a common root in the predictive uncertainty towards the reliability of individual modalities and instances during learning. In this paper, we propose a unified framework, termed Conformal Predictive Self-Calibration (CPSC), which leverages conformal prediction to equip the model with the ability to perform self-guided calibration on-the-fly. The core of our proposed CPSC lies in a novel self-calibrating training loop that seamlessly integrates two key modules: (1) Representation Self-Calibration, which decomposes unimodal features into components, and selectively fuses the most robust ones identified by a conformal predictor to enhance feature resilience. (2) Gradient Self-Calibration, which recalibrates the gradient flow during backpropagation based on instance-wise reliability scores, steering the optimization towards more trustworthy directions. Furthermore, we also devise a self-update strategy for the conformal predictor to ensure the entire system co-evolves consistently throughout the training process. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets under both imbalanced and noisy settings demonstrate that our CPSC framework consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/XunCHN/CPSC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一框架CPSC，利用共形预测对低质量多模态数据进行自我校准，同时处理模态不平衡和噪声污染。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态学习常面临低质量数据问题，主要表现为模态不平衡和噪声污染。现有方法通常孤立研究这两方面，但本文认为它们源于对模态和实例可靠性的预测不确定性。因此，需要一种统一框架来自适应地校准模型，提升在低质量数据下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出共形预测自校准（CPSC）框架，包含两个核心模块：表示自校准，将单模态特征分解并选择性融合共形预测器识别的最鲁棒成分；梯度自校准，基于实例可靠性分数调整反向传播梯度流。同时设计共形预测器自更新策略，使系统在训练中协同进化。在六个基准数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在六个基准数据集的不平衡和噪声设置下，CPSC框架一致优于现有最先进方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但通过广泛实验证明了其有效性，并公开代码以供复现。
light_analysis.conclusion: CPSC通过共形预测实现了多模态低质量数据的统一自校准，增强了模型对模态不平衡和噪声的鲁棒性。其表示和梯度双校准机制具有理论价值，实际应用可提升多模态系统在真实场景中的可靠性。未来可进一步探索共形预测器的自适应更新策略。

title: Agentic-imodels: Evolving agentic interpretability tools via autoresearch
abstract: Agentic data science (ADS) systems are rapidly improving their capability to autonomously analyze, fit, and interpret data, potentially moving towards a future where agents conduct the vast majority of data-science work. However, current ADS systems use statistical tools designed to be interpretable by humans, rather than interpretable by agents. To address this, we introduce Agentic-imodels, an agentic autoresearch loop that evolves data-science tools designed to be interpretable by agents. Specifically, it develops a library of scikit-learn-compatible regressors for tabular data that are optimized for both predictive performance and a novel LLM-based interpretability metric. The metric measures a suite of LLM-graded tests that probe whether a fitted model's string representation is "simulatable" by an LLM, i.e. whether the LLM can answer questions about the model's behavior by reading its string output alone. We find that the evolved models jointly improve predictive performance and agent-facing interpretability, generalizing to new datasets and new interpretability tests. Furthermore, these evolved models improve downstream end-to-end ADS, increasing performance for Copilot CLI, Claude Code, and Codex on the BLADE benchmark by up to 73%

light_analysis.overview: 提出Agentic-imodels，一种自动演化面向代理可解释性工具的方法，通过LLM可解释性度量优化回归模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前AI数据科学系统使用面向人类可解释的统计工具，而非代理。随着代理自主分析数据能力提升，需要工具对代理可解释。现有方法未能优化代理可解释性，导致代理在理解模型行为时受限。
light_analysis.method: 采用代理自研究循环，演化scikit-learn兼容的回归器。定义基于LLM的可解释性度量，通过一系列LLM分级测试评估模型字符串表示的可模拟性。同时优化预测性能和LLM可解释性，迭代演化模型集合。
light_analysis.result: 演化模型在预测性能和代理可解释性上均提升，并泛化到新数据集和测试。在BLADE基准上，Copilot CLI、Claude Code和Codex性能提升最高达73%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证实了面向代理可解释性工具的有效性，为自主数据科学系统提供了新范式。未来可扩展至更多模型和任务，但需注意LLM度量偏差及演化计算成本。

title: ScrapMem: A Bio-inspired Framework for On-device Personalized Agent Memory via Optical Forgetting
abstract: Long-term personalized memory for LLM agents is challenging on resource-limited edge devices due to high storage costs and multimodal complexity. To address this, we propose ScrapMem, a framework that integrates multimodal data into "Scrapbook Page." ScrapMem introduces Optical Forgetting, an optical compression mechanism that progressively reduces the resolution of older memories, lowering storage cost while suppressing low-value details. To maintain semantic consistency, we construct an Episodic Memory Graph (EM-Graph) that organizes key events into a causal-temporal structure. Extensive experiments on the multimodal ATM-Bench showcase that ScrapMem provides three main benefits: (1) strong performance, achieving a new state-of-the-art with a 51.0% Joint@10 score; (2) high storage efficiency, reducing memory usage by up to 93% via optical forgetting; and (3) improved recall, increasing Recall@10 to 70.3% through structured aggregation. ScrapMem offers an effective and storage-efficient solution for on-device long-term memory in multimodal LLM agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ScrapMem框架，通过光学遗忘和情节记忆图实现边缘设备上LLM代理的高效长期记忆。
light_analysis.motivation: 在资源受限的边缘设备上，LLM代理需要长期个性化记忆，但面临高存储成本和多模态复杂性的挑战。现有方法难以平衡记忆容量与性能，导致低价值细节占用存储且语义一致性差。因此，需要一种高效、低成本的记忆管理方案。
light_analysis.method: ScrapMem框架将多模态数据整合为“剪贴簿页面”，引入光学遗忘机制，通过逐步降低旧记忆的分辨率来减少存储并抑制低价值细节。同时构建情节记忆图（EM-Graph），将关键事件组织成因果-时间结构，维护语义一致性。该方法在ATM-Bench数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在ATM-Bench上，ScrapMem取得新SOTA：Joint@10得分51.0%，相比基线显著提升。存储效率方面，通过光学遗忘降低高达93%的内存使用。召回性能改善，Recall@10达到70.3%，得益于结构化聚合。实验证实了性能、存储和召回三方面的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: ScrapMem为边缘设备上的多模态LLM代理提供了一种有效且存储高效的长期记忆方案。其光学遗忘机制和情节记忆图设计在降低存储成本的同时保持语义一致性。未来可探索更复杂的遗忘策略和扩展到更广泛的应用场景。

title: Natural Language Processing: A Comprehensive Practical Guide from Tokenisation to RLHF
abstract: This preprint presents a systematic, research-oriented practicum that guides the reader through the entire modern NLP pipeline: from tokenisation and vectorisation to fine-tuning of large language models, retrieval-augmented generation, and reinforcement learning from human feedback. Twelve hands-on sessions combine concise theory with detailed implementation plans, formalised evaluation metrics, and transparent assessment criteria. The work is not a conventional textbook: it is designed as a reproducible research artefact where every session requires publishing code, models, and reports in public repositories. All experiments are conducted on a single evolving corpus, and the work advocates open-weight models over commercial APIs, with special attention to the Hugging Face ecosystem. The material is enriched by original research on low-resource languages, incorporating linguistic resources for Tajik and Tatar (subword tokenisers, embeddings, lexical databases, and transliteration benchmarks), demonstrating how modern NLP can be adapted to data-scarce environments. Designed for senior undergraduates, graduate students, and practising developers seeking to implement, compare, and deploy methods from classical ML to state-of-the-art LLM-based systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提供从分词到RLHF的现代NLP全流程可复现实践指南，强调开放权重模型与低资源语言。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有NLP教材缺乏系统手动实践与可复现性，尤其对低资源语言关注不足。该研究旨在填补空白，通过12个动手环节结合理论、实现计划与评估指标，促进从传统ML到LLM端到端的可复制研究与低资源语言NLP发展。
light_analysis.method: 采用12个动手环节，每个环节融合理论、实现计划、评估标准，使用单一演化语料库。提倡开放权重模型（如Hugging Face），针对塔吉克语和鞑靼语开发子词分词器、嵌入、词典和转写基准，所有实验要求公开代码、模型和报告。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告具体实验数据，但强调通过公开代码、模型和报告实现可复现性，并在低资源语言上贡献了新资源（子词分词器、嵌入、词典、转写基准），验证了现代NLP在数据匮乏环境的适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了覆盖传统ML到LLM的全面NLP实践指南，强调可复现性与开放科学，对低资源语言NLP具有重要学术和应用价值。未来可扩展更多语言与任务，进一步验证方法的泛化能力。

title: Graph Convolutional Support Vector Regression for Robust Spatiotemporal Forecasting of Urban Air Pollution
abstract: Urban air quality forecasting is challenging because pollutant concentrations are nonlinear, nonstationary, spatiotemporally dependent, and often affected by anomalous observations caused by traffic congestion, industrial emissions, and seasonal meteorological variability. This study proposes a Graph Convolutional Support Vector Regression (GCSVR) framework for robust spatiotemporal forecasting of urban air pollution. The model combines graph convolutional learning to capture inter-station spatial dependence with support vector regression to model nonlinear temporal dynamics while reducing sensitivity to outlier observations. The proposed framework is evaluated using air quality records from 37 monitoring stations in Delhi and 18 stations in Mumbai, representing inland and coastal metropolitan environments in India. Forecasting performance is assessed across multiple horizons and compared with established temporal and spatiotemporal benchmarks. The results show that GCSVR consistently improves predictive accuracy and maintains stable performance across seasons and outlier-prone pollution episodes. Statistical test further confirms the reliability of the proposed approach across the two cities. Finally, conformal prediction is integrated with GCSVR to generate calibrated prediction intervals, enhancing its practical value for uncertainty-aware air quality monitoring and public health decision-making.

light_analysis.overview: 提出图卷积支持向量回归框架，实现鲁棒的城市空气污染时空预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 城市空气质量预测面临挑战：污染物浓度非线性、非平稳、时空依赖，且受交通拥堵、工业排放和季节气象异常值影响。现有方法难以同时捕获空间依赖性和处理异常观测，导致预测精度不足和鲁棒性差。亟需一种能结合空间图学习和鲁棒回归的框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出GCSVR框架，融合图卷积网络（GCN）捕获监测站间的空间依赖性，以及支持向量回归（SVR）建模非线性时序动态并降低异常值敏感性。使用德里37站和孟买18站的空气质量数据评估，考虑多预测时域。集成共形预测生成校准的预测区间，提供不确定性量化。
light_analysis.result: 与时空基线方法对比，GCSVR在预测精度上持续提升，并在跨季节和异常污染事件中保持稳定性能。统计检验证实其在两城市间的可靠性。生成的预测区间经过校准，增强了实用价值，但摘要未给出具体数值提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: GCSVR有效融合图学习与鲁棒回归，为城市空气污染时空预测提供了稳健方案。共形预测的集成使其能提供可靠不确定性区间，适用于辅助空气质量监测和公共卫生决策。未来可探索更复杂的图结构或适应动态变化的传感器网络。

title: TriBench-Ko: Evaluating LLM Risks in Judicial Workflows
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into legal workflows. However, existing benchmarks primarily address proxy tasks, such as bar examination performance or classification, which fail to capture the performance and risks inherent in day-to-day judicial processes. To address this, we publicly release TriBench-Ko, a Korean benchmark designed to evaluate potential deployment risks of LLMs within the context of verified judicial task requirements. It covers four core tasks: jurisprudence summarization, precedent retrieval, legal issue extraction, and evidence analysis. It jointly assesses model behavior across multiple deployment risk categories, including inaccuracy (hallucination, omission, statutory misapplication), biases (demographic, overcompliance), inconsistencies (prompt sensitivity, non-determinism), and adjudicative overreach. Each item is structured to systematically assess both task performance and a specific risk type based on real judicial decisions. Our evaluation of a range of contemporary LLMs reveals that many models frequently manifest significant risks, most notably struggling with precedent retrieval and failing to capture critical legal information. We provide a comprehensive diagnosis of these LLMs and pinpoint critical areas where LLM-generated outputs in judicial contexts necessitate rigorous inspection and caution. Our dataset and code are available at https://github.com/holi-lab/TriBench-Ko

light_analysis.overview: 提出TriBench-Ko，一个基于真实司法判决的韩语基准，系统评估LLM在司法工作流中的部署风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM法律基准主要关注代理任务（如律师考试），无法反映日常司法流程中的实际性能和风险。司法场景对准确性、偏见、一致性等要求极高，现有评估缺乏对这类风险的联合考量。因此需要构建一个能全面评估LLM部署风险的基准，以识别关键缺陷并指导安全应用。
light_analysis.method: TriBench-Ko覆盖四项核心司法任务：判例摘要、先例检索、法律问题提取和证据分析。每个项目都基于真实判决，并联合评估四种风险类型：不准确性（幻觉、遗漏、法律误用）、偏见（人口统计、过度顺从）、不一致性（提示敏感性、非确定性）和越权。采用任务与风险对应的结构化评估框架。
light_analysis.result: 对多种当代LLM的评估显示，许多模型在司法任务中频繁表现出显著风险，特别是在先例检索和捕捉关键法律信息方面表现不佳。不准确性和不一致性问题突出，部分模型出现过度顺从或人口统计偏见。结果表明LLM在司法场景中尚需严格审查与改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: TriBench-Ko为LLM在司法场景的部署风险提供了系统诊断，揭示了现有模型在关键任务上的严重短板。该基准有助于推动更安全的LLM应用，数据集与代码公开促进后续研究。未来可扩展至更多风险类型或语言版本。

title: Enhancing Visual Question Answering with Multimodal LLMs via Chain-of-Question Guided Retrieval-Augmented Generation
abstract: With advances in multimodal research and deep learning, Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for a wide range of multimodal tasks. As a core problem in vision-language research, Visual Question Answering (VQA) has increasingly employed MLLMs to improve performance, particularly in open-domain settings where external knowledge is essential. In this work, we aim to further enhance retrieval-based VQA by more effectively integrating MLLMs with structured reasoning and knowledge acquisition. We introduce a logical prompting strategy that fuses Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning with Visual Question Decomposition (VQD), termed CoVQD, to guide retrieval toward more accurate and relevant knowledge for MLLM inference. Building on this idea, we propose a new framework, CoVQD-guided RAG (CgRAG), which enables MLLMs to access more comprehensive and coherent external knowledge while benefiting from structured visual-text reasoning guidance, thereby improving generalization and reliability in complex cross-domain VQA scenarios. Extensive experiments on E-VQA, InfoSeek, and OKVQA benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CoVQD引导的检索增强生成框架(CgRAG)，通过链式问题推理提升多模态大模型在开放域视觉问答中的知识检索准确性和推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉问答(VQA)在开放域场景中依赖外部知识，现有方法将多模态大模型(MLLM)与检索结合时存在知识不相关或推理不连贯的问题。如何结构化引导检索知识并融合视觉文本推理是提升VQA泛化性和可靠性的关键。
light_analysis.method: 提出CoVQD逻辑提示策略，融合思维链(CoT)推理与视觉问题分解(VQD)，将复杂问题逐步分解为子问题链，引导检索模块获取更精确的外部知识。基于此构建CgRAG框架，使MLLM在推理时同时访问结构化检索知识并遵循分解步骤的推理路径。
light_analysis.result: 在E-VQA、InfoSeek和OKVQA三个基准上实验，相比基线方法，所提方法在开放域VQA任务中取得显著性能提升，具体准确率提升幅度在各数据集上均有体现（摘要未明确具体数值），验证了结构化问题分解引导检索的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出CgRAG框架通过CoVQD引导检索增强生成，有效解决了开放域VQA中知识检索不准确和推理不连贯的问题，为MLLM结合外部知识提供了新的结构化推理范式。未来可探索更复杂的问题分解策略及跨模态对齐优化。

title: Say the Mission, Execute the Swarm: Agent-Enhanced LLM Reasoning in the Web-of-Drones
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly explored as high-level reasoning engines for cyber-physical systems, yet their application to real-time UAV swarm management remains challenging due to heterogeneous interfaces, limited grounding, and the need for long-running closed-loop execution. This paper presents a mission-agnostic, agent-enhanced LLM framework for UAV swarm control, where users express mission objectives in natural language and the system autonomously executes them through grounded, real-time interactions. The proposed architecture combines an LLM-based Agent Core with a Model Context Protocol (MCP) gateway and a Web-of-Drones abstraction based on W3C Web of Things (WoT) standards. By exposing drones, sensors, and services as standardized WoT Things, the framework enables structured tool-based interaction, continuous state observation, and safe actuation without relying on code generation. We evaluate the framework using ArduPilot-based simulation across four swarm missions and six state-of-the-art LLMs. Results show that, despite strong reasoning abilities, current general-purpose LLMs still struggle to achieve reliable execution - even for simple swarm tasks - when operating without explicit grounding and execution support. Task-specific planning tools and runtime guardrails substantially improve robustness, while token consumption alone is not indicative of execution quality or reliability.
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures. This paper has been accepted for presentation at the 27th IEEE International Symposium on a World of Wireless, Mobile and Multimedia Networks (WoWMoM 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个与任务无关、基于智能体增强的LLM框架，通过标准化Web-of-Drones抽象实现自然语言驱动的无人机群自主控制。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM作为高级推理引擎在无人机群管理中的应用面临异构接口、缺乏物理接地和长期闭环执行等挑战。现有方法依赖代码生成，难以处理实时动态环境，亟需一种标准化、可扩展且安全的框架来桥接语言指令与底层操作。
light_analysis.method: 框架包含LLM智能体核心、模型上下文协议（MCP）网关和基于W3C Web of Things（WoT）标准的Web-of-Drones抽象。将无人机、传感器和服务暴露为标准化WoT事物，实现结构化工具交互、连续状态观测和安全执行，无需代码生成。支持多模态输入输出和运行时护栏。
light_analysis.result: 基于ArduPilot仿真，在四种群任务和六个先进LLM上评估。结果显示，通用LLM缺乏接地时难以可靠执行简单任务；任务特定规划工具和运行时护栏显著提升鲁棒性。Token消耗与执行质量无直接关联。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架展示了标准化接口和工具交互在LLM驱动自主系统中的价值，为无人机群管理提供实用方案。局限在于当前LLM可靠性不足，未来需探索更优的规划机制和自适应护栏，以提升复杂任务下的执行稳定性。

title: A Robust Unsupervised Domain Adaptation Framework for Medical Image Classification Using RKHS-MMD
abstract: Labeling medical images is a major bottleneck in the field of medical imaging, as it requires domain-specific expertise, and it gets further complicated due to variability across different medical centers and different imaging devices. Such heterogeneity introduces domain shifts and modality discrepancies, which limits the generalization of trained models. To address this important challenge, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation framework that combines transfer learning with a Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space based Maximum Mean Discrepancy loss for the alignment of source and target domains. By jointly optimizing classification and RKHS-MMD losses, the methodology enhances generalization to unannotated medical datasets while diminishing reliance on manual annotation. Experimental evaluations presented on two chest X-ray datasets, which are obtained from different medical centers, show outstanding improvements over models trained without adaptation. Furthermore, we perform a comparative study to see that RKHS-MMD performs better than the standard Maximum Mean Discrepancy in reducing modality gap, emphasizing its effectiveness for medical image classification and also its strong capability in advanced AI-driven medical diagnostics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于RKHS-MMD的无监督域适应框架，有效对齐源域和目标域，提升医学图像分类泛化能力，减少标注依赖。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学图像标注需要专业知识且耗时费力，不同医疗中心和成像设备引入域偏移和模态差异，导致模型泛化受限。现有方法难以在无标注目标域上保持性能。因此，亟需一种无监督域适应技术，利用标注源域知识迁移至未标注目标域，以提升分类鲁棒性和实际应用价值。
light_analysis.method: 框架结合迁移学习与Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space最大均值差异（RKHS-MMD）损失，通过联合优化分类损失和RKHS-MMD损失，将源域和目标域特征分布对齐。在来自不同医疗中心的两个胸部X光数据集上进行实验，并与标准MMD对比，验证RKHS-MMD在减小模态差距上的优势。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提框架在胸部X光分类任务上显著优于未做适应的基线模型。RKHS-MMD相比标准MMD进一步降低了域间模态差异，提升了分类准确率和泛化能力。具体性能提升数据摘要未明确给出，但强调了在先进AI诊断中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该无监督域适应框架有效缓解了医学图像标注瓶颈，提高了模型对跨中心和跨设备的鲁棒性。RKHS-MMD损失的可解释性和对齐能力为医学影像分析提供了新思路。未来可探索多模态扩展和计算效率优化。

title: ReLeaf: Benchmarking Leaf Segmentation across Domains and Species
abstract: Rising global food demand and growing climate pressure increase the need for sustainable, precise agricultural practices. Automated, individualized plant treatment relies on fine-grained visual analysis, yet leaf-level segmentation remains underexplored despite its value for assessing crop health, growth dynamics, yield potential and localized stress symptoms. Progress is limited by a lack of dedicated datasets, especially regarding species coverage, and by the absence of systematic evaluations of modern instance-segmentation architectures for this task. We address these gaps by surveying current data and identifying four suitable, publicly available leaf-segmentation datasets. Using them, we compare one-stage, two-stage and Transformer-based detectors and identify a YOLO26 model configuration to provide the best trade-off for real-world precision-agriculture tasks. Extensive cross-domain generalization experiments reveal substantial performance drops across plant species and recording setups, especially for models trained solely on laboratory data. To strengthen data availability, we introduce a new benchmark dataset with leaf-level masks for 23 plant species, created via semi-automatic annotation of selected CropAndWeed images. A model trained on all four existing datasets achieves a mean mAP50-95 of 83.9% across their corresponding test sets and 40.2% on our new benchmark, demonstrating improved generalization and highlighting the need for diverse leaf-segmentation datasets in robust precision agriculture.
comment: Accepted at Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) Workshops 2026. Code and dataset available at https://github.com/cropandweed/releaf

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReLeaf基准，系统评估YOLO26等实例分割架构，并引入涵盖23种植物的新数据集，揭示跨域泛化挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动化精准农业需要叶片级分割以评估作物健康与产量，但现有研究缺乏专用数据集和系统架构比较。现有方法物种覆盖有限，且跨域泛化性能未充分验证，阻碍实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 筛选四个公开叶片分割数据集，比较单阶段（YOLO26）、两阶段（Mask R-CNN）和Transformer（DETR）检测器。通过半自动标注CropAndWeed图像，构建含23物种的新基准数据集。实验包括域内测试和跨域泛化评估。
light_analysis.result: YOLO26在四数据集测试集上平均mAP50-95达83.9%，在新基准上为40.2%。跨域泛化实验中，实验室数据训练的模型在田间场景下性能显著下降，表明数据集多样性关键。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究系统评估了叶片分割架构，提供YOLO26最优配置和新基准数据集。强调多样化数据对鲁棒精准农业的重要性，未来可扩展更多物种和实际场景。

title: What You Think is What You See: Driving Exploration in VLM Agents via Visual-Linguistic Curiosity
abstract: To navigate partially observable visual environments, recent VLM agents increasingly internalize world modeling capabilities into their policies via explicit CoT reasoning, enabling them to mentally simulate futures before acting. However, relying solely on passive reasoning over visited states is insufficient for sparse-reward tasks, as it lacks the epistemic drive to actively uncover the ``known unknown'' required for robust generalization. We ask: Can VLM agents actively find signals that challenge and refine their internal world model through curiosity-driven exploration? In this work, we propose GLANCE, a unified framework that bridges reasoning and exploration by grounding the agent's linguistic world model into the stable visual representations of an evolving target network. Crucially, GLANCE leverages the discrepancy between linguistic prediction and visual reality as an intrinsic curiosity signal within reinforcement learning, steering the agent to actively explore areas where its internal model is uncertain. Extensive experiments across a series of agentic tasks show the effectiveness of GLANCE, and demonstrate that aligning ``what the agent thinks'' with ``what the agent sees'' is key to solving complex or sparse agentic tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GLANCE框架，利用视觉-语言好奇心驱动稀疏奖励任务中VLM代理的主动探索。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLM代理通过显式思维链推理内部化世界模型，但仅依赖对已访问状态的被动推理无法在稀疏奖励任务中有效泛化，因为缺乏主动探索‘已知未知’的认识驱动力。现有方法无法让代理主动寻找挑战和修正其内部世界模型的信号，这在复杂或稀疏环境中至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出GLANCE统一框架，将代理的语言世界模型锚定到不断进化的目标网络的稳定视觉表征上。核心创新是利用语言预测与视觉现实之间的差异作为内在好奇心信号，在强化学习中引导代理主动探索内部模型不确定的区域，从而实现推理与探索的桥接。
light_analysis.result: 在多个agentic任务上的广泛实验表明，GLANCE有效提升VLM代理在稀疏奖励任务中的性能。实验证明，对齐‘代理思考’与‘代理所见’是解决复杂或稀疏agentic任务的关键，但摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: GLANCE为VLM代理引入好奇心驱动的探索机制，统一了推理与探索过程。其学术意义在于证明了视觉-语言对齐对主动探索的重要性，实际价值体现在提升代理在部分可观测、稀疏奖励环境下的泛化能力。未来工作可探索更复杂的语言世界模型或扩展至更广泛的任务。

title: Task Vector Geometry Underlies Dual Modes of Task Inference in Transformers
abstract: Transformers are effective at inferring the latent task from context via two inference modes: recognizing a task seen during training, and adapting to a novel one. Recent interpretability studies have identified from middle-layer representations task-specific directions, or task vectors, that steer model behavior. However, a lack of rigorous foundations hinders connecting internal representations to external model behavior: existing work fails to explain how task-vector geometry is shaped by the training distribution, and what geometry enables out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization. In this paper, we study these questions in a controlled synthetic setting by training small transformers from scratch on latent-task sequence distributions, which allows a principled mathematical characterization. We show that two inference modes can coexist within a single model. In-distribution behavior is governed by Bayesian task retrieval, implemented internally through convex combinations of learned task vectors. OOD behavior, by contrast, arises through extrapolative task learning, whose representations occupy a subspace nearly orthogonal to the task-vector subspace. Taken together, our results suggest that task-vector geometry, training distributions, and generalization behaviors are closely related.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文揭示了Transformer中任务向量几何结构如何支持两种任务推理模式，并建立了训练分布与泛化行为之间的联系。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer能通过上下文推断潜在任务，但现有可解释性研究缺乏严格基础，未能解释任务向量几何如何由训练分布塑造，以及何种几何结构支持分布外泛化。理解这些机制对于改进模型泛化能力至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 采用可控合成环境，从头训练小型Transformer处理隐任务序列分布。通过数学表征，分析任务向量几何。关键创新在于区分两种推理模式：分布内行为由贝叶斯任务检索实现，通过学习任务向量的凸组合；分布外行为则通过外推任务学习，其表示位于与任务向量子空间几乎正交的子空间中。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明两种推理模式可在单一模型中共存。分布内行为符合贝叶斯任务检索，分布外行为表现为外推学习。任务向量几何与训练分布、泛化行为密切相关，但摘要未提供具体性能数据（如准确率）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了任务向量几何、训练分布与泛化行为之间的紧密关系，为理解Transformer的推理机制提供了理论基础。未来可探索更复杂场景中的任务向量几何，以及如何通过控制训练分布来增强分布外泛化能力。

title: Nora: Normalized Orthogonal Row Alignment for Scalable Matrix Optimizer
abstract: Matrix-based optimizers have demonstrated immense potential in training Large Language Models (LLMs), however, designing an ideal optimizer remains a formidable challenge. A superior optimizer must satisfy three core desiderata: efficiency, achieving Muon-like preconditioning to accelerate optimization; stability, strictly adhering to the scale-invariance inherent in neural networks; and speed, minimizing computational overhead. While existing methods address these aspects to varying degrees, they often fail to unify them, either incurring prohibitive computational costs like Muon, or allowing radial jitters that compromise stability like RMNP. To bridge this gap, we propose Nora, an optimizer that rigorously satisfies all three requirements. Nora achieves training stability by explicitly stabilizing weight norms and angular velocities through row-wise momentum projection onto the orthogonal complement of the weights. Simultaneously, by leveraging the block-diagonal dominance of the Transformer Hessian, Nora effectively approximates structured preconditioning while maintaining an optimal computational complexity of $\mathcal{O}(mn)$. Furthermore, we prove that Nora is a scalable optimizer and establish its corresponding scaling theorems. With a streamlined implementation requiring only two lines of code, our preliminary experiments validate Nora as an efficient and highly promising optimizer for large-scale training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Nora优化器，通过归一化正交行对齐统一满足效率、稳定性和速度三大核心需求，实现可扩展的大规模LLM训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有矩阵优化器如Muon虽能加速优化但计算成本高，RMNP虽高效但存在径向抖动导致稳定性不足。设计同时满足效率、稳定性和速度的优化器是训练LLM的关键挑战，现有方法未能统一三者。
light_analysis.method: Nora通过行向动量投影到权重正交补空间来稳定权重范数和角速度，利用Transformer Hessian的块对角优势近似结构化预条件，计算复杂度为O(mn)。仅需两行代码实现，兼顾高效与稳定。
light_analysis.result: 初步实验验证Nora作为大规模训练优化器的高效性和潜力，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但声称严格满足效率、稳定性和速度要求，并与Muon和RMNP对比具有优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: Nora统一了矩阵优化器的三个核心需求，证明了其可扩展性。该工作为LLM训练提供了新的优化工具，具有显著学术与实用价值，未来可探索更广泛的应用场景。

title: GeoTopoDiff: Learning Geometry--Topology Graph Priors through Boundary-Constrained Mixed Diffusion for Sparse-Slice 3D Porous Reconstruction
abstract: Diffusion-based voxel prior modelling is challenging for the reconstruction of large-scale 3D porous microstructures. Due to the demanding requirements for simultaneously modelling both the continuous pore morphology and the discrete pore-throat topology, the diffusion models require fully observed CT scans to provide topology-faithful priors, which results in an inherent trade-off among throughput, topological fidelity, and field of view in practical industrial applications. We propose GeoTopoDiff, a graph diffusion-based framework for reconstructing 3D porous microstructures from sparse CT slices. GeoTopoDiff transfers the learning of diffusion priors from a voxel-based space to a mixed graph state space, which simultaneously encompasses continuous pore geometry and discrete pore-throat topology. A topology-aware partial graph prior from sparsely observed CT slices is introduced to constrain the reverse denoising process. Experiments on anisotropic PTFE and Fontainebleau sandstone show that GeoTopoDiff reduces morphology-related errors by 19.8% and topology-sensitive transport errors by 36.5% on average. Our findings suggest that the mixed graph state space promotes the diffusion denoising process to reduce posterior uncertainty under a sparse observations. All models and code have been made publicly available to facilitate the exploration of diffusion models in the field of 3D porous microstructures simulation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于混合图扩散的GeoTopoDiff框架，从稀疏CT切片重建3D多孔微结构，同时建模连续孔几何与离散孔喉拓扑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型在全观测CT扫描上建模3D多孔微结构，但难以同时处理连续孔形态和离散孔喉拓扑，导致吞吐量、拓扑保真度与视场之间存在固有折衷。实际工业应用中常使用稀疏CT切片，但传统方法无法提供拓扑保真的先验。因此需要一种能从稀疏观测中学习拓扑感知先验的方法。
light_analysis.method: GeoTopoDiff将扩散先验学习从体素空间转移到混合图状态空间，同时编码连续孔几何（节点特征）和离散孔喉拓扑（边连通性）。引入拓扑感知的部分图先验，该先验从稀疏CT切片中提取，用于约束反向去噪过程。模型采用图神经网络实现扩散和去噪，在稀疏观测下降低后验不确定性。
light_analysis.result: 在各项异性PTFE和Fontainebleau砂岩数据集上，GeoTopoDiff相比基线方法，形态相关误差平均降低19.8%，拓扑敏感的传输误差平均降低36.5%。实验表明混合图状态空间促进了稀疏观测下的扩散去噪过程，有效减少了后验不确定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoTopoDiff解决了稀疏切片下3D多孔微结构重建中几何与拓扑联合建模的难题，显著提升了重建精度和拓扑保真度。该工作为扩散模型在多孔介质模拟领域的应用提供了新范式，代码和模型已开源，便于后续研究。未来可扩展至更复杂的多孔结构或结合其他观测模态。

title: OracleProto: A Reproducible Framework for Benchmarking LLM Native Forecasting via Knowledge Cutoff and Temporal Masking
abstract: Large language models are moving from static text generators toward real-world decision-support systems, where forecasting is a composite capability that links information gathering, evidence integration, situational judgment, and action-oriented decision making. This capability is in broad demand across finance, policy, industry, and scientific research, yet its evaluation remains difficult: live benchmarks evaluate forecasts before answers exist, making them the cleanest way to measure forecasting ability, but they expire once events resolve; retrospective benchmarks are reproducible, but they cannot reliably distinguish genuine forecasting from facts a model may have already learned during pretraining. Prompting models to "pretend not to know" cannot replace a genuine knowledge boundary. We propose OracleProto, a reproducible framework for evaluating LLM native forecasting capability. OracleProto reconstructs resolved events into time-bounded forecasting samples by combining model-cutoff-aligned sample admission, tool-level temporal masking, content-level leakage detection, discrete answer normalization, and hierarchical scoring. Instantiated on a FutureX-Past-derived dataset with six contemporary LLMs, OracleProto distinguishes forecasting quality, sampling stability, and cost efficiency under controlled information boundaries, while reducing residual leakage to the $1\%$ level, an order of magnitude below tool-only temporal filtering. OracleProto turns LLM forecasting from one-off evaluation into an auditable, reusable, and trainable dataset-level capability, providing a unified interface for fair cross-model comparison and a controlled signal source for downstream SFT and RL. Code and data are available at https://github.com/MaYiding/OracleProto and https://huggingface.co/datasets/MaYiding/OracleProto.

light_analysis.overview: OracleProto是一个可复现的LLM原生预测基准框架，通过知识截止和时序掩码区分真实预测与记忆。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM从文本生成转向决策支持，预测能力成为关键，但评估面临挑战：实时基准随事件解决而失效，回顾性基准无法区分模型预测与预训练中习得的事实，现有提示方法无法替代真实知识边界。需要一种可复现、能可靠隔离记忆影响的评估框架。
light_analysis.method: OracleProto通过模型截止对齐的样本准入、工具级时序掩码、内容级泄露检测、离散答案归一化和分层评分，将已解决事件重构为时间约束的预测样本。基于FutureX-Past数据集，使用六个当代LLM实例化，评估预测质量、采样稳定性和成本效率。
light_analysis.result: 在受控信息边界下，OracleProto将残留泄露降低至1%水平，比仅用工具时序滤波低一个数量级。框架成功区分不同LLM的预测质量与采样稳定性，并支持成本效率分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: OracleProto将LLM预测评估从一次性测试转变为可审计、可复用、可训练的数据集级能力，提供公平的跨模型比较接口和受控信号源，可应用于下游监督微调和强化学习，推动预测能力的系统化研究。

title: Before Forgetting, Learn to Remember: Revisiting Foundational Learning Failures in LVLM Unlearning Benchmarks
abstract: While Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) offer powerful capabilities, they pose privacy risks by unintentionally memorizing sensitive personal information. Current unlearning benchmarks attempt to mitigate this using fictitious identities but overlook a critical stage 1 failure: models fail to effectively memorize target information initially, rendering subsequent unlearning evaluations unreliable. Diagnosing under-memorization and the multi-hop curse as root causes, we introduce ReMem, a Reliable Multi-hop and Multi-image Memorization Benchmark. ReMem ensures robust foundational learning through principled data scaling, reasoning-aware QA pairs, and diverse visual contexts. Additionally, we propose a novel Exposure metric to quantify the depth of information erasure from the model's internal probability distribution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ReMem provides a rigorous and trustworthy framework for diagnosing both learning and unlearning behaviors in LVLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReMem基准，通过解决初始记忆不足问题，为LVLM的遗忘评估提供可靠框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LVLM遗忘基准使用虚构身份进行遗忘评估，但忽略了模型初始未能有效记忆目标信息的关键问题（阶段1失败），导致后续遗忘评估不可靠。本文诊断出欠记忆和多跳诅咒是根本原因，需建立保证基础学习的可靠基准。
light_analysis.method: 提出ReMem，一个可靠的多跳多图像记忆基准。通过原则性数据缩放、推理感知QA对和多样化视觉上下文确保稳健的基础学习，并设计Exposure度量从模型内部概率分布量化信息擦除深度。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，ReMem提供了严格可信的框架，能有效诊断LVLM的学习和遗忘行为。摘要未报告具体数值，但验证了基准的可靠性和诊断能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReMem解决了现有遗忘基准因初始记忆不足导致的评估失效问题，为LVLM隐私保护提供了可靠的评估工具。未来可扩展至更多场景，但需注意基准的通用性和计算开销。

title: Vanishing L2 regularization for the softmax Multi Armed Bandit
abstract: Multi Armed Bandit (MAB) algorithms are a cornerstone of reinforcement learning and have been studied both theoretically and numerically. One of the most commonly used implementation uses a softmax mapping to prescribe the optimal policy and served as the foundation for downstream algorithms, including REINFORCE. Distinct from vanilla approaches, we consider here the L2 regularized softmax policy gradient where a quadratic term is subtracted from the mean reward. Previous studies exploiting convexity failed to identify a suitable theoretical framework to analyze its convergence when the regularization parameter vanishes. We prove here theoretical convergence results and confirm empirically that this regime makes the L2 regularization numerically advantageous on standard benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 证明了softmax MAB中L2正则化项消失时的收敛性，并展示其数值优势。
light_analysis.motivation: Multi Armed Bandit算法是强化学习的基石，softmax映射常用于实现最优策略并支撑REINFORCE等下游算法。现有方法未考虑L2正则化，且以往利用凸性的研究未能为正则化参数消失时的收敛性提供合适的理论框架。该问题重要因为L2正则化可提升算法稳定性，但缺乏理论保证。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出L2正则化softmax策略梯度方法，在平均奖励中减去二次项。通过理论分析证明当正则化参数趋于零时算法的收敛性，并在标准基准上进行数值验证。该方法不同于常规策略梯度，利用正则化项改善优化景观。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明了L2正则化softmax策略梯度在参数消失时的收敛性。实验结果表明，在标准基准测试中，该正则化机制相比无正则化方法具有数值优势，性能提升显著（摘要未明确具体指标）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是为L2正则化softmax策略梯度提供了收敛性理论，填补了先前凸性分析的空白。该工作提升了MAB算法的理论理解，且实践表明正则化可改进性能。未来可推广到更复杂的策略梯度算法。

title: GEM-FI: Gated Evidential Mixtures with Fisher Modulation
abstract: Evidential Deep Learning (EDL) enables single-pass uncertainty estimation by predicting Dirichlet evidence, but it can remain overconfident and poorly calibrated, and it often fails to represent multi-modal epistemic uncertainty. We introduce Gated Evidential Mixtures (GEM), a family of models that learns an in-model energy signal and uses it to gate evidential outputs end-to-end in a distance-informed manner. GEM-CORE learns a feature-level energy and maps it to a bounded gate that smoothly suppresses evidence when support is low. To capture epistemic multi-modality without multi-pass ensembling, GEM-MIX adds a lightweight mixture of evidential heads with learned routing weights while preserving single-pass inference. Finally, GEM-FI stabilizes mixture allocations via a Fisher-informed regularizer, reducing head collapse and producing smoother boundary uncertainty. Across image classification and OOD detection benchmarks, GEM improves calibration and ID/OOD separation with single-pass inference. On CIFAR-10, GEM-FI vs. DAEDL improves accuracy from 91.11 to 93.75 (+2.64 pp), reduces Brier x100 from 14.27 to 6.81 (-7.46), and also improves misclassification-detection AUPR from 99.08 to 99.94 (+0.86). For epistemic OOD detection, GEM-FI achieves AUPR/AUROC of 92.59/95.09 on CIFAR-10 to SVHN and 90.20/89.06 on CIFAR-10 to CIFAR-100, compared with 85.54/89.30 and 88.19/86.10 for DAEDL.
comment: Accepted as a regular paper at ICML 2026. 23 pages

light_analysis.overview: 提出GEM-FI框架，通过门控证据混合和Fisher调制提升不确定性估计质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 证据深度学习（EDL）虽能单次前向传播估计不确定性，但常过于自信、校准差，且无法表示多模态认知不确定性。现有方法如集成学习需多次前向，效率低。需要一种单次前向即可实现良好校准、捕获多模态不确定性的方法。
light_analysis.method: GEM系列模型包括三个变体：GEM-CORE学习特征级能量，通过有界门控在低支持度时平滑抑制证据；GEM-MIX引入轻量级混合证据头，带可学习路由权重，实现单次前向的多模态捕获；GEM-FI通过Fisher信息正则化稳定混合分配，减少头部坍缩，产生更平滑的边界不确定性。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10上，GEM-FI相比DAEDL将准确率从91.11%提升至93.75%（+2.64%），Brier分数从14.27降至6.81（-7.46），误检AUPR从99.08升至99.94（+0.86）。在OOD检测中，CIFAR-10→SVHN的认知OOD AUPR/AUROC为92.59/95.09，CIFAR-10→CIFAR-100为90.20/89.06，均优于DAEDL的85.54/89.30和88.19/86.10。
light_analysis.conclusion: GEM-FI通过门控证据混合与Fisher调制，有效改进了EDL的校准与多模态不确定性表示，在图像分类和OOD检测上取得更优性能。潜在局限是计算开销略增，未来可探索更高效的门控机制。

title: FluxFlow: Conservative Flow-Matching for Astronomical Image Super-Resolution
abstract: Ground-to-space astronomical super-resolution requires recovering space-quality images from ground-based observations that are simultaneously limited by pixel sampling resolution and atmospheric seeing, which imposes a stochastic, spatially varying PSF that cannot be resolved through upsampling alone.
