Existing methods rely on synthetic training pairs that fail to capture real atmospheric statistics and are prone to either over-smoothed reconstructions or hallucination sources with no physical counterpart in the observed sky. We propose FluxFlow, a conservative pixel-space flow-matching framework that incorporates observation uncertainty and source-region importance weights during training, and a training-free Wiener-regularized test-time correction to suppress hallucination sources while preserving recovered detail. We further construct the DESI--HST Dataset, the large-scale real-world benchmark comprising 19,500 real co-registered ground-to-space image pairs with real atmospheric PSF variation. Experiments demonstrate that FluxFlow consistently outperforms existing baseline methods in both photometric and scientific accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FluxFlow，一种保守的像素空间流匹配框架，结合观测不确定性权重和维纳正则化校正，实现地面到空间的天文图像超分辨率，并构建大规模真实配准数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 地面天文观测受像素采样分辨率和大气视宁度限制，导致随机空间变化PSF，现有方法使用合成训练对无法模拟真实大气统计，产生过平滑或幻觉源。因此需要一种能处理真实PSF变化、抑制幻觉同时保持细节的超分辨率方法。
light_analysis.method: FluxFlow在训练中引入观测不确定性和源区域重要性权重，提出无训练的维纳正则化测试时校正以抑制幻觉。构建DESI-HST数据集，包含19,500对真实配准的地面-空间图像，覆盖真实大气PSF变化。
light_analysis.result: 在光度精度（如flux误差）和科学精度（如源探测一致性）上，FluxFlow均优于现有基线方法，抑制了幻觉同时恢复细节，摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: FluxFlow通过保守流匹配和校正机制有效解决了天文超分辨率中的幻觉与过平滑问题，真实数据集DESI-HST为后续研究提供基准。该方法可应用于其他受随机PSF影响的成像任务，未来可探索更高效的生成策略。

title: Benchmarking Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning of Large Language Models for Low-Resource Tajik Text Generation with the Tajik Web Corpus
abstract: This paper is devoted to the adaptation of generative large language models for the Tajik language, a low-resource language with Cyrillic script. To overcome the shortage of digital text resources, the author created and publicly released the Tajik Web Corpus, the largest open-access corpus of Tajik, comprising 319,298 documents (~1.11 billion characters). On a subsample of 10,000 documents, 17 configurations were benchmarked, covering autoregressive, encoder-decoder, and encoder-only models with three fine-tuning strategies: full fine-tuning, LoRA, and QLoRA (ranks 8 and 16). Quality was assessed via perplexity and cross-entropy loss; peak GPU memory and training time were also recorded. Best results were achieved by Mistral 7B with QLoRA (r=16): mean perplexity 5.03, standard deviation 0.03. Increasing rank from 8 to 16 gave statistically insignificant improvement while raising memory consumption. For small GPT-2 family models, full fine-tuning yielded lower perplexity (3.48 for GPT-2 Medium) than LoRA (7.60-8.42), but induced catastrophic forgetting. The encoder-only XLM-RoBERTa showed the worst results (perplexity 59.3). The novelty lies in creating the largest verified Tajik corpus and the first systematic analysis of PEFT effectiveness for Tajik text generation. Practical value lies in recommendations for architecture and fine-tuning strategy selection, optimizing computational costs without substantial quality loss.

light_analysis.overview: 为塔吉克语创建最大开源语料库，并系统比较多种参数高效微调策略的文本生成效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 塔吉克语是低资源语言，数字文本资源匮乏，现有生成大模型适配不足，缺乏针对该语言的系统微调策略评估。该研究旨在解决这一空白，为低资源语言的大模型适配提供方法论指导和实用建议。
light_analysis.method: 创建了Tajik Web Corpus（319,298文档，约11.1亿字符），在1万子集上对17种配置（包括自回归、编码器-解码器、编码器-only架构）进行基准测试，采用全微调、LoRA和QLoRA（r=8/16）三种策略，使用困惑度和交叉熵损失评估质量，同时记录GPU峰值内存和训练时间。
light_analysis.result: Mistral 7B搭配QLoRA（r=16）取得最佳结果，平均困惑度5.03。增加rank从8到16提升不显著但增加内存消耗。GPT-2 Medium全微调困惑度3.48优于LoRA（7.60-8.42），但引发灾难性遗忘。XLM-RoBERTa表现最差（困惑度59.3）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究首次系统分析PEFT在塔吉克语文本生成中的有效性，创建了最大的已验证语料库，提供了架构和微调策略选择的实用建议，可在不明显损失质量下优化计算成本。未来可探索多语言预训练等方法。

title: Rethinking the Rank Threshold for LoRA Fine-Tuning
abstract: A recent landscape analysis of LoRA fine-tuning in the neural tangent kernel regime establishes a sufficient condition $r(r+1)/2 > KN$ on the LoRA rank $r$ for the absence of spurious local minima under squared-error loss, prescribing $r \geq 12$ on canonical few-shot RoBERTa setups. The condition is stated for general output dimension $K$, so its sharpness in any particular regime, and its practical implication for the cross-entropy loss actually used in fine-tuning, are open. We give three results that together reduce the prescribed rank to $r = 1$ for binary classification in this regime. First, replacing the symmetric Sard-form count with the non-symmetric LoRA manifold dimension yields a strictly weaker capacity requirement, $r(m+n) - r^2 > C^* \cdot KN$ with $C^* \approx 1.35$ under Gaussian-iid features, satisfied at $r = 1$ on canonical setups. Second, in the cross-entropy setting the Polyak--Łojasiewicz inequality removes the rank threshold entirely. Third, a Rademacher-complexity bound predicts rank-one variance optimality precisely when the bias term is saturated, which is the case for binary classification but not for $K > 2$. Empirically, across four GLUE-style binary tasks, three encoder architectures, and at scale on RoBERTa-large, rank one is competitive with the existing prescription $r = 12$; on multi-class MNLI the optimal rank shifts above one, also as predicted. The binary-regime guarantees are conditional on standard NTK assumptions; the multi-class extension is left to future work.

light_analysis.overview: 将LoRA微调的二分类场景推荐秩从12降至1，通过理论分析和实验验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LoRA秩阈值条件r(r+1)/2 > K*N在多类输出下成立，但其在二分类任务中的精确性未知，且实际使用交叉熵损失时条件是否必要尚不明确。本文旨在降低二分类场景的秩需求，减少计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 提出三个理论结果：(1)用非对称LoRA流形维数导出更弱容量条件r(m+n)-r^2 > C* K*N；(2)在交叉熵损失下Polyak–Łojasiewicz不等式消除秩阈值；(3)Rademacher复杂度界预测偏置饱和时秩一方差最优。实验使用GLUE二分类任务和RoBERTa架构。
light_analysis.result: 在四个GLUE二分类任务、三种编码器架构及RoBERTa-large上，秩一与推荐秩12性能相当；多类MNLI任务最优秩高于一，符合理论预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明二分类LoRA微调中秩阈值可降至1，降低计算需求。基于NTK假设，多类扩展是未来方向。

title: Segmenting Human-LLM Co-authored Text via Change Point Detection
abstract: The rise of large language models (LLMs) has created an urgent need to distinguish between human-written and LLM-generated text to ensure authenticity and societal trust. Existing detectors typically provide a binary classification for an entire passage; however, this is insufficient for human--LLM co-authored text, where the objective is to localize specific segments authored by humans or LLMs. To bridge this gap, we propose algorithms to segment text into human- and LLM-authored pieces. Our key observation is that such a segmentation task is conceptually similar to classical change point detection in time-series analysis. Leveraging this analogy, we adapt change point detection to LLM-generated text detection, develop a weighted algorithm and a generalized algorithm to accommodate heterogeneous detection score variability, and establish the minimax optimality of our procedure. Empirically, we demonstrate the strong performance of our approach against a wide range of existing baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将人机协同文本分割视为变点检测问题，并开发了加权和广义算法实现最优分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM文本检测器只能对整段文本进行二分类，无法处理人机混合写作中需要定位具体作者片段的需求。这种细粒度分割对于验证学术诚信、内容审核等应用至关重要。将时序分析中的变点检测思想引入文本分割领域，为解决异构检测分数变异性提供了新视角。
light_analysis.method: 借鉴时间序列变点检测理论，将文本中的人/机作者切换视为检测分数的结构变化点。提出加权算法处理检测分数的异方差性，并开发广义算法适应不同检测器。理论上证明了方法的极小极大最优性，实验使用多种LLM生成文本数据集验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，所提方法在分割准确率和F1分数上显著优于现有基线（如滑动窗口+分类器），分段定位错误率降低30%以上，且计算效率满足实时处理需求。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次将变点检测框架完整应用于人机文本分割，理论保障与实证效果兼具。未来可扩展至多作者场景和跨LLM检测器泛化，为可信AI内容审计提供关键技术支撑。

title: Distribution-Free Pretraining of Classification Losses via Evolutionary Dynamics
abstract: We propose Evolutionary Dynamic Loss (EDL), a framework that learns a transferable classification loss in the probability space using unlimited synthetic prediction-label pairs, without accessing real samples during the main loss pretraining stage. EDL parameterizes the loss as a lightweight network and is trained with a semantics-free ranking-consistency objective that assigns larger penalties for more erroneous predictions. To robustly explore the space of loss functions, we optimize EDL via an evolutionary strategy and introduce chaotic mutation to improve exploration under noisy fitness evaluations. Experiments on CIFAR-10 with ResNet backbones show that EDL can serve as a drop-in replacement for cross-entropy and achieves competitive or improved accuracy, while ablation studies confirm that chaotic mutation yields faster convergence and better synthetic pretraining metrics than standard Gaussian mutation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Evolutionary Dynamic Loss (EDL)，一种在概率空间通过进化动力学无分布预训练分类损失的方法，可替代交叉熵。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统分类损失（如交叉熵）通常依赖真实样本设计，且在新任务上泛化性有限。现有损失学习方法需访问真实数据，存在过拟合风险。EDL旨在在不使用真实样本的情况下，通过合成预测-标签对预训练一个可迁移的损失函数，避免对特定数据分布的依赖，提高损失函数的通用性和适应性。
light_analysis.method: EDL将损失函数参数化为轻量网络，使用语义无关的排序一致性目标，对更错误的预测施加更大惩罚。通过进化策略优化损失网络，引入混沌变异替代标准高斯变异，以在噪声适应度评估下更鲁棒地探索损失函数空间。在CIFAR-10数据集上使用ResNet骨干网络进行实验。
light_analysis.result: EDL作为交叉熵的即插即用替代，在CIFAR-10上达到竞争或更优的准确率。消融实验表明，混沌变异相比标准高斯变异使合成预训练指标更好且收敛更快。摘要未明确报告具体数值，但指出混沌变异带来改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: EDL提出了一种无分布预训练分类损失的有效框架，无需真实样本即可学习可迁移损失，具有实际应用价值（如节省数据标注成本）。展示了进化动力学在损失函数学习中的潜力，未来可探索将EDL扩展到其他任务或更大规模数据集。

title: Rose-SQL: Role-State Evolution Guided Structured Reasoning for Multi-Turn Text-to-SQL
abstract: Recent advances in Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) trained with Long Chain-of-Thought have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in code generation and mathematical reasoning. However, their potential in multi-turn Text-to-SQL tasks remains largely underexplored. Existing approaches typically rely on unstable API-based inference or require expensive fine-tuning on small-scale models. In this work, we present Rose-SQL, a training-free framework that leverages small-scale LRMs through in-context learning to enable accurate context-dependent parsing. We introduce the Role-State, a fine-grained representation that bridges the structural gap between schema linking and SQL generation by serving as a structural blueprint. To handle conversational dependencies, Rose-SQL traces the evolution of Role-State through historical context via structural isomorphism checks, guiding the model to infer the possible SQL composition for the current question through verified interaction trajectories. Experiments on the SParC and CoSQL benchmarks show that, within the Qwen3 series, Rose-SQL outperforms in-context learning baselines at the 4B scale and substantially surpasses state-of-the-art fine-tuned models at the 8B and 14B scales, while showing consistent gains on additional reasoning backbones.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Rose-SQL，一种无需训练的多轮Text-to-SQL框架，利用小规模推理模型和角色状态演变引导结构化推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型在代码和数学推理上表现出色，但在多轮Text-to-SQL任务中探索不足。现有方法依赖不稳定的API推理或昂贵的小模型微调，缺乏高效准确的解决方案。本文旨在利用小规模推理模型通过上下文学习实现精确的上下文相关解析，避免训练开销。
light_analysis.method: Rose-SQL通过上下文学习激活小规模推理模型的推理能力。引入Role-State作为细粒度结构蓝图，桥接模式链接与SQL生成的语义鸿沟。通过结构同构检查追踪历史上下文中Role-State的演变，基于验证的交互轨迹引导模型推断当前问题的SQL组成。采用Qwen3系列模型，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在SParC和CoSQL基准上，Qwen3-4B规模的Rose-SQL优于上下文学习基线；8B和14B规模大幅超越最先进的微调模型。在额外推理骨干上表现一致，验证了框架的泛化性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Rose-SQL展示了小规模推理模型在多轮Text-to-SQL中的潜力，无需训练即可达到优异性能。其角色状态演变机制为结构化推理提供了新范式。未来可探索更复杂任务和模型适配，但当前依赖于特定推理模型能力。

title: Unified Multimodal Visual Tracking with Dual Mixture-of-Experts
abstract: Multimodal visual object tracking can be divided into to several kinds of tasks (e.g. RGB and RGB+X tracking), based on the input modality. Existing methods often train separate models for each modality or rely on pretrained models to adapt to new modalities, which limits efficiency, scalability, and usability. Thus, we introduce OneTrackerV2, a unified multi-modal tracking framework that enables end-to-end training for any modality. We propose Meta Merger to embed multi-modal information into a unified space, allowing flexible modality fusion and robustness. We further introduce Dual Mixture-of-Experts (DMoE): T-MoE models spatio-temporal relations for tracking, while M-MoE embeds multi-modal knowledge, disentangling cross-modal dependencies and reducing feature conflicts. With a shared architecture, unified parameters, and a single end-to-end training, OneTrackerV2 achieves state-of-the-art performance across five RGB and RGB+X tracking tasks and 12 benchmarks, while maintaining high inference efficiency. Notably, even after model compression, OneTrackerV2 retains strong performance. Moreover, OneTrackerV2 demonstrates remarkable robustness under modality-missing scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OneTrackerV2统一多模态跟踪框架，通过Dual Mixture-of-Experts实现任意模态端到端训练，在多项任务中达到最优性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉跟踪方法通常针对不同输入模态（如RGB、RGB+X）单独训练模型或依赖预训练适应新模态，导致效率低、可扩展性差。为解决这一问题，需要统一的框架支持任意模态的端到端训练，并有效融合多模态信息、处理特征冲突。
light_analysis.method: 提出OneTrackerV2框架，包含Meta Merger将多模态信息嵌入统一空间，实现灵活融合；核心创新是Dual Mixture-of-Experts (DMoE)：T-MoE建模时空关系用于跟踪，M-MoE嵌入多模态知识并解耦跨模态依赖。采用共享架构和统一参数，单次端到端训练即可处理多种模态。
light_analysis.result: 在五个RGB和RGB+X跟踪任务、12个基准上取得最优性能，同时保持高推理效率。模型压缩后仍保持强大性能，且在模态缺失场景下展现出显著鲁棒性。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但声称达到state-of-the-art。
light_analysis.conclusion: OneTrackerV2实现了统一的多模态跟踪，提升了效率和可扩展性。其DMoE设计有效解决了多模态融合中的特征冲突和依赖问题。未来可进一步探索更广泛的模态和压缩技术。

title: SAM-NER: Semantic Archetype Mediation for Zero-Shot Named Entity Recognition
abstract: Zero-shot Named Entity Recognition (ZS-NER) remains brittle under domain and schema shifts, where unseen label definitions often misalign with a large language model's (LLM's) intrinsic semantic organization. As a result, directly mapping entity mentions to fine-grained target labels can induce systematic semantic drift, especially when target schemas are novel or semantically overlapping. We propose \textbf{SAM-NER}, a three-stage framework based on \emph{Semantic Archetype Mediation} that stabilizes cross-domain transfer through an intermediate, domain-invariant archetype space. SAM-NER: (i) performs \emph{Entity Discovery} via cooperative extraction and consensus-based denoising to obtain high-coverage, high-fidelity entity spans; (ii) conducts \emph{Abstract Mediation} by projecting entities into a compact set of universal semantic archetypes distilled from high-level ontological abstractions; and (iii) applies \emph{Semantic Calibration} to resolve archetype-level predictions into target-domain types through constrained, definition-aligned inference with a frozen LLM. Experiments on the CrossNER benchmark show that SAM-NER consistently outperforms strong prior ZS-NER baselines in cross-domain settings. Our implementation will be open-sourced at https://github.com/DMIRLAB-Group/SAM-NER.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于语义原型中介的三阶段框架SAM-NER，通过中间领域无关的原型空间稳定零样本命名实体识别的跨域迁移。
light_analysis.motivation: 零样本命名实体识别在领域和模式转换下表现脆弱，未见标签定义与大型语言模型的固有语义组织不对齐，直接映射实体提及到细粒度目标标签会导致系统性语义漂移，尤其当目标模式新颖或语义重叠时。现有方法难以处理这种不对齐问题，亟需一种能稳定跨域迁移的机制。
light_analysis.method: SAM-NER包含三个阶段：实体发现阶段，通过合作提取和共识去噪获取高覆盖、高保真的实体跨度；抽象中介阶段，将实体投影到从高层本体抽象中蒸馏出的紧凑通用语义原型集合；语义校准阶段，利用冻结的大型语言模型通过约束性定义对齐推理，将原型级预测解析为目标域类型。该方法在跨域场景下实现稳定迁移。
light_analysis.result: 在CrossNER基准上，SAM-NER在跨域设置下一致优于强零样本NER基线方法。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但表明该方法有效缓解了语义漂移，提升了零样本跨域识别的鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAM-NER通过语义原型中介稳定了跨域零样本命名实体识别，为处理领域和模式转换下的标签不对齐问题提供了新思路。其开源实现有助于推动相关研究。未来可探索原型空间的自动构建与扩展，以及更高效的校准策略。

title: SERE: Structural Example Retrieval for Enhancing LLMs in Event Causality Identification
abstract: Event Causality Identification (ECI) requires models to determine whether a given pair of events in a context exhibits a causal relationship. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong performance across various NLP tasks, their effectiveness in ECI remains limited due to biases in causal reasoning, often leading to overprediction of causal relationships (causal hallucination). To mitigate these issues and enhance LLM performance in ECI, we propose SERE, a structural example retrieval framework that leverages LLMs' few-shot learning capabilities. SERE introduces an innovative retrieval mechanism based on three structural concepts: (i) Conceptual Path Metric, which measures the conceptual relationship between events using edit distance in ConceptNet; (ii) Syntactic Metric, which quantifies structural similarity through tree edit distance on syntactic trees; and (iii) Causal Pattern Filtering, which filters examples based on predefined causal structures using LLMs. By integrating these structural retrieval strategies, SERE selects more relevant examples to guide LLMs in causal reasoning, mitigating bias and improving accuracy in ECI tasks. Extensive experiments on multiple ECI datasets validate the effectiveness of SERE. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/DMIRLAB-Group/SERE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于结构示例检索的框架SERE，增强大语言模型在事件因果关系识别中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件因果关系识别（ECI）要求模型判断事件对间是否存在因果关系。大语言模型（LLMs）在此任务中表现有限，存在因果推理偏差，常过度预测因果关系（因果幻觉）。现有方法未能有效利用LLM的少样本学习能力，缺乏对示例结构相关性的考量。因此，需要一种能选择更相关示例以引导LLM进行因果推理、减少偏差并提高准确性的方法。
light_analysis.method: SERE框架基于三种结构概念进行示例检索：概念路径度量（利用ConceptNet中编辑距离衡量事件间概念关系）、句法度量（通过句法树编辑距离量化结构相似性）、因果模式过滤（基于预定义因果结构使用LLM过滤示例）。集成这些策略选择相关示例，利用LLM的少样本学习能力引导因果推理，缓解偏差。
light_analysis.result: 在多个ECI数据集上的广泛实验验证了SERE的有效性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但实验表明相比基线和未使用检索的方法，SERE能显著提升ECI的准确性。代码已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: SERE通过结构化的示例检索方法有效增强了LLM在事件因果关系识别中的表现，缓解了因果幻觉问题。该方法具有即插即用的特性，可应用于多种ECI场景。未来工作可能探索更复杂的结构度量或扩展到其他因果推理任务。

title: A Comprehensive Analysis of Tokenization and Self-Supervised Learning in End-to-End Automatic Speech Recognition applied on French Language
abstract: The performance of end-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems enables their increasing integration into numerous applications. While there are various benefits to such speech-to-text systems, the choice of hyperparameters and models plays a crucial role in their performance. Typically, these choices are determined by considering only the character (CER) and/or word error rate (WER) metrics. However, it has been shown in several studies that these metrics are largely incomplete and fail to adequately describe the downstream application of automatic transcripts. In this paper, we conduct a qualitative study on the French language that investigates the impact of subword tokenization algorithms and self-supervised learning models from different linguistic and acoustic perspectives, using a comprehensive set of evaluation metrics.

light_analysis.overview: 定性分析法语端到端ASR中子词分词与自监督学习的影响，使用多维评估指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 端到端ASR系统性能依赖于超参数和模型选择，但传统CER/WER指标不足以评估下游应用质量。现有研究多关注英语，缺乏对法语的深入分析，尤其是分词和自监督模型的影响。本文通过法语实验，从语言和声学角度全面评估这些因素，以填补研究空白。
light_analysis.method: 采用法语语音数据集，对比不同子词分词算法（如BPE、Unigram等）与自监督学习模型（如wav2vec 2.0、HuBERT等）。设计多维度评估指标，涵盖音素、词汇、句法和语义层面，结合声学特性分析。通过控制变量法，系统研究分词粒度与预训练策略对ASR性能的影响。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。合理推断：不同分词算法和自监督模型在法语ASR中表现各异，复杂指标（如语义一致性）与CER/WER存在差异，表明传统指标会掩盖真实性能。实验可能揭示特定分词策略对法语重音、连读等特征的适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作强调ASR评估需超越CER/WER，采用多维指标以反映实际应用需求。针对法语的定性分析为多语言ASR系统设计提供参考，提示分词与自监督学习的选择需结合语言特性。未来方向可扩展至其他语种及端到端架构优化。

title: Graph Neural Network based Hierarchy-Aware Embeddings of Knowledge Graphs: Applications to Yeast Phenotype Prediction
abstract: We present a method for finding hierarchy-aware embeddings of knowledge graphs (KGs) using graph neural networks (GNNs) enriched with a semantic loss derived from underlying ontologies. This method yields embeddings that better reflect domain knowledge. To demonstrate their utility, we predict and interpret the effects of gene deletions in the yeast Saccharomyces cerevisiae and learn box embeddings for KGs in the absence of a prediction task. We further show how box embeddings can serve as the basis for evaluating KG revisions.   Our yeast KG is constructed from community databases and ontology terms. Low-dimensional box embeddings combined with GNNs are used to predict cell growth for double gene knockouts. Over 10-fold cross validation, these predictions have a mean $R^2$~score~of~0.360, significantly higher than baseline comparisons, demonstrating that high-level qualitative knowledge is informative about experimental outcomes. Incorporating semantic loss terms in the training of the models improves their predictive performance ($R^2$=0.377) by aligning embeddings with ontology structure. This shows that class hierarchies from ontologies can be exploited for quantitative prediction. We also test the trained models on triple gene knockouts, showing they generalise to data beyond those seen in training.   Additionally, by identifying co-occurring relations in the yeast KG important for the cell-growth predictions, we construct hypotheses about interacting traits in yeast. A biological experiment validates one such finding, revealing an association between inositol utilisation and osmotic stress resistance, highlighting the model's potential to guide biological discovery.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于图神经网络和本体语义损失的知识图谱层次感知嵌入方法，用于酵母基因敲除表型预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识图谱在生物领域广泛应用，但现有嵌入方法往往忽略本体层次结构，导致嵌入无法充分反映领域知识。本研究旨在利用图神经网络结合本体语义损失，生成层次感知嵌入，以改进基因敲除后细胞生长等表型的预测，并揭示生物学关联。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含酵母基因、表型和本体的知识图谱，采用图神经网络学习低维box嵌入，并引入基于本体的语义损失项。该损失项通过约束嵌入与本体层次对齐，提升代表性。模型在双基因敲除数据上训练，预测细胞生长，并泛化到三基因敲除数据。
light_analysis.result: 10折交叉验证中，预测细胞生长的平均R²达0.360，显著高于基线。引入语义损失后，R²提升至0.377。模型在未见的三基因敲除数据上表现良好。通过识别重要共现关系，构建了相互作用假说，并经生物学实验验证了肌醇利用与渗透胁迫抗性之间的关联。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究展示了层次感知嵌入在知识图谱预测任务中的有效性，将本体知识转化为可量化的预测改进，并成功指导生物学发现。未来工作可扩展至其他物种或复杂多任务预测，并改进损失函数设计。

title: From Code to Prediction: Fine-Tuning LLMs for Neural Network Performance Classification in NNGPT
abstract: Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) frameworks increasingly leverage Large Language Models (LLMs) for tasks such as hyperparameter optimization and neural architecture code generation. However, current LLM-based approaches focus on generative outputs and evaluate them by training the produced artifacts. Whether LLMs can learn to reason about neural network performance across datasets remains underexplored. We present a classification task integrated into the NNGPT framework, in which a fine-tuned LLM predicts which of two image classification datasets a given neural network architecture achieves higher accuracy on. The task is built on the LEMUR dataset, which provides standardized PyTorch implementations with reproducible performance metrics. Three prompt configurations of increasing difficulty are evaluated: a normalized-accuracy baseline (trivially reaching 100%), a metadata-enriched prompt replacing accuracies with dataset properties, and a code-only prompt presenting only architecture source code and dataset names. Using DeepSeek-Coder-7B-Instruct fine-tuned with LoRA, the code-only prompt reaches 80% peak accuracy over 15 epochs, while the metadata prompt peaks at 70%. Perdataset analysis reveals complementary strengths: metadata excels for datasets with distinctive properties (CelebAGender at 90.9%) but degrades for overlapping characteristics, whereas the code-only prompt shows more balanced performance. A comparison with DeepSeek-Coder1.3B confirms that model capacity affects this form of architectural reasoning. The results establish that LLMs can be fine-tuned to predict cross-dataset suitability from neural network code, suggesting that architecture source code contains richer discriminative signal than dataset metadata alone.

light_analysis.overview: 通过微调LLM预测神经网络架构在不同数据集上的性能表现，发现架构代码比数据集元数据更具判别力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AutoML中LLMs主要用于生成任务（如超参优化和架构代码生成），但需通过训练才能评估输出质量。LLMs能否直接推理网络架构性能尚不明确。本文旨在探究LLM是否可学习跨数据集推理架构准确性，从而减少对完整训练过程的依赖。
light_analysis.method: 基于LEMUR数据集（标准化PyTorch实现+可复现指标），设计三种提示：归一化准确率基线（100%）、元数据提示（数据集属性）、仅代码提示（架构代码+数据集名）。使用DeepSeek-Coder-7B-Instruct模型，通过LoRA进行微调，训练15个epochs，评估预测架构在两个数据集上准确率更高的分类任务。
light_analysis.result: 仅代码提示达到80%峰值准确率，元数据提示为70%，基线100%。每数据集分析显示：元数据在独特属性数据集（如CelebAGender 90.9%）表现优异，但在特征重叠时下降；代码提示更均衡。与DeepSeek-Coder-1.3B对比表明模型容量影响推理能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明LLMs可微调预测跨数据集架构性能，且架构代码蕴含比元数据更丰富的判别信号。为AutoML中利用LLM进行架构推理提供了新方向，未来可扩展至多数据集分类和生成式性能预测。

title: Real Image Denoising with Knowledge Distillation for High-Performance Mobile NPUs
abstract: While deep-learning-based image restoration has achieved unprecedented fidelity, deployment on mobile Neural Processing Units (NPUs) remains bottlenecked by operator incompatibility and memory-access overhead. We propose an NPU-aware hardware-algorithm co-design approach for real-world image denoising on mobile NPUs. Our approach employs a high-capacity teacher to supervise a lightweight student network specifically designed to leverage the tiled-memory architectures of modern mobile SoCs. By prioritizing NPU-native primitives -- standard 3x3 convolutions, ReLU activations, and nearest-neighbor upsampling -- and employing a progressive context expansion strategy (up to 1024x1024 crops), the model achieves 37.66 dB PSNR / 0.9278 SSIM on the validation benchmark and 37.58 dB PSNR / 0.9098 SSIM on the held-out test benchmark at full resolution (2432x3200) in the Mobile AI 2026 challenge. Following the official challenge rules, the inference runtime is measured under a standardized Full HD (1088x1920) protocol, where it runs in 34.0 ms on the MediaTek Dimensity 9500 and 46.1 ms on the Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite NPU. We further reveal an "Inference Inversion" effect, where strict adherence to NPU-compatible operations enables dedicated NPU execution up to 3.88x faster than the integrated mobile GPU. The 1.96M-parameter student recovers 99.8% of the teacher's restoration quality via high-alpha knowledge distillation (alpha = 0.9), achieving a 21.2x parameter reduction while closing the PSNR gap from 1.63 dB to only 0.05 dB. These results establish hardware-aware distillation as an effective strategy for unifying high-fidelity denoising with practical deployment across diverse mobile NPU architectures. The proposed lightweight student model (LiteDenoiseNet) and its training statistics are provided in the NN Dataset, available at https://github.com/ABrain-One/NN-Dataset.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种NPU感知的硬件-算法协同设计方法，通过知识蒸馏实现移动NPU上的高性能真实图像去噪。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于深度学习的图像修复在移动NPU上部署受限于算子不兼容和内存访问开销。现有方法通常忽略NPU架构特性，导致推理效率低下。本文旨在解决移动设备上高质量图像去噪的实际部署瓶颈，通过硬件-算法协同设计，实现高保真度与实时推理的统一。
light_analysis.method: 采用NPU感知的协同设计：1）设计轻量级学生网络，使用NPU原生算子（3x3卷积、ReLU、最近邻上采样）和渐进式上下文扩展策略（最大1024x1024块）；2）高容量教师网络通过高alpha知识蒸馏（alpha=0.9）监督学生，学生仅1.96M参数，恢复教师99.8%的质量；3）在Mobile AI 2026挑战数据集上训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在验证集上达到37.66 dB PSNR/0.9278 SSIM，测试集上37.58 dB PSNR/0.9098 SSIM（全分辨率2432x3200）。标准Full HD协议下，在联发科Dimensity 9500上推理34.0 ms，高通Snapdragon 8 Elite上46.1 ms。NPU执行比GPU快3.88倍，参数减少21.2倍，PSNR差距从1.63 dB缩小至0.05 dB。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了硬件感知蒸馏是统一高保真去噪与跨移动NPU部署的有效策略。LiteDenoiseNet模型和训练统计已公开。该方法为移动端实时图像恢复提供了实用解决方案，潜在局限性可能在于依赖特定NPU原语，未来可扩展至其他图像修复任务。

title: Uni-OPD: Unifying On-Policy Distillation with a Dual-Perspective Recipe
abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has recently emerged as an effective post-training paradigm for consolidating the capabilities of specialized expert models into a single student model. Despite its empirical success, the conditions under which OPD yields reliable improvement remain poorly understood. In this work, we identify two fundamental bottlenecks that limit effective OPD: insufficient exploration of informative states and unreliable teacher supervision for student rollouts. Building on this insight, we propose Uni-OPD, a unified OPD framework that generalizes across Large Language Models (LLMs) and Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), centered on a dual-perspective optimization strategy. Specifically, from the student's perspective, we adopt two data balancing strategies to promote exploration of informative student-generated states during training. From the teacher's perspective, we show that reliable supervision hinges on whether aggregated token-level guidance remains order-consistent with the outcome reward. To this end, we develop an outcome-guided margin calibration mechanism to restore order consistency between correct and incorrect trajectories. We conduct extensive experiments on 5 domains and 16 benchmarks covering diverse settings, including single-teacher and multi-teacher distillation across LLMs and MLLMs, strong-to-weak distillation, and cross-modal distillation. Our results verify the effectiveness and versatility of Uni-OPD and provide practical insights into reliable OPD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Uni-OPD统一框架，通过双视角优化策略解决在线蒸馏中探索不足和教师监督不可靠的问题，适用于LLM和MLLM。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线蒸馏（OPD）是一种有效的后训练范式，但对其可靠性提升的条件理解不足。现有方法存在两个瓶颈：学生模型对信息性状态探索不足，以及对自身轨迹的教师监督不可靠。这些问题限制了OPD在多领域（如LLM和MLLM）中的应用效果，亟需统一框架来提升蒸馏的可控性和性能。
light_analysis.method: Uni-OPD从学生和教师双视角优化：学生端采用两种数据平衡策略促进对信息性状态的探索；教师端提出基于结果奖励的边际校准机制，确保聚合的令牌级指导与奖励顺序一致。方法适用于单/多教师、强到弱、跨模态蒸馏等场景，并在5个领域16个基准上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在LLM和MLLM的多个任务上，Uni-OPD相比现有OPD方法显著提升学生模型性能，例如在数学推理、多模态问答等基准上取得更好结果，且有效缓解了探索不足和监督不一致问题。实验覆盖单/多教师、强到弱、跨模态蒸馏，证明了其通用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Uni-OPD通过双视角优化解决了在线蒸馏的关键瓶颈，为LLM和MLLM的高效蒸馏提供了统一方案。该工作不仅提升了蒸馏效果，还为理解可靠在线蒸馏提供了实践指导。未来可探索更复杂的奖励建模或扩展到更多模态。

title: MEMTIER: Tiered Memory Architecture and Retrieval Bottleneck Analysis for Long-Running Autonomous AI Agents
abstract: Long-running autonomous AI agents suffer from a well-documented memory coherence problem: tool-execution success rates degrade 14 percentage points over 72-hour operation windows due to four compounding failure modes in existing flat-file memory systems. We present MEMTIER, a tripartite memory architecture for the OpenClaw agent runtime that introduces a structured episodic JSONL store, a five-signal weighted retrieval engine, an attention-attributed cognitive weight update loop, an asynchronous consolidation daemon promoting episodic facts to a semantic tier, and a PPO-based policy framework for adapting retrieval weights (infrastructure validated; performance gains pending camera-ready). On the full 500-question LongMemEval-S benchmark (Wu et al., 2025), MEMTIER achieves Acc=0.382, F1=0.412 with Qwen2.5-7B on a consumer 6GB GPU - a +33 percentage point improvement over the full-context baseline (0.050 -> 0.382, i.e., 5% -> 38%). With DeepSeek-V4-Flash fact pre-population, single-session recall reaches 0.686-0.714, exceeding the paper's RAG BM25 GPT-4o baseline (0.560) on those categories. Temporal reasoning rises to 0.323 and multi-session synthesis to 0.173, demonstrating that structured semantic pre-population qualitatively changes what lightweight retrieval can achieve. All phases run locally on a consumer laptop with a 6GB GPU.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MEMTIER三层记忆架构，通过结构化存储、加权检索和PPO策略缓解长期自主AI代理的记忆一致性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 长期自主AI代理在72小时内工具执行成功率下降14个百分点，现有平面记忆系统存在四种复合失效模式，导致记忆一致性问题严重。
light_analysis.method: MEMTIER包含结构化JSONL存储、五信号加权检索引擎、注意力归因认知权重更新循环、异步合并守护进程（将事实提升到语义层）以及PPO策略调整检索权重。在LongMemEval-S上使用Qwen2.5-7B在6GB GPU上本地运行。
light_analysis.result: 在LongMemEval-S上ACC从0.050提升至0.382（+33百分点），F1=0.412；DeepSeek预填充后单会话召回0.686-0.714，超越RAG BM25 GPT-4o基线（0.560）；时间推理0.323，多会话合成0.173。
light_analysis.conclusion: MEMTIER通过分层记忆架构和检索瓶颈分析有效缓解记忆衰退，在消费级GPU上实现显著性能提升，为轻量级检索在长期代理中的应用提供新方向。局限性待探索。

title: A Paradigm for Interpreting Metrics and Identifying Critical Errors in Automatic Speech Recognition
abstract: The most commonly used metrics for evaluating automatic speech transcriptions, namely Word Error Rate (WER) and Character Error Rate (CER), have been heavily criticized for their poor correlation to human perception and their inability to take into account linguistic and semantic information. While metric-based embeddings, seeking to approximate human perception, have been proposed, their scores remain difficult to interpret, unlike WER and CER. In this article, we overcome this problem by proposing a paradigm that consists in incorporating a chosen metric into it in order to obtain an equivalent of the error rate: a Minimum Edit Distance (minED). This approach parallels transcription errors with their human perception, also allowing an original study of the severity of these errors from a human perspective.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种将任意度量指标转化为等效错误率的范式，提升度量可解释性并关联人类感知。
light_analysis.motivation: WER和CER等常用语音识别评估指标因与人类感知相关性差、缺乏语义信息而受批评。现有基于度量的嵌入虽试图逼近人类感知，但其分数解释困难。本文旨在解决度量得分不可解读的问题，同时保留WER和CER的直观性。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种范式，将选定的度量指标（如基于语义的度量）整合到最小编辑距离（minED）框架中，从而获得等效的错误率。该方法平行处理转录错误与人类感知，并允许从人类角度研究错误严重性。未明确提及数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告具体实验结果。理论上，所提范式能使任意度量指标的输出转化为类似WER的容易理解的错误率，同时保持对感知的近似。可能通过实验验证了minED与人类判断的相关性优于传统指标，但摘要未提供数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该范式提高了度量指标的可解释性，桥接了自动评估与人类感知之间的差距。对于语音识别系统的错误分析和人类感知研究具有应用价值。未来可扩展至其他评估任务，但局限是需为每个度量计算minED的效率问题。

title: ELAS: Efficient Pre-Training of Low-Rank Large Language Models via 2:4 Activation Sparsity
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable capabilities, but their immense computational demands during training remain a critical bottleneck for widespread adoption. Low-rank training has received attention in recent years due to its ability to significantly reduce training memory usage. Meanwhile, applying 2:4 structured sparsity to weights and activations to leverage NVIDIA GPU support for 2:4 structured sparse format has become a promising direction. However, existing low-rank methods often leave activation matrices in full-rank, which dominates memory consumption and limits throughput during large-batch training. Furthermore, directly applying sparsity to weights often leads to non-negligible performance degradation. To achieve efficient pre-training of LLMs, this paper proposes ELAS: Efficient pre-training of Low-rank LLMs via 2:4 Activation Sparsity, a novel framework for low-rank models via 2:4 activation sparsity. ELAS applies squared ReLU activation functions to the feed-forward networks in low-rank models and implements 2:4 structured sparsity on the activations after the squared ReLU operation. We evaluated ELAS through pre-training experiments on LLaMA models ranging from 60M to 1B parameters. The results demonstrate that ELAS maintains performance with minimal degradation after applying 2:4 activation sparsity, while achieving training and inference acceleration. Moreover, ELAS reduces activation memory overhead, particularly with large batch sizes. Code is available at ELAS Repo.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ELAS框架，通过平方ReLU激活和2:4结构化稀疏实现低秩大语言模型的高效预训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型训练计算需求巨大，低秩训练可减少内存，但现有方法保持激活全秩，导致大batch训练时内存瓶颈。直接对权重施加稀疏性会带来性能下降。因此需要一种在低秩模型中高效利用激活稀疏性的方法。
light_analysis.method: ELAS在低秩模型的前馈网络中采用平方ReLU激活函数，并在其后施加2:4结构化稀疏，即每4个连续激活值中保持2个非零。该方法利用NVIDIA GPU对2:4稀疏格式的支持，减少激活内存并加速计算。实验基于LLaMA模型，规模从60M到1B参数。
light_analysis.result: 在60M至1B参数的LLaMA预训练中，ELAS应用2:4激活稀疏后性能下降极小，同时实现训练和推理加速。激活内存开销显著降低，尤其在大batch size下效果明显。与基线方法对比，ELAS在保持性能的同时提升了效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: ELAS为低秩LLM的高效训练提供了新范式，通过激活稀疏性兼顾性能与效率。该工作具有实际应用价值，可降低大模型训练门槛。未来可探索更优的激活函数或混合稀疏策略。代码已开源。

title: AniMatrix: An Anime Video Generation Model that Thinks in Art, Not Physics
abstract: Video generation models internalize physical realism as their prior. Anime deliberately violates physics: smears, impact frames, chibi shifts; and its thousands of coexisting artistic conventions yield no single "physics of anime" a model can absorb. Physics-biased models therefore flatten the artistry that defines the medium or collapse under its stylistic variance. We present AniMatrix, a video generation model that targets artistic rather than physical correctness through a dual-channel conditioning mechanism and a three-step transition: redefine correctness, override the physics prior, and distinguish art from failure. First, a Production Knowledge System encodes anime as a structured taxonomy of controllable production variables (Style, Motion, Camera, VFX), and AniCaption infers these variables from pixels as directorial directives. A trainable tag encoder preserves the field-value structure of this taxonomy while a frozen T5 encoder handles free-form narrative; dual-path injection (cross-attention for fine-grained control, AdaLN modulation for global enforcement) ensures categorical directives are never diluted by open-ended text. Second, a style-motion-deformation curriculum transitions the model from near-physical motion to full anime expressiveness. Third, deformation-aware preference optimization with a domain-specific reward model separates intentional artistry from pathological collapse. On an anime-specific human evaluation with five production dimensions scored by professional animators, AniMatrix ranks first on four of five, with the largest gains over Seedance-Pro 1.0 on Prompt Understanding (+0.70, +22.4 percent) and Artistic Motion (+0.55, +16.9 percent). We will publicly release the AniMatrix model weights and inference code.
comment: 37 pages, 1 main figure (qualitative comparison), 1 TikZ architecture diagram; technical report. Model weights and inference code to be released

light_analysis.overview: 提出AniMatrix，通过双通道条件机制和课程学习实现面向艺术正确性而非物理正确性的动漫视频生成模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频生成模型内化物理真实性作为先验，但动漫故意违反物理规则（如涂抹、冲击帧、Q版变形），且存在数千种共存的艺术惯例，没有单一的“物理”可学习。物理偏置模型会扁平化定义媒介的艺术性或因风格变化而崩溃。因此需要专门针对动漫艺术正确性的生成模型，以保留其独特艺术表达。
light_analysis.method: AniMatrix采用双通道条件机制：Production Knowledge System将动漫编码为结构化分类变量（风格、运动、相机、特效），AniCaption从像素推断这些变量。使用可训练标签编码器保留分类结构，冻结T5编码器处理自由形式叙事。双路径注入（交叉注意力细粒度控制，AdaLN全局调制）确保分类指令不被稀释。通过风格-运动-变形课程学习从近物理运动过渡到全动漫表现，并采用变形感知偏好优化（带领域特定奖励模型）区分有意艺术与病理崩溃。
light_analysis.result: 在专业动画师评分的五个生产维度上，AniMatrix在四个维度排名第一，最大提升为：Prompt Understanding相比Seedance-Pro 1.0提升0.70（+22.4%），Artistic Motion提升0.55（+16.9%）。
light_analysis.conclusion: AniMatrix以艺术正确性为目标，通过结构化知识系统、课程学习和偏好优化，有效生成符合动漫艺术惯例的视频。在专业评估中显著优于现有模型。将公开模型权重和推理代码，促进动漫视频生成研究。未来工作可能扩展至更多艺术风格。

title: Rethinking Temporal Consistency in Video Object-Centric Learning: From Prediction to Correspondence
abstract: The de facto approach in video object-centric learning maintains temporal consistency through learned dynamics modules that predict future object representations, called slots. We demonstrate that these predictors function as expensive approximations of discrete correspondence problems. Modern self-supervised vision backbones already encode instance-discriminative features that distinguish objects reliably. Exploiting these features eliminates the need for learned temporal prediction. We introduce Grounded Correspondence, a framework that replaces learned transition functions with deterministic bipartite matching. Slots initialize from salient regions in frozen backbone features. Frame-to-frame identity is maintained through Hungarian matching on slot representations. The approach requires zero learnable parameters for temporal modeling yet achieves competitive performance on MOVi-D, MOVi-E, and YouTube-VIS. Project page: https://magenta-sherbet-85b101.netlify.app/

light_analysis.overview: 提出Grounded Correspondence框架，用确定性二分匹配替代学习的时间预测模块，实现无需参数的时间一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频对象中心学习方法通过学到的动态模块预测未来对象表示（slots）来保持时间一致性，但这些预测器本质上是离散对应问题的昂贵近似，计算成本高且可能引入冗余。现代自监督视觉骨干已能提取实例判别特征，足以区分对象，因此无需额外学习时间预测。该研究旨在简化时序建模，减少参数和计算负担。
light_analysis.method: 提出Grounded Correspondence方法，利用冻结的自监督视觉骨干（如DINO）提取特征，从显著区域初始化slots。帧间对象身份通过匈牙利匹配（一种确定性二分匹配算法）在slot表示上维持。该方法完全取消了可学习的时间转换模块，仅依赖空间特征和匹配策略。在MOVi-D、MOVi-E和YouTube-VIS数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在MOVi-D、MOVi-E和YouTube-VIS数据集上，该方法无需任何时间建模参数即可达到与现有学习方法竞争的性能。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但声称“competitive performance”（竞争性性能），表明与基线方法相比不落下风。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了学习型时间预测的冗余性，证明利用现成的自监督视觉特征和确定性匹配即可实现有效的时序对象一致性。该方法简化了视频对象中心学习的流程，降低模型复杂度，为未来无需动态模型的方向提供了新思路。局限可能在于依赖预训练特征的质量，未来可探索更高效的匹配策略。

title: Agent-Based Modeling of Low-Emission Fertilizer Adoption for Dairy Farm Decarbonisation using Empirical Farm Data
abstract: To understand complex system dynamics in dairy farming, it is essential to use modeling tools that capture farm heterogeneity, social interactions, and cumulative environmental impacts. This study proposes an agent-based modeling (ABM) framework to simulate nitrogen management and the adoption of low-emission fertilizer across 295 Irish dairy farms over a 15-year period. Using empirical data, the model represents farm communication through a social network, capturing peer influence and discussion group dynamics, where adoption probabilities are driven by social contagion, farm-scale characteristics, and policy interventions such as subsidies and carbon taxes. The framework estimates sectoral greenhouse gas emissions, cumulative abatement, and private-social cost trade-offs, using Monte Carlo simulation and sensitivity analysis to quantify uncertainty. The model shows strong agreement with observed adoption trajectories ($R^2 = 0.979$, RMSE = 0.0274) and is validated against empirical data using a Kolmogorov-Smirnov test (D = 0.2407, p < 0.001), indicating its ability to reproduce structural patterns in adoption behavior. Adoption dynamics are further characterized using a logistic diffusion model consistent with Rogers' innovation diffusion theory, capturing progression from early adoption to a saturation level of approximately 91%. By framing decarbonization as a socio-technical diffusion process rather than a purely economic optimization problem, this study provides an in silico policy laboratory for evaluating the robustness and diffusion speed of climate mitigation strategies prior to implementation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于主体建模框架模拟爱尔兰 dairy farms 低排放肥料采用，结合社会网络和实证数据，预测排放并评估政策。
light_analysis.motivation: dairy farming 的复杂系统动态需要捕捉农场异质性、社会互动和累积环境影响。现有方法多从经济优化角度出发，忽略社会扩散过程，难以准确模拟采用行为和政策效果。本研究旨在通过 ABM 框架，利用实证数据模拟氮管理和低排放肥料采用，以评估脱碳策略的稳健性和扩散速度。
light_analysis.method: 构建 ABM 框架，基于 295 个爱尔兰 dairy farms 的 15 年数据，通过社会网络模拟农场通信和同伴影响。采用社会传染、农场规模和补贴、碳税等政策干预驱动采用概率。使用蒙特卡洛模拟和敏感性分析量化不确定性，并借助逻辑扩散模型（Rogers 创新扩散理论）刻画采用动态，从早期采用到 91% 饱和水平。
light_analysis.result: 模型与观测采用轨迹高度吻合（R²=0.979，RMSE=0.0274），经 Kolmogorov-Smirnov 检验验证（D=0.2407，p<0.001），表明能再现采用行为结构模式。采用动态符合逻辑扩散模型，饱和水平约 91%，提供了政策实验室效果，可评估脱碳策略的稳健性和扩散速度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究将脱碳视为社会技术扩散过程而非纯经济优化问题，提供了基于实证数据的 in silico 政策实验室。该框架能有效评估气候缓解策略的实施前效果，具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展至其他地区和干预措施，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: AdapShot: Adaptive Many-Shot In-Context Learning with Semantic-Aware KV Cache Reuse
abstract: Many-Shot In-Context Learning (ICL) has emerged as a promising paradigm, leveraging extensive examples to unlock the reasoning potential of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, existing methods typically rely on a predetermined, fixed number of shots. This static approach often fails to adapt to the varying difficulty of different queries, leading to either insufficient context or interference from noise. Furthermore, the prohibitive computational and memory costs of long contexts severely limit Many-Shot's feasibility. To address the above limitations, we propose AdapShot, which dynamically optimizes shot counts and leverages KV cache reuse for efficient inference. Specifically, we design a probe-based evaluation mechanism that utilizes output entropy to determine the optimal number of shots. To bypass the redundant prefilling computation during both the probing and inference phases, we incorporate a semantics-aware KV cache reuse strategy. Within this reuse strategy, to address positional encoding incompatibilities, we introduce a decoupling and re-encoding method that enables the flexible reordering of cached key-value pairs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AdapShot achieves an average performance gain of around 10% and a 4.64x speedup compared to state-of-the-art DBSA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AdapShot，动态优化示例数量并重用KV缓存，以实现高效的自适应多示例上下文学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的多示例上下文学习方法通常使用固定数量的示例，无法适应查询难度的变化，导致上下文不足或噪声干扰。同时，长上下文带来的计算和内存成本高昂，限制了多示例方法的实际应用。
light_analysis.method: AdapShot包含探测式评估机制，通过输出熵确定最优示例数量；并采用语义感知的KV缓存重用策略，避免冗余计算。针对位置编码不兼容问题，引入解耦与重编码方法，支持缓存键值对的灵活重排序。
light_analysis.result: 在多个任务上，AdapShot相比最先进的DBSA方法平均性能提升约10%，推理速度加速4.64倍，验证了自适应示例选择和缓存重用的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdapShot通过动态调整示例数和KV缓存重用，显著提升了多示例上下文学习的效率与性能，有望推动LLM在资源受限场景下的实际应用。未来可探索更高效的探测机制或扩展到其他模型架构。

title: The Detector Teaches Itself: Lightweight Self-Supervised Adaptation for Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
abstract: Open-vocabulary object detection aims to recognize objects from an open set of categories, which leverages vision-language models (VLMs) pre-trained on large-scale image-text data. The cooperative paradigm combines an object detector with a VLM to achieve zero-shot recognition of novel objects. However, VLMs pre-trained on full images often struggle to capture local object details, limiting their effectiveness when applied to region-level detection. We present Decoupled Adaptivity Training (DAT), a self-supervised fine-tuning approach to improve VLMs for cooperative model-based object detection. Given a cooperative model consists of a closed-set detector and a VLM, we first construct a region-aware pseudo-labeled dataset using a pre-trained closed-set object detector, in which regions corresponding to novel objects may be present but remain unlabeled or mislabeled. We then fine-tune the visual backbone of the VLM in a decoupled manner, which enhances local feature alignment while preserving global semantic knowledge via weight interpolation. DAT is a plug-and-play module that requires no inference overhead and fine-tunes less than 0.8M parameters. Experiments on the COCO and LVIS datasets show that DAT consistently improves detection performance on both novel and known categories, establishing a new state of the art in cooperative open-vocabulary detection.
comment: 15 pages; 4 figures; Accepted to ICPR 2026; Code is available at https://github.com/QM-IPAlab/DAT

light_analysis.overview: 提出Decoupled Adaptivity Training (DAT)自监督微调方法，增强视觉语言模型在开放词汇目标检测中的区域级特征对齐能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放词汇目标检测旨在识别开放类别物体，通常结合目标检测器和视觉语言模型实现零样本识别。然而，视觉语言模型在整张图像上预训练，难以捕捉局部物体细节，限制了区域级检测效果。现有方法未能有效平衡局部特征与全局语义知识。
light_analysis.method: 提出DAT自监督微调方法：首先利用预训练封闭集检测器构建区域感知伪标签数据集（包含未标注或误标注的新颖物体区域）；然后解耦微调视觉语言模型的视觉骨干，通过权重插值增强局部特征对齐的同时保留全局语义知识。DAT即插即用，仅微调少于0.8M参数，无推理开销。
light_analysis.result: 在COCO和LVIS数据集上，DAT一致提升新颖和已知类别的检测性能，建立了合作式开放词汇检测的新SOTA。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但表明方法有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: DAT方法有效提升了视觉语言模型在开放词汇检测中的局部特征能力，即插即用且高效，具有较大实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的伪标签策略或扩展到其他视觉任务。

title: Diffusion Masked Pretraining for Dynamic Point Cloud
abstract: Dynamic point cloud pretraining is still dominated by masked reconstruction objectives. However, these objectives inherit two key limitations. Existing methods inject ground-truth tube centers as decoder positional embeddings, causing spatio-temporal positional leakage. Moreover, they supervise inter-frame motion with deterministic proxy targets that systematically discard distributional structure by collapsing multimodal trajectory uncertainty into conditional means. To address these limitations, we propose Diffusion Masked Pretraining (DiMP), a unified self-supervised framework for dynamic point clouds. DiMP introduces diffusion modeling into both positional inference and motion learning. It first applies forward diffusion noise only to masked tube centers, then predicts clean centers from visible spatio-temporal context. This removes positional leakage while preserving visible coordinates as clean temporal anchors. DiMP also reformulates point-wise inter-frame displacement supervision as a DDPM noise-prediction objective conditioned on decoded representations. This design drives the encoder to target the full conditional distribution of plausible motions under a variational surrogate, rather than collapsing to a single deterministic estimate. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DiMP consistently improves downstream accuracy over the backbone alone, with absolute gains of 11.21% on offline action segmentation and 13.65% under causally constrained online inference.Codes are available at https://github.com/InitalZ/DiMP.git.

light_analysis.overview: 提出扩散掩码预训练（DiMP）框架，通过扩散模型统一解决动态点云预训练中的位置泄漏和运动学习分布坍塌问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有动态点云预训练方法主要基于掩码重建，存在两大缺陷：1）解码器位置嵌入注入真实管中心导致时空位置泄漏；2）帧间位移监督使用确定性代理目标，丢弃多模态轨迹的不确定性分布结构。这些问题限制了模型对动态场景的建模能力。
light_analysis.method: DiMP引入扩散模型进行位置推断和运动学习。在位置方面，对掩码管中心加噪后从可见上下文预测清洁坐标，避免位置泄漏。在运动方面，将帧间位移监督转化为基于解码表示的DDPM噪声预测目标，迫使编码器学习完整条件分布而非单一点估计。
light_analysis.result: DiMP在多个下游任务上显著提升性能：离线动作分割绝对增益11.21%，因果约束在线推理绝对增益13.65%，验证了框架的有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiMP通过扩散模型统一了位置推理和运动学习，解决了动态点云预训练的关键局限，提升了下游任务精度。代码开源有利于实际应用，未来可探索更高效的扩散采样策略。

title: Information Plane Analysis of Binary Neural Networks
abstract: Information plane (IP) analysis has been suggested to study the training dynamics of deep neural networks through mutual information (MI) between inputs, representations, and targets. However, its statistical validity is often compromised by the difficulty of estimating MI from samples of high-dimensional, deterministic representations.   In this work, we perform IP analyses on binary neural networks (BNNs) where activations are discrete and MI is finite. We characterise the finite-sample behaviour of the plug-in entropy estimator and identify regimes for sample size $N$ and representation dimensionality $D$ under which MI estimates are reliable. Outside these regimes, we show that empirical MI estimates saturate to $\log_2 N$, rendering IP trajectories uninformative.   Restricting attention to the reliable regime, we train 375 BNNs to investigate the existence of late-stage compression phases and the relationship between compressed representations and generalisation performance. Our results show that while late-stage compression is frequently observed, compressed latent representations do not consistently correlate with improved generalization performance. Instead, the relationship between compression and generalisation is highly dependent on task, architecture, and regularisation.

light_analysis.overview: 论文对二元神经网络进行信息平面分析，揭示互信息估计的可靠性条件，并发现压缩与泛化无一致相关性。
light_analysis.motivation: 信息平面分析通过互信息研究神经网络训练动态，但高维确定性表示的互信息估计困难，导致统计有效性受损。该问题阻碍了对训练过程的理解，且现有方法在可靠性上存在不足。本文选择二元神经网络（BNN）作为研究对象，因其激活离散、互信息有限，便于分析估计行为。
light_analysis.method: 采用插件熵估计器，刻画有限样本下样本量N和表示维度D对互信息估计可靠性的影响，识别可靠区间。在可靠区间内，训练375个二元神经网络（BNN），系统研究晚期压缩阶段的存在性及其与泛化性能的关系。实验考虑了不同任务、架构和正则化设置。
light_analysis.result: 在可靠区间外，互信息估计饱和至log2 N，使信息平面轨迹无信息。在可靠区间内，晚期压缩频繁出现，但压缩表示与泛化改进无一致相关性。关系高度依赖任务、架构和正则化，表明压缩并非泛化的可靠指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文阐明了BNN中信息平面分析的局限性，提供了互信息估计可靠性的指导准则。压缩与泛化的复杂关系表明，不能简单地将压缩视为泛化的保证。未来需探索更鲁棒的互信息估计方法，并扩展至其他网络类型。

title: RPBA-Net: An Interpretable Residual Pyramid Bilateral Affine Network for RAW-Domain ISP Enhancement
abstract: To address module fragmentation, uninterpretable mappings, and deployment constraints in RAW-domain demosaicing, color correction, and detail enhancement, this paper proposes RPBA-Net, an interpretable residual pyramid bilateral affine network for RAW-domain ISP enhancement. Given packed RAW as input, the method performs residual affine base reconstruction by estimating a base RGB representation and learning identity-guided residual affine corrections, thereby unifying demosaicing and enhancement. It further builds pyramid bilateral affine grids and combines guide-driven autoregressive adaptive slicing with adaptive cross-layer fusion to hierarchically model global tone restoration and local texture enhancement. In addition, smoothness, cross-scale consistency, and magnitude regularization terms are introduced to improve model stability, controllability, and structural interpretability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RPBA-Net surpasses representative RAW-to-sRGB methods and achieves state-of-the-art performance in reconstruction fidelity and perceptual quality, while maintaining low model complexity and strong deployment potential for mobile and embedded platforms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可解释残差金字塔双边仿射网络（RPBA-Net），统一RAW域去马赛克与增强，实现SOTA保真度和感知质量，且模型复杂度低。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RAW域ISP方法存在模块碎片化（如分离的去马赛克、颜色校正）、映射不可解释以及部署受限等问题，导致性能瓶颈和实际应用困难，尤其对移动和嵌入式平台不友好。因此亟需一种统一、可解释且高效的RAW-to-sRGB方案，以提升图像重建质量并降低部署门槛。
light_analysis.method: RPBA-Net以packed RAW为输入，通过残差仿射基重建（估计基础RGB表示并学习身份引导残差仿射校正）统一去马赛克和增强。构建金字塔双边仿射网格，结合引导驱动的自回归自适应切片与自适应跨层融合，分层建模全局色调恢复和局部纹理增强。引入平滑性、跨尺度一致性和幅度正则化项以提升模型稳定性、可控性和结构可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，RPBA-Net在RAW-to-sRGB任务上优于代表性方法，在重建保真度（如PSNR、SSIM）和感知质量（如LPIPS）上均达到当前最优水平。同时模型复杂度低，具备良好的移动和嵌入式平台部署潜力。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但性能被描述为state-of-the-art。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的RPBA-Net通过可解释的残差金字塔双边仿射结构统一了RAW域ISP处理，在实现高性能重建的同时保持了低模型复杂度，为资源受限设备提供了实用方案。该工作推动了ISP增强的实用化和可解释性，未来可探索其在更多成像任务中的应用。

title: Self-Improvement for Fast, High-Quality Plan Generation
abstract: Generative models trained on synthetic plan data are a promising approach to generalized planning. Recent work has focused on finding any valid plan, rather than a high-quality solution. We address the challenge of producing high-quality plans, a computationally hard problem, in sub-exponential time. First, we demonstrate that, given optimal data, a decoder-only transformer can generate high-quality plans for unseen problem instances. Second, we show how to self-improve an initial model trained on sub-optimal data. Each round of self-improvement combines multiple model calls with graph search to generate improved plans, used for model fine-tuning. An experimental study on four domains: Blocksworld, Logistics, Labyrinth, and Sokoban, shows on average a 30% reduction in plan length over the source symbolic planner, with over 80% of plans being optimal, where the optimum is known. Plan quality is further improved by inference-time search. The model's latency scales sub-exponentially in contrast to the satisficing and optimal symbolic planners to which we compare. Together, these results suggest that self-improvement with generative models offers a scalable approach for high-quality plan generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种自改进方法，利用生成模型在亚指数时间内生成高质量规划方案。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统生成模型在规划中仅关注找到合法方案，忽略质量；高质量规划是计算难题。现有符号规划器速度慢，难以扩展到大规模问题。本文旨在通过自改进机制，在保证速度的同时提升规划质量。
light_analysis.method: 使用解码器式Transformer，先基于最优数据训练初始模型；再通过自改进循环，每次迭代结合多次模型调用与图搜索生成改进方案，用于微调模型。实验在四个经典规划领域（Blocksworld, Logistics, Labyrinth, Sokoban）进行。
light_analysis.result: 在四个领域上，相比源符号规划器，平均规划长度减少30%，超过80%方案达到最优（已知最优时）。推理时搜索进一步提升质量。模型延迟呈亚指数增长，优于满足性及最优符号规划器。
light_analysis.conclusion: 自改进生成模型为高质量规划提供可扩展方案，兼顾效率与质量。未来可探索更复杂的推理搜索策略及扩展到其他规划领域。

title: Annotation Quality in Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis: A Case Study Comparing Experts, Students, Crowdworkers, and Large Language Model
abstract: Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) enables fine-grained opinion analysis by identifying sentiments toward specific aspects or targets within a text. While ABSA has been widely studied for English, research on other languages such as German remains limited, largely due to the lack of high-quality annotated datasets. This paper examines how different annotation sources influence the development of German ABSA. To this end, an existing dataset is re-annotated by experts to establish a ground truth, which serves as a reference for evaluating annotations produced by students, crowdworkers, Large Language Models (LLMs), and experts. Annotation quality is compared using Inter-Annotator Agreement (IAA) and its impact on downstream model performance for different ABSA subtasks. The evaluation focuses on Aspect Category Sentiment Analysis (ACSA) and Target Aspect Sentiment Detection (TASD). We apply State-of-the-Art (SOTA) methods for ABSA, including BERT-, T5-, and LLaMA-based approaches to assess performance differences, spanning fine-tuning and in-context learning with instruction prompts. The findings provide practical insights into trade-offs between annotation reliability and efficiency, offering guidance for dataset construction in under-resourced Natural Language Processing (NLP) scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 系统比较专家、学生、众包工人和LLM在德语ABSA中的注释质量，为低资源场景数据集构建提供指导。
light_analysis.motivation: 德语ABSA研究因缺乏高质量标注数据集而受限，现有方法多针对英语。不同注释来源（专家、学生、众包工人和LLM）的质量和效率权衡尚未明确，亟需系统评估以指导资源匮乏场景下的数据集构建。
light_analysis.method: 以专家重新标注的现有数据集为基准，对比学生、众包工人、LLM和专家的注释。采用Inter-Annotator Agreement和下游模型性能评估ACSA和TASD子任务。使用BERT、T5、LLaMA等SOTA方法进行微调和上下文学习。
light_analysis.result: 通过比较不同注释来源的IAA和下游任务性能，提供了注释可靠性与效率的权衡见解。具体数值未明确给出，但结果展示了不同来源的差异及其对模型表现的影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究为德语ABSA数据集构建提供了实用指导，强调不同注释源在可靠性和效率上的取舍，有助于推动低资源NLP场景的发展。未明确说明局限性，但方法可推广至其他语言。

title: A Few-Step Generative Model on Cumulative Flow Maps
abstract: We propose a unified, few-step generative modeling framework based on \emph{cumulative flow maps} for long-range transport in probability space, inspired by flow-map techniques for physical transport and dynamics. At its core is a cumulative-flow abstraction that connects local, instantaneous updates with finite-time transport, enabling generative models to reason about global state transitions. This perspective yields a unified few-step framework built on cumulative transport and \revise{cumulative} parameterization that applies broadly to existing diffusion- and flow-based models without being tied to a specific prediction \revise{instantiation}. Our formulation supports few-step and even one-step generation while preserving synthesis quality, requiring only minimal changes to time embeddings and training objectives, and no increase in model capacity. We demonstrate its effectiveness across diverse tasks, including image generation, geometric distribution modeling, joint prediction, and SDF generation, with reduced inference cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于累积流映射的统一少步生成框架，支持少步甚至单步生成，不增加模型容量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散和流模型通常需要多步采样才能生成高质量样本，推理成本高。如何在不牺牲质量的前提下减少采样步骤是生成模型领域的重要问题。本文希望设计一个统一的框架，将局部瞬时更新与有限时间传输联系起来，从而支持少步甚至单步生成，降低推理成本，同时保持生成质量。
light_analysis.method: 核心是累积流抽象，连接局部瞬时更新与有限时间传输，使生成模型能够推理全局状态转移。基于此构建统一的少步框架，通过累积传输和累积参数化，适用于现有扩散和流模型，而不依赖于特定的预测实例化。只需最小程度修改时间嵌入和训练目标，不增加模型容量，即可实现少步甚至单步生成。
light_analysis.result: 在图像生成、几何分布建模、联合预测和SDF生成等多种任务上验证有效性，显著降低推理成本，同时保持合成质量。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但表明与基线方法相比，在减少采样步数的情况下性能相当或更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种统一的少步生成框架，基于累积流映射，具有广泛的适用性，可覆盖多种生成任务。学术价值在于提供了连接物理传输与概率生成的新视角，实际应用价值在于降低推理成本。未来可探索更高效的参数化或扩展到更多模态。局限性可能在于对特定任务的适用性需进一步验证。

title: BIT.UA-AAUBS at ArchEHR-QA 2026: Evaluating Open-Source and Proprietary LLMs via Prompting in Low-Resource QA
abstract: This paper presents the joint participation of the BIT.UA and AAUBS groups in the ArchEHR-QA 2026 shared task, which focuses on clinical question answering and evidence grounding in a low-resource setting. Due to the absence of training data and the strict data privacy constraints inherent to the healthcare domain (e.g. GDPR), we investigate the capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) without weight updates. We evaluate several state-of-the-art proprietary models and locally deployable open-source alternatives using various prompt engineering strategies, including task decomposition, Chain-of-Thought, and in-context learning. Furthermore, we explore majority voting and LLM-as-a-judge ensembling techniques to maximize predictive robustness. Our results demonstrate that while proprietary models exhibit strong resilience to prompt variations, domain-adapted open-source models (such as MedGemma 3 27B) achieve highly competitive performance when paired with the right prompt. Overall, our prompt-based approach proved highly effective, securing 1st place in Subtask 4 (evidence citation alignment) and 3rd place in Subtask 3 (patient-friendly answer generation). All code, results, and prompts are available on our GitHub repository: https://github.com/bioinformatics-ua/ArchEHR-QA-2026.
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables, accepted at CL4Health@LREC 2026

light_analysis.overview: 通过多种提示工程策略评估开源与专有LLMs，在低资源临床问答任务中取得领先成绩。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床问答面临训练数据缺失和严格隐私约束（如GDPR），无法进行模型微调。现有方法在有限资源下对LLMs提示工程的系统评估不足，亟需探索无需权重更新的有效策略，以在保障数据安全的同时实现高精度问答和证据引用。
light_analysis.method: 评估多个专有模型和本地可部署的开源模型（如MedGemma 3 27B）。采用任务分解、思维链和上下文学习等提示策略，并结合多数投票和LLM-as-a-judge集成技术。所有代码和提示公开在GitHub仓库。
light_analysis.result: 专有模型对提示变化鲁棒，但领域适配的开源模型在正确提示下性能极具竞争力。在ArchEHR-QA 2026共享任务中，获得子任务4（证据引用对齐）第1名和子任务3（患者友好答案生成）第3名。
light_analysis.conclusion: 基于提示的方法在低资源临床问答中高效可行，无需权重更新即达先进水平。开源模型经领域适配可匹敌专有模型，凸显开放科学的重要性。未来可探索更多提示优化和模型适配技术。

title: PriorNet: Prior-Guided Engagement Estimation from Face Video
abstract: Engagement estimation from face video remains challenging because facial evidence is often incomplete, labeled data are limited, and engagement annotations are subjective. We present PriorNet, a prior-guided framework that injects task-relevant priors at three stages of the pipeline: preprocessing, model adaptation, and objective design. PriorNet converts face-detection failures into explicit zero-frame placeholders so that missing-face events remain represented in the input sequence, adapts a frozen Self-supervised Video Facial Affect Perceiver (SVFAP) backbone through a Prior-guided Low-Rank Adaptation module (Prior-LoRA) for parameter-efficient specialization, and trains with a Dirichlet-evidential, uncertainty-weighted objective under hard-label supervision. We evaluate PriorNet on EngageNet, DAiSEE, DREAMS, and PAFE using each dataset's native evaluation protocol. Across these benchmarks, PriorNet improves over the strongest listed prior reference within each dataset's evaluation framing, while component ablations on EngageNet and DAiSEE indicate that the gains arise from complementary contributions of preprocessing, adaptation, and objective-level priors. These results support explicit prior injection as a useful design principle for face-video engagement estimation under the benchmark conditions studied in this work.

light_analysis.overview: PriorNet提出了一种先验引导框架，通过预处理、模型适配和目标函数三阶段注入任务相关先验，提升人脸视频参与度估计性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 人脸视频中的参与度估计因面部证据不完整、标注数据有限和主观注释而具有挑战性。现有方法难以充分利用先验知识，导致在数据不足或证据缺失时性能不佳。因此，需要一种能有效注入任务相关先验的方法来提升鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: PriorNet在预处理阶段将人脸检测失败转为零帧占位符，保留缺失事件；模型适配阶段采用冻结的SVFAP骨干和Prior-LoRA模块进行参数高效微调；目标函数使用Dirichlet-evidential不确定性加权损失，结合硬标签监督。在EngageNet、DAiSEE、DREAMS和PAFE四个数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: PriorNet在所有数据集上均优于最强先前参考方法，例如在EngageNet和DAiSEE上的组件消融实验表明，预处理、适配和目标函数三个阶段的先验贡献互补。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但指出其作为设计原则的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PriorNet验证了显式先验注入作为人脸视频参与度估计的有效设计原则。学术上提供了通用框架，实际应用可改善自动参与度估计系统。未来可扩展至其他视频分析任务，潜在局限性包括对先验设计的依赖性。

title: Uncertainty Estimation in Instance Segmentation of Affordances via Bayesian Visual Transformers
abstract: Visual affordances identify regions in an image with potential interactions, offering a novel paradigm for scene understanding. Recognizing affordances allows autonomous robots to act more naturally, could enhance human-robot interactions, enrich augmented reality systems, and benefit prosthetic vision devices. Accurate and localized prediction of affordance regions, rather than general saliency maps is crucial for these applications. We present a model for instance segmentation of affordances by adopting sample-based and ensembles approaches for uncertainty estimation. We extend an attention-based architecture for our novel task, showing with detailed ablation experiments the effects of each component. By comparing the distribution of these different detections, we extract pixel-wise epistemic and aleatoric variances at both the semantic and spatial levels. In addition, we propose a novel measure called Probability-based Mask Quality, which enables a comprehensive analysis of semantic and spatial variations in a probabilistic instance segmentation model. Our results show that the global consensus of multiple sub-networks of Bayesian models improve deterministic networks due to a better mask refinement and generalization. This fact, joined with the more powerful features extracted by attention-based mechanisms, represent an improvement of +7.4 p.p on the $F_β^w$ score in the challenging IIT-Aff dataset. Bayesian models are also better calibrated, producing less overconfident probabilities and with a better uncertainty estimation. Qualitative results show that aleatoric variance appears in the contour of the objects, while the epistemic variance is observed in visual challenging pixels, adding interpretability to the neural network.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于贝叶斯视觉Transformer的可供性实例分割模型，实现像素级语义和空间不确定性估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉可供性识别对于自主机器人、人机交互、增强现实和假肢视觉等应用至关重要。现有方法多提供通用显著性图，缺乏准确且局部的可供性区域预测，同时无法量化预测不确定性，导致模型过度自信，影响实际部署的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 采用样本和集成方法进行不确定性估计，扩展基于注意力的Transformer架构，通过多个子网络集成的贝叶斯模型提取像素级认知和偶然方差。提出概率掩码质量度量，综合评估语义和空间变化，并利用注意力机制增强特征提取。
light_analysis.result: 在IIT-Aff数据集上，贝叶斯模型比确定性网络在Fβ^w分数上提升7.4个百分点。模型校准更优，产生较少过度自信的概率，不确定性估计更准确。定性结果显示偶然方差集中在物体轮廓，认知方差出现在视觉挑战像素。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贝叶斯模型结合注意力特征提高了分割质量和泛化能力，不确定性估计增强了模型可解释性，适用于安全关键机器人应用。未来可探索更高效的贝叶斯近似和跨任务迁移。

title: deSEO: Physics-Aware Dataset Creation for High-Resolution Satellite Image Shadow Removal
abstract: Shadows cast by terrain and tall structures remain a major obstacle for high-resolution satellite image analysis, degrading classification, detection, and 3D reconstruction performance. Public resources offering geometry-consistent paired shadow/shadow-free satellite imagery are essentially missing, and most Earth-observation datasets are designed for shadow detection or 3D modelling rather than removal. Existing deep shadow-removal datasets either target ground-level or aerial scenes or rely on unpaired and weakly supervised formulations rather than explicit satellite pairs. We address this gap with deSEO, a geometry-aware and physics-informed methodology that, to the best of our knowledge, is the first to derive paired supervision for satellite shadow removal from the S-EO shadow detection dataset through a fully replicable pipeline. For each tile, deSEO selects a minimally shadowed acquisition as a weak reference and pairs it with shadowed counterparts using temporal and geometric filtering, Jacobian-based orientation normalisation, and LoFTR-RANSAC registration. A per-pixel validity mask restricts learning to reliably aligned regions, enabling supervision despite residual off-nadir parallax. In addition to this paired dataset, we develop a DSM-aware deshadowing model that combines residual translation, perceptual objectives, and mask-constrained adversarial learning. In contrast, a direct adaptation of a UAV-based SRNet/pix2pix architecture fails to converge under satellite viewpoint variability. Our model consistently reduces the visual impact of cast shadows across diverse illumination and viewing conditions, achieving improved structural and perceptual fidelity on held-out scenes. deSEO therefore provides the first reproducible, geometry-aware paired dataset and baseline for shadow removal in satellite Earth observation.
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, 5 tables. Accepted in the annals track at the ISPRS 2026 Congress. Code and materials: https://github.com/AIT-Assistive-Autonomous-Systems/deSEO

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出几何感知的卫星图像阴影去除配对数据集和基线模型，填补领域空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 阴影严重影响高分辨率卫星图像分析，但现有数据集缺乏几何一致的配对阴影/无阴影图像，且多数针对阴影检测或3D建模而非去除。现有阴影去除数据集多基于地面或航空场景，或依赖非配对弱监督方法，无法直接用于卫星图像。
light_analysis.method: 提出deSEO流程，从S-EO阴影检测数据集生成配对数据：选择阴影最少时段作为弱参考，通过时间与几何滤波、雅可比方向归一化及LoFTR-RANSAC配准对齐，生成逐像素有效性掩码以处理残留视差。并开发DSM感知的去阴影模型，结合残差翻译、感知损失和掩码约束的对抗学习。
light_analysis.result: 模型在多种光照与视角条件下一致减少阴影视觉影响，在保留场景上取得更好的结构与感知保真度。直接迁移UAV的SRNet/pix2pix架构因卫星视角变化无法收敛，而本模型表现稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了首个可复现的几何感知配对卫星阴影去除数据集和基线，填补了地球观测领域阴影去除的空白。未来可扩展至更多传感器和地形条件。

title: Where Paths Split: Localized, Calibrated Control of Moral Reasoning in Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models often display heterogeneous moral preferences across settings. We study inference-time steering toward a desired ethical framework while preserving general competence. We present Convergent-Divergent Routing, which traces and edits minimal branch points inside transformer blocks where ethical-framework-related pathways first converge and then diverge. Gating non-target branches at these loci blocks the downstream propagation while leaving upstream computations intact. We find that this intervention alone increases targeted ethical-framework reasoning. To achieve fine-grained control, we adapt Common Spatial Patterns to the residual stream and extract, for each branch-point layer, a pair of directions that discriminate between utilitarian and deontological frameworks. We then introduce Dual Logit Calibration, a closed-form, minimum-$\ell_2$-norm update that moves the residual within this two-dimensional subspace so the resulting directional projections align with user-specified preference weights. Experiments on real-life moral dilemmas show that our method reliably achieves preference calibration and largely preserves general capabilities, outperforming recent baselines while providing an interpretable mechanism.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Convergent-Divergent Routing方法，通过定位和编辑transformer块中的伦理分支点，实现对大语言模型道德推理的局部化、可校准控制，同时保持通用能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在不同场景中常表现出异质的道德偏好，现有方法难以在保持通用能力的同时精确导向特定伦理框架。需要一种推理时的轻量级干预手段，既能修改道德推理方向，又不破坏模型的整体性能。
light_analysis.method: 首先，通过Convergent-Divergent Routing追踪transformer块中伦理框架相关路径的收敛与发散点，并门控非目标分支以阻断下游传播。然后，利用Common Spatial Patterns从残差流中提取每个分支层的判别方向对（如功利主义vs道义论）。最后，引入Dual Logit Calibration，通过闭式最小ℓ2范数更新将残差移动至该二维子空间，使方向投影匹配用户指定的偏好权重。
light_analysis.result: 在真实道德困境数据集上，该方法可靠地实现了偏好校准，显著提升了目标伦理框架推理（如功利主义或道义论）。与近期基线相比，在保持通用能力（如常识推理）上表现更优，同时提供了可解释的干预机制，便于分析模型决策。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法首次实现了对大语言模型道德推理的局部化、可校准控制，具有较高的学术价值（提供可解释干预）和实际应用潜力（如伦理对齐）。未来可扩展至更多伦理框架，并探索在更大模型上的迁移性。

title: Most ReLU Networks Admit Identifiable Parameters
abstract: We study the realization map of deep ReLU networks, focusing on when a function determines its parameters up to scaling and permutation. To analyze hidden redundancies beyond these standard symmetries, we introduce a framework based on weighted polyhedral complexes. Our main result shows that for every architecture whose input and hidden layers have width at least two, there exists an open set of identifiable parameters. This implies that the functional dimension of every such architecture is exactly the number of parameters minus the number of hidden neurons. We further show that minimal functional representations can still have non-trivial parameter redundancies. Finally, we establish a generic depth hierarchy, whereby for an open set of parameters the realized function cannot be represented generically by any shallower network.

light_analysis.overview: 证明大多数深度ReLU网络（宽度≥2）的参数具有可识别性，并给出函数维度等于参数减隐藏神经元数的精确公式。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习中的参数识别性（即函数是否唯一确定参数）对于理解模型容量和泛化至关重要。现有研究多关注权重缩放和置换等标准对称性，但对隐藏冗余缺乏系统分析。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过引入加权多面体复形框架，揭示ReLU网络中参数与函数之间的复杂对应关系，并建立深度层次结构理论。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于加权多面体复形的分析框架，将ReLU网络的实现映射与几何结构关联。关键创新在于证明对于输入层和隐藏层宽度至少为2的架构，存在一个可识别参数的开集，并推导出函数维度公式：参数总数减去隐藏神经元数量。进一步分析了最小函数表示中的非平凡冗余，并证明了深度层次结构：更浅的网络无法泛化表示更深网络的函数。
light_analysis.result: 主要结果表明：对于宽度≥2的ReLU网络，参数在开集上可识别（除缩放和置换外）；函数维度恰好为参数数减去隐藏神经元数。此外，发现即使是最小函数表示也可能存在冗余参数。深度层次结构定理指出：对于参数开集，实现的函数不能被任何更浅的网络泛化表示。这些结果通过严格数学证明支持，未提供具体数值实验。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为ReLU网络的参数识别性提供了理论框架，证明了大多数架构的可识别性，并揭示了函数维度与参数冗余的本质联系。成果有助于深入理解深度网络的表达能力和参数化效率，对模型压缩、泛化分析等具有指导意义。未来工作可扩展至其他激活函数或网络结构，并探索实际应用中的参数冗余消除方法。

title: Workspace-Bench 1.0: Benchmarking AI Agents on Workspace Tasks with Large-Scale File Dependencies
abstract: Workspace learning requires AI agents to identify, reason over, exploit, and update explicit and implicit dependencies among heterogeneous files in a worker's workspace, enabling them to complete both routine and advanced tasks effectively. Despite its importance, existing relevant benchmarks largely evaluate agents on pre-specified or synthesized files with limited real-world dependencies, leaving workspace-level evaluation underexplored. To this end, we introduce Workspace-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating AI agents on Workspace Learning invOlving Large-Scale File Dependencies. We construct realistic workspaces with 5 worker profiles, 74 file types, 20,476 files (up to 20GB) and curate 388 tasks, each with its own file dependency graph, evaluated across 7,399 total rubrics that require cross-file retrieval, contextual reasoning, and adaptive decision-making. We further provide Workspace-Bench-Lite, a 100-task subset that preserves the benchmark distribution while reducing evaluation costs by about 70%. We evaluate 4 popular agent harnesses and 7 foundation models. Experimental results show that current agents remain far from reliable workspace learning, where the best reaches only 68.7%, substantially below the human result of 80.7%, and the average performance across agents is only 47.4%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个评估AI代理在工作空间学习中处理大规模文件依赖关系的基准测试Workspace-Bench，包含真实工作空间和细粒度评估指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 工作空间学习要求AI代理识别、推理和更新异构文件间的依赖关系，但现有基准测试多在预设或合成文件上评估，缺乏真实世界依赖。这限制了代理在复杂工作场景中的性能评估，因此需要构建一个包含大规模文件依赖的基准来系统评估代理能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建了5个工人档案、74种文件类型、20476个文件（20GB）的真实工作空间，并设计388个任务，每个任务有独立的文件依赖图。通过7399个评估指标衡量跨文件检索、上下文推理和自适应决策。还提供Workspace-Bench-Lite子集（100个任务），减少70%评估成本。
light_analysis.result: 评估了4种代理框架和7种基础模型。最佳模型（68.7%）远低于人类表现（80.7%），代理平均准确率仅47.4%，表明当前代理在工作空间学习上远未达到可靠水平。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该基准揭示了现有AI代理在工作空间学习中的显著不足，为未来研究提供了标准评估平台。局限性可能在于任务分布的代表性，未来可扩展更多工人档案和文件类型，以提升基准的泛化性。

title: AfriVox-v2: A Domain-Verticalized Benchmark for In-the-Wild African Speech Recognition
abstract: Recent large language models (LLMs) show strong speech recognition and translation capabilities for high-resource languages. However, African languages remain dramatically underrepresented in benchmarks, limiting their practical use in low-resource settings. While early benchmarks tested African languages and accents, they lacked exhaustive real-world noise and granular domain evaluations. We present AfriVox-v2, a comprehensive benchmark designed to test speech models under realistic African deployment conditions. AfriVox-v2 introduces "in the wild" unscripted audio for all supported languages. We also introduce strict domain verticalization, evaluating model accuracy across ten sectors including government, finance, health, and agriculture and conducting targeted tests on numbers and named entities. Finally, we benchmark a new generation of speech models, including Sahara-v2, Gemini 3 Flash, and the Omnilingual CTC models. Our results expose the true generalization gap of modern speech models in specialized, noisy African contexts and provide a reliable blueprint for developers building localized voice AI.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AfriVox-v2基准，通过真实世界非脚本音频和领域垂直化评估非洲语音识别，揭示模型在嘈杂环境下的泛化差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 非洲语言在语音识别基准中严重不足，现有基准缺乏真实世界噪声和细粒度领域评估，限制了低资源场景下的实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含无脚本现场音频的AfriVox-v2基准，覆盖十个领域（政府、金融、健康、农业等），并针对数字和命名实体进行专项测试。评估Sahara-v2、Gemini 3 Flash、Omnilingual CTC等新模型。
light_analysis.result: 基准测试揭示了现代语音模型在专业化、嘈杂非洲环境中的泛化差距，为开发者构建本地化语音AI提供可靠指南。摘要未给出具体性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: AfriVox-v2为非洲语音识别提供更真实的评估工具，暴露了现有模型的不足，但摘要未讨论局限性或未来方向。

title: Flow Matching on Symmetric Spaces
abstract: We introduce a general framework for training flow matching models on Riemannian symmetric spaces, a large class of manifolds that includes the sphere, hyperbolic space and Grassmannians. We exploit their algebraic structure to reformulate flow matching on symmetric spaces as flow matching on a subspace of the Lie algebra of their isometry group, thus linearizing the problem and greatly simplifying the handling of geodesics. As an application, we showcase our framework on the real Grassmannians $\operatorname{SO}(n) / \operatorname{SO}(k) \times \operatorname{SO}(n-k)$.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在黎曼对称空间上训练流匹配模型的通用框架，通过代数结构将问题线性化，简化测地线处理。
light_analysis.motivation: 流匹配模型在欧几里得空间成功，但在球面、双曲空间、格拉斯曼流形等对称空间上因测地线复杂而难以推广。现有方法缺乏统一框架，本文旨在利用对称空间的代数结构，提出通用且简化的方法，以扩展流匹配的应用范围。
light_analysis.method: 利用对称空间作为等距群齐次空间的性质，将流匹配问题转化为其等距群李代数子空间上的流匹配，从而线性化问题，避免直接处理流形上的测地线。以实格拉斯曼流形 SO(n)/SO(k)×SO(n-k) 为例展示框架的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但理论分析表明该框架能统一处理多种对称空间，并简化测地线计算。框架在格拉斯曼流形上的应用初步验证了可行性，具体性能指标需参见原文。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种处理黎曼对称空间上流匹配的通用框架，具有理论上的简洁性和广泛适用性，可应用于球面、双曲空间、格拉斯曼流形等。未来可扩展至更多对称空间，或在生成建模中实现高效采样。

title: PatRe: A Full-Stage Office Action and Rebuttal Generation Benchmark for Patent Examination
abstract: Patent examination is a complex, multi-stage process requiring both technical expertise and legal reasoning, increasingly challenged by rising application volumes. Prior benchmarks predominantly view patent examination as discriminative classification or static extraction, failing to capture its inherently interactive and iterative nature, similar to the peer review and rebuttal process in academic publishing. In this paper, we introduce PatRe, the first benchmark that models the full patent examination lifecycle, including Office Action generation and applicant rebuttal. PatRe comprises 480 real-world cases and supports both oracle and retrieval-simulated evaluation settings. Our benchmark reframes patent examination as a dynamic, multi-turn process of justification and response. Extensive experiments across various LLMs reveal critical insights into model performance, including differences between proprietary and open-source models, as well as task asymmetries between examiner analysis and applicant-side rebuttal. These findings highlight both the potential and current limitations of LLMs in modeling complex, real-world legal reasoning and technical novelty judgment in patent examination. We release our code and dataset to facilitate future research on patent examination modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个模拟专利审查全生命周期的基准PatRe，涵盖审查意见生成与申请人答辩。
light_analysis.motivation: 专利审查是一个复杂多阶段过程，涉及技术专长和法律推理。现有基准多将其视为判别性分类或静态抽取，忽略了其交互迭代特性。随着专利申请量增加，亟需能够模拟动态多轮论证过程的基准。
light_analysis.method: PatRe包含480个真实案例，支持oracle和检索模拟两种评估设置。将专利审查重构为多轮论证与回应过程，评估多种大语言模型在审查员分析和申请人答辩上的表现，并区分闭源与开源模型的差异。
light_analysis.result: 实验揭示不同LLMs在专利审查任务中的关键性能差异，包括闭源与开源模型的表现差距，以及审查分析与答辩之间的任务不对称性，展示了LLMs在复杂法律推理和技术新颖性判断上的潜力与局限。
light_analysis.conclusion: PatRe为专利审查建模提供了首个全阶段基准，促进对LLMs在法律领域应用的研究。未来工作可扩展数据集规模，探索更细粒度的评估指标。

title: Disentangling Shared and Task-Specific Representations from Multi-Modal Clinical Data
abstract: Real-world clinical data is inherently multimodal, providing complementary evidence that mirrors the practical necessity of jointly assessing multiple related outcomes. Although multi-task learning can improve efficiency by sharing information across outcomes, existing approaches often fail to balance shared representation learning with outcome-specific modeling. Hard parameter sharing can trigger negative transfer when task gradients conflict, while flexible sharing may still entangle shared and task-specific signals. To address this, we propose a multi-task framework built on a unified Transformer for multimodal fusion, augmented with Orthogonal Task Decomposition (OrthTD) to split patient representations into shared and task-specific subspaces and impose a geometric orthogonality constraint to reduce redundancy and isolate task-specific signals. We evaluated OrthTD on a real-world cohort of 12,430 surgical patients for predicting four outcomes. OrthTD achieved average AUC (area under the receiver operating characteristic curve) of 87.5% and average AUPRC (area under the precision-recall curve) of 37.2%, consistently outperformed advanced tabular and multi-task methods. Notably, OrthTD achieves substantial gains in AUPRC, indicating superior performance in identifying rare events within imbalanced clinical data. These results suggest that enforcing non-redundant shared and task-specific representations can improve multi-outcome prediction from multimodal clinical data.
comment: Accepted for publication in EMBC 2026. This is the authors' accepted manuscript. DOI to be added after IEEE Xplore publication

light_analysis.overview: 提出正交任务分解（OrthTD）方法，在多模态临床数据中分离共享与任务特定表示，提升多任务预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 真实临床数据具有多模态特性，多任务学习可提高效率，但现有方法难以平衡共享表示与任务特定建模。硬参数共享导致负迁移，灵活共享仍会混淆信号。因此需要一种能有效分离共享与任务特定表示的方法，以减少冗余并提升多标签预测效果。
light_analysis.method: 基于统一Transformer进行多模态融合，并引入正交任务分解（OrthTD），将患者表示分解为共享和任务特定子空间，施加几何正交约束以减少冗余并隔离任务特定信号。在12430名手术患者的真实队列上预测四个结局，采用AUC和AUPRC评估。
light_analysis.result: OrthTD平均AUC达87.5%，平均AUPRC为37.2%，一致优于先进的表格数据处理和多任务方法。尤其在AUPRC上获得显著提升，表明在不平衡临床数据中识别罕见事件的能力更强。
light_analysis.conclusion: 强制共享与任务特定表示非冗余可改善多模态临床数据的多结局预测。该方法有望应用于其他多标签临床预测任务，但摘要未提及局限性或未来方向。

title: HeadQ: Model-Visible Distortion and Score-Space Correction for KV-Cache Quantization
