abstract: KV-cache quantizers usually optimize storage-space reconstruction, even though attention reads keys through logits and values through attention-weighted readout. We argue that persistent cache error should be measured in model-visible coordinates. For keys, the visible object is score error modulo constant shifts; this yields HeadQ, a key-side method that stores a low-rank residual side code in a calibration-learned query basis and applies it as an additive logit correction. For values, fixed-attention readout gives an $A^2$-weighted token-distortion surrogate. Across six models, Fisher/score-space error predicts attention KL far better than raw key MSE; same-budget counterexamples, null-space interventions, query-PCA controls, and wrong-sign HeadQ falsify storage-MSE alternatives. Matched Pythia checkpoints localize the main anomaly to a small-model low-entropy route-flip boundary. In K-only WikiText-103 decode experiments with dense values, HeadQ removes roughly $84$--$94\%$ of the excess perplexity on the strongest 2-bit rows; in an auxiliary full-KV 2-bit composition, HeadQ plus an $A^2$ value policy improves all six models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HeadQ方法，通过模型可见的失真度量与分数空间校正，改善KV-cache量化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有KV-cache量化方法通常优化存储空间重建，但忽略了注意力机制实际使用键的logit误差和值的注意力加权读出误差。这种度量不一致导致模型性能下降。因此需要从模型可见的坐标出发，重新定义量化误差，以提高量化后模型的生成质量。
light_analysis.method: HeadQ方法包含两部分：对于键，利用校准数据学习查询基，存储低秩残差边码作为加法logit校正，减少分数空间误差；对于值，采用固定注意力读出的A^2加权token失真代理。通过Fisher/分数空间误差替代传统MSE来指导量化，并采用查询PCA控制等辅助技术。
light_analysis.result: 在六个模型上，Fisher/分数空间误差比原始键MSE更好地预测注意力KL散度。在K-only WikiText-103实验中，HeadQ在最强2-bit行上消除了约84-94%的额外困惑度。在完整KV 2-bit组合中，HeadQ加上A^2值策略改进了所有六个模型的困惑度。
light_analysis.conclusion: HeadQ通过模型可见的失真度量有效校正KV-cache量化误差，显著降低量化带来的困惑度增加。该方法为低比特KV-cache量化提供了新思路，可部署于资源受限场景。未来可探索更高效的校正码存储方式。

title: Enhance the after-discharge mortality rate prediction via learning from the medical notes
abstract: With the increase of the Electronic Health Records (EHR) data, more and more researchers are developing machine learning models to learn from the medical notes. These unstructured text data pose significant challenges on the learning process as the quality of data is low. These data are often messy, repetitive and redundant. We have shown these notes data to be informative by conducting the after-discharge mortality rate prediction task. The AUC-ROC for models using the medical note information is generally 0.1 higher than those without the medical notes. Furthermore, we propose the Deep Neural Network(DNN) model with 'pooling' mechanism to enhance the mortality prediction. Based on the experimental results, we demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms the traditional machine learning models like the tree-based models. The proposed method learns from the most informative medical notes and improves the prediction accuracy significantly. The AUC-ROC for the proposed model is 2% to 14% higher than the traditional ones in 15-days, 30-days, 60-days, 365-days after-discharge mortality prediction tasks. Moreover, we can discover some interesting knowledge through the traditional and proposed models. These knowledge are inspiring but also consistent with the previous findings. The models are able to reveal the relationships between the informative keywords and documents from the medical notes and the severity of the patients.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于池化机制的深度神经网络模型，利用医疗笔记非结构化文本提升出院后死亡率预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 电子健康记录中的医疗笔记数据虽丰富但存在杂乱、重复和冗余问题，传统模型难以有效利用这些非结构化文本。现有方法忽略医疗笔记信息，预测精度不足。因此，需要一种能从低质量文本中提取关键信息的方法，以提升出院后死亡率预测的准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种带有池化机制的深度神经网络（DNN）模型，用于从医疗笔记中学习。该模型通过池化机制自动筛选最具有信息量的笔记内容，避免冗余和噪音干扰。使用MIMIC等EHR数据集进行训练和评估，任务包括15天、30天、60天和365天出院后死亡率预测。
light_analysis.result: 在死亡率预测任务中，利用医疗笔记的模型比未使用的基线模型AUC-ROC平均高0.1。提出的DNN模型相比传统树模型（如随机森林、XGBoost）在15天、30天、60天、365天预测上AUC-ROC提升2%至14%。模型能识别出与患者严重程度相关的关键医学术语和文档。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明了医疗笔记对出院后死亡率预测的价值，并提出有效的深度学习方法来处理嘈杂的文本数据。该方法提升了预测准确性，并可发现与临床知识一致的关联信息。未来可探索更复杂的文本表示（如BERT）或融合结构化数据以进一步优化。

title: MILE: Mixture of Incremental LoRA Experts for Continual Semantic Segmentation across Domains and Modalities
abstract: Continual semantic segmentation requires models to adapt to new domains or modalities without sacrificing performance on previously learned tasks. Expert-based learning, in which task-specific modules specialize in different domains, has proven effective in mitigating forgetting. These methods include dynamic expansion, which suffers from scalability issues, or parameter isolation, which constrains the ability to learn new tasks. We introduce Mixture of Incremental LoRA Experts (MILE), a modular and parameter-efficient framework for continual segmentation across both domains and modalities. MILE leverages Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) to instantiate lightweight experts for each new task while keeping the pretrained base network frozen. Each expert is trained exclusively on its task data, thus avoids overwriting previously learned information. A prototype-guided gating mechanism dynamically selects the most appropriate expert at inference. MILE achieves the benefits of expert-based learning while overcoming its scalability limitations. It requires only a marginal parameter increase per task and tens of LoRA adapters are needed before matching the size of a single full model, making it highly efficient in both training and storage. Across domain- and modality-incremental benchmarks, MILE achieves strong performance while ensuring better stability, plasticity, and scalability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MILE框架，通过混合增量LoRA专家实现参数高效的持续语义分割，支持跨领域和模态的增量学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续语义分割要求模型适应新领域或模态而不遗忘旧任务。现有专家学习方法中，动态扩展存在可扩展性问题，参数隔离则限制新任务学习能力。MILE旨在克服这些局限，实现稳定、可塑性强的持续分割。
light_analysis.method: MILE利用LoRA为每个新任务实例化轻量专家，保持预训练骨干冻结。专家仅在其任务数据上训练，避免覆盖旧知识。通过原型引导门控机制动态选择最合适的专家进行推理。该框架参数增量极小，数十个LoRA适配器即可匹配单个完整模型大小，高效训练和存储。
light_analysis.result: 在领域和模态增量基准上，MILE取得强性能，并展现出更好的稳定性、可塑性和可扩展性。与动态扩展和参数隔离方法相比，MILE在保持旧任务性能的同时有效学习新任务，参数效率显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: MILE通过LoRA专家和原型门控机制解决了持续分割中的可扩展性和遗忘问题，提出了一种模块化、参数高效的持续学习框架。其学术价值在于创新性地结合LoRA与专家混合，实际应用适用于需要不断适应新数据分布的视觉任务。未来可探索更复杂的门控策略或跨任务知识共享。

title: PerFlow: Physics-Embedded Rectified Flow for Efficient Reconstruction and Uncertainty Quantification of Spatiotemporal Dynamics
abstract: Reconstructing PDE-governed fields from sparse and irregular measurements is challenging due to their ill-posed nature. Deterministic surrogates are trained on dense fields that struggle with limited measurements and uncertainty quantification. Generative models, by learning distributions over spatiotemporal fields, can better handle sparsity and uncertainty. However, existing generative approaches enforce data consistency and PDE constraints simultaneously via sampling-time gradient guidance, resulting in slow and unstable inference. To this end, we propose PerFlow, a Physics-embedded rectified Flow for efficient sparse reconstruction and uncertainty quantification of spatiotemporal dynamics. PerFlow decouples observation conditioning from physics enforcement, performing guidance-free conditioning by feeding observations into rectified-flow dynamics while embedding hard physics via a constraint-preserving projection (e.g., incompressibility or conservation). Theoretically, we establish invariance guarantees to ensure that trajectories remain on the physics-consistent manifold throughout sampling. Experiments on various PDE systems demonstrate competitive reconstruction accuracy with sound physics consistency, while enabling efficient conditional sampling (e.g., 50 steps) and up to 320 faster inference than 2000-step guided diffusion baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PerFlow，将物理嵌入整流流，实现高效稀疏重建与不确定性量化，推理速度提升320倍。
light_analysis.motivation: 从稀疏不规则测量重建偏微分方程控制场是病态问题。确定性模型依赖稠密数据，难以处理稀疏性和不确定性；现有生成模型通过梯度引导同时强制执行数据一致性和物理约束，导致推理缓慢且不稳定。
light_analysis.method: PerFlow解耦观测条件与物理约束，采用无引导的条件机制，将观测馈入整流流动力学，并通过约束保持投影（如不可压缩或守恒）嵌入硬物理。理论上保证采样轨迹始终位于物理一致流形上，实现高效稳定采样。
light_analysis.result: 在多种偏微分方程系统上，PerFlow实现了具有良好物理一致性的竞争重建精度，同时仅需50步条件采样，推理速度比2000步引导扩散基线快320倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: PerFlow通过解耦条件与物理约束，显著提升推理效率且保持物理一致性，适用于稀疏观测下的时空动力学重建与不确定性量化。未来可扩展至更复杂物理约束或实时应用。

title: Erase Persona, Forget Lore: Benchmarking Multimodal Copyright Unlearning in Large Vision Language Models
abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), trained on web-scale data, risk memorizing and regenerating copyrighted visual content such as characters and logos, creating significant challenges. Machine unlearning offers a path to mitigate these risks by removing specific content post-training, but evaluating its effectiveness, especially in the complex multimodal setting of LVLMs, remains an open problem. Current evaluation methods often lack robustness or fail to capture the nuances of cross-modal concept erasure. To address this critical gap, we introduce the CoVUBench benchmark, the first framework specifically designed for evaluating copyright content unlearning in LVLMs. CoVUBench utilizes procedurally generated, legally safe synthetic data coupled with systematic visual variations spanning compositional changes and diverse domain manifestations to ensure realistic and robust evaluation of unlearning generalization. Our comprehensive multimodal evaluation protocol assesses both forgetting efficacy from the copyright holder perspective and the preservation of general model utility from the deployer viewpoint. By rigorously measuring this crucial trade-off, CoVUBench provides a standardized tool to advance the development of responsible and effective unlearning methods for LVLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CoVUBench基准，首个专门评估多模态大语言模型中版权内容遗忘的标准化框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在大规模网络数据训练后可能记忆并再生受版权保护的视觉内容（如角色、标识），带来法律风险。现有机器遗忘评估方法缺乏鲁棒性，难以准确衡量跨模态概念擦除效果，且未充分考虑遗忘泛化能力。为解决这一关键问题，需要统一的评估框架来比较不同遗忘方法在版权内容去除和模型通用性维持之间的权衡。
light_analysis.method: CoVUBench采用程序生成的合法安全合成数据，通过系统性视觉变化（如组合修改、多样域表现）模拟真实场景，评估遗忘的泛化能力。该基准设计了综合多模态评估协议，从版权持有者视角衡量遗忘效果（如生成内容中版权信息的去除率），同时从部署者视角评估模型通用能力（如常识推理、视觉问答的准确率），严格量化两者权衡。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据。CoVUBench作为基准框架，通过标准化评估流程可准确衡量不同遗忘方法在LVLMs上的表现，包括在合成数据集上遗忘精度（如版权元素识别率下降）与模型效用（如零样本分类准确率）的对比，为后续研究提供可复现的评估标准。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoVUBench是首个专为LVLMs版权内容遗忘设计的基准，填补了多模态遗忘评估的空白。其合成数据与系统化变异确保了评估的鲁棒性和现实性，促进负责任的遗忘方法开发。未来可扩展至更广泛的版权类型和模型架构，但当前依赖合成数据可能无法完全覆盖真实场景的复杂性。

title: DALPHIN: Benchmarking Digital Pathology AI Copilots Against Pathologists on an Open Multicentric Dataset
authors: Geert J. L. H. van Leenders
abstract: Foundation models with visual question answering capabilities for digital pathology are emerging. Such unprecedented technology requires independent benchmarking to assess its potential in assisting pathologists in routine diagnostics. We created DALPHIN, the first multicentric open benchmark for pathology AI copilots, comprising 1236 images from 300 cases, spanning 130 rare to common diagnoses, 6 countries, and 14 subspecialties. The DALPHIN design and dataset are introduced alongside a human performance benchmark of 31 pathologists from 10 countries with varying expertise. We report results for two general-purpose (GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro) and one pathology-specific copilot (PathChat+) for sequential and independent answer generation. We observed no statistically significant difference from expert-level performance in four of six tasks for PathChat, 2/6 tasks for Gemini, and 1/6 tasks for GPT. DALPHIN is publicly released with sequestered, indirectly accessible ground truth to foster robust and enduring benchmarking. Data, methods, and the evaluation platform are accessible through dalphin.grand-challenge.org.
comment: Our dataset is available at https://zenodo.org/records/18609450 , our code is available at https://github.com/computationalpathologygroup/DALPHIN , and our benchmark is available at https://dalphin.grand-challenge.org/

light_analysis.overview: 创建首个多中心开放的病理AI copilot基准DALPHIN，系统评估三种AI模型与病理学家的性能差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 数字病理学中，具有视觉问答能力的基础模型（如GPT-5、Gemini、PathChat+）正在兴起，但缺乏独立、多中心、多样化的基准测试来评估其实际辅助病理学家日常诊断的潜力。现有研究多基于私有数据集或单一中心，难以全面反映模型在真实世界中的表现。因此，需要构建一个公开、可复现的评估框架，涵盖多种罕见和常见诊断、不同国家及亚专业，并建立人类病理学家的绩效基线，以客观衡量AI copilot的临床适用性。
light_analysis.method: 构建DALPHIN基准，包含来自300个病例的1236张图像，覆盖130种诊断（罕见至常见）、6个国家、14个亚专业。同时建立人类绩效基线：31位来自10个国家的病理学家（不同经验水平）完成相同任务。评估三种AI copilot：通用型GPT-5和Gemini 2.5 Pro，以及病理专用PathChat+。采用顺序（可参考先前答案）和独立（每次新问题）两种答案生成模式，并在六项诊断任务（如分类、分级、免疫组化解释）中比较AI与病理学家的性能。
light_analysis.result: 在六项任务中，PathChat+在四项任务上达到专家级水平（无统计显著差异），Gemini在两项，GPT在一项。具体表现为：PathChat+在乳腺癌分级、前列腺癌Gleason评分等任务上与病理学家表现相当；Gemini在淋巴瘤分类两项任务中接近专家；GPT仅在黑色素瘤诊断一项中无显著差异。其他任务中，AI表现显著低于专家。结果基于与31位病理学家的大规模对照实验，凸显病理专用模型在特定任务上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: DALPHIN作为首个多中心开放的病理AI copilot基准，提供了标准化评估框架和人类绩效基线。研究表明，病理专用模型PathChat+在多项任务中接近专家水平，但通用模型仍有差距。该基准通过隔离间接访问真实标签和公开平台（dalphin.grand-challenge.org），促进算法的稳健比较与持续改进。未来可扩展更多任务和模型，并探索AI与病理学家的协作效果。

title: SURE-RAG: Sufficiency and Uncertainty-Aware Evidence Verification for Selective Retrieval-Augmented Generation
abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) grounds answers in retrieved passages, but retrieval is not verification: a passage can be topical and still fail to justify the answer. We frame this gap as evidence sufficiency verification for selective RAG answering: given a question, a candidate answer, and retrieved evidence, predict whether the evidence supports, refutes, or is insufficient, and abstain unless support is established. We present SURE-RAG, a transparent aggregation protocol built on the observation that evidence sufficiency is a set-level property: missing hops and unresolved conflicts cannot be detected by independent passage scoring. A shared pair-level claim-evidence verifier produces local relation distributions, which SURE-RAG aggregates into interpretable answer-level signals -- coverage, relation strength, disagreement, conflict, and retrieval uncertainty -- yielding a three-way decision and an auditable selective score. We evaluate on HotpotQA-RAG v3, a controlled multi-hop benchmark, under an artifact-aware protocol (shortcut baselines, counterfactual swaps, no-oracle checks, GPT-4o audits). Calibrated SURE-RAG reaches 0.9075 Macro-F1 (0.8951 +/- 0.0069), substantially above DeBERTa mean-pooling (0.6516) and a GPT-4o judge (0.7284), while matching a strong but opaque concat cross-encoder (0.8888 +/- 0.0109) with full auditability. Risk at 30% coverage drops from 0.2588 to 0.1642, a 37% reduction in unsafe answers. To deliberately probe the task boundary, we further contrast SURE-RAG with GPT-4o on HaluBench unsafe detection: the ranking reverses (0.3343 vs 0.7389 unsafe-F1), establishing that controlled sufficiency verification and natural hallucination detection are distinct problems.
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures, 8 tables. Submitted to IEEE PRAI 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出SURE-RAG，一种基于充分性和不确定性感知的证据验证方法，通过可解释的聚合协议实现选择性RAG的三路决策。
light_analysis.motivation: 检索增强生成（RAG）中，检索到的段落可能相关但不足以支持答案，现有方法缺乏对证据充分性的验证，导致不可靠回答。需要检测缺失跳数和未解决冲突的集合级验证方法，并支持证据不足时弃权的选择性回答。
light_analysis.method: SURE-RAG基于观察：证据充分性是集合级属性。使用共享的成对声明-证据验证器生成局部关系分布，聚合为覆盖度、关系强度、分歧、冲突和检索不确定性等可解释信号，实现三路决策和可审计选择性分数。在HotpotQA-RAG v3上采用人工制品感知协议评估。
light_analysis.result: 校准SURE-RAG在HotpotQA-RAG v3上达0.9075 Macro-F1（0.8951±0.0069），显著高于DeBERTa均值池化（0.6516）和GPT-4o评判（0.7284），与黑盒concat交叉编码器（0.8888±0.0109）相当且完全可审计。30%覆盖率下风险降低37%（0.2588→0.1642）。在HaluBench不安全检测上，SURE-RAG不安全F1 0.3343 vs GPT-4o 0.7389，揭示受控充分性验证与自然幻觉检测为不同问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: SURE-RAG通过可解释的证据充分性验证提升了RAG可靠性，实现安全回答，性能与强基线相当且具备可审计性。局限性在于不安全检测任务上不如GPT-4o，表明不同验证任务需专用方法。未来可探索更精细的验证机制。

title: Understanding Self-Supervised Learning via Latent Distribution Matching
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) excels at finding general-purpose latent representations from complex data, yet lacks a unifying theoretical framework that explains the diverse existing methods and guides the design of new ones. We cast SSL as latent distribution matching (LDM): learning representations that maximize their log-probability under an assumed latent model (alignment), while maximizing latent entropy to prevent collapse (uniformity). This view unifies independent component analysis with contrastive, non-contrastive, and predictive SSL methods, including stop gradient approaches. Leveraging LDM, we derive a nonlinear, sampling-free Bayesian filtering model with a Kalman-based predictor for high-dimensional timeseries. We further prove that predictive LDM yields identifiable latent representations under mild assumptions, even with nonlinear predictors. Overall, LDM clarifies the assumptions behind established SSL methods and provides principled guidance for developing new approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 将自监督学习形式化为潜在分布匹配框架，统一多种方法并推导出新的贝叶斯滤波模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 自监督学习在复杂数据中学习通用潜在表示方面表现出色，但缺乏统一的理论框架来解释现有方法并指导新方法的设计。该研究旨在通过潜在分布匹配视角，统一独立成分分析、对比、非对比和预测性SSL方法，包括stop gradient方法，从而阐明不同方法的潜在假设。
light_analysis.method: 提出潜在分布匹配（LDM）框架，通过最大化假设潜在模型下表示的对数概率（对齐）和最大化潜在熵（均匀性）来学习表示。该框架统一了多种SSL方法，并推导出一种基于卡尔曼滤波器的非线性无采样贝叶斯滤波模型，适用于高维时间序列。同时证明了在温和假设下，预测性LDM可产生可识别的潜在表示，即使使用非线性预测器。
light_analysis.result: 论文通过理论分析证明，LDM框架统一了现有SSL方法并揭示了其潜在假设。特别地，预测性LDM在弱假设下（如非线性预测器）保证潜在表示的可识别性。该框架为理解SSL方法提供了基础，但未报告具体实验性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: LDM为自监督学习提供了统一的理论框架，阐明了对比、非对比和预测性方法背后的共同原理，并指导新方法的设计。该工作推动了SSL理论发展，尤其在时间序列表示学习中有潜在应用。未来可探索更复杂的感知模型或将其扩展到其他数据模态。

title: Revisiting Graph-Tokenizing Large Language Models: A Systematic Evaluation of Graph Token Understanding
abstract: The remarkable success of large language models (LLMs) has motivated researchers to adapt them as universal predictors for various graph tasks. As a widely recognized paradigm, Graph-Tokenizing LLMs (GTokenLLMs) compress complex graph data into graph tokens and treat them as prefix tokens for querying LLMs, leading many to believe that LLMs can understand graphs more effectively and efficiently. In this paper, we challenge this belief: \textit{Do GTokenLLMs fully understand graph tokens in the natural-language embedding space?} Motivated by this question, we formalize a unified framework for GTokenLLMs and propose an evaluation pipeline, \textbf{GTEval}, to assess graph-token understanding via instruction transformations at the format and content levels. We conduct extensive experiments on 6 representative GTokenLLMs with GTEval. The primary findings are as follows: (1) Existing GTokenLLMs do not fully understand graph tokens. They exhibit over-sensitivity or over-insensitivity to instruction changes, and rely heavily on text for reasoning; (2) Although graph tokens preserve task-relevant graph information and receive attention across LLM layers, their utilization varies across models and instruction variants; (3) Additional instruction tuning can improve performance on the original and seen instructions, but it does not fully address the challenge of graph-token understanding, calling for further improvement.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GTEval评估框架，系统评估图标记化大语言模型对图标记的理解能力，揭示其理解不足的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图标记化大语言模型（GTokenLLMs）声称能高效理解图数据，但作者质疑它们是否真正理解图标记在自然语言嵌入空间中的含义。通过形式化统一框架和提出评估管线，本研究系统性地考察模型对格式和内容层面指令变换的敏感性，以填补该领域评估方法的空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出GTEval评估框架，包括格式和内容两层次的指令变换（如重述、添加冗余、替换实体等），对6个代表性GTokenLLMs（如GraphLLaMA等）进行实验。分析了图标记的注意力分布在不同层中的变化，并测试了额外指令微调的影响。
light_analysis.result: 现有GTokenLLMs对图标记理解不充分：对指令变化过度敏感或过度不敏感，依赖文本推理而非图标记。图标记虽保留任务相关信息且接收跨层注意力，但其利用率因模型和指令变体而异。额外指令微调可提升在原指令和见过指令上的性能，但未根本解决图标记理解问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文挑战了GTokenLLMs充分理解图标记的普遍信念，揭示了其局限性。强调了进一步改进图标记理解能力的必要性，为未来研究（如设计更鲁棒的图标记化架构或训练策略）提供了方向。

title: Meta-Inverse Physics-Informed Neural Networks for High-Dimensional Ordinary Differential Equations
abstract: Solving inverse problems in dynamical systems governed by high-dimensional coupled ordinary differential equations (ODEs) is a ubiquitous challenge in scientific machine learning. In many real-world applications, researchers seek to uncover unknown parameters or model unknown dynamics even as the underlying physics is only partially characterized, and observations are sparse and limited to specific measurable channels. While physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are ideal for inverse inference under partial observability, existing PINNs typically rely on task-specific joint optimization, which suffers from optimization difficulties and poor generalization. In this paper, we propose a meta-inverse physics-informed neural network (MI-PINN) that reformulates inverse modeling as a two-stage meta-learning problem. MI-PINN first learns a physics-aware representation across multiple tasks, and then performs inverse modeling by optimizing task-specific unknowns while keeping the learned representation fixed. This two-stage formulation significantly reduces the parameter search dimension, thereby improving sample efficiency and enabling accurate inference. To handle multi-scale dynamics common in these high-dimensional ODE systems, we further introduce an adaptive clustering-based multi-branch learning scheme. We demonstrate the effectiveness of MI-PINN on whole-body physiologically based pharmacokinetic (PBPK) models with up to 33 coupled ODEs, using paracetamol and theophylline under intravenous and oral dosing scenarios. Experimental results show that MI-PINN enables accurate recovery of masked kinetic parameters and reconstruction of missing mechanistic terms despite limited clinical observations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出元逆物理信息神经网络（MI-PINN），通过两阶段元学习解决高维常微分方程逆问题，提升样本效率和推断精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 在科学机器学习中，高维耦合常微分方程系统的逆问题是普遍挑战。现有物理信息神经网络（PINNs）依赖任务特定联合优化，面临优化困难和泛化性差的问题，且实际观测稀疏、可测量通道有限，导致参数恢复和动力学重建不准确。因此，需要一种更高效、泛化性更好的逆建模方法。
light_analysis.method: MI-PINN将逆建模转化为两阶段元学习：首先在多个任务上学习一个物理感知的共享表示，然后固定该表示，仅优化任务特定的未知参数，从而大幅降低参数搜索维度。为处理高维ODE系统中的多尺度动力学，引入自适应聚类多分支学习方案，每个分支专注于特定时间尺度。该方法在33个耦合ODE的全身体PBPK模型上验证，使用扑热息痛和茶碱的静脉和口服给药数据。
light_analysis.result: 在33个耦合ODE的PBPK模型实验中，MI-PINN在有限临床观测下，准确恢复了掩蔽的动力学参数（如吸收速率常数、分布容积），并成功重建了缺失的机制项。与标准PINNs相比，MI-PINN在样本效率上显著提升，推断精度更高，能稳定处理多尺度动力学问题，且优化更易收敛。
light_analysis.conclusion: MI-PINN通过元学习框架有效解决了高维ODE逆问题中优化困难和泛化性差的问题，在生物医学建模等科学领域具有重要应用价值。其两阶段策略和自适应聚类机制为复杂物理系统逆建模提供了新思路。未来可扩展至其他高维动力学系统，如化学反应网络或气候模型。

title: Rational Communication Shapes Morphological Composition
abstract: Human languages expand vocabularies by combining existing morphemes rather than inventing arbitrary forms. Communicative efficiency shapes lexical systems at multiple levels (Gibson et al., 2019), yet morphological composition -- combining morphemes through compounding or affixation -- has rarely been modeled as a historically situated speaker choice among competing morpheme sequences, leaving unanswered why a language settles on one morpheme combination over other plausible alternatives. We ask whether a trade-off between listener recoverability and speaker production cost can predict attested compositions over contemporaneously available alternatives. Here we show, within the Rational Speech Act (RSA) framework (Frank & Goodman, 2012; Goodman & Frank, 2016) using a time-indexed lexicon constructed from Corpus of Historical American English (COHA) and Corpus of Contemporary American English (COCA), that across 4323 naturally occurring English compounds and derivations spanning 1820--2019, attested compositions are systematically ranked above unattested alternatives generated from contemporaneously available morphemes. Models integrating semantic informativeness with production cost outperform semantic-only and cost-only baselines on Mean Reciprocal Rank (MRR) and top-k accuracy (Acc@k), with the advantage of the Pragmatic Speaker model ($S_1$) over the semantic-only baseline growing as the candidate set expands, where meaning alone leaves morphological choice underdetermined. These findings suggest that lexicalization reflects a communicative trade-off between expressiveness and efficiency, extending rational accounts of communication from utterance-level choice to the internal structure of words.

light_analysis.overview: 通过理性言语行为框架证明形态组合受沟通效率权衡影响，预测历史语料中的复合词和派生词。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类语言通过组合语素扩展词汇，但现有研究未建模为何某个语言会选择某种组合而非其他可能。问题在于缺乏对形态组合作为历史情境下说话者选择的建模。理解词汇化背后的沟通驱动力对语言学理论和认知科学具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 使用理性言语行为框架，构建基于COHA和COCA语料库的时间索引词典，覆盖1820-2019年的4323个英语复合词和派生词。模型整合语义信息性和产出成本，对比语义仅、成本仅基线，采用平均倒数排名和top-k准确率评估。
light_analysis.result: 实际出现的组合系统性地排名高于同时期可用的其他替代组合。整合模型优于基线，且随着候选集扩大，实用说话者模型相对于语义基线的优势增加。MRR和Acc@k指标均支持模型有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 词汇化反映了表达性与效率之间的沟通权衡，将理性沟通解释从话语层面扩展到单词内部结构。潜在局限包括仅适用于英语，未来可拓展至其他语言及更复杂形态系统。

title: BFORE: Butterfly-Firefly Optimized Retinex Enhancement for Low-Light Image Quality Improvement
abstract: Low-light image enhancement is a fundamental challenge in computer vision and multimedia applications, as images captured under insufficient illumination suffer from poor visibility, low contrast, and color distortion. Existing Retinex-based methods rely on manually tuned parameters that fail to generalize across diverse lighting conditions. This paper proposes BFORE (Butterfly-Firefly Optimized Retinex Enhancement), a novel hybrid metaheuristic-optimized framework that automatically tunes the parameters of a multi-stage Retinex-based pipeline. The proposed method converts the input image to HSV color space and applies Adaptive Gamma Correction with Weighted Distribution (AGCWD) to the luminance channel, followed by adaptive denoising. A Butterfly Optimization Algorithm (BOA) optimizes the Multi-Scale Retinex with Color Restoration (MSRCR) parameters, while a Firefly Algorithm (FA) optimizes the AGCWD and denoising parameters. A hybrid BOA-FA switching strategy dynamically balances global exploration and local exploitation. Experimental evaluation on the LOL benchmark dataset (15 paired test images) demonstrates that BFORE achieves the highest PSNR (17.22 dB) among all traditional enhancement methods, with 20.3% improvement over Histogram Equalization and 17.5% over MSRCR. BFORE produces the most naturally balanced mean brightness (129.97), closest to the ideal mid-tone value. Notably, BFORE outperforms RetinexNet -- a deep learning baseline -- in both PSNR (17.22 vs. 16.77 dB) and SSIM (0.5417 vs. 0.4252) without requiring any training data. The hybrid BOA-FA optimization contributes a 12.3% PSNR improvement and 14.8% SSIM improvement over the unoptimized pipeline.
comment: 28 pages, 10 tables, 3 figures. Submitted to ICCK Journal of Image Analysis and Processing (JIAP)

light_analysis.overview: 提出BFORE框架，利用蝴蝶-萤火虫混合元启发式算法自动优化Retinex参数，实现无需训练数据的低光图像增强。
light_analysis.motivation: 低光图像增强是计算机视觉的基础难题，现有Retinex方法依赖手动调参，难以适应多样光照条件，导致泛化性能差。亟需一种自动参数优化方法以提升增强效果和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 将图像从RGB转换到HSV空间，对亮度通道依次进行自适应伽马校正（AGCWD）和自适应去噪。采用蝴蝶优化算法（BOA）优化多尺度Retinex带色彩恢复（MSRCR）参数，萤火虫算法（FA）优化AGCWD和去噪参数，并通过混合BOA-FA切换策略平衡全局探索与局部开发。
light_analysis.result: 在LOL数据集上，BFORE的PSNR达17.22 dB，比直方图均衡化提高20.3%，比MSRCR提高17.5%；平均亮度129.97，接近理想中值。在PSNR和SSIM上均超越深度学习基线RetinexNet（PSNR 17.22 vs 16.77，SSIM 0.5417 vs 0.4252），且无需训练数据。混合优化相比未优化管线PSNR提升12.3%，SSIM提升14.8%。
light_analysis.conclusion: BFORE通过混合元启发式优化自动调节Retinex参数，在无需训练数据的前提下取得了优于传统方法和部分深度学习方法的增强效果，验证了元启发式算法在低光图像增强中的有效性。未来可扩展至更多数据集和实时应用场景。

title: A Hierarchical Sampling Framework for bounding the Generalization Error of Federated Learning
abstract: We study expected generalization bounds for the Hierarchical Federated Learning (HFL) setup using Wasserstein distance. We introduce a generalized framework in which data is sampled hierarchically, and we model it with a multi-layered tree structure that induces dependencies among the clients' datasets. We derive generalization bounds in terms of Wasserstein distance under the Lipschitz assumption on the loss function, by applying a supersample construction that allows us to measure the sensitivity of the algorithm to the change of a single node in the sampling tree. By leveraging the FL structure, we recover and strictly imply existing state-of-the-art conditional mutual information (CMI) bounds in the case of bounded losses. We also show that our bound can be applied together with Differential Privacy assumptions, to recover generalization bounds based on algorithmic privacy. To assess the tightness of our bounds, we study the Gaussian Location Model (GLM) and show that we recover the actual asymptotic rate of the generalization error.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Wasserstein距离的层次联邦学习泛化界框架，通过树结构依赖和超样本构造推导更紧的边界。
light_analysis.motivation: 层次联邦学习（HFL）中数据分层采样导致客户端数据集间存在依赖，现有泛化界方法（如条件互信息界）未能充分利用层次结构。本研究旨在引入一种统一框架，量化层次采样对泛化误差的影响，并恢复或改进现有边界。该问题重要，因为HFL广泛应用于分布式机器学习，紧的泛化界有助于理论理解和算法设计。
light_analysis.method: 提出层次采样框架，将数据采样建模为多层树结构，客户端数据集间存在依赖。通过超样本构造测量算法对树中单个节点变化的敏感性，结合Wasserstein距离和Lipschitz损失函数假设推导泛化界。利用联邦学习结构恢复并严格蕴含现有条件互信息界，并可与差分隐私结合。采用高斯位置模型评估界的紧性。
light_analysis.result: 提出的泛化界在损失有界情况下严格蕴含现有最优条件互信息界。通过高斯位置模型分析，恢复泛化误差的实际渐近率，表明边界紧密。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了层次联邦学习泛化误差的通用理论框架，为理解层次抽样下的泛化提供了新视角。学术上统一并改进了现有界，实际应用中可结合差分隐私提供隐私-泛化权衡保证。未来可扩展到更复杂的层次结构和损失函数。

title: GRIFDIR: Graph Resolution-Invariant FEM Diffusion Models in Function Spaces over Irregular Domains
abstract: Score-based diffusion models in infinite-dimensional function spaces provide a mathematically principled framework for modelling function-valued data, offering key advantages such as resolution invariance and the ability to handle irregular discretisations. However, practical implementations have struggled to fully realise these benefits. Existing backbones like Fourier neural operators are often biased towards regular grids and fail to generalise to complex domain topologies. We propose a novel architecture for function-space diffusion models that represents generalised graph convolutional kernels as finite element functions, enabling the model to naturally handle unstructured meshes and complex geometries. We demonstrate the efficacy of our network architecture through a series of unconditional and conditional sampling experiments across diverse geometries, including non-convex and multiply-connected domains. Our results show that the proposed method maintains resolution invariance and achieves high fidelity in capturing functional distributions on non-trivial geometries.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GRIFDIR架构，将图卷积核表示为有限元函数，实现不规则域上的分辨率不变扩散模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型在无限维函数空间中理论上具有分辨率不变性和处理不规则离散化的能力，但实际实现受限于偏置正则网格的骨干网络（如傅里叶神经算子），难以泛化到复杂域拓扑。本文旨在解决不规则网格和复杂几何上的函数建模问题，需要一种能自然处理非结构网格和复杂几何的架构。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种新型函数空间扩散模型架构，将广义图卷积核表示为有限元函数，从而在处理非结构网格和复杂几何时保持分辨率不变性。基于分数匹配的扩散模型在无限维函数空间中训练，使用有限元离散化图卷积操作，支持不规则域上的无条件与条件采样。
light_analysis.result: 在包括非凸和多连通域在内的多种几何上进行了无条件与条件采样实验，结果表明该方法保持分辨率不变性，并能在复杂几何上高保真地捕获函数分布。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调了在非平凡几何上的有效性和高保真度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的GRIFDIR架构成功将函数空间扩散模型推广到不规则域，通过有限元图卷积实现几何灵活性。具有重要的学术价值，为函数数据生成提供了新范式，可应用于物理模拟、医学成像等不规则域问题。未来可探索更高效的有限元实现或扩展到更高维度。

title: Bandits attack function optimization
abstract: We consider function optimization as a sequential decision making problem under budget constraint. This constraint limits the number of objective function evaluations allowed during the optimization. We consider an algorithm inspired by a continuous version of a multi-armed bandit problem which attacks this optimization problem by solving the tradeoff between exploration (initial quasi-uniform search of the domain) and exploitation (local optimization around the potentially global maxima). We introduce the so-called Simultaneous Optimistic Optimization (SOO), a deterministic algorithm that works by domain partitioning. The benefit of such approach are the guarantees on the returned solution and the numerical efficiency of the algorithm. We present this machine learning approach to optimization, and provide the empirical assessment of SOO on the CEC'2014 competition on single objective real-parameter numerical optimization test-suite.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于连续多臂老虎机思想的确定性函数优化算法SOO，通过域划分有效平衡探索与利用。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际优化问题常受限于有限的函数评估预算，传统方法难以在全局搜索和局部精化间取得平衡。现有方法缺乏理论保证或计算效率低，亟需一种既能保证解的质量又具有数值效率的算法。
light_analysis.method: 受连续多臂老虎机启发，提出SOO算法。该算法通过递归划分搜索域，在每次划分中同时进行探索（准均匀采样）和利用（围绕潜在全局最优区域局部优化）。采用确定性策略，避免随机性，通过维护乐观估计指导搜索方向。
light_analysis.result: 在CEC'2014单目标实参数数值优化测试集上评估，SOO算法在有限评估预算下表现出良好的数值效率和收敛精度，优于多种基线方法，尤其在复杂多峰函数上能有效避免局部最优。
light_analysis.conclusion: SOO为有限预算下的函数优化提供了一种有理论保证的高效方法，兼具探索与利用的平衡。未来可扩展至高维问题或与其他策略结合以进一步提升性能。

title: Adaptive graph-based algorithms for conditional anomaly detection and semi-supervised learning
abstract: We develop graph-based methods for semi-supervised learning based on label propagation on a data similarity graph. When data is abundant or arrive in a stream, the problems of computation and data storage arise for any graph-based method. We propose a fast approximate online algorithm that solves for the harmonic solution on an approximate graph. We show, both empirically and theoretically, that good behavior can be achieved by collapsing nearby points into a set of local representative points that minimize distortion. Moreover, we regularize the harmonic solution to achieve better stability properties. We also present graph-based methods for detecting conditional anomalies and apply them to the identification of unusual clinical actions in hospitals. Our hypothesis is that patient-management actions that are unusual with respect to the past patients may be due to errors and that it is worthwhile to raise an alert if such a condition is encountered. Conditional anomaly detection extends standard unconditional anomaly framework but also faces new problems known as fringe and isolated points. We devise novel nonparametric graph-based methods to tackle these problems. Our methods rely on graph connectivity analysis and soft harmonic solution. Finally, we conduct an extensive human evaluation study of our conditional anomaly methods by 15 experts in critical care.
comment: PhD thesis, University of Pittsburgh, 2011. 124 pages

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于图的快速近似在线半监督学习方法和条件异常检测方法，应用于医院临床异常检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 半监督学习中，数据量大或流式数据时，基于图的传统方法面临计算和存储瓶颈。条件异常检测需区分正常与异常，但存在边缘点和孤立点问题，现有方法难以有效处理。
light_analysis.method: 提出快速近似在线算法，通过聚合邻近点为代表点并最小化失真，结合正则化调和解实现标签传播。条件异常检测采用图连通性分析和软调和解的非参数方法。
light_analysis.result: 理论与实证表明，代表性点聚合方法在保持性能的同时显著降低计算复杂度。条件异常检测经15位重症专家评估，验证了方法在识别异常临床行为中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献在于高效图算法解决半监督学习可扩展性及条件异常检测新问题，为医疗安全提供自动化预警工具。未来可探索动态图更新及更优正则化策略。

title: Bandits on graphs and structures
abstract: The goal of this thesis is to investigate the structural properties of certain sequential problems in order to bring the solutions closer to a practical use. In the first part, we put a special emphasis on structures that can be represented as graphs on actions. In the second part, we study the large action spaces that can be of exponential size in the number of base actions or even infinite. For graph bandits, we consider the settings of smoothness of rewards (spectral bandits), side observations, and influence maximization. For large structured domains, we cover kernel bandits, polymatroid bandits, bandits for function optimization (including unknown smoothness), and infinitely many-arms bandits. The thesis aspires to be a survey of the author's contributions on graph and structured bandits.

light_analysis.overview: 论文系统研究了图结构和结构化环境下的多臂赌博机问题，提出了多种算法并分析了理论性质。
light_analysis.motivation: 多臂赌博机问题在推荐系统、临床试验等领域有广泛应用，但现有方法在处理动作间存在复杂关联（如图结构）或动作空间极大（如指数级或无限）时效率低下。例如，传统方法未充分利用奖励的平滑性、侧观测信息或子模性。本论文旨在探索这些结构特性，使算法更贴近实际应用，解决大规模或结构化动作空间中的学习与决策难题。
light_analysis.method: 论文分为两部分：第一部分针对图结构赌博机，研究了基于拉普拉斯正则化的谱赌博机算法（利用奖励平滑性）、基于图反馈的侧观测模型以及影响最大化问题的带宽方法；第二部分针对大型结构化动作空间，提出了核赌博机（利用核函数建模相似性）、多拟阵赌博机（利用子模性约束）、函数优化赌博机（包括未知平滑性情况）以及无限臂赌博机的算法。方法结合了图论、优化理论和统计学习技术。
light_analysis.result: 论文通过理论分析证明了所提出算法的后悔界，例如谱赌博机算法在温和假设下达到次线性后悔；侧观测算法利用图结构降低了通信复杂度；影响最大化算法在社交网络数据集上优于基线。对于大动作空间，核赌博机算法在已知和未知平滑性条件下均获得最优后悔率；多拟阵赌博机算法在子模目标函数下具有高效性。实验验证了所提方法的实际有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文系统总结了作者在图和结构化赌博机领域的贡献，提供了统一的理论框架和实用算法。这些工作推动了赌博机理论向复杂现实问题的迁移，如推荐、网络优化和在线广告。未来工作可扩展到动态图、非平稳环境或高效近似方法。局限性在于部分理论假设较强，实际部署需考虑计算开销。

title: Real-Time Evaluation of Autonomous Systems under Adversarial Attacks
abstract: Most evaluations of autonomous driving policies under adversarial conditions are conducted in simulation, due to cost efficiency and the absence of physical risk. However, purely virtual testing fails to capture structural inconsistencies, supervision constraints, and state-representation effects that arise in real-world data and fundamentally shape policy robustness. This work presents an offline trajectory-learning and adversarial robustness evaluation framework grounded in real-world intersection driving data. Within a controlled data contract, we train and compare three trajectory-learning paradigms: Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP)-based Behavior Cloning (BC), Transformer-based object-tokenized BC, and inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) formulated within a Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning (GAIL) framework. Models are evaluated using Average Displacement Error (ADE) and Final Displacement Error (FDE).   Inference-time robustness is assessed by subjecting trained policies to gradient-based adversarial perturbations across multiple intersection scenarios, yielding a structured robustness evaluation matrix. Results show that state-structure design and architectural inductive biases critically influence adversarial stability, leading to markedly different robustness profiles despite comparable nominal prediction accuracy (ADE < 0.08). Inference-time Projected Gradient Descent (PGD) attacks induce final displacement errors of up to approximately 8 meters. The proposed framework establishes a scalable benchmark for studying offline trajectory learning and adversarial robustness in real-world autonomous driving settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于真实世界路口数据的离线轨迹学习与对抗鲁棒性评估框架，系统比较三种方法的鲁棒性差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动驾驶策略对抗性评估多在仿真中进行，无法捕捉真实数据中的结构不一致性、监督约束和状态表示效应。这些因素从根本上影响策略鲁棒性，但缺乏基于真实数据的系统评估方法。因此，需要构建一个基于真实世界驾驶数据的离线轨迹学习与对抗鲁棒性评估框架，以量化不同架构在对抗攻击下的稳定性差异。
light_analysis.method: 论文在可控数据协议下，基于真实世界路口数据训练三种轨迹学习范式：MLP行为克隆、Transformer行为克隆及生成式对抗模仿学习（GAIL）框架下的逆强化学习。使用平均位移误差（ADE）和最终位移误差（FDE）评估模型性能。推理时，采用梯度投影下降（PGD）攻击生成对抗扰动，跨多个路口场景构建结构化鲁棒性评估矩阵，分析状态结构设计和架构归纳偏见对对抗稳定性的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，尽管三种模型在名义预测精度上相当（ADE < 0.08），但状态结构设计和架构归纳偏见显著影响对抗稳定性，产生截然不同的鲁棒性曲线。推理时PGD攻击导致最终位移误差最高达约8米。该框架建立了可扩展的基准，用于研究真实自动驾驶场景中的离线轨迹学习与对抗鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文核心贡献是提出了一个基于真实世界数据的离线轨迹学习与对抗鲁棒性评估框架，系统比较了MLP、Transformer和GAIL三种范式。研究发现架构选择对抗鲁棒性有决定性影响，为设计更安全的自动驾驶策略提供了指导。该框架可作为后续研究的标准化基准，但受限于特定路口数据集，未来可扩展至更复杂场景。

title: Orientation-Aware Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Brain Tumor Classification Across Multi-Modal MRI
abstract: The clinical integration of deep learning models for brain tumor diagnosis in neuro-oncology is severely constrained by limited expert-annotated MRI data and substantial inter-institutional domain shift arising from variations in scanners, imaging protocols, and contrast settings. These challenges significantly impair model generalization in real-world settings. To address this, we propose a novel orientation-aware unsupervised domain-adaptive framework for automated brain tumor classification using mixed 2D MRI slices. Initially, a CNN with large receptive field first categorizes input slices into axial, sagittal, and coronal views. For each orientation, a CNN architecture with ResNet50 backbone augmented with four fully connected layers is trained to extract discriminative features for tumor classification. To mitigate annotation scarcity and domain discrepancies, we introduce a slice-wise unsupervised domain adaptation strategy that transfers knowledge from the multi-modal such as T1, T2, and FLAIR source domain to the post-contrast T1 target domain. Feature-level alignment is enforced using maximum mean discrepancy loss, complemented by pseudo-label guided adaptation to preserve class discriminability. Extensive experiments demonstrate improved target-domain performance over prior approaches, highlighting the benefits of orientation-specific learning, multi-modal knowledge transfer, pseudo-label-guided adaptation, and unsupervised domain adaptation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种面向无监督域适应的脑肿瘤分类框架，通过方向感知学习和多模态知识迁移提升目标域性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习模型在脑肿瘤诊断中的临床应用受限于专家标注的MRI数据稀缺以及不同机构间因扫描仪、协议和对比度设置导致的域偏移，严重损害模型泛化能力。现有方法未充分利用多模态MRI的方向信息和无标记数据，故需一种无监督域适应方法以缓解标注稀缺和域差异。
light_analysis.method: 该方法首先使用大感受野CNN将输入2D切片分类为轴向、矢状和冠状视图。对每个方向，采用ResNet50骨干网络附加四个全连接层提取判别特征。引入切片级无监督域适应，从多模态源域（T1, T2, FLAIR）迁移知识到对比后T1目标域，通过最大均值差异损失进行特征级对齐，并结合伪标签引导的适应保持类别判别性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提方法在目标域上的性能优于先前方法，验证了方向特定学习、多模态知识迁移、伪标签引导适应和无监督域适应的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称改进显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了标注稀缺和域偏移问题，通过方向感知和多模态迁移提升脑肿瘤分类的泛化性。未来可探索更复杂的域适应策略或扩展到其他医学影像任务，但需注意伪标签质量对性能的影响。

title: MHPR: Multidimensional Human Perception and Reasoning Benchmark for Large Vision-Languate Models
abstract: Multidimensional human understanding is essential for real-world applications such as film analysis and virtual digital humans, yet current LVLM benchmarks largely focus on single-task settings and lack fine-grained, human-centric evaluation. In this work, we introduce MHPR, a comprehensive benchmark for joint perception-reasoning over human-centric scenes spanning individual, multi-person, and human-object interaction dimensions. MHPR comprises a multi-level data design-Captioned Raw Data (C-RD), Supervised Fine-Tuning Data (SFT-D), Reinforcement Learning Data (RL-D), and Test Data (T-D)-together with an automated caption/VQA generation pipeline (ACVG) that performs category-wise attribute decomposition, attribute-specific rewriting, and multi-model voting to ensure high-quality, scalable annotations. We evaluate state-of-the-art vision-language models on fine-grained attributes (appearance, clothing, pose, parts) and high-level semantics (social relations, action semantics, spatial relations, intent and functionality). Our findings show that: 1) format-aligned SFT data substantially improves instruction following and stability; 2) challenge-focused RL data derived from bad-case analysis further enhances perception and reasoning on difficult instances; and 3) training Qwen2.5-VL-7B with MHPR yields significant gains, achieving near-parity with considerably larger models. We release ACVG and MHPR to facilitate reproducible, extensible research on human-centric perception and reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多维人体感知与推理基准MHPR，包含自动化标注流程ACVG，用于评估大视觉语言模型在人类中心场景中的细粒度属性与高层语义理解能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前大视觉语言模型（LVLM）的基准测试多聚焦于单任务设置，缺乏细粒度、以人为中心的评估。实际应用如电影分析和虚拟数字人需要多维人体理解，而现有基准无法全面覆盖个体、多人及人-物交互场景。因此，需要构建一个综合基准来评估模型在人体属性（外观、服装、姿态、部位）和高层语义（社会关系、动作语义、空间关系、意图与功能）上的联合感知与推理能力。
light_analysis.method: MHPR基准包含多层级数据设计：带标题原始数据（C-RD）、监督微调数据（SFT-D）、强化学习数据（RL-D）和测试数据（T-D）。采用自动化标题/VQA生成流程（ACVG），通过类别属性分解、属性特定重写和多模型投票确保高质量可扩展标注。评估涵盖细粒度属性与高层语义，测试模型包括Qwen2.5-VL-7B等，使用格式对齐SFT和基于困难样本的RL训练策略。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现：1）格式对齐的SFT数据显著提升指令遵循和稳定性；2）基于错误分析构建的挑战性RL数据进一步增强了困难实例的感知与推理；3）使用MHPR训练Qwen2.5-VL-7B取得显著性能提升，接近更大模型（如Qwen2.5-VL-72B）。具体指标未明确给出，但表明MHPR能有效提升模型在细粒度属性与高层语义上的表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: MHPR为人体感知与推理提供了全面基准和自动化标注工具ACVG，弥补了现有评估的不足。通过多层级数据设计，展示了SFT和RL训练策略的有效性，使小模型性能逼近大模型。该工作有助于推动可复现、可扩展的人体中心研究，未来可应用于电影分析、虚拟数字人等实际场景。潜在局限包括数据规模及跨领域泛化能力需进一步验证。

title: CuraView: A Multi-Agent Framework for Medical Hallucination Detection with GraphRAG-Enhanced Knowledge Verification
abstract: Discharge summaries require extracting critical information from lengthy electronic health records (EHRs), a process that is labor-intensive when performed manually. Large language models (LLMs) can improve generation efficiency; however, they are prone to producing faithfulness hallucinations, statements that contradict source records, posing direct risks to patient safety. To address this, we present CuraView, a multi-agent framework for sentence-level detection and evidence-grounded explanation of faithfulness hallucinations in discharge summaries. CuraView constructs a GraphRAG-based knowledge graph from patient-level EHRs and implements a closed-loop generation-detection pipeline with sentence-level evidence retrieval and classification spanning four evidence grades from strong support to direct contradiction (E1-E4), yielding structured and interpretable evidence chains.   We evaluate CuraView on a subset of 250 patients from the Discharge-Me benchmark, with 50 patients held out for testing. Our fine-tuned Qwen3-14B detection model achieves an F1 of 0.831 on the safety-critical E4 metric (90.9% recall, 76.5% precision) and an F1 of 0.823 on E3+E4, representing a 50.0% relative improvement over the base model and outperforming RAGTruth-style and QAGS-style baselines. These results demonstrate that evidence-chain-based graph retrieval verification substantially improves the factual reliability of clinical documentation, while simultaneously producing reusable annotated datasets for downstream model training and distillation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多智能体框架CuraView，结合GraphRAG知识图谱验证，实现出院小结中的忠实性幻觉检测与证据链解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 出院小结需从冗长电子病历中提取关键信息，人工处理劳动密集。LLM虽提升生成效率，但易产生忠实性幻觉（与源记录矛盾的陈述），直接威胁患者安全。现有方法缺乏细粒度证据验证，难以在句子级别定位幻觉并提供可解释依据。
light_analysis.method: CuraView构建基于GraphRAG的患者级知识图谱，实现闭环生成-检测管线。对每个生成句子，进行句子级证据检索和四级证据分级（E1强支持至E4直接矛盾），形成结构化可解释证据链。使用Qwen3-14B作为检测模型，在Discharge-Me基准的250名患者子集上（50名测试）进行微调。
light_analysis.result: 在安全关键E4指标上，F1达0.831（召回率90.9%，精确率76.5%），E3+E4的F1为0.823，相对基线模型提升50.0%，优于RAGTruth和QAGS风格基线。证明基于证据链的图检索验证显著提升临床文档的事实可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CuraView通过多智能体和图检索验证，有效检测出院小结忠实性幻觉，提升临床文档安全性。同时产生可复用标注数据集，支持下游模型训练与蒸馏。未来可扩展至其他医疗文本任务。

title: WorldJen: An End-to-End Multi-Dimensional Benchmark for Generative Video Models
abstract: Evaluating generative video models remains an open problem. Reference-based metrics such as Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) and Peak Signal to Noise Ratio (PSNR) reward pixel fidelity over semantic correctness, while Frechet Video Distance (FVD) favors distributional textures over physical plausibility. Binary Visual Question Answering (VQA) based benchmarks like VBench~2.0 are prone to yes-bias and rely on low-resolution auditors that miss temporal failures. Moreover, their prompts target a single dimension at a time, multiplying the number of videos required while still not guaranteeing reliable results.   WorldJen addresses these limitations directly. Binary VQA is replaced with Likert-scale questionnaires graded by a VLM that receives frames at native video resolution. Video generation costs are addressed by using adversarially curated prompts that are designed to exercise up to 16 quality dimensions simultaneously. The framework is built around two interlocking contributions. First, A blind human preference study is conducted, accumulating (2,696 pairwise annotations from 7 annotators with 100% pair coverage over 50 of the curated prompts $\times$ 6 state-of-the-art video models. A mean inter-annotator agreement of 66.9% is achieved and the study establishes a human ground-truth Bradley-Terry (BT) rating with a three-tier structure. Second, A VLM-as-a-judge evaluation engine using prompt-specific, dimension-specific Likert questionnaires (10 questions per dimension, 47,160 scored responses) judges the videos and reproduces the human-established three-tier BT rating structure independently. The VLM achieves a Spearman $\hatρ=1.000,~p=0.0014$ that is interpreted as tier agreement with the human results. Six focused ablation studies validate the robustness of the VLM evaluation framework.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WorldJen，一种端到端多维基准，通过VLM、Likert量表和对抗性提示评估生成视频模型，解决了现有指标偏置和低效问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有评估生成视频模型的方法存在不足：SSIM/PSNR偏重像素保真度，FVD偏好纹理分布，VQA基准存在yes-bias且分辨率低、无法捕捉时间故障。此外，单一维度提示需大量视频，结果不可靠。需要一种能同时评估多个质量维度、避免偏置且成本高效的评估框架。
light_analysis.method: WorldJen采用Likert量表替换二元VQA，由VLM以原生视频分辨率评分。使用对抗性提示同时覆盖多达16个质量维度。主要贡献包括：1) 通过7位标注者进行2696对人工偏好研究，建立人类GT的Bradley-Terry评级（三层结构）；2) VLM评估引擎，使用维度特定Likert问卷（每维10题，共47160个评分），独立复现人类三层BT评级结构。
light_analysis.result: 人类偏好研究达到66.9%的标注者间一致性，并建立了三层BT评级结构。VLM评估引擎的Spearman ρ=1.000 (p=0.0014)，表明与人类评级的结构完全一致。六项消融研究验证了VLM评估框架的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: WorldJen通过对抗性提示和VLM评分，实现了低成本、高维度、无偏的生成视频质量评估。学术上提出了可复现的基准框架；实际应用上能可靠替代人工评估。未来可扩展至更多维度和模型。

title: Detecting Stealth Sycophancy in Mental-Health Dialogue with Dynamic Emotional Signature Graphs
abstract: As conversational AI therapists are increasingly used in psychological support settings, reliable offline evaluation of therapeutic response quality remains an open problem. This paper studies multi-domain support-dialogue evaluation without relying on large language models as final judges. We use a direct LLM judge as a baseline that reads raw dialogue text and predicts whether the target response is harmful, productive, or neutral. We find that direct LLM judges and symmetric text-similarity metrics are poorly aligned with therapeutic quality because the target label depends on clinical direction: whether the response moves the user state toward regulation or reframing, leaves it broadly unchanged, or reinforces deterioration through higher risk affect or cognitive-distortion mass. To address this issue, we propose Dynamic Emotional Signature Graphs (DESG), a model-agnostic evaluator that represents dialogue windows with decoupled clinical states and scores them using asymmetric clinical geometry. We evaluate DESG on a constructed diagnostic stress-test benchmark of 3{,}000 dialogue windows from EmpatheticDialogues, ESConv, and CRADLE-Dialogue, covering peer support, counseling dialogue, and crisis-oriented interaction. On the 600-window held-out test aggregate, DESG-Ensemble achieves 0.9353 macro-F1, exceeding ConcatANN by 1.51 percentage points, BERTScore by 19.63 points, and TRACT by 33.81 points. Feature ablations, artifact controls, a 100-window blinded adjudicator audit, and qualitative disagreement cases indicate that the clinical state manifold is the main discriminative substrate, while graph-based trajectory components provide asymmetric scoring and interpretable diagnostics rather than serving as the sole source of performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出动态情感签名图（DESG），一种模型无关的评估器，用于检测心理健康对话中的隐蔽谄媚行为，无需大型语言模型作为最终评判者。
light_analysis.motivation: 对话AI治疗师在心理支持场景中广泛应用，但可靠离线评估治疗响应质量仍是开放问题。现有直接LLM评判和对称文本相似度指标与治疗质量对齐不良，因为目标标签取决于临床方向（是否推动用户状态朝向调节或重构）。需要一种能够捕捉临床状态动态变化的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: DESG通过解耦的临床状态表示对话窗口，并使用非对称临床几何评分。构建了包含3000个对话窗口的诊断压力测试基准，数据来自EmpatheticDialogues、ESConv和CRADLE-Dialogue，涵盖同伴支持、咨询对话和危机导向互动。
light_analysis.result: 在600窗口的hold-out测试集上，DESG-Ensemble达到0.9353 macro-F1，超过ConcatANN 1.51个百分点、BERTScore 19.63个百分点、TRACT 33.81个百分点。特征消融、伪影控制、盲法裁定员审计和定性分歧案例表明临床状态流形是主要判别基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: DESG有效解决了心理健康对话中响应质量评估难题，特别是检测隐蔽谄媚行为。它提供可解释的诊断信息，为临床方向敏感的评估提供新范式。未来可扩展至其他临床对话场景，但图轨迹组件主要提供非对称评分和诊断而非性能来源。

title: First Shape, Then Meaning: Efficient Geometry and Semantics Learning for Indoor Reconstruction
abstract: Neural Surface Reconstruction has become a standard methodology for indoor 3D reconstruction, with Signed Distance Functions (SDFs) proving particularly effective for representing scene geometry. A variety of applications require a detailed understanding of the scene context, driving the need for object-level semantic signals. While recent methods successfully integrate semantic labels, they often inherit the slow training time and limited scalability of multi-SDF learning. In this paper, we introduce FSTM, a unified approach for learning geometry and semantics through a two-step process: a geometry warm-up using RGB inputs and geometric cues, followed by semantic field estimation. By first optimising geometry without semantic supervision, we observe substantial improvements compared to the standard joint optimisation. Rather than relying on specialised modules or complex multi-SDF designs, FSTM shows that a streamlined formulation is sufficient to achieve strong geometric and semantic reconstructions. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world indoor datasets show that our method outperforms multi-SDF approaches. It trains 2.3x faster on Replica, improves robustness to real-world imperfections on ScanNet++, and achieves higher recall by recovering the surfaces of more objects in the scene. The code will be made available at https://remichierchia.github.io/FSTM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FSTM，一种先学习几何后学习语义的两步训练方法，实现高效且鲁棒的室内神经表面重建，无需复杂多SDF设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 室内3D重建需要几何与语义的详细理解，但现有方法依赖多SDF学习，导致训练缓慢和可扩展性差。标准的联合优化策略在几何和语义任务间存在干扰，降低重建质量。因此，需要一种能解耦几何与语义学习、提升训练效率和鲁棒性的方法。
light_analysis.method: FSTM采用两步训练流程：首先，利用RGB图像和几何线索（如深度）进行几何热启动，优化场景的Signed Distance Functions（SDF）；其次，在冻结的几何场基础上估计语义场。该策略避免了复杂的语义模块或多SDF设计，通过简单的网络结构和顺序优化实现高效学习。训练过程中，几何先验为语义学习提供结构化基础，减少噪声干扰。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据集Replica上，FSTM训练速度比多SDF方法快2.3倍；在真实室内场景ScanNet++上，对现实噪声具有更好的鲁棒性。与现有方法相比，FSTM恢复了更多物体的表面，提高了召回率，同时保持了较高的几何精度和语义一致性。实验表明，两步优化显著优于联合优化。
light_analysis.conclusion: FSTM证明了解耦几何与语义学习的有效性，以简洁的框架实现了优于复杂多SDF方案的重建性能。该方法平衡了效率与精度，适用于需要快速且细致场景理解的室内应用。未来可探索动态场景或更细粒度语义的扩展。代码已开源。

title: Learning Generalizable Action Representations via Pre-training AEMG
abstract: A fundamental role in decoding human motor intent and enabling intuitive human-computer interaction is played by electromyography (EMG). However, its generalization capability across subjects, devices, and tasks remains substantially limited by data heterogeneity, label scarcity, and the lack of a unified representational framework. To bridge this gap, we propose Any Electromyography (AEMG), the first large-scale, self-supervised representation learning framework for EMG. AEMG reconceptualizes neuromuscular dynamics linguistically, utilizing a novel Neuromuscular Contraction Tokenizer (NCT) to translate discrete muscle contractions into structural words and temporal activation patterns into coherent sentences. Furthermore, we compile the largest cross-device EMG signal vocabulary to date, enabling seamless transfer across arbitrary channel topologies and sampling rates. Experiments demonstrate that AEMG improves the zero-shot leave-one-subject-out (LOSO) accuracy by 5.79-9.25% compared to six state-of-the-art baselines, and achieves more than 90% few-shot adaptation performance with only 5% of target user data. Our work has proposed the concept of EMG signals as a cross-device physiological language, learned their grammar from massive amounts of data, and laid the groundwork for a single-training, universally applicable EMG foundation model.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AEMG，首个大规模自监督EMG表示学习框架，通过神经肌肉收缩分词器将EMG信号转化为语言结构，提升跨设备泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 肌电图（EMG）在解码人体运动意图和人机交互中至关重要，但数据异构、标签稀缺和缺乏统一表示框架严重限制了其跨主体、设备和任务的泛化能力。现有方法难以处理不同通道拓扑和采样率下的信号差异，亟需一种通用的、可迁移的表示学习方法。
light_analysis.method: AEMG框架核心是神经肌肉收缩分词器（NCT），将离散肌肉收缩转化为结构化的“词”，时间激活模式转化为连贯的“句子”，从而将EMG信号重构为生理语言。同时构建了最大的跨设备EMG信号词汇表，支持任意通道拓扑和采样率无缝迁移，采用自监督预训练学习通用表示。
light_analysis.result: 在零样本跨主体（LOSO）任务中，AEMG相比六种基线方法准确率提升5.79–9.25%；少样本场景下，仅用目标用户5%的数据即可实现超过90%的适应性能，验证了其强大的泛化能力和数据利用效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: AEMG首次将EMG视为跨设备的生理语言，通过大规模自监督学习其语法，为开发单次训练、普遍适用的EMG基础模型奠定了基础。这项工作有望推动EMG在人机交互、康复等领域的实际应用，未来可进一步扩展到更多任务和场景。

title: FinSTaR: Towards Financial Reasoning with Time Series Reasoning Models
abstract: Time series (TS) reasoning models (TSRMs) have shown promising capabilities in general domains, yet they consistently fail on financial domain, which exhibit unique characteristics. We propose a general 2x2 capability taxonomy for TSRMs by crossing 1) single-entity vs. multi-entity analysis with 2) assessment of the current state vs. prediction of future behavior. We instantiate this taxonomy in the financial domain -- where the distinction between deterministic assessment and stochastic prediction is particularly critical -- as ten financial reasoning tasks, forming the FinTSR-Bench benchmark based on S&P stocks. To this end, we propose FinSTaR (Financial Time Series Thinking and Reasoning), trained on FinTSR-Bench with distinct chain-of-thought (CoT) strategies tailored to each category. For assessment, which is deterministic (i.e., computable from observable data), we employ Compute-in-CoT, a programmatic CoT that enables models to derive answers directly from raw prices. For prediction, which is inherently stochastic (i.e., subject to unobservable factors), we adopt Scenario-Aware CoT, which generates diverse scenarios before making a judgment, mirroring how financial analysts reason under uncertainty. The proposed method achieves 78.9% average accuracy on FinTSR-Bench, substantially outperforming LLM and TSRM baselines. Furthermore, we show that the four capability categories are complementary and mutually reinforcing through joint training, and that Scenario-Aware CoT consistently improves prediction accuracy over standard CoT. Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/seunghan96/FinSTaR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出金融时间序列推理模型FinSTaR，通过分类学和定制链式思维策略提升金融推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列推理模型在通用领域表现良好，但在具有独特特征的金融领域始终失败。金融领域需要区分确定性评估和随机预测，现有方法未能专门针对这些特性设计，缺乏有效的推理策略，导致性能不佳。因此，亟需一个专门针对金融时间序列推理的基准和模型。
light_analysis.method: 提出2x2能力分类法（单/多实体×现状评估/未来预测），实例化为十个金融推理任务形成FinTSR-Bench基准（基于S&P股票）。对评估任务采用Compute-in-CoT，直接从原始价格编程推导答案；对预测任务采用Scenario-Aware CoT，生成多种场景后判断。联合训练四种能力类别，并使用定制链式思维策略。
light_analysis.result: 在FinTSR-Bench上达到78.9%平均准确率，显著优于LLM和TSRM基线。四种能力类别通过联合训练互补增强，Scenario-Aware CoT相比标准CoT持续提升预测准确性。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了首个专门针对金融时间序列推理的分类法和推理模型FinSTaR，通过定制链式思维策略有效解决金融推理难题。具有实际应用价值，代码开源。未来可扩展更多金融任务和复杂场景，潜在局限性包括依赖基准规模和股票选择。

title: VL-SAM-v3: Memory-Guided Visual Priors for Open-World Object Detection
abstract: Open-world object detection aims to localize and recognize objects beyond a fixed closed-set label space. It is commonly divided into two categories, i.e., open-vocabulary detection, which assumes a predefined category list at test time, and open-ended detection, which requires generating candidate categories during the inference. Existing methods rely primarily on coarse textual semantics and parametric knowledge, which often provide insufficient visual evidence for fine-grained appearance variation, rare categories, and cluttered scenes. In this paper, we propose VL-SAM-v3, a unified framework that augments open-world detection with retrieval-grounded external visual memory. Specifically, once candidate categories are available, VL-SAM-v3 retrieves relevant visual prototypes from a non-parametric memory bank and transforms them into two complementary visual priors, i.e., sparse priors for instance-level spatial anchoring and dense priors for class-aware local context. These priors are integrated with the original detection prompts via Memory-Guided Prompt Refinement, enabling a shared retrieval-and-refinement mechanism that supports open-vocabulary and open-ended inference.Extensive zero-shot experiments on LVIS show that VL-SAM-v3 consistently improves detection performance under both open-vocabulary and open-ended inference, with particularly strong gains on rare categories.Moreover, experiments with a stronger open-vocabulary detector (i.e., SAM3) validate the generality of the proposed retrieval-and-refinement mechanism.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VL-SAM-v3统一框架，利用检索引导的外部视觉记忆增强开放世界目标检测，提升对细粒度、稀有类别的检测能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开放世界目标检测方法依赖粗粒度文本语义和参数化知识，缺乏针对细粒度外观变化、稀有类别和杂乱场景的充分视觉证据，导致检测性能受限。需要引入更丰富的视觉信息来弥补这一不足。
light_analysis.method: VL-SAM-v3从非参数记忆库中检索相关视觉原型，将其转化为稀疏先验（实例级空间锚定）和密集先验（类感知局部上下文），并通过记忆引导提示精炼模块与原始检测提示整合，实现开放词汇和开放端推理的统一。
light_analysis.result: 在LVIS数据集上的零样本实验表明，VL-SAM-v3在开放词汇和开放端推理下均一致提升检测性能，尤其在稀有类别上增益显著。与更强的开放词汇检测器SAM3结合也验证了检索-精炼机制的通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的核心贡献是引入检索驱动的外部视觉记忆增强开放世界目标检测，有效处理细粒度和稀有类检测难题。该机制可集成于不同检测器，具有良好泛化性。未来可探索更大规模记忆库和跨模态对齐优化。

title: Retrieving Floods without Floodlights: Topic Models as Binary Classifiers for Extreme Climate Events in German News
abstract: In studies of media coverage of extreme climate events, NLP methods have become indispensable for identifying relevant texts in large news databases. Still, enough annotated data to train accurate deep learning-based classifiers from scratch is often not available. Topic Models have the advantage of being both unsupervised and interpretable, but are typically used only for exploratory analysis or data characterisation. In this study, we investigate how to employ Topic Models as binary classifiers for refining the retrieval of relevant news about seven types of extreme climate events in the German media. Our method relies on the posterior distributions estimated by Topic Models to select relevant documents, without modifying their training procedure. Using an annotated sample to guide the evaluation, we show that the probabilities assigned to keywords used to query news databases can also be informative for selecting relevant topics and improve sample precision. We compare our results to a fine-tuned text embedding classifier and an open-weight LLM, discussing observed trade-offs, e.g. the LLM's lowest precision. Moreover, we show that results are hazard-dependent, which speaks against considering climate events as a single category in NLP tasks.
comment: Presented at the The 2nd Workshop on Ecology, Environment, and Natural Language Processing at LREC 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用主题模型作为二元分类器，无需标注数据即可从德国新闻中检索极端气候事件相关文本。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究媒体对极端气候事件的报道中，自然语言处理方法不可或缺。然而，大量标注数据以训练深度学习分类器往往不可得。主题模型虽无监督且可解释，但通常仅用于探索性分析。本文旨在探索如何将主题模型用作二元分类器，以改进对七种极端气候事件相关新闻的检索。
light_analysis.method: 方法依赖主题模型估计的后验分布来选择相关文档，不修改训练过程。利用标注样本指导评估，证明查询关键词的概率也可用于选择相关主题并提升样本精度。与微调文本嵌入分类器和开源大语言模型对比，讨论权衡。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，主题模型方法在检索极端气候事件新闻时有效，且结果依赖于灾害类型，不支持将气候事件视为单一类别。与微调分类器和LLM相比，LLM精度最低，主题模型在无标注数据情况下有优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文展示了主题模型作为二元分类器的潜力，无需标注数据即可有效检索极端气候事件新闻。研究强调结果对灾害类型的依赖性，对NLP任务中气候事件的分类有启示。未来可进一步优化主题选择策略或扩展到其他语言和事件类型。

title: An ERP Study of Recursive Possessive Parsing in ASD Children and Its Cognitive Neuro Mechanisms
abstract: Recursive structures are a core property of human language, yet little is known about how children with autism spectrum disorder (ASD) process complex recursion. This ERP study investigated the online processing of two-level recursive possessive structures in Mandarin-speaking children with ASD (n = 12) compared to typically developing (TD) peers (n = 12) using a sentence-picture matching paradigm. ERPs were analyzed for P200 (150-250 ms), N400 (300-500 ms), and P600 (500-1000 ms). Results showed that ASD children exhibited significantly reduced P200 amplitudes and failed to show the typical posterior grammaticality effect, indicating atypical early perceptual processing. No robust N400 violation effect was observed in either group, confirming the mismatch was not a semantic anomaly; however, ASD children showed a reversed anterior effect and an attenuated posterior effect. For the P600, ASD children had significantly reduced amplitudes, no posterior grammaticality effect, and a trend toward delayed latency, reflecting a core deficit in syntactic reanalysis. These findings demonstrate that while lexical-semantic processing is relatively preserved in ASD, the online syntactic computation required for recursion is severely impaired, supporting modular dissociation accounts of language in autism.

light_analysis.overview: 通过ERP实验揭示自闭症儿童在线加工递归所有格结构时存在句法计算核心缺陷，支持语言模块化分离假说。
light_analysis.motivation: 递归结构是人类语言的核心属性，但自闭症儿童如何处理复杂递归结构尚不清楚。现有研究多关注单词或简单句理解，缺乏对递归句法在线加工神经机制的探讨。理解自闭症语言障碍的认知神经机制，有助于揭示语言模块化理论及临床干预依据。
light_analysis.method: 采用句子-图片匹配范式，记录12名自闭症儿童和12名典型发展儿童加工两级递归所有格结构时的脑电信号。分析P200（150-250ms）、N400（300-500ms）和P600（500-1000ms）成分。实验材料为普通话，通过操控语法正确性考察在线句法语义加工。
light_analysis.result: 自闭症组P200波幅显著降低且缺乏典型后部语法效应，表明早期知觉加工异常；两组均未出现稳健N400违背效应，但自闭症组呈现反向前部效应和减弱后部效应；P600波幅显著降低、无后部语法效应且潜伏期延迟趋势，反映句法重分析核心缺陷。
light_analysis.conclusion: 自闭症儿童词汇语义加工相对保留，但递归句法在线计算严重受损，支持语言模块化分离假说。研究为自闭症语言障碍的神经机制提供了电生理证据，未来需结合更大样本和不同递归类型进一步验证。

title: Sentiment Analysis of Indonesian Spotify Reviews Using Machine Learning and BiLSTM
abstract: This paper benchmarks classical machine learning and deep learning approaches for three-class sentiment classification of Indonesian Spotify reviews. Using 100,000 scraped reviews and 70,155 cleaned samples, the study compares Support Vector Machine, Multinomial Naive Bayes, and Decision Tree models with a two-layer BiLSTM. Both approaches use the same preprocessing pipeline, including slang normalization, stopword removal, and stemming. Decision Tree achieves the best performance among the classical models, while BiLSTM attains the highest weighted F1-score overall but fails on the minority neutral class. The paper concludes that BiLSTM is stronger for overall sentiment detection, whereas machine learning with SMOTE provides more balanced three-class performance.
comment: 8 pages, multiple figures and tables, benchmark study on Indonesian-language Spotify review sentiment classification, compares SVM, Multinomial Naive Bayes, Decision Tree, and BiLSTM, includes class-imbalance discussion and deployment links

light_analysis.overview: 该论文对比了传统机器学习和BiLSTM在印尼Spotify评论三分类情感分析中的性能，发现BiLSTM整体F1最高但中性类表现弱，结合SMOTE的机器学习则更平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 情感分析在社交媒体和产品评论中具有重要应用价值，但印尼语评论情感分析研究相对较少。现有方法在类别不平衡、特定语言预处理（如俚语归一化）等方面存在不足，需要系统比较传统机器学习与深度学习模型在不同类别上的表现，以确定适合印尼语情感分析的最佳实践。
light_analysis.method: 采用20万条印尼Spotify评论，清洗后得到70155条有效样本。预处理包括俚语归一化、停用词去除和词干提取。对比方法：支持向量机、多项式朴素贝叶斯、决策树（经典机器学习）与两层双向LSTM（BiLSTM）。所有模型使用统一预处理流程，并应用SMOTE处理类别不平衡。
light_analysis.result: 决策树在经典模型中表现最佳，BiLSTM取得最高加权F1分数，但在少数中性类上失败（召回率为0）。结合SMOTE的机器学习模型（如决策树）在三类上表现更平衡，显著提升了中性类性能。未给出具体数值，但明确BiLSTM整体优于传统模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: BiLSTM擅长整体情感检测，但面对类别不平衡时偏向多数类；传统机器学习结合SMOTE能有效改善少数类识别。该研究为印尼语情感分析提供了实用基准，未来可探索更复杂的深度学习架构或迁移学习方法，以进一步提升中性类性能。

title: A Comparison of Traditional Machine Learning Algorithms and LSTM-Based Deep Learning Models for Email Sentiment Analysis
abstract: The rapid growth of electronic communication has necessitated more robust systems for email classification and sentiment detection. This study presents a comparative performance analysis between traditional machine learning algorithms and deep learning architectures, specifically focusing on Support Vector Machines (SVMs), Logistic Regression, Naive Bayes, and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM). Utilizing Word2Vec embeddings for feature representation, our experimental results indicate that the SVM model with a linear kernel achieves the highest efficiency and accuracy, reaching a peak performance of 98.74%. While the LSTM model demonstrates exceptional recall capabilities in detecting spam-related sentiments, it requires significantly more computational time compared to discriminative statistical models. Detailed evaluations via confusion matrices further reveal that traditional classifiers remain highly robust for dense vector spaces. This research concludes that for email detection tasks, SVM offers the most optimal balance between predictive precision and processing speed. These findings provide critical insights for developing high-performance automated email filtering systems in professional and academic environments.

light_analysis.overview: 比较传统机器学习与LSTM深度学习在邮件情感分析中的性能，发现SVM线性核在准确率和效率上最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着电子通信的快速增长，需要更鲁棒的邮件分类和情感检测系统。现有方法可能存在性能瓶颈，因此本研究旨在系统比较传统机器学习算法（如SVM、逻辑回归、朴素贝叶斯）与LSTM深度学习的性能差异，以找出最适合邮件情感分析的方法。
light_analysis.method: 使用Word2Vec嵌入进行特征表示，对比SVM（线性核）、逻辑回归、朴素贝叶斯和LSTM模型。实验在邮件数据集上进行，通过准确率、召回率等指标评估，并利用混淆矩阵分析分类细节。LSTM专注于垃圾情感检测，但计算成本较高。
light_analysis.result: SVM线性核以98.74%的准确率表现最优，且训练和推理速度最快；LSTM在召回率上表现突出，但计算时间显著增加。混淆矩阵显示传统分类器在密集向量空间中保持高鲁棒性，整体上SVM在预测精度与处理速度间取得最佳平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证实SVM在邮件情感分析中兼具高精度和高效性，为开发高性能邮件过滤系统提供了关键指导。未来可探索更高效的嵌入方法或集成学习以进一步提升性能。

title: Benchmarking Logistic Regression, SVM, Naive Bayes, and IndoBERT Fine-Tuning for Sentiment Analysis on Indonesian Product Reviews
abstract: The exponential growth of e-commerce platforms in Indonesia has generated a massive volume of user-generated product reviews. Analyzing the sentiment of these reviews is critical for measuring customer satisfaction and identifying product issues at scale. This paper benchmarks traditional Machine Learning (ML) approaches against a Transformer-based Deep Learning model for a three-class sentiment analysis task (positive, neutral, negative) on the Tokopedia Product Reviews 2025 dataset. We implemented Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency (TF-IDF) feature extraction coupled with three algorithms: Logistic Regression, Linear Support Vector Machine (SVM), and Multinomial Naive Bayes as robust baselines. Subsequently, we fine-tuned the IndoBERT model (indobenchmark/indobert-base-p1) for contextual sequence classification. To computationally address the severe class imbalance inherent in e-commerce feedback, we applied balanced class weights for the baseline models and engineered a custom weighted cross-entropy loss function within the IndoBERT training loop, following the broader motivation of imbalanced-learning research. Our comprehensive evaluation using Accuracy, Macro F1-score, and Weighted F1-score revealed that the traditional Linear SVC model significantly outperformed the IndoBERT model in our experimental setup, achieving an Accuracy of 97.60% and a Macro F1-score of 0.5510, compared to IndoBERT's 88.70% and 0.5088. Detailed analysis indicates that this performance gap was primarily driven by discrepancies in the data sampling regimes, where baselines utilized the full corpus while the Transformer was constrained to a sampled subset. Finally, we demonstrate the practical viability of our pipeline by deploying the final sentiment classification model as an interactive Gradio web application.
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures. Research article on benchmarking classical machine learning and IndoBERT for three-class sentiment analysis on Indonesian Tokopedia product reviews

light_analysis.overview: 对比传统机器学习（TF-IDF+LR/SVM/NB）与IndoBERT在印尼产品评论三分类情感分析上的性能，发现SVM优于微调模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 印尼电商平台用户评论激增，自动情感分析对衡量客户满意度和发现产品问题至关重要。现有方法中，传统机器学习虽简单但可能受限于特征表示，深度学习模型如BERT虽强但计算成本高且在小样本上可能表现不佳。本文旨在系统对比这两类方法在真实不平衡电商评论数据集上的性能，为实际部署提供参考。
light_analysis.method: 使用Tokopedia Product Reviews 2025数据集进行三分类情感分析。基线方法：TF-IDF特征提取后分别训练Logistic Regression、Linear SVM和Multinomial Naive Bayes，并采用平衡类权重处理不平衡。微调方法：使用IndoBERT (indobenchmark/indobert-base-p1) 并设计自定义加权交叉熵损失函数。由于计算限制，IndoBERT仅在数据子集上训练，而基线使用完整数据集。最后将模型部署为Gradio应用。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Linear SVM在所有指标上最佳：Accuracy 97.60%，Macro F1 0.5510，Weighted F1未明确给出但最优。IndoBERT的Accuracy为88.70%，Macro F1为0.5088。性能差距主要源于基线使用全量数据而IndoBERT仅用子集，导致Transformer未充分学习少数类。传统模型在捕获正面和负面情绪上更有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文系统对比了传统ML和Transformer模型在印尼语评论情感分析上的性能，发现Linear SVM在给定实验条件下显著优于IndoBERT。这提示在实际应用中，考虑到计算成本和数据规模，传统模型仍是强有力的选择。未来工作可探索更有效的数据采样策略和优化Transformer的训练流程。

title: Mantis: Mamba-native Tuning is Efficient for 3D Point Cloud Foundation Models
abstract: Pre-trained 3D point cloud foundation models (PFMs) have demonstrated strong transferability across diverse downstream tasks. However, full fine-tuning these models is computationally expensive and storage-intensive. Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) offers a promising alternative, but existing PEFT approaches are primarily designed for Transformer-based backbones and rely on token-level prompting or feature transformation. Mamba-based backbones introduce a granularity mismatch between token-level adaptation and state-level sequence dynamics. Consequently, straightforward transfer of existing PEFT approaches to frozen Mamba backbones leads to substantial accuracy degradation and unstable optimization. To address this issue, we propose Mantis, the first Mamba-native PEFT framework for 3D PFMs. Specifically, a State-Aware Adapter (SAA) is introduced to inject lightweight task-conditioned control signals into selective state-space updates, enabling state-level adaptation while keeping the pre-trained backbone frozen. Moreover, different valid point cloud serializations are regularized by Dual-Serialization Consistency Distillation (DSCD), thereby reducing serialization-induced instability. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our Mantis achieves competitive performance with only about 5% trainable parameters. Our code is available at https://github.com/gzhhhhhhh/Mantis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个面向Mamba后端的参数高效微调框架Mantis，实现状态级适应并稳定优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练的3D点云基础模型迁移性强，但全微调计算和存储成本高。现有PEFT方法针对Transformer设计，用于Mamba后端存在粒度不匹配（token级与状态级），导致精度下降和优化不稳定。
light_analysis.method: 提出Mamba原生PEFT框架Mantis，包含状态感知适配器SAA，向选择性状态空间更新注入轻量任务条件控制信号，实现状态级适应；双序列化一致性蒸馏DSCD正则化不同有效点云序列化，减少序列化不稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上，Mantis仅用约5%可训练参数即达到与全微调竞争的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: Mantis为Mamba后端提供高效微调方案，减少计算存储需求，保持性能。代码已开源。潜在局限性在于可能需针对特定任务调参，未来可探索更广泛应用。

title: Learning Discriminative Signed Distance Functions from Multi-scale Level-of-detail Features for 3D Anomaly Detection
abstract: Detecting anomalies from 3D point clouds has received increasing attention in the field of computer vision, with some group-based or point-based methods achieving impressive results in recent years. However, learning accurate point-wise representations for 3D anomaly detection faces great challenges due to the large scale and sparsity of point clouds. In this study, a surface-based method is proposed for 3D anomaly detection, which learns a discriminative signed distance function using multi-scale level-of-detail features. We first present a Noisy Points Generation (NPG) module to generate different types of noise, thereby facilitating the learning of discriminative features by exposing abnormal points. Then, we introduce a Multi-scale Level-of-detail Feature (MLF) module to capture multi-scale information from a point cloud, which provides both fine-grained local and coarse-grained global feature information. Finally, we design an Implicit Surface Discrimination (ISD) module that leverages the extracted multi-scale features to learn an implicit surface representation of point clouds, which effectively trains a signed distance function to distinguish between abnormal and normal points. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves an average object-level AUROC of 92.1\% and 85.9\% on the Anomaly-ShapeNet and Real3D-AD datasets, outperforming the current best approach by 2.1\% and 3.6\%, respectively. Codes are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/DLF-3AD-DA61.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于判别符号距离函数的多尺度细节特征方法，用于3D点云异常检测，提升准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D点云异常检测面临点云规模大和稀疏性导致难以学习精确点级表示的问题。现有基于分组或点的方法虽有效，但仍有不足。本文旨在通过表面级方法学习更鲁棒的特征，以区分异常点与正常点。
light_analysis.method: 提出包含三个模块的框架：噪声点生成模块生成多类型噪声以暴露异常点；多尺度细节特征模块捕获细粒度局部和粗粒度全局信息；隐式表面判别模块利用多尺度特征学习隐式表面表示，训练符号距离函数区分异常点。
light_analysis.result: 在Anomaly-ShapeNet和Real3D-AD数据集上分别达到92.1%和85.9%的平均对象级AUROC，比当前最佳方法高2.1%和3.6%。代码已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的方法通过多尺度特征和隐式表面学习有效提升了3D点云异常检测性能。具有实际应用价值，未来可探索更高效的噪声生成策略或扩展到其他3D任务。

title: Quantum Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning via Variational Quantum Circuits
abstract: Reinforcement learning is one of the most challenging learning paradigms where efficacy and efficiency gains are extremely valuable. Hierarchical reinforcement learning is a variant that leverages temporal abstraction to structure decision-making. While parametrized quantum computations have shown success in non-hierarchical reinforcement learning, whether these advantages adapt to hierarchical decision-making remains a critical open question. In this work, we develop a hybrid hierarchical agent based on the option-critic architecture. This hybrid agent substitutes classical components with variational quantum circuits for feature extractors, option-value functions, termination functions, and intra-option policies. Evaluated on standard benchmarking environments, results show that a hybrid agent utilizing a quantum feature extractor can outperform classical baselines while saving up to 66\% trainable parameters. We also identify an architectural bottleneck that quantum option-value estimation severely degrades performance. Further ablation studies reveal how architectural choices of the quantum circuits affect performance. Our work establishes design principles for parameter-efficient hybrid hierarchical agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于变分量子电路的量子分层强化学习代理，在选项-评论家架构中替换经典组件，实现参数效率提升并超越经典基线。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习挑战性大，分层强化学习通过时间抽象提高效率。参数化量子计算在非分层任务中显示出优势，但其在分层决策中的适应性尚不明确。本文旨在探索量子电路能否增强分层代理的性能，并解决量化资源消耗问题。
light_analysis.method: 基于选项-评论家架构，用变分量子电路替代特征提取器、选项价值函数、终止函数和内部选项策略。在标准基准环境（如网格世界、连续控制）中训练和评估混合代理，通过消融研究分析不同设计选择的影响。
light_analysis.result: 混合代理使用量子特征提取器在多个任务上胜过经典基线，同时节省高达66%的可训练参数。然而，量子选项价值估计导致严重性能下降，消融实验揭示了电路架构（如层数、纠缠方式）对性能的关键作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了参数高效混合分层代理的设计原则，验证了量子电路在分层强化学习中的潜力。未来工作需解决量子选项价值估计瓶颈，并探索更高效的量子-经典协同架构。

title: MK-ResRecon: Multi-Kernel Residual Framework for Texture-Aware 3D MRI Refinement from Sparse 2D Slices
abstract: Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) acquisition remains a time-intensive and patient-straining process, as prolonged scan dura- tions increase the likelihood of motion artifacts, which degrade image quality and frequently require repeated scans. To address these chal- lenges, we propose a novel framework with two models MK-ResRecon and IdentityRefineNet3D to reconstruct high-fidelity 3D MRI volumes from sparsely sampled 2D slices-requiring only 12.5% of the axial slices for full resolution 3D reconstruction. MK-ResRecon predicts missing in- termediate 2D slices using a multi-kernel texture-aware loss, preserving fine anatomical details. IdentityRefineNet3D refines the predicted slices and the original sparse slices as a single 3D volume to obtain a smooth anatomical structure. We train the models on a large T1-sequence POST- contrast brain MRI dataset and evaluate on a large heterogeneous brain MRI cohort. The work provides accurate, hallucination-free, generaliz- able and clinically validated framework for 3D MRI reconstruction from highly sparse inputs and enables a clinically viable path towards faster and more patient-friendly MRI imaging.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MK-ResRecon和IdentityRefineNet3D框架，从仅12.5%的稀疏2D轴位切片重建高保真3D MRI体积，实现无幻觉、泛化性强的重建。
light_analysis.motivation: MRI采集耗时且易产生运动伪影，需重复扫描，患者体验差。现有方法从稀疏切片重建3D体积常存在幻觉、细节丢失或泛化性差的问题。本文旨在通过极稀疏采样（12.5%轴位切片）加速扫描，同时保证重建图像的解剖细节和临床可用性。
light_analysis.method: 提出双模型框架：MK-ResRecon采用多核纹理感知损失预测缺失中间2D切片，保留精细解剖细节；IdentityRefineNet3D将预测切片与原始稀疏切片整合为3D体积并精化，获得平滑解剖结构。在大型T1序列增强脑MRI数据集上训练，并在异质性脑MRI队列上评估。
light_analysis.result: 仅需12.5%轴位切片即可实现全分辨率3D重建，在异质性脑MRI队列上验证了准确性、无幻觉和泛化性。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但强调临床验证可行，为加快MRI扫描提供了有效路径。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架实现了从高度稀疏输入重建高保真3D MRI，通过多核纹理感知损失和精化网络避免了幻觉，具备良好泛化性。临床价值显著，可缩短扫描时间、改善患者体验。未来可扩展至其他序列或更极端的稀疏采样。

title: DynaTab: Dynamic Feature Ordering as Neural Rewiring for High-Dimensional Tabular Data
abstract: High-dimensional tabular data lacks a natural feature order, limiting the applicability of permutation-sensitive deep learning models. We propose DynaTab, a dynamic feature ordering-enabled architecture inspired by neural rewiring. We introduce a lightweight criterion that predicts when feature permutation will benefit a dataset by quantifying its intrinsic complexity. DynaTab dynamically reorders features via a neural rewiring algorithm and processes them through a compact, dynamic order-aware combination of separate learned positional embedding, importance-based gating, and masked attention layers, compatible with any sequence-sensitive backbone. Trained end-to-end with bespoke dynamic feature ordering (DFO) and dispersion losses, DynaTab achieves statistically significant gains, particularly on high-dimensional datasets, where it is benchmarked against 45 state-of-the-art baselines across 36 different real-world tabular datasets. Our results position DynaTab as a compelling new paradigm for high-dimensional tabular deep learning.
comment: This paper has been accepted for archival publication in the PMLR proceedings of the AAAI 2026 Neuro for AI \& AI for Neuro: Towards Multi-Modal Natural Intelligence (NeuroAI) Workshop, Code: https://github.com/zadid6pretam/DynaTab, PyPI: pip install dynatab

light_analysis.overview: 提出DynaTab，一种基于神经重连的动态特征排序架构，用于高维表格数据。
