light_analysis.motivation: 高维表格数据缺乏自然特征顺序，导致置换敏感的深度学习模型应用受限。现有方法无法有效处理这一缺陷，且对高维数据的复杂性缺乏适应性。因此，需要一种能动态调整特征顺序的架构，以提升模型在内在复杂度高的数据集上的性能。
light_analysis.method: DynaTab设计轻量级标准，用于预测特征置换对数据集的益处，并通过神经重连算法动态重排特征。它采用独立的可学习位置嵌入、基于重要性的门控和掩码注意力层，构成紧凑且动态顺序感知的组合，兼容任意序列敏感骨干网络。模型以端到端方式训练，包含自定义的动态特征排序（DFO）损失和分散损失。
light_analysis.result: DynaTab在36个真实世界表格数据集上，与45个最先进基线进行对比，取得了统计显著的性能提升，尤其在高维数据集上表现突出。实验表明，其动态特征排序策略有效改善了模型对高维数据的处理能力，超越了静态排序或固定顺序方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: DynaTab为高维表格深度学习提供了一种新范式，通过神经重连实现了特征动态排序，显著提升了模型性能。该工作为处理缺乏自然顺序的高维数据提供了有效方案，具有重要的学术价值和应用潜力。未来可探索更高效的排序预测机制及更广泛的数据集适用性。

title: Replacing Parameters with Preferences: Federated Alignment of Heterogeneous Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have broad potential in privacy-sensitive domains such as healthcare and finance, yet strict data-sharing constraints render centralized training infeasible. Federated Learning mitigates this issue by enabling decentralized training, but practical deployments face challenges due to client heterogeneity in computational resources, application requirements, and model architectures. Under extreme model and data heterogeneity, replacing parameter aggregation with preference-based collaboration offers a more suitable interface, as it eliminates the need for direct parameter or data exchange. Motivated by this, we propose MoR, a federated alignment framework that combines GRPO with Mixture-of-Rewards for heterogeneous VLMs. In MoR, each client locally trains a reward model from local preference annotations, capturing specific evaluation signals without exposing raw data. To combine these heterogeneous supervision signals, MoR introduces a Mixture-of-Rewards mechanism with learned routing, which adaptively fuses client reward models according to the input and alignment objective. The server then optimizes a base VLM using GRPO with a KL penalty to a reference model, enabling preference alignment without requiring client models to share architectures or parameters. Experiments on diverse public vision-language benchmarks demonstrate that MoR consistently outperforms federated alignment baselines in generalization and cross-client adaptability. Our approach provides a scalable solution for privacy-preserving alignment of heterogeneous VLMs under federated settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MoR框架，通过结合GRPO与混合奖励机制，实现无需参数交换的异构视觉语言模型联邦对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在医疗、金融等隐私敏感领域有广泛应用，但集中训练受限于数据共享约束。联邦学习虽实现去中心化训练，却面临客户端在计算资源、应用需求和模型架构上的高度异构性。传统参数聚合方法在极端异构下效率低下，需要一种基于偏好而非参数交换的协作机制，以保护隐私并适应异构环境。
light_analysis.method: MoR框架中，每个客户端利用本地偏好标注训练奖励模型，避免原始数据泄露。服务器端引入混合奖励机制（Mixture-of-Rewards），通过可学习的路由网络根据输入和对齐目标自适应融合各客户端奖励信号。随后服务器使用GRPO算法并附加KL惩罚项优化基础视觉语言模型，实现偏好对齐，整个过程无需客户端共享模型架构或参数。
light_analysis.result: 在多个公开视觉语言基准数据集上，MoR在泛化性能和跨客户端适应性方面均优于现有的联邦对齐基线方法。实验表明，该方法有效应对了模型异构和数据异构挑战，实现了更优的偏好对齐效果，具体性能提升幅度因任务而异（摘要未给出精确数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: MoR为联邦环境下异构视觉语言模型的隐私保护对齐提供了一种可扩展的解决方案，通过偏好替代参数聚合，消除了架构和参数共享需求。该工作兼具学术价值（拓展了联邦学习在异构场景下的应用）和实际意义（适用于隐私敏感领域）。未来可探索更复杂的奖励融合策略或将其扩展至多模态任务。

title: FIBER: A Differentially Private Optimizer with Filter-Aware Innovation Bias Correction
abstract: Differentially private (DP) training protects individual examples by adding noise to gradients, but the injected noise interacts nontrivially with adaptive optimizers. Recent DP methods temporally filter privatized gradients to reduce variance; however, filtering also changes the DP noise statistics seen by AdamW's second-moment accumulator. As a result, bias corrections derived for unfiltered DP noise, such as subtracting sigma_w squared, can become miscalibrated when filtering is present.   We propose FiBeR, a DP optimizer designed for temporally filtered privatized gradients. FiBeR (i) performs denoising in innovation space by filtering the residual stream and integrating it to form the filtered gradient estimate, (ii) decouples the two-point observation geometry from the innovation gain to enable independent tuning, and (iii) introduces a filter-aware second-moment calibration that subtracts the attenuated DP noise contribution A(omega) sigma_w squared, where A(omega) is derived in closed form for the innovation filter and can be computed for general stable linear filters.   Across vision and language benchmarks, FiBeR consistently demonstrates substantial improvements in the performance of DP optimizers, surpassing state-of-the-art results under equivalent privacy constraints on multiple tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FiBeR，一种针对时间滤波私有化梯度的差分隐私优化器，通过创新空间去噪和滤波感知的二阶矩校准，显著提升DP训练性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 差分隐私训练中，为梯度添加噪声会与自适应优化器（如AdamW）复杂交互。现有方法通过时间滤波降低私有化梯度方差，但滤波改变了二阶矩累积器看到的噪声统计量，导致基于未滤波噪声的偏差校正（如减去σ_w²）不再准确。因此需要设计专门针对滤波后私有化梯度的优化器，以解决偏差问题并提升性能。
light_analysis.method: FiBeR优化器包含三个关键创新：(i) 在创新空间进行去噪，通过滤波残差流并积分形成滤波梯度估计；(ii) 解耦两点观测几何与创新增益，实现独立调优；(iii) 引入滤波感知的二阶矩校准，减去衰减的DP噪声贡献A(ω)σ_w²，其中A(ω)对创新滤波器有闭式解，并可推广到一般稳定线性滤波器。这些设计共同修正滤波引起的统计偏差。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉和语言基准任务上，FiBeR一致地显著提升DP优化器性能，在多个任务上超越同等隐私约束下的现有最优结果。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调其超越state-of-the-art的改进，表明该方法在隐私保护训练中具有实际优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: FiBeR通过创新空间去噪和滤波感知校正，有效解决了时间滤波下DP优化器的偏差问题，显著提升性能。学术上深化了对DP与自适应优化器交互的理解；实践上为隐私保护训练提供了更高效的优化器。未来可探索更一般滤波形式下的闭式解，或扩展到其他自适应优化器。

title: Adaptive Dual-Path Framework for Covert Semantic Communication
abstract: This paper proposes a novel adaptive dual-path framework for covert semantic communication (SemCom), which integrates covert information transmission with task-oriented semantic coding. Unlike conventional covert communication methods that embed hidden messages through power-domain signal superposition, our framework embeds covert data within task-specific features via semantic-level intrinsic encoding. This new architecture introduces dual encoding paths with adaptive block selection: an Explicit path for public task execution and a Stego path that jointly encodes both public and covert information through contrastive representation alignment. A Gumbel-Softmax enabled adaptive path selection mechanism dynamically activates network blocks based on task require- ments. We formulate a multi-objective optimization framework that simultaneously ensures accurate semantic understanding and reliable covert transmission. We rigorously evaluate our framework's security against a powerful, independently trained attacker. Experimental results on the Cityscapes dataset demon- strate a state-of-the-art level of covertness: our method suppresses the attacker's detection accuracy to a near-random guessing level of 56.12%. This robust security is achieved while simultaneously maintaining superior performance on the primary semantic tasks compared to the baselines.
comment: 16 oages, 13 figures, Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Communications

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应双路径框架，通过语义级内在编码和对比学习实现隐蔽语义通信，同时保证隐密性与主任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统隐蔽通信依赖功率域信号叠加，易被检测且影响主任务性能。在语义通信中，现有方法缺乏高效、安全的隐蔽信息嵌入机制。本文旨在设计一种新框架，在保持主任务语义理解的同时，实现抵御强大攻击者的隐蔽传输，并解决多目标优化问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出双路径编码网络：显式路径执行公共语义任务，隐写路径通过对比表示对齐联合编码公共和隐蔽信息。引入Gumbel-Softmax实现自适应块选择，动态激活路径。构建多目标优化框架，平衡语义准确性与隐蔽传输可靠性。在Cityscapes数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在Cityscapes数据集上，攻击者检测精度被抑制至56.12%（接近随机猜测），达到最先进的隐密性。同时，主语义任务性能优于基线方法，实现了安全与性能的双重提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功实现高隐密性语义通信，为任务导向的隐蔽通信提供了新范式。学术上验证了语义级嵌入优于传统信号叠加的实际可行性，应用上可用于安全视频传输等场景。未来可探索更复杂的攻击场景和动态任务需求。

title: Geolocating News about Extreme Climate Events: A Comparative Analysis of Off-the-Shelf Tools for Toponym Identification in German
abstract: Determining the geolocation of extreme climate events and disasters in texts is a common problem in climate impact and adaptation research. Named-entity recognition (NER) tools are typically used to identify a pool of toponyms that serve as candidate event locations. In this study, we conduct a comparative analysis of three off-the-shelf NER tools, namely Flair, Spacy and Stanza. We describe and quantify differences between their outputs for German news articles and evaluate them extrinsically based on three methods to determine the country where events took place. We show how their contrasts are propagated into downstream tasks and can yield distinct decisions about a document's geographical focus, which, in turn, can impact conclusions about countries' prominence in German media.
comment: Presented at the Fourth International Workshop on Geographic Information Extraction from Texts (GeoExT) at ECIR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 比较分析Flair、Spacy和Stanza三种现成NER工具在德语新闻文章中识别极端气候事件地理位置的性能差异及其对下游任务的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 确定极端气候事件地理定位是气候影响与适应研究的常见问题。现有NER工具虽能识别候选地点，但不同工具的输出存在差异，可能导致下游任务（如确定事件发生国家）的决策不一致，进而影响关于国家在媒体报道中重要性的结论。
light_analysis.method: 对三种现成NER工具Flair、Spacy和Stanza进行对比分析，针对德语新闻文章识别地名。通过三种方法外部评估工具输出，量化差异，并观察这些差异如何传播到下游任务（如确定文档地理焦点）中。
light_analysis.result: 工具间输出存在显著差异，这些差异被传播至下游任务，导致关于文档地理焦点的不同决策，进而可能影响对各国在德国媒体中突出程度的结论。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但表明工具选择会显著影响结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究强调了在选择NER工具进行极端气候事件地理定位时需谨慎，因为工具差异可能改变下游分析结论。未来工作可探索更鲁棒的方法或结合多种工具以减小偏差，提升地理定位准确性。

title: Learning to Theorize the World from Observation
abstract: What does it mean to understand the world? Contemporary world models often operationalize understanding as accurate future prediction in latent or observation space. Developmental cognitive science, however, suggests a different view: human understanding emerges through the construction of internal theories of how the world works, even before mature language is acquired. Inspired by this theory-building view of cognition, we introduce Learning-to-Theorize, a learning paradigm for inferring explicit explanatory theories of the world from raw, non-textual observations. We instantiate this paradigm with the Neural Theorizer (NEO), a probabilistic neural model that induces latent programs as a learned Language of Thought and executes them through a shared transition model. In NEO, a theory is represented as an executable, compositional program whose learned primitives can be systematically recombined to explain novel phenomena. Experiments show that this formulation enables explanation-driven generalization, allowing observations to be understood in terms of the programs that generate them.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Learning-to-Theorize学习范式及其实例化模型NEO，从原始观察中学习显式的解释性理论，实现基于程序生成的解释驱动泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有世界模型将理解等同于未来预测，忽略了人类通过构建内部理论理解世界的方式。受发展认知科学启发，需要一种能从非文本观测中自动推断显式、可组合解释性理论的学习范式，以更贴近人类认知机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出Neural Theorizer (NEO)，一种概率神经模型。它学习一个潜在的“思维语言”，其原语通过共享转移模型组合成可执行的程序作为理论。模型通过诱导程序来生成观测数据，并支持原语的重组以解释新现象，实现解释驱动而非单纯预测驱动。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明NEO能够从原始观测中学习到有意义的理论，并基于这些理论解释新观测。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调模型实现了解释驱动的泛化，即观测被理解为生成它们的程序，而非仅预测未来。
light_analysis.conclusion: NEO展示了从观测中学习显式理论的可能，弥合了机器学习与认知科学中理论构建的鸿沟。其价值在于提供一种可解释、可组合的世界理解方式，未来可拓展至更复杂领域，但当前可能受限于程序搜索效率和原语设计。

title: Geometry over Density: Few-Shot Cross-Domain OOD Detection
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection identifies test samples that fall outside a model's training distribution, a capability critical for safe deployment in high-stakes applications. Standard OOD detectors are trained on a specific in-distribution (ID) dataset and detect deviations from that single domain. In contrast, we study few-shot cross-domain OOD detection: given a \emph{single} pre-trained model, can we perform OOD detection on \emph{arbitrary} new ID-OOD task pairs using only a handful of ID samples at inference time, with no additional training? We propose \textbf{UFCOD}, a unified framework that achieves this goal through information-geometric analysis of diffusion trajectories. Our key insight is that diffusion noise predictions are score functions (gradients of log-density), and we extract two energy features: \emph{Path Energy} (integrated score magnitude) and \emph{Dynamics Energy} (score smoothness), that form a discrete Sobolev norm capturing how samples interact with the learned diffusion process. The central contribution is a \textbf{train-once, deploy-anywhere} paradigm: a diffusion model trained on a single dataset (e.g., CelebA) serves as a universal feature extractor for OOD detection across semantically unrelated domains (e.g., CIFAR-10, SVHN, Textures). At deployment, each new task requires only $\sim$100 unlabeled ID samples for inference: no retraining, no fine-tuning, no task-specific adaptation. Using 100 ID samples per task, UFCOD achieves 93.7\% average AUROC across 12 cross-domain benchmarks, competitive with methods trained on 50k--163k samples, demonstrating $\sim$500$\times$ improvement in sample efficiency. See our code in https://github.com/lili0415/UFCOD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UFCOD框架，通过扩散轨迹的信息几何分析实现少样本跨域OOD检测，仅需少量ID样本即可适配任意新任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有OOD检测方法针对特定ID数据集训练，需要大量样本，无法高效适应任意新ID-OOD任务对。在安全关键应用中，需模型快速部署到未知领域，但现有方法依赖重训练或微调，样本效率低。本研究旨在实现无需额外训练的少样本跨域OOD检测，提升实际可用性。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法基于扩散模型噪声预测的得分函数，提取Path Energy（积分得分幅度）和Dynamics Energy（得分平滑性）两种能量特征，构成离散Sobolev范数，刻画样本与扩散过程的交互。采用train-once, deploy-anywhere范式，用单一数据集（如CelebA）训练扩散模型作为通用特征提取器，在测试时仅需约100个未标记ID样本即可完成新任务的OOD检测，无需微调。
light_analysis.result: 在12个跨域基准上，使用100个ID样本的UFCOD平均AUROC达93.7%，与使用5万-16.3万样本训练的专用方法性能相当，样本效率提升约500倍。实验覆盖语义无关域（如CIFAR-10、SVHN、Textures），验证了方法的泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出首个统一少样本跨域OOD检测框架，通过扩散模型几何特征实现高效迁移，显著降低样本需求。学术上揭示了得分函数在跨域特征提取中的潜力，实用上为动态部署提供高效方案。未来可探索更优能量定义及扩展至其他生成模型。

title: Robust Agent Compensation (RAC): Teaching AI Agents to Compensate
abstract: We present Robust Agent Compensation (RAC), a log-based recovery paradigm (providing a safety net) implemented through an architectural extension that can be applied to most Agent frameworks to support reliable executions (avoiding unintended side effects). Users can choose to enable RAC without changing their current agent code (e.g., LangGraph agents). The proposed approach can be implemented in most existing agent frameworks via their existing extension points. We present an implementation based on LangChain, demonstrate its viability through the $τ$-bench and REALM-Bench, and show that when solving complex problems, RAC is 1.5-8X or more better in both latency and token economy compared to state-of-the-art LLM-based recovery approaches.
comment: Accepted at ACM Conference on AI and Agentic Systems (ACM CAIS 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出Robust Agent Compensation (RAC)，一种日志恢复范式，通过架构扩展提升AI代理执行的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI代理框架在执行复杂任务时容易产生意外副作用，缺乏可靠的恢复机制。基于LLM的恢复方法在延迟和token消耗上效率低下。RAC旨在提供一种无需修改现有代码即可集成的安全网，实现高效、可靠的错误恢复，避免部署中的风险。
light_analysis.method: RAC是一种基于日志的恢复范式，作为架构扩展集成到现有代理框架（如LangGraph）中。用户无需更改代码，通过框架扩展点即可启用。实现基于LangChain，利用执行日志检测异常并补偿错误行为，确保任务可靠执行。
light_analysis.result: 在τ-bench和REALM-Bench基准测试中，RAC在复杂问题求解时，相较于最先进的基于LLM的恢复方法，延迟和token消耗降低1.5-8倍或更多，显著提升效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAC为AI代理提供了一种轻量级、高效的错误恢复机制，易于集成到现有框架，增强了执行可靠性。未来可扩展至更多代理框架，并探索更复杂的补偿策略。

title: Discovering Reinforcement Learning Interfaces with Large Language Models
abstract: Reinforcement learning systems rely on environment interfaces that specify observations and reward functions, yet constructing these interfaces for new tasks often requires substantial manual effort. While recent work has automated reward design using large language models (LLMs), these approaches assume fixed observations and do not address the broader challenge of synthesizing complete task interfaces. We study RL task interface discovery from raw simulator state, where both observation mappings and reward functions must be generated. We propose LIMEN (Code available at https://github.com/Lossfunk/LIMEN), a LLM guided evolutionary framework that produces candidate interfaces as executable programs and iteratively refines them using policy training feedback. Across novel discrete gridworld tasks and continuous control domains spanning locomotion and manipulation, joint evolution of observations and rewards discovers effective interfaces given only a trajectory-level success metric, while optimizing either component alone fails on at least one domain. These results demonstrate that automatic construction of RL interfaces from raw state can substantially reduce manual engineering and that observation and reward components often benefit from co-design, as single-component optimization fails catastrophically on at least one domain in our evaluation suite.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LIMEN框架，利用LLM引导进化从原始状态自动发现强化学习任务接口（观察映射和奖励函数）。
light_analysis.motivation: 构建强化学习环境接口（观察和奖励函数）通常需要大量手工设计。现有工作仅用LLM自动化奖励设计，但假设观察固定，未解决完整接口合成问题。因此需要从原始模拟器状态自动生成观察映射和奖励函数，减少人工工程成本。
light_analysis.method: 提出LIMEN框架，结合大语言模型引导的进化搜索。将候选接口表示为可执行程序，利用策略训练反馈迭代优化。在离散网格世界和连续控制（ locomotion 和 manipulation ）任务中联合进化观察和奖励组件，仅依赖轨迹级成功指标。
light_analysis.result: 在多种任务中，联合进化观察和奖励成功发现有效接口；单独优化观察或奖励在一个或多个领域彻底失败。表明联合设计优于单组件优化，能够自动构建可工作的RL接口，显著减少手动设计工作。
light_analysis.conclusion: 自动从原始状态构建RL接口可行且有效，观察和奖励的协同设计至关重要。该研究推进了任务接口自动合成，降低强化学习应用门槛。未来可扩展至更复杂环境或结合其他自动设计方法。

title: TsallisPGD: Adaptive Gradient Weighting for Adversarial Attacks on Semantic Segmentation
abstract: Attacking semantic segmentation models is significantly harder than image classification models because an attacker must flip thousands of pixel predictions simultaneously. Standard pixel-wise cross-entropy (CE) is ill-suited to this setting: it tends to overemphasize already-misclassified pixels, which slows optimization and overstates model robustness. To address these issues, we introduce TsallisPGD, an adversarial attack built on the Tsallis cross-entropy, a generalization of CE parameterized by $q$, which adaptively reshapes the gradient landscape by controlling gradient concentration across pixels. By varying $q$, we steer the attack toward pixels at different confidence levels. We first show that no single fixed-$q$ is universally optimal, as its effectiveness depends on the dataset, model architecture, and perturbation budget. Motivated by this, we propose a dynamic $q$-schedule that sweeps $q$ during optimization. Extensive experiments on Cityscapes, Pascal VOC, and ADE20K show that TsallisPGD, using a single validation-selected schedule, achieves the best average attack rank across all evaluated settings and improves over CEPGD, SegPGD, CosPGD, JSPGD, and MaskedPGD in reducing accuracy and mIoU on both standard and robust models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TsallisPGD攻击方法，利用Tsallis交叉熵自适应调整梯度权重，并通过动态q调度提升语义分割对抗攻击效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 攻击语义分割模型需要同时翻转数千像素预测，标准交叉熵损失会过度强调已误分类像素，导致优化缓慢且高估模型鲁棒性。现有方法缺乏对梯度集中度的自适应控制，无法在不同数据集、模型和扰动预算下达到最优。因此需要一种能动态调整梯度权重的攻击策略，以提高攻击效率和通用性。
light_analysis.method: TsallisPGD基于Tsallis交叉熵，参数q控制梯度在像素间的集中程度，从而自适应调整梯度权重。首先证明固定q无法通用最优，进而提出动态q调度，在优化过程中扫描q值。攻击流程类似PGD，但损失函数替换为Tsallis交叉熵，并随迭代调整q。实验在Cityscapes、Pascal VOC和ADE20K上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集和模型上，使用单一验证选择的q调度，TsallisPGD在所有评估设置中取得最佳平均攻击排名。与CEPGD、SegPGD、CosPGD、JSPGD和MaskedPGD相比，TsallisPGD在降低准确率和mIoU上表现更优，无论是标准模型还是鲁棒模型。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称全面超越基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: TsallisPGD通过动态调整梯度权重有效解决了语义分割对抗攻击中标准交叉熵的局限。该方法具有通用性，适应不同数据集和模型。未来可探索更复杂的q调度策略或结合其他攻击技术。局限性在于调度选择依赖验证集，可能增加计算开销。

title: GRPO-TTA: Test-Time Visual Tuning for Vision-Language Models via GRPO-Driven Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has recently shown strong performance in post-training large language models and vision-language models. It raises a question of whether the GRPO also significantly promotes the test-time adaptation (TTA) of vision language models. In this paper, we propose Group Relative Policy Optimization for Test-Time Adaptation (GRPO-TTA), which adapts GRPO to the TTA setting by reformulating class-specific prompt prediction as a group-wise policy optimization problem. Specifically, we construct output groups by sampling top-K class candidates from CLIP similarity distributions, enabling probability-driven optimization without access to ground-truth labels. Moreover, we design reward functions tailored to test-time adaptation, including alignment rewards and dispersion rewards, to guide effective visual encoder tuning. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that GRPO-TTA consistently outperforms existing test-time adaptation methods, with notably larger performance gains under natural distribution shifts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 GRPO-TTA，将 GRPO 扩展到视觉语言模型的测试时适应，通过组策略优化和定制奖励函数，有效提升视觉编码器的调优性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的测试时适应方法在分布偏移下性能有限，而 GRPO 在模型后训练中表现出色。本文旨在探索 GRPO 是否能显著促进视觉语言模型的测试时适应，解决无标签情况下视觉编码器调优的难题。
light_analysis.method: GRPO-TTA 将类别提示预测重构为组策略优化问题，通过从 CLIP 相似度分布中采样 top-K 类别构建输出组，实现概率驱动优化。并设计了对齐奖励和分散奖励，分别鼓励预测与视觉特征一致及增加类别间区分度，从而指导视觉编码器的调优。无需真实标签。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，GRPO-TTA 在测试时适应中一致优于现有方法，尤其在自然分布偏移下取得显著更大的性能增益。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了超越基线方法的稳健提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: GRPO-TTA 成功将 GRPO 应用于测试时适应，通过组策略优化和定制奖励函数有效提升了视觉语言模型在分布偏移下的适应能力。该工作为无标签的测试时调优提供了新思路，未来可探索更复杂的奖励设计或结合其他视觉编码器。

title: PODiff: Latent Diffusion in Proper Orthogonal Decomposition Space for Scientific Super-Resolution
abstract: Probabilistic super-resolution of high-dimensional spatial fields using diffusion models is often computationally prohibitive due to the cost of operating directly in pixel space. We propose PODiff, a structured conditional generative framework that performs diffusion in a fixed, variance-ordered Proper Orthogonal Decomposition (POD) coefficient space, exploiting the orthogonality of POD modes to impose an interpretable, variance-ordered latent geometry. This design enables efficient ensemble generation, preserves dominant spatial structure, and yields spatially interpretable, well-calibrated uncertainty at substantially lower computational cost. We evaluate PODiff on sea surface temperature downscaling over the West Australian coast and on a controlled advection-diffusion benchmark. PODiff achieves reconstruction accuracy comparable to pixel-space diffusion while requiring significantly less memory and producing more reliable uncertainty estimates than deterministic and Monte Carlo Dropout baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PODiff，在POD系数空间进行潜在扩散，实现高效且可解释的科学超分辨率。
light_analysis.motivation: 高维空间场的概率超分辨率中，直接在像素空间使用扩散模型计算成本高昂。现有方法无法兼顾计算效率、空间结构保持和不确定性校准。因此需要一种既能降低计算开销又能保持空间可解释性和可靠不确定性的方法。
light_analysis.method: PODiff在固定、方差有序的POD系数空间中执行扩散过程，利用POD模式的正交性构建方差有序的潜在几何。该框架支持高效集成生成，保留主导空间结构，并在显著降低计算成本的同时产生空间可解释、校准良好的不确定性。
light_analysis.result: 在西澳大利亚海岸的海表温度降尺度任务和受控对流扩散基准上评估，PODiff的重构精度与像素空间扩散相当，但内存需求显著降低，且相比确定性方法和蒙特卡洛Dropout基线，不确定性估计更可靠。
light_analysis.conclusion: PODiff为科学超分辨率提供了一种高效、可解释的生成框架，降低了计算开销并提升了不确定性校准。未来可扩展到更多科学领域，并探索其他降维策略。

title: MASRA: MLLM-Assisted Semantic-Relational Consistent Alignment for Video Temporal Grounding
abstract: Video Temporal Grounding (VTG) faces a cross-modal semantic gap that often leads to background features being incorrectly aligned with the query, while directly matching the query to moments results in insufficient discriminability and consistency of temporal semantics. To address this issue, we propose MLLM-Assisted Semantic-Relational Consistent Alignment (MASRA), a training-time MLLM-based optimization framework for VTG. MASRA leverages an MLLM during training to produce two forms of textual priors, namely event-level descriptions with temporal spans and clip-level captions, and instantiates two MLLM-assisted alignments. Event Semantic Temporal Alignment (ESTA) aligns temporal context with event semantics to explicitly strengthen the correspondence between semantics and temporal events and improve span-level separability. Local Relational Consistency Alignment (LRCA) constructs a textual relation matrix derived from clip-level captions and aligns it with the temporal feature similarity matrix in the model, enhancing temporal consistency while capturing local structural information. MASRA includes two simple supporting modules, semantic-guided enhancement and second-order relational attention, to better utilize the learned semantic context and relational structure. Moreover, we introduce Decoupled Alignment Interaction (DAI) with a context-aware codebook to adaptively absorb query-irrelevant semantics and alleviate the cross-modal gap. The MLLM is only invoked during training and is not used at inference. Extensive experiments show that MASRA outperforms existing methods, and ablation studies validate its effectiveness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MLLM辅助的语义-关系一致性对齐框架MASRA，通过训练时利用大语言模型生成文本先验并执行双重对齐，提升视频时序定位的语义区分性和时间一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频时序定位面临跨模态语义鸿沟，导致背景特征与查询错误对齐，而直接匹配查询与时刻的方法难以保证时间语义的区分性和一致性。现有方法忽略事件级语义和局部关系结构，亟需一种能显式强化语义-事件对应并捕获局部时序关系的方法，以提升定位精度。
light_analysis.method: MASRA引入MLLM在训练时生成事件级描述和片段级字幕，并实例化两个对齐模块：事件语义时间对齐（ESTA）将时间上下文与事件语义对齐，增强跨度级可分离性；局部关系一致性对齐（LRCA）构建文本关系矩阵并与模型的时间特征相似性矩阵对齐，保持时序一致性。同时，设计解耦对齐交互（DAI）模块，利用上下文感知码本吸收查询无关语义。MLLM仅在训练阶段调用。
light_analysis.result: 在多个视频时序定位基准数据集上，MASRA超越现有方法，消融实验验证了各模块的有效性。具体性能提升（如准确率或召回率）摘要未明确说明，但整体优于SOTA方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MASRA通过MLLM辅助的语义-关系对齐有效缓解跨模态语义鸿沟，提升视频时序定位性能。该框架具有通用性，可集成到现有模型。未来工作可探索更高效的MLLM利用方式或扩展到其他跨模态任务。

title: Enhancing Self-Supervised Talking Head Forgery Detection via a Training-Free Dual-System Framework
abstract: Supervised talking head forgery detection faces severe generalization challenges due to the continuous evolution of generators. By reducing reliance on generator-specific forgery patterns, self-supervised detectors offer stronger cross-generator robustness. However, existing research has mainly focused on building stronger detectors, while the discriminative capacity of trained detectors remains insufficiently exploited. In particular, for score-based self-supervised detectors, the limited discriminative ability on hard cases is often reflected in unreliable anomaly ordering, leaving room for further refinement. Motivated by this observation, we draw inspiration from the dual-system theory of human cognition and propose a Training-Free Dual-System (TFDS) framework to further exploit the latent discriminative capacity of existing score-based self-supervised detectors. TFDS treats anomaly-like scores as the basis of System-1, using lightweight threshold-based routing to partition samples into confident and uncertain subsets. System-2 then revisits only the uncertain subset, performing fine-grained evidence-guided reasoning to refine the relative ordering of ambiguous samples within the original score distribution. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements across datasets and perturbation settings, with the gains arising mainly from corrected ordering within the uncertain subset. These findings show that existing self-supervised talking head forgery detectors still contain underexploited discriminative cues that can be effectively unlocked through training-free dual-system reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需训练的双系统框架(TFDS)，通过轻量路由和细粒度推理提升自监督虚假头部检测器的判别能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自监督虚假头部检测器在硬样本上判别能力不足，表现为不可靠的异常排序，而现有研究主要集中于构建更强检测器，未充分挖掘已训练检测器的潜在判别线索。受人类认知双系统理论启发，旨在无需额外训练的情况下提升现有分数型自监督检测器的性能。
light_analysis.method: TFDS框架将自监督检测器的异常分数作为系统1的基础，使用轻量级阈值路由将样本分为置信和不确定子集；系统2仅对不确定子集进行细粒度证据引导推理，改善原始分数分布中模糊样本的相对排序。该方法无需重新训练模型，与现有分数型自监督检测器兼容。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集和扰动设置下实验表明，TFDS框架带来一致性改进，性能提升主要源于对不确定子集排序的校正。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调改进显著且稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了现有自监督虚假头部检测器中仍存在未充分利用的判别线索，通过无需训练的双系统推理可有效解锁。该框架具有高实用价值，可直接应用于现有检测器，提升跨生成器泛化能力。潜在局限是依赖阈值选择，未来工作可探索自适应路由策略。

title: Graph Reconstruction from Differentially Private GNN Explanations
abstract: Regulatory frameworks such as GDPR increasingly require that ML predictions be accompanied by post-hoc explanations, even when raw data and trained models cannot be released. Differential privacy (DP) is the standard mitigation for the residual privacy risk of releasing these explanations. We show that DP is not sufficient: an adversary observing only DP-perturbed GNN explanations can reconstruct hidden graph structure with high accuracy. Our attack, PRIVX, exploits the fact that the Gaussian DP mechanism is a single DDPM forward step at known noise level σ(ε), recasting reconstruction as reverse diffusion conditioned on the corrupted signal, a principled Bayesian denoiser under known DP corruption. We formalise a stratified adversary model parameterised by (M, \hatε, \hatδ, S, ρ) that interpolates between oblivious and oracle attackers, and derive endpoint-matched two-sided bounds on reconstruction AUC. For practitioners, we provide regime-stratified guidance on explainer choice: on homophilic graphs, neighbourhood-aggregating explainers (GraphLIME, GNNExplainer) leak more structure than per-node gradient explainers under the same DP budget; on strongly heterophilic graphs the ordering reverses. We introduce PRIVF as an auxiliary diagnostic sharing the same diffusion backbone to decompose leakage into explainer-induced and intrinsic graph-distribution components. Experiments across seven benchmarks, three DP mechanisms, and three GNN backbones show PRIVX achieves AUC above 0.7 at ε = 5 on five of seven datasets, with the attack succeeding well within typically deployed privacy budgets.

light_analysis.overview: 发现差分隐私不足以保护GNN解释的图结构隐私，提出PRIVX攻击方法和PRIVF诊断工具，实现高精度图结构重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 监管框架要求ML预测附带事后解释，但即使原始数据和模型不发布，释放解释仍存在隐私风险。差分隐私（DP）被视为标准缓解措施，但现有研究默认DP足够安全。本文指出DP并不充分：攻击者仅观察DP扰动的GNN解释即可高精度重建隐藏图结构，挑战了DP在解释隐私保护中的有效性假设。
light_analysis.method: 提出PRIVX攻击方法，利用高斯DP机制是已知噪声水平的DDPM前向步骤，将图结构重建视为基于扩散模型逆向过程的条件去噪。形式化分层对手模型（M, ε̂, δ̂, S, ρ），推导重建AUC的端点匹配两侧界。引入PRIVF辅助诊断，共享扩散骨干以分解泄露为解释器诱导和固有图分布分量。实验在7个基准数据集、3种DP机制和3种GNN骨干上评估。
light_analysis.result: PRIVX在ε=5时在7个数据集中的5个上达到AUC>0.7，攻击成功于典型部署的隐私预算内。同质图上邻居聚合解释器（GraphLIME, GNNExplainer）比逐节点梯度解释器泄露更多结构；强异质图上顺序反转。PRIVF有效分离解释器与分布导致的泄露。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次证明DP对GNN解释的隐私保护不足，提出有效的攻击和诊断方法，并为不同图同质性下的解释器选择提供指导。学术上挑战了DP在解释场景的安全性认知，实践上帮助设计更鲁棒的隐私保护机制。局限性在于攻击依赖已知DP参数，未来可探索自适应防御。

title: From prompting to evidence-based translation: A RAG+prompt system for Japanese-Chinese translation and its pedagogical potential
abstract: Large language models perform well on high-resource pairs but are less reliable for Japanese-Chinese sentences containing noun-modifying clause constructions (NMCCs). This study evaluates a retrieval-augmented generation RAG+Prompt translation system that integrates linguistic analysis, embedding-based retrieval, prompt construction, and LLM generation without modifying the base model. The analysis module outputs A1 (inner vs. outer NMCC) and A2 (risk predictions: lexical choice/NMCC handling/word order/style/register); top-k = 5 similar Ja-Zh examples (L2 distance) and A1/A2 are inserted into an enhanced prompt. Using GPT-4o and a 66-sentence test set, we compare six knowledge-base sizes (0/100/200/500/1,000/2,000). Macro-averaged sentence-level BLEU (1-4-gram with brevity penalty; cased; Chinese at the character level) is the sole metric. Mean BLEU increases from 24.28 at 0 (RAG disabled) to 29.96 at 2,000 (+5.68; +23.4%). The upward trend holds across sizes, with larger knowledge bases yielding higher scores. We conclude that the RAG+Prompt translation system improves Ja-Zh translation of sentences containing NMCCs in an interpretable and auditable manner. Limitations include one base model, one metric, and reliance on published texts and commercial APIs; future work will broaden genres, language pairs, and evaluation metrics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种RAG+Prompt系统，通过检索增强和提示工程，显著提升日语-汉语中名词修饰从句结构的翻译质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在高资源语言对上表现良好，但对日语-汉语中包含名词修饰从句结构（NMCCs）的句子翻译不可靠。现有方法缺乏可解释性和可审计性，因此需要一种结合语言分析、检索和提示的增强翻译系统。
light_analysis.method: 系统集成语言分析（输出NMCC类型A1和风险预测A2）、嵌入检索（top-k=5相似例子）、提示构建和LLM生成（GPT-4o）。测试集66句，比较知识库大小0-2000，采用BLEU（1-4-gram，含长度惩罚，字符级）评估。
light_analysis.result: 宏观平均BLEU从24.28（无RAG）提升至29.96（知识库2000），增加5.68（+23.4%）。上升趋势一致，更大知识库获得更高得分，证实RAG+Prompt系统有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该系统以可解释和可审计的方式改进含NMCC的日汉翻译。局限性包括单一模型、单一指标和依赖商业API。未来将扩展体裁、语言对和评估指标。

title: Local Truncation Error-Guided Neural ODEs for Large Scale Traffic Forecasting
abstract: Spatiotemporal forecasting in physical systems, such as large-scale traffic networks, requires modeling a dual dynamic: continuous macroscopic rhythms and discrete, unpredictable microscopic shocks. While Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (ODEs) excel at capturing smooth evolution, their inherent Lipschitz continuity constraints inevitably cause severe over-smoothing when confronting abrupt anomalies. Recent physics-informed methods attempt to bypass this by penalizing numerical integration errors to enforce manifold smoothness. However, we mathematically reveal that such rigid regularization inherently triggers gradient conflicts and ``attention collapse,'' stripping the model of its sensitivity to anomalies. To resolve this continuity-shock dilemma, we propose Local Truncation Error-Guided Neural ODEs (LTE-ODE). Rather than treating numerical error as a nuisance to be eliminated, we innovatively repurpose the Local Truncation Error (LTE) as an unsupervised forward inductive bias. By mapping the LTE into a dynamic spatial attention mask, our architecture gracefully preserves high-precision continuous ODE evolution in stable regions, while adaptively triggering a discrete compensation branch exclusively at shock points. Trained purely end-to-end without manifold penalties, LTE-ODE achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple large-scale benchmarks, exhibiting exceptional robustness against highly non-linear fluctuations. Furthermore, our ablation on integration steps demonstrates high deployment flexibility, allowing the model to seamlessly adapt to varying hardware memory constraints in real-world applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LTE-ODE，通过重用局部截断误差作为前向归纳偏置，解决神经ODE在交通预测中连续-冲击困境。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模交通网络中的时空预测需要建模连续宏观节律和离散微观冲击的双重动态。神经ODE擅长捕捉平滑演化，但其Lipschitz连续性约束导致过平滑，无法处理突变。现有物理信息方法通过惩罚数值积分误差强制流形平滑，但引发梯度冲突和注意力坍塌，削弱对异常的敏感性。因此需要一种能同时处理连续和冲击的模型。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新在于将局部截断误差( LTE )重新用作无监督前向归纳偏置，而非消除。通过将LTE映射为动态空间注意力掩码，在稳定区域保持高精度连续ODE演化，在冲击点自适应触发离散补偿分支。模型纯端到端训练，无需流形惩罚。架构包括ODE求解器和基于LTE的注意力门控机制。
light_analysis.result: 在多个大规模基准上取得最先进性能，对高度非线性波动表现出卓越鲁棒性。消融实验表明集成步长具有高部署灵活性，可适应不同硬件内存约束。与基线相比，有效缓解了过平滑并在异常点保持敏感。未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: LTE-ODE解决了交通预测中的连续-冲击困境，通过将数值误差转化为有益信号实现鲁棒预测。学术上揭示了刚性正则化的缺陷并提出新范式，实际应用中具有高灵活性和适应性。未来可探索将LTE引导扩展到其他物理系统时空预测问题。

title: GeoDecider: A Coarse-to-Fine Agentic Workflow for Explainable Lithology Classification
abstract: Lithology classification aims to infer subsurface rock types from well-logging signals, supporting downstream applications like reservoir characterization. Despite substantial progress, most existing methods still treat lithology classification as a single-pass classification task. In contrast, practical experts incorporate geological principles, external knowledge, and tool-use capabilities to perform accurate classification. In this work, we propose GeoDecider, a coarse-to-fine agentic workflow that enables accurate and explainable lithology classification through training-free use of large language models (LLMs). GeoDecider reformulates lithology classification as an expert-like structured process and organizes it into a multi-stage workflow involving coarse-to-fine reasoning. Specifically, GeoDecider includes the following stages: (1) base classifier-guided coarse classification, which uses a pre-trained classifier to provide a rough reference for downstream tasks, thus reducing the overall cost of downstream reasoning, (2) tool-augmented reasoning, which utilizes several tools such as contextual analysis and neighbor retrieval to achieve finer and more precise classifications, (3) geological refinement, which post-processes the final results to enforce geological consistency. Experiments on four benchmarks show that GeoDecider outperforms representative baselines. Further analysis demonstrates that the proposed framework produces geologically interpretable predictions while achieving a better trade-off between classification performance and inference efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoDecider，一种粗到细的智能工作流，利用大语言模型实现可解释且准确的岩性分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有岩性分类方法多为单次分类任务，忽略了实际专家结合地质原理、外部知识和工具进行准确分类的过程。这种单一分类方式缺乏可解释性，且难以处理复杂地质信号。因此，需要一种能够模拟专家推理过程、具备可解释性的分类方法，以提升分类准确性和地质一致性。
light_analysis.method: GeoDecider将岩性分类重构为多阶段粗到细推理流程。首先，基础分类器进行粗分类，提供参考并降低下游推理成本。其次，工具增强推理阶段利用上下文分析和邻域检索等工具细化分类。最后，地质精炼阶段后处理结果以强制地质一致性。整个流程无需训练，直接使用大语言模型。
light_analysis.result: 在四个基准数据集上，GeoDecider显著优于代表性基线方法。进一步分析表明，该框架不仅生成地质可解释的预测，还在分类性能与推理效率之间实现了更好的权衡。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但整体表现领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoDecider通过模拟专家推理流程，实现了准确且可解释的岩性分类，具有实际应用价值（如储层表征）。其无需训练的特点降低了部署成本，但可能依赖LLM的质量和工具设计。未来可探索更复杂的工具集成和跨领域泛化。

title: Two Calls, Two Moments, and the Vote-Accuracy Curve of Repeated LLM Inference
abstract: Repeated sampling is a standard way to spend test-time compute, but its benefit is controlled by the latent distribution of correctness across examples, not by one-call accuracy alone. We study the binary correctness layer of repeated LLM inference under conditional-i.i.d. calls. One labeled call identifies the mean latent success probability; two labeled calls identify its second moment and hence the same-example correctness correlation that separates stable errors from recoverable call-level randomness. From these two moments, every fixed majority-vote budget has a sharp distribution-free two-call interval. The key technical reduction is that the infinite-dimensional moment problem has three-atom extremizers and quadratic dual certificates for every finite budget, so the bounds are exact rather than discretized or parametric. The first useful budget, three votes, has a closed form, width at most $1/8$, and a certified-improvement criterion. The infinite-vote endpoint is the limit of majority voting as the number of calls tends to infinity; it is also sharply bounded, but remains threshold-sensitive because it depends on latent mass around $q=1/2$. We add maximum-entropy and Latent-difficulty Gaussian-probit (LDGP) point completions, and experiments on LLM calls over QNLI and QQP show that empirical three- and five-vote accuracies are contained in the projected two-call regions while temperature changes and randomized model mixtures can create voting gains not ordered by one-call accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过两次标注推理调用即可精确界定多次投票准确率区间的理论方法，无需数据分布假设。
light_analysis.motivation: 重复采样是测试时计算的标准用法，但其收益受示例间正确性潜在分布控制，而非单次正确率。现有方法依赖分布假设或离散化近似，无法精确界定多数投票的准确率区间。本文旨在通过最少标注调用次数（两次）获取有限矩信息，从而给出任意投票预算下准确率的尖锐无分布界，避免参数化或离散化误差。
light_analysis.method: 核心是将无限维矩问题简化为三原子极值函数与二次对偶证书，使每个固定投票预算下的上下界精确可解。利用一次标注调用估计均值，两次标注调用估计二阶矩及相同示例正确性相关性。推导出三次投票的闭式界（宽度≤1/8）及可认证改进准则，无穷投票极限界也尖锐但对阈值敏感。补充最大熵与Latent-difficulty Gaussian-probit点估计，并在QNLI和QQP数据集上用LLM实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在QNLI和QQP数据集上，三次和五次投票的实证准确率完全落在两次调用投影的区间内，验证了理论界的紧致性。同时发现温度变化和模型随机混合可以产生不由单次正确率排序的投票增益，说明该方法能捕捉分布敏感性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提供了重复LLM推理中多数投票准确率的最优无分布界，仅需两次标注调用即可规划测试时计算预算。其理论贡献在于将无限维矩问题极简化解，实验验证了实用性。局限性在于无穷投票极限依赖于阈值附近潜伏质量，未来可扩展至更复杂投票规则或非独立同分布调用。

title: GRAFT: Auditing Graph Neural Networks via Global Feature Attribution
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) achieve strong performance on node classification tasks but remain difficult to interpret, particularly with respect to which input features drive their predictions. Existing global GNN explainers operate at the structural level identifying recurring subgraph motifs, but none explain model behaviour globally at the level of input node attributes. We propose GRAFT, a posthoc global explanation framework that identifies class-level feature importance profiles for GNNs. The method combines diversity-guided exemplar selection, Integrated Gradients-based attribution, and aggregation to construct a global view of feature influence for each class, which can be further expressed as concise natural language rules using a large language model with self-refinement. We evaluate GRAFT across multiple datasets, architectures, and experimental settings, demonstrating its effectiveness in capturing model-relevant features, supporting bias analysis, and enabling feature-efficient transfer learning. In addition, we introduce a structured human evaluation protocol to assess the interpretability of generated rules along dimensions such as accuracy and usefulness. Our results suggest that GRAFT provides a practical and interpretable approach for analysing feature-level behaviour in GNNs, bridging quantitative attribution with human-understandable explanations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GRAFT框架，通过全局特征归因实现GNN类级特征重要性分析，并生成可解释的自然语言规则。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络在节点分类任务中表现优异，但难以解释哪些输入特征驱动预测。现有全局解释器仅关注结构层面的子图模式，未能在输入节点属性层面解释模型行为。因此需要一种全局特征级解释方法来理解GNN决策。
light_analysis.method: GRAFT是一种事后全局解释框架，通过多样性引导的示例选择、基于Integrated Gradients的归因和聚合，为每个类别构建全局特征影响图。进一步利用大语言模型通过自精炼生成简洁的自然语言规则。方法结合了归因与LLM的可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集、架构和实验设置下评估，GRAFT有效捕捉模型相关特征，支持偏差分析，并实现特征高效的迁移学习。引入结构化人工评估，验证生成规则在准确性和有用性方面的可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GRAFT提供了一种实用且可解释的方法来分析GNN的节点属性级行为，弥合了定量归因与人类理解之间差距。未来可应用于模型审计、公平性分析和可解释性提升。

title: Learning Dynamics of Zeroth-Order Optimization: A Kernel Perspective
abstract: Classical optimization theory establishes that zeroth-order (ZO) algorithms suffer from a dimension-dependent slowdown, with convergence rates typically scaling with the model dimension compared to first-order methods. However, in contrast to these theoretical expectations, a growing body of recent work demonstrates the successful application of ZO methods to fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) with billions of parameters. To explain this paradox, we derive the one-step learning dynamics of ZO SGD, where the empirical Neural Tangent Kernel (eNTK) naturally emerges as the key term governing the learning behavior. Inspection of the eNTK produced by ZO SGD reveals that each element corresponds to the inner product of neural tangent vectors projected onto a random low-dimensional subspace. Thus, by invoking the Johnson-Lindenstrauss Lemma, our analysis shows that the fidelity of the ZO eNTK is governed primarily by the number of perturbations. Crucially, the approximation error depends on the model output size rather than the massive parameter dimension. This dimension-free property provides a theoretical justification for the scalability of ZO methods to LLMs finetuning tasks. We believe that this kernel-based framework offers a novel perspective for understanding ZO methods within the context of learning dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 通过神经正切核视角，理论解释了零阶优化在微调大语言模型时维度无关的可扩展性。
light_analysis.motivation: 经典优化理论指出零阶算法收敛速度随模型维度线性下降，然而近期零阶方法成功应用于微调数十亿参数的大语言模型，形成理论与实践的矛盾。本文旨在揭示此悖论背后的学习动态机制，为ZO方法的高维可扩展性提供理论依据。
light_analysis.method: 推导零阶SGD的一步学习动态，发现经验神经正切核（eNTK）自然作为关键项出现。分析表明ZO eNTK的每个元素对应神经切向量在随机低维子空间上的投影内积。通过Johnson-Lindenstrauss引理，证明ZO eNTK的近似保真度主要取决于扰动次数，且误差与模型输出维度相关而非参数维度。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析得出ZO方法的可扩展性源于其学习动态中核矩阵的近似误差与参数维度无关，仅依赖于输出维度。这解释了为什么ZO在LLM微调中有效，尽管参数维度巨大。论文未提供具体实验数值，但建立了理论框架。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从核视角阐明了零阶优化在大规模模型中的学习动态特性，表明其维度无关性源于投影子空间的保真度。该工作为理解ZO方法的实际成功提供了理论基石，未来可探索不同扰动策略及自适应扰动数的影响。

title: Fully Automatic Trace Gas Plume Detection
abstract: Future imaging spectrometers will increase data volumes by orders of magnitude, requiring automated detection of trace gas point sources. We present a fully automated framework that combines machine learning-based morphological analysis with physics-based spectroscopic fitting to detect plumes without human participation. Applied to EMIT imaging spectrometer data, the system operates in two modes: "daily digest" that runs automatically on all downlinked data, flagging the largest events for immediate response, and a retrospective analysis that identifies plumes missed by prior human review. The daily digest demonstrates that a significant fraction of the largest plumes can be detected automatically with negligible false positives, while retrospective analysis suggests at least 25% of plumes may have been overlooked. In addition to the previously observed methane point sources, we extend detection to three understudied trace gases: NH3, NO2 and the first observations of carbon monoxide (CO) plume in EMIT imagery.
comment: Manuscript 27 pages, 9 figures, 1 table, more in attached supplementary; In review

light_analysis.overview: 提出全自动痕量气体羽流检测框架，结合机器学习和物理光谱拟合，无需人工干预，并扩展到NH3、NO2和CO等气体。
light_analysis.motivation: 未来成像光谱仪数据量剧增，需要自动化检测痕量气体点源。现有方法依赖人工审查，效率低且易漏检。该研究旨在实现全自动检测，提高检测率和响应速度，同时拓展可检测气体种类。
light_analysis.method: 框架结合机器学习形态学分析与基于物理的光谱拟合。采用两种模式：每日摘要自动运行于所有下行数据，标记最大事件；回顾分析识别先前人工审查遗漏的羽流。应用于EMIT成像光谱仪数据。
light_analysis.result: 每日摘要显示大部分最大羽流可自动检测且误报率极低；回顾分析表明至少25%的羽流被人工漏检。除甲烷外，成功检测到NH3、NO2及EMIT图像中首次观测的CO羽流。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了全自动羽流检测的可行性，显著提升监测效率和覆盖率，并扩展了可检测气体范围。该方法可增强环境监测能力，未来可应用于其他成像光谱仪数据。

title: SoDa2: Single-Stage Open-Set Domain Adaptation via Decoupled Alignment for Cross-Scene Hyperspectral Image Classification
abstract: Cross-scene hyperspectral image (HSI) classification stands as a fundamental research topic in remote sensing, with extensive applications spanning various fields. Owing to the inclusion of unknown categories in the target domain and the existence of domain shift across different scenes, open-set domain adaptation techniques are commonly employed to address cross-scene HSI classification. However, existing open-set cross-scene HSI classification methods still face two critical challenges: (1) domain shift issues arising from the direct alignment of mixed spectral-spatial features; (2) high computational costs caused by two-stage training strategies. To address these issues, this paper proposes a single-stage open-set domain adaptation method with decoupled alignment (SoDa$^2$) for cross-scene HSI classification. A contribution-aware dual-modality feature extraction is customized to disentangle the characteristics from spectral sequence signals and spatial details, selectively and adaptively enhancing discriminative features. The decoupled alignment module minimizes the Maximum Mean Discrepancy to independently reduce the spectral discrepancy and the spatial discrepancy between the source and target domains, extracting more fine-grained domain-invariant features. A cost-effective single-stage dual-branch framework is designed to learn MMD-constrainted aligned features and constraint-free intrinsic features for adaptive distinction between known and unknown classes. This framework employs a Gaussian Mixture Model to model the squared cosine similarity distribution between the two feature types, enabling open-set recognition without prior knowledge of unknown classes. Extensive experiments on three groups of HSI datasets demonstrate that SoDa$^2$ outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving superior classification accuracy and model transferability for open-set cross-scene tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出单阶段开集域适应方法SoDa^2，通过解耦对齐实现跨场景高光谱图像分类，提升精度与迁移性。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨场景高光谱图像分类面临域偏移和未知类别两大挑战。现有方法直接对齐混合光谱-空间特征导致域偏移，且两阶段训练策略计算成本高。这些问题限制了分类精度和实际应用效率，亟需一种能同时缓解域偏移、降低计算复杂度的开集域适应方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出SoDa^2方法，包含贡献感知双模态特征提取，解耦光谱序列和空间细节并增强判别特征；解耦对齐模块独立最小化光谱和空间的最大均值差异（MMD），提取细粒度域不变特征；单阶段双分支框架学习MMD约束对齐特征和无约束特征，利用高斯混合模型建模余弦相似度分布实现开集识别，无需未知类别先验。
light_analysis.result: 在三组高光谱数据集上的实验表明，SoDa^2优于现有最先进方法，在开集跨场景任务中取得更高分类精度和模型迁移性。具体性能提升摘要未给出数值，但强调了卓越效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: SoDa^2通过解耦对齐有效缓解域偏移，单阶段策略降低计算成本，且无需未知类别先验即可开集识别。该方法为遥感跨场景分类提供高效方案，未来可推广至其他域适应任务。潜在局限性包括对复杂场景的泛化能力有待验证。

title: Dual-Foundation Models for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
abstract: Semantic segmentation provides pixel-level scene understanding essential for autonomous driving and fine-grained perception tasks. However, training segmentation models requires costly, labor-intensive annotations on real-world datasets. Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) addresses this by training models on labeled synthetic data and adapting them to unlabeled real images. While conceptually simple, adaptation is challenging due to the domain gap, i.e., differences in visual appearance and scene structure between synthetic and real data. Prior approaches bridge this gap through pixel-level mixing or feature-level contrastive learning. Yet, these techniques suffer from two major limitations: (1) reliance on high-confidence pseudo-labels restricts learning to a subset of the target domain, and (2) prototype-based contrastive methods initialize class prototypes from source-trained models, yielding biased and unstable anchors during adaptation. To address these issues, we propose a dual-foundation UDA framework that leverages two complementary foundation models. First, we employ the Segment Anything Model (SAM) with superpixel-guided prompting to enable learning from a broader range of target pixels beyond high-confidence predictions. Second, we incorporate DINOv3 to construct stable, domain-invariant class prototypes through its robust representation learning. Our method achieves consistent improvements of +1.3% and +1.4% mIoU over strong UDA baselines on GTA-to-Cityscapes and SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes, respectively.
comment: 15 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at the 28th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出双基础模型框架，利用SAM和DINOv3解决无监督域适应中伪标签局限和原型偏差问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 语义分割需要昂贵标注，无监督域适应（UDA）通过合成数据训练并适配真实图像。现有方法受限于高置信伪标签和偏置原型初始化，导致学习不全面和不稳定。本文针对这些局限提出新框架，以提升域适应性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出双基础模型框架：首先采用Segment Anything Model（SAM）结合超像素引导提示，拓宽目标域像素学习范围，超越高置信预测；其次利用DINOv3构建稳定域不变类原型，避免原型偏差。方法在GTA→Cityscapes和SYNTHIA→Cityscapes数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在GTA-to-Cityscapes和SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes上分别提升+1.3%和+1.4% mIoU，优于强UDA基线，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 双基础模型框架有效解决UDA中伪标签局限和原型偏差，显著提升域适应性能。该方法可扩展至其他密集预测任务，为无监督域适应提供了新思路。

title: Dynamic Distillation and Gradient Consistency for Robust Long-Tailed Incremental Learning
abstract: The task of Long-tailed Class Incremental Learning (LT-CIL) addresses the sequential learning of new classes from datasets with imbalanced class distributions. This scenario intensifies the fundamental problem of catastrophic forgetting, inherent to continual learning, with the dual challenges of under-learning minority classes and overfitting majority classes. To tackle these combined issues, this paper proposes two main techniques. First, we introduce gradient consistency regularization, which leverages the moving average of gradients to suppress abrupt fluctuations and stabilize the training process. Second, we dynamically adjust the weight of the distillation loss by measuring the degree of class imbalance with normalized entropy. This adaptive weighting establishes an optimal balance between retaining old knowledge and acquiring new information. Experiments on the CIFAR-100-LT, ImageNetSubset-LT, and Food101-LT benchmarks show that our method achieves consistent accuracy improvements of up to 5.0\%. Furthermore, we demonstrate dramatic gains in the challenging 'In-ordered' setting, where tasks progress from majority to minority classes, highlighting our method's robustness in mitigating forgetting under unfavorable learning dynamics. This enhanced performance is achieved without a significant increase in computational overhead, demonstrating the practicality of our framework.

light_analysis.overview: 提出动态蒸馏和梯度一致性正则化，解决长尾增量学习中的灾难性遗忘和类别不平衡问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 长尾类别增量学习面临双重挑战：类别分布不平衡导致少数类学习不足和多数类过拟合，同时加剧持续学习中的灾难性遗忘。现有方法未能有效平衡新旧知识，尤其在任务从多数类向少数类迁移时性能下降严重。
light_analysis.method: 提出梯度一致性正则化，利用梯度移动平均抑制训练波动；动态调整蒸馏损失权重，通过归一化熵度量类别不平衡，自适应平衡旧知识保留与新知识获取。实验在CIFAR-100-LT、ImageNetSubset-LT和Food101-LT基准上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在三个长尾基准上持续提升准确率高达5.0%，尤其在'In-ordered'设置（从多数类到少数类）中表现突出，有效缓解遗忘。计算开销未显著增加，证明框架的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解长尾增量学习中的灾难性遗忘和类别不平衡问题，在多种设置下提升鲁棒性，且计算高效。未来可探索更复杂的动态调整策略或扩展到其他持续学习场景。

title: ReasonAudio: A Benchmark for Evaluating Reasoning Beyond Matching in Text-Audio Retrieval
abstract: As multimodal content continues to expand at a rapid pace, audio retrieval has emerged as a key enabling technology for media search, content organization, and intelligent assistants. However, most existing benchmarks concentrate on semantic matching and fail to capture the fact that real-world queries often demand advanced reasoning abilities, including negation understanding, temporal ordering, concurrent event recognition, and duration discrimination. To address this gap, we introduce ReasonAudio, the first reasoning-intensive benchmark for Text-Audio Retrieval, comprising 1,000 queries and 10,000 composite audio clips across five fundamental reasoning tasks: Negation, Order, Overlap, Duration, and Mix. Despite their intuitive nature for humans and straightforward construction, these tasks pose significant challenges to current models. Our evaluation of ten state-of-the-art models reveals the following findings: All models struggle with reasoning-intensive audio retrieval, performing particularly poorly on Negation and Duration while showing relatively better results on Overlap and Order. Moreover, Multimodal Large Language Model-based embedding models fail to inherit the reasoning capabilities of their backbones through contrastive fine-tuning, suggesting that current training paradigms are insufficient to preserve reasoning capacity in retrieval settings

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个推理密集型文本-音频检索基准ReasonAudio，包含五大推理任务，评估现有模型在推理能力上的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有音频检索基准主要关注语义匹配，而实际查询常需要高级推理，如否定理解、时序顺序、并发事件识别和持续时间判断。这些推理需求在现有基准中被忽视，导致模型在真实场景中表现不佳。为解决这一空白，作者引入ReasonAudio基准，旨在推动音频检索中推理能力的研究。
light_analysis.method: ReasonAudio基准包含1,000个查询和10,000个复合音频片段，涵盖Negation、Order、Overlap、Duration和Mix五种推理任务。查询和音频通过组合基元音频构造，确保任务明确且具挑战性。评估了十个SOTA模型，包括多模态大语言模型嵌入模型，使用对比学习微调。
light_analysis.result: 所有模型在推理密集型音频检索上表现挣扎，尤其在Negation和Duration任务上性能极差，而在Overlap和Order任务上相对较好。多模态大语言模型嵌入模型未能通过对比微调继承其主干模型的推理能力，表明当前训练范式不足以在检索中保持推理能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReasonAudio揭示了现有模型在音频检索推理中的严重缺陷，强调了开发新型推理机制或训练策略的必要性。该基准为未来研究提供了标准评估工具，有助于推动更智能的音频检索系统发展。局限性可能包括任务构造方式与真实场景的差异，未来可扩展更多推理类型或整合更复杂的多模态推理。

title: Mix3R: Mixing Feed-forward Reconstruction and Generative 3D Priors for Joint Multi-view Aligned 3D Reconstruction and Pose Estimation
abstract: Recent trends in sparse-view 3D reconstruction have taken two different paths: feed-forward reconstruction that predicts pixel-aligned point maps without a complete geometry, and generative 3D reconstruction that generates complete geometry but often with poor input-alignment. We present Mix3R, a novel generative 3D reconstruction method which mixes feed-forward reconstruction and 3D generation into a single framework in an aligned manner. Mix3R generates a 3D shape in two stages: a sparse voxel generation stage and a textured geometry generation stage. Unlike pure generative methods, our first-stage generation jointly produces a coarse 3D structure (sparse voxels), per-view point maps and camera parameters aligned to that 3D structure. This is made possible by introducing a Mixture-of-Transformers architecture that inserts global self-attentions to a feed-forward reconstruction model and a 3D generative model, both pretrained on large-scale data. This design effectively retains the pretrained priors but enables better 2D-3D alignment. Based on the initial aligned generations of sparse 3D voxels and point maps, we compute an overlap-based attention bias that is directly added to another pretrained textured geometry generation model, enabling it to correctly place input textures onto generated shapes in a training-free manner. Our design brings mutual benefits to both feed-forward reconstruction and 3D generation: The feed-forward branch learns to ground its predictions to a generative 3D prior, and conversely, the 3D generation branch is conditioned on geometrically informative features from the feed-forward branch. As a result, our method produces 3D shapes with better input alignment compared with pure 3D generative methods, together with camera pose estimations more accurate than previous feed-forward reconstruction methods. Our project page is at https://jsnln.github.io/mix3r/

light_analysis.overview: Mix3R混合前馈重建与生成式3D先验，实现联合多视图对齐的3D重建和姿态估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有稀疏视角3D重建面临两条路线：前馈重建预测像素对齐点图但缺乏完整几何，生成式重建生成完整几何但输入对齐差。Mix3R旨在统一两者，在保持生成完整性的同时提升对齐精度，从而解决多视图重建中几何完整性与输入对齐的矛盾。
light_analysis.method: Mix3R采用两阶段生成：稀疏体素生成阶段和纹理几何生成阶段。第一阶段通过Mixture-of-Transformers架构融合预训练的前馈重建模型和3D生成模型，联合生成稀疏体素、每视角点图及相机参数，实现2D-3D对齐。第二阶段基于对齐的稀疏体素和点图计算重叠注意力偏置，以无训练方式引导预训练纹理几何生成模型正确放置输入纹理。
light_analysis.result: Mix3R生成的3D形状相比纯生成方法具有更好的输入对齐，同时相机姿态估计比此前的前馈重建方法更准确。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但定性结果展示了多视图一致性和几何完整性上的优势，例如输入纹理的准确放置和姿态精度提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: Mix3R通过混合设计使前馈分支从生成先验中获益，同时生成分支基于前馈的几何特征进行条件生成，实现相互提升。该方法在保持生成完整性的前提下改善了输入对齐，为多视图3D重建和姿态估计提供统一框架，潜在应用于AR/VR和场景理解。未来工作可探索端到端训练和更高效推理。

title: Tracing Like a Clinician: Anatomy-Guided Spatial Priors for Cephalometric Landmark Detection
abstract: When orthodontists trace cephalometric radiographs, they follow a structured workflow: identify the soft tissue profile, partition the skull into anatomical regions, trace contours, and locate landmarks using geometric definitions -- yet no automated system replicates this reasoning. We present a five-phase anatomy-guided initialization pipeline that translates this clinical workflow into computational operations, producing confidence-weighted spatial attention priors for a downstream HRNet-W32 detector. On 1,502 radiographs from three sources spanning 7+ imaging devices, the system achieves 1.04 mm mean radial error on 25 landmarks -- surpassing prior state-of-the-art (1.23 mm on 19 landmarks) by 15.4%, with twelve landmarks below 1 mm. A three-way controlled ablation reveals two striking findings. First, removing anatomical priors does not merely slow convergence -- it destroys generalization: both models converge to ~1.03 mm on validation, but diverge to 1.94 vs. 1.04 mm on the test set. Second, replacing anatomical priors with random-position Gaussians produces even worse generalization (2.24 mm), confirming that the improvement derives from anatomically correct positioning, not additional input channels. Clinical domain knowledge encoded as spatial priors provides an inductive bias that architecture and data augmentation alone do not provide.

light_analysis.overview: 提出解剖引导的初始化流程，将临床工作流转化为空间注意力先验，提升头影测量标志点检测精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 正畸医生在追踪头影测量X光片时遵循结构化工作流：识别软组织轮廓、划分解剖区域、追踪轮廓并利用几何定义定位标志点，但现有自动化系统未能复现这一推理过程。当前方法缺乏临床领域知识引导，导致泛化能力不足，尤其在跨设备、跨来源数据上性能受限。该研究旨在通过编码解剖先验，提供架构和数据增强难以提供的归纳偏置。
light_analysis.method: 提出五阶段解剖引导初始化管线，将临床工作流转化为计算操作，生成置信度加权的空间注意力先验，输入下游HRNet-W32检测器。使用来自3个来源、7+成像设备的1502张X光片，覆盖25个标志点。通过三路控制消融实验，对比无解剖先验和随机位置高斯先验，验证解剖定位的正确性对泛化的关键作用。
light_analysis.result: 系统在25个标志点上平均径向误差1.04 mm，超越先前最优（19个标志点1.23 mm）15.4%，其中12个标志点低于1 mm。消融实验显示：去除解剖先验虽在验证集上收敛至~1.03 mm，但测试集误差升至1.94 mm；替换为随机高斯先验则更差（2.24 mm），证实改进源于解剖正确位置而非额外输入通道。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次将临床解剖推理显式编码为空间先验，显著提升头影测量标志点检测的精度和跨域泛化能力。表明领域知识作为归纳偏置，能弥补纯数据驱动方法的不足。未来可扩展至更多解剖结构，或结合多任务学习进一步模拟临床工作流。

title: Population-Aware Imitation Learning in Mean-field Games with Common Noise
abstract: Mean Field Games (MFGs) provide a powerful framework for modeling the collective behavior of large populations of interacting agents. In this paper, we address the problem of Imitation Learning (IL) in MFGs subject to common noise, where the population distribution evolves stochastically. This stochasticity compels agents to adopt population-aware policies to respond to aggregate shocks. We formulate two distinct learning objectives: recovering a Nash equilibrium and maximizing performance against an expert population. We investigate two imitation proxies: Behavioral Cloning (BC) and Adversarial (ADV) divergence. We then establish finite-sample error bounds showing that minimizing these proxies effectively controls both the policy's exploitability and its performance gap relative to the expert. Furthermore, we propose a numerical framework using generalized Fictitious Play and Deep Learning to compute expert population-aware policies. Through experiments on three environments we demonstrate that standard population-unaware policies fail to capture the equilibrium dynamics. Our results highlight that learning population-aware policies is crucial to avoid being misled by the randomness inherent in common noise.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在共同噪声下平均场博弈中的人口感知模仿学习方法，建立理论误差界并验证其必要性。
light_analysis.motivation: 共同噪声使人口分布随机演化，而现有模仿学习忽略人口感知，导致策略无法适应聚合冲击。该问题在大型群体交互场景中至关重要，如经济模型和机器人集群，现有方法对随机性处理不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文定义了两种学习目标：恢复纳什均衡和超越专家性能。采用行为克隆和对抗散度作为模仿代理，并推导出有限样本误差界，证明最小化这些代理能有效控制策略的可利用性和性能差距。数值框架利用广义虚拟博弈和深度学习计算人口感知策略。
light_analysis.result: 在三个不同环境中的实验显示，标准人口无知策略无法捕捉均衡动态，而人口感知策略显著提升了鲁棒性；具体性能提升幅度未明确给出，但定性结果一致表明人口感知策略避免被共同噪声误导。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文从理论上证明了人口感知模仿学习在共同噪声MFG中的有效性，并通过数值实验验证了其必要性。该工作为随机环境下的多智能体模仿学习提供了新框架，未来可扩展至更复杂的噪声结构和实际应用。

title: What Happens Inside Agent Memory? Circuit Analysis from Emergence to Diagnosis
abstract: Agent memory failures are silent: an LLM-based agent can produce a fluent response even when it fails to extract, retain, or retrieve the information needed across sessions. The write-manage-read loop describes the external pipeline of these systems but leaves open which internal computations implement each stage. Tracing internal feature circuits across the Qwen-3 family (0.6B--14B) and two memory frameworks (mem0 and A-MEM), we report three findings. First, control is detectable before content: routing circuitry is causally active at 0.6B, while content circuitry produces no detectable signal until 4B under our tracing setup, creating a deployment regime where small models route with apparent competence but silently fail at extraction and grounding. Second, within the content group, Write and Read share a late-layer hub that operates as a context-grounding substrate already present in the base model; only memory framing recruits a functional grounding direction on this substrate, and the hub transfers across both frameworks. Third, emergence does not imply steerability: although the content circuit becomes detectable at 4B, it becomes reliably steerable only at 8B, indicating that detection and intervention have distinct scale thresholds. As a practical implication, the feature-space separation between the two circuit groups enables per-operation failure localization at 76.2% accuracy without supervision, providing a stage-level diagnostic for otherwise silent agent-memory failures.

light_analysis.overview: 通过电路分析揭示LLM agent内存操作中控制与内容的分离，以及涌现与可操控性的不同尺度阈值，并实现无监督的失败定位。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM-based agent的内存失败是隐蔽的：即使无法正确提取、保留或检索信息，也能生成流畅响应。现有方法关注外部流程（write-manage-read loop），但未揭示内部计算如何实现各阶段。理解内部电路对于诊断和修复这种无声失败至关重要，有助于构建更可靠的agent系统。
light_analysis.method: 对Qwen-3家族（0.6B-14B）和两种内存框架（mem0和A-MEM）进行内部特征电路追踪。分析路由电路和内容电路在不同规模下的因果活跃性，并检测write和read共享的late-layer hub。通过对比检测和干预的尺度阈值，研究涌现与可操控性的关系。
light_analysis.result: 路由电路在0.6B即因果活跃，而内容电路直到4B才可检测。内容电路中write和read共享一个late-layer hub，该hub在基础模型中已存在，记忆框架为其招募了功能性的接地方向。内容电路在4B可检测但直到8B才可靠可操控。基于特征空间分离，实现了无监督的每操作失败定位，准确率达76.2%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了agent内存失败的内在机制：控制与内容的分离、共享hub以及涌现与可操控性的尺度阈值差异。提供了一种无监督的故障诊断方法，有助于构建更可靠的agent系统。未来可探索更细粒度的电路分析和干预策略。

title: Can Multimodal Large Language Models Understand Pathologic Movements? A Pilot Study on Seizure Semiology
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated robust capabilities in recognizing everyday human activities, yet their potential for analyzing clinically significant involuntary movements in neurological disorders remains largely unexplored. This pilot study evaluates the capability of MLLMs for automated recognition of pathological movements in seizure videos. We assessed the zero-shot performance of state-of-the-art MLLMs on 20 ILAE-defined semiological features across 90 clinical seizure recordings. MLLMs outperformed fine-tuned Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and Vision Transformer (ViT) baseline models on 13 of 18 features without task-specific training, demonstrating particular strength in recognizing salient postural and contextual features while struggling with subtle, high-frequency movements. Feature-targeted signal enhancement (facial cropping, pose estimation, audio denoising) improved performance on 10 of 20 features. Expert evaluation showed that 94.3 percent of MLLM-generated explanations for correctly predicted cases achieved at least 60 percent faithfulness scores, aligning with epileptologist reasoning. These findings demonstrate the potential of adapting general-purpose MLLMs for specialized clinical video analysis through targeted preprocessing strategies, offering a path toward interpretable, efficient diagnostic assistance. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/LinaZhangUCLA/PathMotionMLLM.

light_analysis.overview: 评估多模态大语言模型在癫痫发作视频中自动识别病理运动的零样本能力，并提出特征增强预处理策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在识别日常人类活动方面表现优异，但其在临床神经疾病中分析不自主运动的能力尚未被探索。癫痫发作症状的手动分析耗时且主观，现有深度模型（如CNN、ViT）需要大量标注数据，且难以捕捉细微特征。本研究旨在利用MLLM的零样本能力，为临床视频分析提供高效、可解释的辅助工具。
light_analysis.method: 采用20个ILAE定义的症状特征，对90个临床癫痫视频进行评估。零样本测试多个SOTA MLLM，并与微调CNN和ViT基线对比。针对特征不足，采用面部裁剪、姿态估计、音频去噪等信号增强方法。另外，由专家评估MLLM解释的忠实度。
light_analysis.result: MLLM在18个特征中的13个上优于基线模型，无需任务特定训练，尤其擅长识别姿势和上下文特征，但难以处理细微高频运动。特征增强后，20个特征中10个性能提升。94.3%的正确预测案例中，MLLM解释的忠实度得分≥60%，与癫痫专家推理一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，通用MLLM通过针对性预处理可适应专业临床视频分析，实现可解释、高效的诊断辅助。该方法为减少专家负担、提升癫痫诊断客观性提供新路径，未来可扩展至其他神经疾病的不自主运动识别。

title: VLMaxxing through FrameMogging Training-Free Anti-Recomputation for Video Vision-Language Models
abstract: Video vision-language models (VLMs) keep paying for visual state the stream already told us was stable. The factory wall did not move, but most VLM pipelines still hand the model dense RGB frames or a fresh prefix again. We study that waste as training-free anti-recomputation: reuse state when validation says it survives, and buy fresh evidence when the scene, query, or cache topology requires it.   The largest measured win is after ingest. On frozen Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct-4bit, adaptive same-video follow-up reuse preserves paired choices and correctness on a 93-query VideoMME breadth setting while reducing follow-up latency by 14.90-35.92x. The first query is still cold; the win starts when later questions reuse the same video state. Stress tests bound the result: repeated-question schedules hold through 50 turns, while dense-answer-anchored prompt variation separates conservative fixed K=1 repair from faster aggressive policies that drift.   Fresh-video pruning is smaller but real. C-VISION skips timed vision-tower work before the first answer is generated. On Gemma 4-E4B-4bit, the clean 32f short cell reaches 1.316x first-query speedup with no paired drift or parse failures on 20 items; Qwen shows the fidelity/speed boundary.   Stage-share ceiling (C-CEILING) is the accounting guardrail: a component speedup becomes an end-to-end speedup only in proportion to the wall-clock share it accelerates, so C-VISION and after-ingest follow-up reuse do not multiply. Candidate C-STREAM remains a native-rate target, not a headline result here. The broader direction is VLM-native media that expose change, motion, uncertainty, object state, sensor time, and active tiles directly, so models do not have to rediscover the world from dense RGB every frame.
comment: 37 pages, 6 figures, 22 tables; code and artifacts available at https://github.com/jfbastien/VLMaxxing

light_analysis.overview: 提出训练无关的反重计算策略，通过复用稳定视觉状态和剪枝冗余帧，大幅降低视频VLM延迟。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频视觉语言模型在处理稳定场景时仍重复计算密集RGB帧或前缀，造成大量冗余计算。现有方法未能有效识别并跳过状态不变的区域，导致推理效率低下。该研究旨在通过训练无关的方式复用已验证稳定的视觉状态，仅在必要时获取新证据，从而提升推理速度而不牺牲准确性。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是训练无关的反重计算（anti-recomputation）：将视频流划分为稳定状态，通过验证机制判断状态是否存活，存活则复用先前状态，否则获取新帧。具体技术包括：C-VISION（在首答案生成前跳过视觉塔计算）和C-CEILING（组件加速的端到端加速比例核算）。实验使用Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct-4bit和Gemma 4-E4B-4bit模型，在VideoMME基准上测试。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL上，自适应相同视频后续问题复用使后续延迟降低14.90-35.92倍，93查询VideoMME广度设置下保持配对选择正确性。压力测试显示重复问题调度可稳定50轮。C-VISION在Gemma模型上实现首查询1.316倍加速，无配对漂移或解析失败。Qwen模型显示保真度与速度的边界。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证实了训练无关反重计算在视频VLM中的有效性，通过状态复用和帧剪枝显著降低延迟。未来方向是开发原生媒体VLM，直接暴露变化、运动、物体状态等，避免模型从密集RGB帧重新发现世界。潜在局限：首查询仍为冷启动，加速收益依赖后续复用。

title: Toward Structural Multimodal Representations: Specialization, Selection, and Sparsification via Mixture-of-Experts
abstract: We propose S3 (Specialization, Selection, Sparsification), a framework that rethinks multimodal learning through a structural perspective. Instead of encoding all signals into a fixed embedding, S3 decomposes multimodal inputs into semantic experts and selectively routes them for each task. Specialization forms concept-level experts in a shared latent space, Selection adapts routing for task-specific needs, and Sparsification prunes low-utility paths to yield compact, information-minimal representations. Across four MultiBench benchmarks, S3 improves accuracy and shows a consistent reverse U-shaped sparsity-performance trend, with peak performance at intermediate sparsity. These results suggest that structuring multimodal representations as selectable semantic components provides a practical and principled alternative to contrastive learning or InfoMax-driven approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出S3框架，通过混合专家模型实现多模态表示的结构化分解与稀疏路由，在MultiBench上取得性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多模态学习方法通常将所有信号编码为固定嵌入，忽略了模态内和模态间的结构信息，导致表示冗余且任务适应性差。对比学习和InfoMax驱动的方法虽能捕捉全局依赖，但缺乏可解释性和可控性。S3旨在通过专家分解和稀疏路由实现更紧凑、任务自适应的多模态表示。
light_analysis.method: S3框架包含三个关键步骤：Specialization将多模态输入分解为共享潜在空间中的语义概念专家；Selection根据任务需求自适应路由相关专家；Sparsification通过剪枝低效用路径得到紧凑、信息极简的表示。该方法基于混合专家（MoE）架构，在MultiBench数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在四个MultiBench基准任务上，S3框架提升了分类准确率，并一致表现出反向U形的稀疏性-性能关系，即中等稀疏度达到最佳性能。相比全密集表示，稀疏化不仅减少计算开销，还避免了过度压缩导致的信息损失。
light_analysis.conclusion: S3通过结构化多模态表示作为可选择的语义组件，为多模态学习提供了不同于对比学习和InfoMax的新范式。其学术价值在于揭示了稀疏性对多模态性能的非线性影响，实际应用上可提高模型效率与可解释性。未来可探索更细粒度的专家定义和动态路由策略。

title: MedSR-Vision: Deep Learning Framework for Multi-Domain Medical Image Super-Resolution
abstract: Medical image super-resolution (MedSR) is essential for improving diagnostic precision across diverse imaging modalities such as MRI, CT, X-ray, Ultrasound, and Fundus imaging. Despite rapid advances in deep learning, challenges remain in preserving anatomical accuracy, maintaining perceptual quality, and generalizing across medical domains. This paper presents MedSR-Vision, a novel unified deep learning framework for evaluating and comparing super-resolution models across five modalities: Brain MRI, Chest X-ray, Renal Ultrasound, Nephrolithiasis CT, and Spine MRI, at magnification scales of $\times2$, $\times3$, and $\times4$. Three representative models namely SRCNN, SwinIR, and Real-ESRGAN are benchmarked using multiple quantitative metrics encompassing fidelity, perceptual realism, and sharpness.   Experimental analysis demonstrates that Real-ESRGAN achieves superior perceptual quality and edge recovery at higher scales, SwinIR excels in preserving structural and diagnostic features, and SRCNN provides efficient and stable performance at lower magnifications. The results establish domain-specific insights and practical guidelines for model selection in clinical imaging workflows, offering a standardized evaluation framework for future medical image super-resolution research and deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MedSR-Vision，一个统一的多模态医学图像超分辨率评估框架，系统对比三种代表性模型，提供临床模型选择指南。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学图像超分辨率对提升诊断精度至关重要，但现有深度学习方法在解剖准确性、感知质量和跨域泛化方面存在不足，且缺乏统一评估标准。本研究旨在建立一个标准化框架，系统评估不同模型在多模态、多放大倍数下的性能，以指导临床实践。
light_analysis.method: MedSR-Vision框架涵盖五个模态（脑MRI、胸部X光、肾超声、肾结石CT、脊柱MRI）和三个放大倍数（×2, ×3, ×4）。基准测试SRCNN、SwinIR、Real-ESRGAN，使用保真度、感知真实性和锐度等定量指标进行综合评估。
light_analysis.result: Real-ESRGAN在高倍数下感知质量和边缘恢复最优；SwinIR在保持结构和诊断特征方面表现突出；SRCNN在低倍数下高效稳定。实验结果提供了领域特定见解，为临床成像流程中的模型选择提供了实用指南。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedSR-Vision为未来医学图像超分辨率研究提供了标准化评估框架，有助于推动模型在真实临床场景中的部署。其可扩展性可支持更多模态和模型，但当前评估指标和数据集范围有限，需进一步扩展。

title: Automated Large-scale CVRP Solver Design via LLM-assisted Flexible MCTS
abstract: Solving large-scale CVRP (LSCVRP) with hundreds to thousands of nodes remains difficult for even state-of-the-art solvers. Divide-and-conquer can scale by decomposing the instance into size-reduced subproblems, but designing decomposition logic and configuring sub-solvers is highly expertise- and labor-intensive. Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as promising tools for automated algorithm design. However, existing LLM-driven approaches struggle with LSCVRP primarily due to the difficulty in generating sophisticated search strategies within a limited context window. To bridge this gap, we propose the LLM-assisted Flexible Monte Carlo Tree Search (LaF-MCTS), a novel framework that automates the design of high-performance LSCVRP solvers. We develop a three-tier decision hierarchy to enable incremental design of decomposition policies and sub-solvers for LSCVRP. To enable efficient search within the algorithmic hypothesis space, we introduce semantic pruning to eliminate semantically and structurally redundant codes, and branch regrowth to regenerate codes and preserve diversity. Extensive experiments on CVRPLib demonstrate that LaF-MCTS autonomously composes and optimizes decomposition-enhanced solvers that surpasses various state-of-the-art CVRP solvers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LaF-MCTS框架，利用LLM辅助灵活蒙特卡洛树搜索自动设计高性能大规模CVRP求解器。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模CVRP（LSCVRP）求解困难，现有分治方法需专家手工设计分解逻辑和子求解器，效率低下。LLM驱动方法受限于上下文窗口，难以生成复杂搜索策略。因此需要一种自动化框架来高效设计LSCVRP求解器。
light_analysis.method: 提出LaF-MCTS框架，包含三层决策层次，逐步设计分解策略和子求解器。引入语义剪枝消除冗余代码，分支再生保持多样性，在算法假设空间中高效搜索。利用LLM辅助生成代码，通过MCTS探索最优组合。
light_analysis.result: 在CVRPLib数据集上，LaF-MCTS自主组合并优化分解增强求解器，性能超越多种最先进的CVRP求解器，包括OR-Tools、LKH-3等，表明自动化设计方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LaF-MCTS实现了LSCVRP求解器的自动化设计，减少对专家知识的依赖，具有重要学术和应用价值。未来可扩展到其他组合优化问题，但需进一步验证泛化能力。

title: FreeTimeGS++: Secrets of Dynamic Gaussian Splatting and Their Principles
abstract: The recent surge in 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) has achieved impressive dynamic scene reconstruction. While these methods demonstrate remarkable performance, the specific drivers behind such gains remain less explored, making a systematic understanding of the underlying principles challenging. In this paper, we perform a comprehensive analysis of these hidden factors to provide a clearer perspective on the 4DGS framework. We first establish a controlled baseline, FreeTimeGS_ours, by formalizing and reproducing the heuristics of the state-of-the-art FreeTimeGS. Using this framework, we dissect 4DGS along its fundamental axes and uncover key secrets, including the emergent temporal partitioning driven by Gaussian durations and the discrepancy between photometric fidelity and spatiotemporal consistency. Based on these insights, we propose FreeTimeGS++, a principled method that employs gated marginalization and neural velocity fields to achieve superior stability and robust dynamic representations. Our approach yields reproducible results with reduced run-to-run variance. We will release our implementation to provide a reliable foundation for future 4DGS research.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示4D高斯溅射的关键原理，提出FreeTimeGS++方法提升动态场景重建的稳定性与鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 4D高斯溅射在动态场景重建中取得显著成果，但驱动性能提升的具体因素尚不明确，缺乏对底层原理的系统理解。现有方法如FreeTimeGS依赖启发式策略，缺乏理论分析。本研究旨在剖析4DGS框架的隐藏因素，为未来研究提供可靠基础。
light_analysis.method: 首先通过形式化并复现FreeTimeGS的启发式方法，建立可控基线FreeTimeGS_ours。在此基础上，沿基本维度解析4DGS，发现高斯持续时间导致的临时时间划分以及光度保真度与时空一致性的不一致等关键秘密。基于这些洞察，提出FreeTimeGS++，采用门控边缘化和神经速度场，实现更优的稳定性和鲁棒动态表示。
light_analysis.result: FreeTimeGS++在动态场景重建中实现了可重复的结果，并有效降低了运行间方差。摘要未明确提供具体数值指标，但声称相比现有方法具有更优的稳定性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过系统分析揭示了4DGS框架的关键原理，并基于此提出FreeTimeGS++方法。该方法通过门控边缘化和神经速度场提升了动态场景重建的稳定性。研究为4DGS领域提供了可靠的理论基础和实践实现，将开源以促进后续研究。未来可进一步探索其他潜在因素或扩展至更多任务。

title: SurgCheck: Do Vision-Language Models Really Look at Images in Surgical VQA?
abstract: Purpose: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown promising performance in surgical visual question answering (VQA). However, existing surgical VQA datasets often contain linguistic shortcuts, where question phrasing implicitly constrains the answer space. It remains unclear whether reported performance reflects visual understanding or reliance on such linguistic shortcuts. Methods: We introduce SurgCheck, a diagnostic benchmark for quantifying linguistic shortcut reliance in surgical VQA. SurgCheck employs a paired-question design in which each surgical frame is associated with an original question containing entity names and a less-biased counterpart that removes these names while preserving identical visual content and ground-truth answers. The resulting performance gap provides a diagnostic signal of shortcut reliance. To ensure that the less-biased question remains well-defined even without entity names, four grounding cues are incorporated: bounding box, arrow, spatial position, and periphrasis. We evaluate both general-purpose and surgical-specific VLMs under zero-shot and fine-tuned settings on SurgCheck. To evaluate open-ended zero-shot responses, we introduce an LLM-as-a-judge evaluation protocol. Results: Using SurgCheck, we observe consistent performance degradation on less-biased questions across five VLMs, despite identical visual inputs. Text-only ablation reveals minimal performance drops for action and target prediction, indicating that action and target prediction is largely driven by linguistic shortcuts rather than visual reasoning. Conclusion: SurgCheck provides a controlled diagnostic framework that exposes failure modes masked by linguistic bias in existing surgical VQA benchmarks. Our findings demonstrate that strong benchmark performance does not necessarily imply faithful visual understanding, underscoring the need for bias-aware evaluation in surgical VQA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SurgCheck诊断基准，量化手术VQA中视觉语言模型对语言捷径的依赖，揭示高分可能不反映真实视觉理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有手术VQA数据集常存在语言捷径，问题措辞隐含约束答案空间，导致模型性能可能不依赖视觉理解。缺乏可靠方法量化这种依赖，影响模型评估可信度。因此需要诊断基准来区分视觉推理与语言偏见。
light_analysis.method: 提出SurgCheck基准，采用配对问题设计：每个手术帧关联原始问题（含实体名）和低偏置问题（去除实体名但保留视觉内容与答案）。通过性能差异量化捷径依赖。低偏置问题引入四种定位线索（边界框、箭头、空间位置、转述）确保可答。评估通用和手术专用VLM的零样本与微调设置，并引入LLM-as-a-judge评价协议处理开放式回答。
light_analysis.result: 在五个VLM上，低偏置问题一致导致性能下降，尽管视觉输入相同。文本消融实验显示动作和目标预测的下降最小，表明这些任务主要依赖语言捷径而非视觉推理。
light_analysis.conclusion: SurgCheck提供了受控诊断框架，暴露了现有基准中被语言偏见掩盖的失败模式。强基准性能不必然表示忠实视觉理解，强调手术VQA需进行偏见感知评估。该工作为开发更健壮的VLM和数据集设计提供指导。

title: Beyond ECE: Calibrated Size Ratio, Risk Assessment, and Confidence-Weighted Metrics
abstract: Confidence calibration has been dominated by the Expected Calibration Error (ECE), a linear metric that counts calibration offset equally regardless of the confidence level at which it occurs. We show that ECE can remain small even under arbitrarily large overconfidence risk, so we propose Calibrated Size Ratio (CSR) instead, an interpretable metric that equals 1 under perfect calibration, from which we derive the risk probability $P_{\mathrm{risk}}$ that quantifies the statistical evidence for overconfidence. We further argue that overconfidence risk assessment must be complemented by a measure of discriminative value: whether the assigned confidences actively distinguish correct from incorrect predictions. We show that confidence-weighted accuracy $\mathrm{cwA}$ is the natural such complement, and that confidence-weighting extends to all standard classification metrics. In particular, we prove that the confidence-weighted AUC (cwAUC) captures the information about calibration while the classical AUC cannot. We validate the proposed indicators on several synthetic confidence distributions under multiple controlled calibration profiles and find that CSR separates risky from non-risky assignments. We also test the metrics on fifteen real datasets, with and without post-hoc calibration, and find that standard methods can yield risky confidence profiles.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Calibrated Size Ratio (CSR) 和风险概率指标，并引入置信度加权指标（如cwAUC）以更全面评估校准质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有校准评估指标期望校准误差（ECE）存在缺陷：即使在任意大的过度自信风险下，ECE仍可能保持较小值，无法有效检测风险。因此需要更鲁棒的指标来量化校准偏差和过度自信证据，并同时考虑置信度的判别能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出Calibrated Size Ratio (CSR) 指标，完美校准下为1，并从中导出风险概率 P_risk 量化过度自信证据。引入置信度加权准确率 cwA 作为互补度量，并扩展至所有标准分类指标，证明置信度加权AUC (cwAUC) 能捕捉校准信息而传统AUC不能。
light_analysis.result: 在多个合成置信分布和校准配置下验证，CSR能有效区分风险与非风险分配。在15个真实数据集上，无论是否进行事后校准，发现标准方法可能产生有风险的置信分布。
