light_analysis.conclusion: CSR和置信度加权指标提供了更全面的校准评估框架，揭示了标准方法可能隐藏的风险。未来可应用于模型可靠性评估和安全关键系统。

title: The Reasoning Trap: An Information-Theoretic Bound on Closed-System Multi-Step LLM Reasoning
abstract: When copies of the same language model are prompted to debate, they produce diverse phrasings of one perspective rather than diverse perspectives. Multi-agent debate (MAD), and more broadly closed-system reasoning where agents iteratively transform each other's outputs, tends to preserve answer accuracy while degrading the reasoning behind those answers. We name the multi-agent case the Debate Trap and the broader phenomenon the Reasoning Trap, offering a programmatic theory of evidence-grounded reasoning failure.The framework has three parts: (i) SFS (Supported Faithfulness Score), a claim-level metric verifying decomposed atomic claims against provided evidence (decomposer-invariant rankings: Spearman rho=1.0); (ii) EGSR (Evidence-Grounded Socratic Reasoning), replacing adversarial argumentation with evidence-grounded inquiry; (iii) Theorem 1 (DPI Bound): under standard MAD, the chain E -> O^0 -> O^1 -> ... is Markov, and the Data Processing Inequality implies E[I(E;O^{t+1})] <= E[I(E;O^t)]. Three companion results -- open-system recovery (Theorem 2), EGSR accumulation (Lemma 2), and vote-aggregation floor (Proposition 1) -- partition multi-step LLM reasoning by its information-theoretic relationship to E. Across 16 conditions on SciFact (300 claims) and FEVER (1,000 claims), DebateCV (C13) preserves 88% of baseline accuracy while SFS drops 43%; majority-vote MAD (C15) reduces SFS to 1.7% of baseline (p < 10^{-6}, d = -0.96); EGSR recovers 98%. An R6 cohort study (Korean n=10x30 FEVER; English n=3x200 SciFact) finds inter-rater Fleiss kappa <= +0.018 with 0.8-1.4 Likert intra-rater shifts across language and domain -- the human agreement that faithfulness metrics have been calibrated against is not itself stable. We offer one falsifiable conjecture: any closed-system reasoning protocol preserving Theorem 1's Markov structure is, in expectation, subject to the same DPI bound.
comment: 23 pages, 18 figures, 4 tables, 126 references. Subtitle: A Falsifiable Theorem, the Multi-Agent-Debate Instantiation, and a Triple Failure of Human Reliability

light_analysis.overview: 揭示封闭系统多步LLM推理的“推理陷阱”并给出信息论下界，提出EGSR方法恢复推理真实性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多智能体辩论（MAD）中，相同模型副本产生单一视角的重复表述，而非多样化观点，导致推理真实性下降。现有方法在保持答案准确性的同时，推理质量严重退化。该问题对依赖多步推理的LLM应用至关重要，但缺乏理论解释和有效解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出三部分框架：(i) SFS指标，分解原子主张并验证证据支撑，实现分解器不变的排名（Spearman rho=1.0）；(ii) EGSR，用证据引导的探究替代对抗性论证；(iii) 定理1 (DPI界)，证明MAD下信息链满足数据不等式，及三个伴随结果（开放系统恢复、EGSR累积、投票聚合下限）。
light_analysis.result: 在SciFact（300条声明）和FEVER（1000条声明）的16种条件下，辩论CV（C13）保留88%基线准确率但SFS下降43%；多数投票MAD（C15）使SFS降至基线1.7%（p<10^-6, d=-0.96）；EGSR恢复98% SFS。人类评估显示Fleiss kappa ≤ +0.018，评分者内信度不稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文从信息论角度解释了闭式系统推理退化的原因，提出了EGSR作为有效补救措施，并揭示了现有真实性度量的不稳定性。该工作对提升LLM推理透明度和可信度具有重要价值，为未来设计开放的推理协议提供了理论基础。

title: Beyond Perceptual Shortcuts: Causal-Inspired Debiasing Optimization for Generalizable Video Reasoning in Lightweight MLLMs
abstract: Although reinforcement learning (RL) has significantly advanced reasoning capabilities in large multimodal language models (MLLMs), its efficacy remains limited for lightweight models essential for edge deployments. To address this issue, we leverage causal analysis and experiment to reveal the underlying phenomenon of perceptual bias, demonstrating that RL-based fine-tuning compels lightweight models to preferentially adopt perceptual shortcuts induced by data biases, rather than developing genuine reasoning abilities. Motivated by this insight, we propose VideoThinker, a causal-inspired framework that cultivates robust reasoning in lightweight models through a two-stage debiasing process. First, the Bias Aware Training stage forges a dedicated "bias model" to embody these shortcut behaviors. Then, the Causal Debiasing Policy Optimization (CDPO) algorithm fine-tunes the primary model, employing an innovative repulsive objective to actively push it away from the bias model's flawed logic while simultaneously pulling it toward correct, generalizable solutions. Our model, VideoThinker-R1, establishes a new state-of-the-art in video reasoning efficiency. For same-scale comparison, requiring no Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and using only 1 of the training data for RL, it surpasses VideoRFT-3B with a 3.2% average gain on widely-used benchmarks and a 7% lead on VideoMME. For cross-scale comparison, it outperforms the larger Video-UTR-7B model on multiple benchmarks, including a 2.1% gain on MVBench and a 3.8% gain on TempCompass. Code is available at https://github.com/falonss703/VideoThinker.

light_analysis.overview: 提出因果启发去偏框架VideoThinker，通过两阶段优化解决轻量级多模态大模型的感知偏置问题，提升视频推理泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习虽能提升大语言模型的推理能力，但对轻量级模型（边缘部署必需）效果有限。研究通过因果分析揭示，基于RL的微调会迫使轻量级模型优先利用数据偏置导致的感知捷径，而非发展真正推理能力。该问题影响模型泛化性，亟需针对性去偏方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出VideoThinker框架，包含两阶段去偏：1) Bias Aware Training阶段，构建专用偏置模型以模拟捷径行为；2) Causal Debiasing Policy Optimization (CDPO)算法，采用排斥目标推动主模型远离偏置逻辑，同时拉向正确解。无需监督微调，仅用1%训练数据。
light_analysis.result: 在同规模对比中，VideoThinker-R1超越VideoRFT-3B，在主流基准平均提升3.2%，VideoMME上领先7%。跨规模对比中，超越更大模型Video-UTR-7B，MVBench提升2.1%，TempCompass提升3.8%。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次从因果视角揭示轻量级模型RL微调中的感知偏置问题，并提出有效去偏框架。学术上深化了对模型推理机制的理解，实际价值在于实现边缘设备上高效、泛化的视频推理。未来可探索更复杂因果结构。

title: ScribbleEdit: Synthetic Data for Image Editing with Scribbles and Text
abstract: Recent progress in generative models has significantly advanced image editing capabilities, yet precise and intuitive user control remains difficult. Specifically, users often struggle to communicate both exact spatial layouts and specific semantic details simultaneously. While natural language instructions effectively convey high-level semantics like texture and color, they lack spatial specificity. Conversely, freehand scribbles provide rough spatial boundaries but cannot express detailed visual attributes. Consequently, achieving precise control requires combining both modalities. However, existing models struggle to jointly interpret abstract scribbles alongside text due to a lack of specialized training data.   In this work, we introduce ScribbleEdit, a large-scale synthetic dataset designed to bridge this gap by combining natural language instructions with freehand scribble inputs for more accurate, controllable edits. We construct this dataset through a synthetic pipeline that automatically generates source-target image pairs via inpainting, which are then paired with human-drawn scribbles and VLM-generated text instructions. Using ScribbleEdit, we evaluate and finetune both diffusion-based and autoregressive unified multimodal image editing models. Our experiments reveal that while off-the-shelf models struggle with abstract scribble inputs, finetuning on our synthetic dataset significantly improves their ability to generate spatially aligned and semantically consistent edits.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ScribbleEdit，首个结合自然语言与手绘涂鸦的大规模合成数据集，显著提升图像编辑的空间对齐与语义一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像编辑方法难以同时实现精确的空间布局和语义细节控制：自然语言缺乏空间特异性，手绘涂鸦无法表达视觉属性。现有模型因缺乏联合解释抽象涂鸦与文本的训练数据，导致编辑效果不佳。因此需要构建专用数据集来弥合这一差距。
light_analysis.method: 通过合成流水线自动生成源-目标图像对（基于inpainting），并与人工绘制的涂鸦和VLM生成的文本指令配对，构建ScribbleEdit数据集。基于该数据集微调扩散模型和自回归统一多模态图像编辑模型，使其学会联合理解涂鸦和文本。
light_analysis.result: 在ScribbleEdit上评估发现，现成模型难以处理抽象涂鸦输入；而经过微调后，模型在生成空间对齐和语义一致的编辑结果上显著改善。摘要未报告具体数值指标，但通过定性结果和用户研究验证了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ScribbleEdit填补了涂鸦+文本联合训练数据的空白，为图像编辑提供更直观的控制方式。微调实验证明其能有效提升模型性能，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来可扩展数据集规模或应用于更多编辑模型。

title: Learning in the Fisher Subspace: A Guided Initialization for LoRA Fine-Tuning
abstract: LoRA adapts large language models (LLMs) by restricting updates to low-rank subspaces of pre-trained weights. While this substantially reduces training cost, the effectiveness of adaptation critically depends on which subspace is chosen at initialization: a poor initialization that allocates capacity to task-irrelevant directions can severely hinder downstream performance. Existing initialization strategies primarily rely on the intrinsic properties of pre-trained weights, implicitly assuming that weight geometry alone reflects task relevance. However, such criteria overlook how the model interacts with the downstream data distribution. In this work, we formulate LoRA initialization as identifying the degree of impact of directions in parameter space under the target data distribution. We argue that data-aware sensitivity, rather than weight-only magnitude, should govern the choice of adaptation subspaces. Building on this perspective, we propose a Fisher-guided framework that leverages curvature information induced by downstream data to characterize how parameter perturbations influence model predictions. This perspective yields a principled, task-dependent criterion for selecting LoRA directions that better align adaptation with the target objective. Empirical results across diverse tasks and modalities demonstrate that data-aware initialization consistently and significantly improves downstream performance over existing approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Fisher信息的数据感知初始化方法，指导LoRA微调中选择与下游任务相关的低秩子空间，提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: LoRA通过限制权重更新到低秩子空间来降低微调成本，但初始化的子空间选择至关重要：若分配到任务无关方向会严重损害性能。现有初始化方法依赖于预训练权重的固有属性（如奇异值），假设权重几何本身反映任务相关性，忽略了模型与下游数据分布之间的交互。因此，需要一种任务相关的、数据感知的初始化准则。
light_analysis.method: 提出Fisher-guided初始化框架，利用下游数据诱导的曲率信息（Fisher信息矩阵）来刻画参数扰动对预测的影响，从而识别参数空间中方向的重要性。该方法将LoRA初始化形式化为在目标数据分布下选择最影响模型输出的方向，而非仅依赖权重幅度。通过Fisher信息提供任务依赖的准则，确保分配容量到与下游目标对齐的子空间。
light_analysis.result: 在多种任务和模态上的实验结果表明，所提出的数据感知初始化方法相较于现有方法持续且显著地提升了下游性能。摘要未给出具体数值，但强调改进是“consistent and significant”。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次从数据感知角度解决LoRA初始化问题，提出Fisher-guided框架，论证了考虑数据分布对参数方向敏感性的必要性。该方法具有学术价值，可推广至其他参数高效微调方法。潜在局限性可能包括Fisher信息计算开销，但摘要未明确说明。未来工作可探索更高效的计算方式或扩展到更多模型架构。

title: Algebraic Semantics of Governed Execution: Monoidal Categories, Effect Algebras, and Coterminous Boundaries
abstract: We present an algebraic semantics for governed execution in which governance is axiomatized, compositional, and coterminous with expressibility. The framework, mechanized in 32 Rocq modules (~12,000 lines, 454 theorems, 0 admitted), is built on interaction trees and parameterized coinduction. A three-axiom GovernanceAlgebra record (safety, transparency, properness) induces a symmetric monoidal category with verified pentagon, triangle, and hexagon coherence, where every tensor composition preserves governance. An algebraic effect system constrains the handler algebra so that only governance-preserving handlers can be constructed in the safe fragment; programs in the empty capability set provably emit only observability directives. Capability-indexed composition bundles programs with machine-checked capability bounds, and a dual guarantee theorem establishes that within_caps and gov_safe hold simultaneously under all composition operators. The capstone result is the coterminous boundary: within our formal model, every program expressible via the four primitive morphism constructors is governed under interpretation, and every governed program is the image of such a program. Turing completeness is preserved inside governance; unmediated I/O is excluded from the governed fragment. Governance denial is modeled as safe coinductive divergence. The governance algebra is parametric: any system instantiating the three axioms inherits all derived properties, including convergence, compositional closure, and goal preservation. Extracted OCaml runs as a NIF in the BEAM runtime, with property-based testing (70,000+ random inputs, zero disagreements) confirming behavioral equivalence between the specification and the runtime interpreter.
comment: 26 pages, 1 figure, 1 table. Companion proofs: https://github.com/mashin-live/governance-proofs. Project: https://mashin.live

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于代数语义的受控执行框架，通过三公理治理代数诱导对称幺半范畴，实现治理与表达能力的共端边界，并在Rocq中机械化验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有系统缺乏形式化、组合化的治理语义，导致安全性和透明度难以保证。本文旨在建立公理化的代数语义，使治理与表达能力同界，并通过机械化证明确保正确性。
light_analysis.method: 基于交互树和参数化余归纳，定义三公理治理代数（安全、透明、正当），构造对称幺半范畴。效应系统约束处理器代数，仅允许治理保留的处理器。能力索引组合程序形成边界，共端边界定理证明可表达程序与受控程序一一对应，图灵完备性保留，未中介I/O排除。
light_analysis.result: 在32个Rocq模块（~12000行，454个定理，0个待定）中完成机械化证明。提取的OCaml在BEAM运行时作为NIF运行，属性测试（70000+随机输入，零分歧）确认规范与解释器行为等价。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了形式化、组合化的受控执行代数语义，具有参数化和机械化验证特性。主要贡献包括治理代数、幺半范畴、效应系统和共端边界定理，为系统安全提供形式化保障。未来可扩展至实际系统，但当前模型仅覆盖理论层面。

title: Effect-Transparent Governance for AI Workflow Architectures: Semantic Preservation, Expressive Minimality, and Decidability Boundaries
abstract: We present a machine-checked formalization of structurally governed AI workflow architectures and prove that effect-level governance can be imposed without reducing internal computational expressivity. Using Interaction Trees in Rocq 8.19, we define a governance operator G that mediates all effectful directives, including memory access, external calls, and oracle (LLM) queries. Our development compiles with 0 admitted lemmas and consists of 36 modules, ~12,000 lines of Rocq, and 454 theorems. We establishseven properties: (P1) governed Turing completeness, (P2) governed oracle expressivity, (P3) a decidability boundary in which governance predicates are total and closed under Boolean composition while semantic program properties remain non-trivial and undecidable by governance, (P4) goal preservation for permitted executions, (P5) expressive minimality of primitive capabilities (compute, memory, reasoning, external call, observability), (P6) subsumption asymmetry showing structural governance strictly subsumes content-level filtering, and (P7) semantic transparency: on all executions where governance permits, the governed interpretation is observationally equivalent (modulo governance-only events) to the ungoverned interpretation. Together, these results show that governance and computational expressivity are orthogonal dimensions: governance constrains the effect boundary of programs while remaining semantically transparent to internal computation.
comment: 15 pages. Companion proofs: https://github.com/mashin-live/governance-proofs. Project: https://mashin.live. v2: corrected cross-reference identifiers for companion papers

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种机器检查的形式化方法，证明AI工作流中效应级治理与计算表达性正交，可在不减少表达力的同时实现语义透明治理。
light_analysis.motivation: AI工作流需要安全、伦理等治理约束，但现有方法常牺牲表达能力或可判定性。该研究旨在形式化证明治理与计算能力不冲突，为可治理的AI系统提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 使用Interaction Trees在Rocq 8.19中定义了治理算子G，通过36个模块、约12,000行代码和454个定理进行形式化验证。建立了七条关键性质，包括图灵完备性保持、可判定性边界和语义透明性。
light_analysis.result: 成功编译为0个未证明引理。形式化证明了治理后系统仍保持图灵完备性和oracle表达能力，且治理谓词可判定。语义透明性表明允许的执行在观测上等价于无治理版本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作表明治理与计算表达性是正交维度，为AI工作流治理提供了形式化基础。学术上推进了形式化方法在AI治理中的应用，实践上可指导设计兼具安全性和表达力的系统。未来需探索实际部署中的效率问题。

title: The Two Boundaries: Why Behavioral AI Governance Fails Structurally
abstract: Every system that performs effects has two boundaries: what it can do (expressiveness) and what governance covers (governance). In nearly all deployed AI systems, these boundaries are defined independently, creating three regions: governed capabilities (the only useful region), ungoverned capabilities (risk), and governance policies that address non-existent capabilities (theater). Two of the three regions are failure modes. We focus on the governance of effects: actions that AI systems perform in the world (API calls, database writes, tool invocations). This is distinct from the governance of model outputs (content quality, bias, fairness), which operates at a different level and requires different mechanisms. We present a formal framework for analyzing this structural gap. Rice's theorem (1953) proves the gap is undecidable in the general case for any Turing-complete architecture that attempts to govern effects behaviorally: no algorithm can decide non-trivial semantic properties of arbitrary programs, including the property "this program's effects comply with the governance policy." We define coterminous governance: a system property where the expressivenessboundary equals the governance boundary. We show that coterminous governance requires an architectural decision (separatingcomputation from effect) rather than a governance layer added after the fact. We show that structural governance under this separation subsumes separate governance infrastructure: governance checks become part of the execution pipeline rather than a second system running alongside it. We propose coterminous governance as the testable criterion for any AI governance system: either the two boundaries are provably identical, or risk and theater are structurally inevitable. Proofs are mechanized in Coq (454 theorems, 36 modules, 0 admitted).
comment: 17 pages, 2 figures. Companion proofs: https://github.com/mashin-live/governance-proofs. Project: https://mashin.live. v2: corrected cross-reference identifiers for companion papers

light_analysis.overview: 提出行为AI治理结构失效的根本原因是表达边界与治理边界的不一致，并提出共边治理作为可测试的解决标准。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI系统的表达能力边界与治理边界独立定义，导致三种区域：受治理能力（唯一有效）、未治理能力（风险）和无效治理（作秀），其中两种是失效模式。该问题源于行为治理的结构性缺陷，且Rice定理证明对图灵完备系统，行为治理的通用情况不可判定。因此需要从架构层面解决治理与能力的对齐问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文形式化分析结构差距，提出共边治理（coterminous governance），要求表达能力边界等于治理边界。实现需架构决策：将计算与效应分离，使治理检查成为执行流水线的一部分而非额外系统。通过Coq机械证明454个定理、36个模块验证框架正确性。
light_analysis.result: 证明在一般图灵完备架构下，行为治理存在不可判定性（Rice定理）。共边治理作为可测试标准：要么两边界可证明相等，否则风险和作秀结构上不可避免。Coq形式化验证了454个定理，无假设。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示AI治理失败的结构性原因，提出共边治理作为必要架构原则。强调治理需内建于系统而非附加层，对安全关键AI系统有重要指导意义。未来可扩展至具体架构实现及非图灵完备系统的治理分析。

title: Mechanized Foundations of Structural Governance: Machine-Checked Proofs for Governed Intelligence
abstract: We present five results in the theory of structural governance for cognitive workflow systems. Three are mechanized in Coq 8.19 using the Interaction Trees library with parameterized coinduction; two are proved on paper with explicit reductions. The Coinductive Safety Predicate (gov_safe) is a coinductive property that captures governance safety for infinite program behaviors, indexed by a boolean permission flag that is provably false for ungoverned I/O and true for governed interpretations (mechanized). The Governance Invariance Theorem establishes that governance is uniform across the meta-recursive tower: governance at level n+1 reduces to governance at level n by definitional equality of the type (mechanized). The Sufficiency Theorem proves that four atomic primitives (code, reason, memory, call) are expressively complete for any discrete intelligent system, formalized as compositional closure of a Kleisli category (mechanized). The Alternating Normal Form provides a canonical decomposition of any machine into alternating code and effect layers, with a confluent rewriting system (paper proof). The Necessity Theorem proves via explicit reduction to Rice's theorem that an architecturally opaque component (the reason primitive) is mathematically necessary for problems requiring semantic judgment (paper proof). A sixth contribution connects the abstract model to the deployed runtime: the Verified Interpreter Specification formalizes the BEAM runtime's trust, capability, and hash chain logic in Coq, then tests the running system against this specification using property-based testing with over 70,000 randomly generated directive sequences and zero disagreements. The mechanization comprises approximately 12,000 lines across 36 modules with 454 theorems and zero admitted lemmas.
comment: 27 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. Code and proofs: https://github.com/mashin-live/governance-proofs. Project: https://mashin.live. v2: corrected cross-reference identifiers for companion papers

light_analysis.overview: 提出结构性治理理论的五个机械化证明结果，包括共归纳安全谓词、治理不变性定理等，并在Coq中实现约12000行代码的验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 认知工作流系统需要形式化保证治理安全性，但现有方法缺乏对无限程序行为的严谨验证。本文旨在建立结构性治理的数学基础，通过机械化证明确保智能系统中治理机制的可靠性和一致性，解决因架构不透明导致的语义判断难题。
light_analysis.method: 使用Coq 8.19和Interaction Trees库进行参数化共归纳机械化证明。定义共归纳安全谓词（gov_safe）索引布尔权限标志；证明治理不变性定理，显示治理在元递归塔中逐层归约；通过Kleisli范畴的组合闭包证明四个原子原语的表达完全性；用纸笔证明交替范式分解和必要性定理（归约至Rice定理）。还提供BEAM运行时的验证解释器规范，包含信任、能力和哈希链逻辑。
light_analysis.result: 机械化证明包含454个定理，零接纳引理，覆盖36个模块约12000行代码。通过属性基测试，对超过70,000个随机生成的指令序列进行检验，未发现与规范的分歧，验证了抽象模型与运行时的一致性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为智能工作流系统的治理提供了形式化基础，通过机械化证明确保了理论结果的正确性。验证解释器规范桥接了抽象模型与具体实现，具有重要的理论价值和实际应用意义。未来可扩展至更复杂的治理策略和运行时验证。

title: Architectural Observability Collapse in Transformers
abstract: Activation monitoring can catch confident errors in autoregressive transformers only if training preserved an internal decision-quality signal that output confidence does not expose. Monitorability is an architectural property before it is a monitor-design problem. We define observability: the linear readability of per-token decision quality from frozen mid-layer activations after controlling for max-softmax confidence and activation norm. Confidence controls absorb on average 60.3% of raw probe signal across 14 models in 6 families.   Observability is not a generic property of transformers. In Pythia's controlled suite, all three tested runs at the 24-layer, 16-head configuration collapse to rho_partial ~0.10 across a 3.5x parameter gap and two Pile variants, while six other configurations occupy a separated healthy band from 0.21 to 0.38. The output-controlled residual r_OC collapses at the same points; neither nonlinear probes nor layer sweeps recover healthy-range signal. Checkpoint dynamics localize the cause: both matched-width configurations form the signal at the earliest measured checkpoint, and training erases it in the 1.4B even as it reaches lower final loss than the 1B.   Across independent recipes the collapse map changes but the phenomenon persists. Qwen 2.5 and Llama differ by 2.9x at matched 3B scale, with probe-seed distributions that do not overlap. Mistral 7B v0.3 preserves observability where Llama 3.1 8B collapses at identical 32-layer, 32-head, 4096-hidden shape. Within Qwen 2.5, observability persists from 0.5B through 32B. A WikiText-trained observer transfers to downstream QA without task-specific training: at 20% flag rate, exclusive catch reaches 10.9-13.4% in seven of nine model-task cells, near the 12-15% language-modeling ceiling. Architecture selection is a monitoring decision.
comment: 31 pages, 8 figures, 11 tables. v2 of arXiv:2604.24801. Full changelog: https://github.com/tmcarmichael/nn-observability/blob/v4.0.0/CHANGELOG.md. Code and data: https://github.com/tmcarmichael/nn-observability/releases/tag/v4.0.0 (commit 33bb8379); Croissant 1.1 metadata at croissant.json; archive: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20034469

light_analysis.overview: 发现Transformer架构中可观察性（observability）的崩溃现象，并分析其与模型规模和训练动态的关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 激活监控可捕捉自回归变换器中的自信错误，但前提是训练保留了内部决策质量信号。现有方法未系统研究架构本身对可监控性的影响。本文通过定义可观察性（从冻结中层激活线性可读的逐token决策质量），发现该性质不是Transformer的通用属性，不同配置下差异显著，这为设计可监控AI系统提供重要依据。
light_analysis.method: 定义可观察性为控制max-softmax置信度和激活范数后，从中间层激活中线性可读的决策质量。使用探针（probe）在Pythia、Qwen、Llama等多个模型家族上测试。分析特定配置（如Pythia 24层16头）下可观察性崩溃，并通过检查点动态定位信号在早期训练形成但被后期训练擦除。
light_analysis.result: 在14个模型6个家族中，置信度控制平均吸收60.3%原始探针信号。Pythia中24层16头配置在3.5倍参数差距下偏相关系数约0.10，其他配置在0.21-0.38。Qwen 2.5和Llama在相同3B规模差异2.9倍，Mistral 7B保持可观察性而Llama 3.1 8B崩溃。从0.5B到32B的Qwen中可观察性持续。WikiText训练后转移至下游QA时，20%标记率下专属捕获率10.9-13.4%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明架构选择本身就是监控决策，不同模型配置的可观察性差异巨大且与最终损失无关。这提示设计可监控AI系统时需谨慎选择架构，未来可研究克服可观察性崩溃的机制，如通过训练正则化或架构改进保持内部信号。

title: ClawMark: A Living-World Benchmark for Multi-Turn, Multi-Day, Multimodal Coworker Agents
abstract: Language-model agents are increasingly used as persistent coworkers that assist users across multiple working days. During such workflows, the surrounding environment may change independently of the agent: new emails arrive, calendar entries shift, knowledge-base records are updated, and evidence appears across images, scanned PDFs, audio, video, and spreadsheets. Existing benchmarks do not adequately evaluate this setting because they typically run within a single static episode and remain largely text-centric. We introduce \bench{}, a benchmark for coworker agents built around multi-turn multi-day tasks, a stateful sandboxed service environment whose state evolves between turns, and rule-based verification. The current release contains 100 tasks across 13 professional scenarios, executed against five stateful sandboxed services (filesystem, email, calendar, knowledge base, spreadsheet) and scored by 1537 deterministic Python checkers over post-execution service state; no LLM-as-judge is invoked during scoring. We benchmark seven frontier agent systems. The strongest model reaches 75.8 weighted score, but the best strict Task Success is only 20.0\%, indicating that partial progress is common while complete end-to-end workflow completion remains rare. Turn-level analysis shows that performance drops after the first exogenous environment update, highlighting adaptation to changing state as a key open challenge. We release the benchmark, evaluation harness, and construction pipeline to support reproducible coworker-agent evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ClawMark基准，用于评估多轮、多天、多模态同事代理在动态环境中的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准主要在静态单轮文本环境中评估语言模型代理，无法测试代理在多工作日中适应环境变化（如新邮件、日历变更、知识库更新、多模态信息）的能力。随着持久性同事代理的普及，急需一个能反映真实工作流程的评估基准。
light_analysis.method: ClawMark包含100个任务，涵盖13个专业场景，使用五个有状态沙盒服务（文件系统、邮件、日历、知识库、电子表格）。任务采用多轮多天设计，环境回合间自主演化。评分基于1537个确定性Python检查器，无需LLM评判。
light_analysis.result: 评估7个前沿代理系统，最强模型加权得分75.8，但严格任务成功率仅20.0%。回合分析表明，首次外源环境更新后性能显著下降，凸显适应动态状态的关键挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: ClawMark填补了持久性同事代理评估空白，提供可重复基准。当前代理在端到端工作流完成和动态适应方面仍有不足，为未来研究指明了方向。基准、评估工具和构建流程已开源。

title: Different Strokes for Different Folks: Writer Identification for Historical Arabic Manuscripts
abstract: Handwritten Arabic manuscripts preserve the Arab world's intellectual and cultural heritage, and writer identification supports provenance, authenticity verification, and historical analysis. Using the Muharaf dataset of historical Arabic manuscripts, we evaluate writer identification from individual line images and, to the best of our knowledge, provide the first baselines reported under both line-level and page-disjoint evaluation protocols. Since the dataset is only partially labeled for writer identification, we manually verified and expanded writer labels in the public portion from 6,858 (28.00%) to 21,249 lines (86.75%) out of 24,495 line images, correcting inconsistencies and removing non-handwritten text. After further filtering, we retained 18,987 lines (77.51%). We propose a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)-based model with attention mechanisms for closed-set writer identification, including rare two-writer lines modeled as composite writer-pair classes. We benchmark fourteen configurations and conduct ablations across different feature extractors and training regimes. To assess generalization to unseen pages, the page-disjoint protocol assigns all lines from each page to a single split. Under the line-level protocol, a fine-tuned DenseNet201 with attention achieves 99.05% Top-1 accuracy, 99.73% Top-5 accuracy, and 97.44% F1-score. Under the more challenging page-disjoint protocol, the best observed results are 78.61% Top-1 accuracy, 87.79% Top-5 accuracy, and 66.55% F1-score, thus quantifying the impact of page-level cues. By expanding the Muharaf dataset's labeled subset and reporting both protocols, we provide a clearer benchmark and a practical resource for historians and linguists engaged with culturally and historically significant documents. The code and implementation details are available on GitHub.
comment: 29 pages, 13 figures, 31 tables. Accepted for publication in the International Journal on Document Analysis and Recognition (IJDAR)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于CNN和注意力机制的书法家识别方法，扩展Muharaf数据集标注，在线级和页面分离协议下建立基线。
light_analysis.motivation: 历史阿拉伯手稿是文化遗产的重要载体，书法家识别有助于溯源、真伪鉴定和历史分析。现有Muharaf数据集标注不完整（仅28%行有标签），且缺乏统一的评估协议，阻碍了方法比较。
light_analysis.method: 手动扩展Muharaf数据集标签至86.75%的行，并提出CNN+注意力模型用于闭集识别，将罕见的两书法家行建模为复合类。基准测试14种配置，进行特征提取器和训练策略消融。采用线级和页面分离（每页全部分到同一划分）两种协议评估。
light_analysis.result: 线级协议下，微调DenseNet201+注意力达Top-1 99.05%、Top-5 99.73%、F1 97.44%。页面分离协议下最佳Top-1 78.61%、Top-5 87.79%、F1 66.55%，表明页面级线索显著影响性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 扩展了Muharaf数据集标注并建立了两种协议下的基线，为阿拉伯手稿书法家识别提供更清晰的基准。代码开源，有助于历史学家和语言学家分析文化典籍。未来需提升跨页面泛化能力。

title: StackFeat RL: Reinforcement Learning over Iterative Dual Criterion Feature Selection for Stable Biomarker Discovery
abstract: Feature selection in high-dimensional genomic data ($d \gg n$) demands methods that are simultaneously accurate, sparse, and stable. Existing approaches either require manual threshold specification (mRMR, stability selection), produce unstable selections under data perturbation (Lasso, Boruta), or ignore biological structure entirely. We introduce StackFeat-RL, a meta-learning framework that optimises the hyperparameters of an iterative dual-criterion feature selection algorithm via REINFORCE policy gradients. The dual criterion, requiring both coefficient consistency and selection frequency, guards against two failure modes missed by single-criterion methods, while iterative accumulation provides convergence guarantees via the law of large numbers.   On COVID-19 miRNA data (GSE240888, 332 features) and three Alzheimer's disease classification tasks (GSE84422, 13237 genes; Normal vs.\ Possible, Probable, and Definite AD), StackFeat-RL achieves the highest predictive accuracy among all evaluated methods, including ElasticNet, Boruta, mRMR, and stability selection, while requiring 3--4$\times$ fewer features.   Keywords: feature selection, reinforcement learning, REINFORCE, elastic net, biomarker discovery, Alzheimer's disease, dual-criterion selection, protein interaction networks

light_analysis.overview: 提出StackFeat-RL，用强化学习优化双准则特征选择的超参数，实现高维基因组数据的稳定精准特征选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 高维基因组数据(d≫n)的特征选择需要同时满足准确性、稀疏性和稳定性。现有方法如mRMR、稳定性选择需手动设定阈值，Lasso、Boruta在数据扰动下选择不稳定，且忽略生物结构。单准则方法易遗漏两种失败模式，亟需一种自动、稳定且稀疏的特征选择方法，以提升生物标志物发现的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: StackFeat-RL采用元学习框架，通过REINFORCE策略梯度优化迭代双准则特征选择算法的超参数。双准则同时要求系数一致性和选择频率，克服单准则的两种失败模式；迭代累积利用大数定律提供收敛保证。无需人工阈值设定，自动学习最优超参数组合。
light_analysis.result: 在COVID-19 miRNA数据集(GSE240888, 332特征)和三个阿尔茨海默病分类任务(GSE84422, 13237基因；正常vs可能、很可能、明确AD)上，StackFeat-RL在预测准确率上超过ElasticNet、Boruta、mRMR和稳定性选择，同时所需特征数量减少3-4倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: StackFeat-RL为高维基因组特征选择提供了兼顾准确性、稀疏性和稳定性的解决方案，通过强化学习自动调优双准则选择策略。在COVID-19和阿尔茨海默病生物标志物发现中表现优异，具有临床应用潜力。未来可扩展至其他组学数据及多模态生物标志物整合。

title: SOC-ICNN: From Polyhedral to Conic Geometry for Learning Convex Surrogate Functions
abstract: Classical ReLU-based Input Convex Neural Networks (ICNNs) are equivalent to the optimal value functions of Linear Programming (LP). This intrinsic structural equivalence restricts their representational capacity to piecewise-linear polyhedral functions. To overcome this representational bottleneck, we propose the SOC-ICNN, an architecture that generalizes the underlying optimization class from LP to Second-Order Cone Programming (SOCP). By explicitly injecting positive semi-definite curvature and Euclidean norm-based conic primitives, our formulation introduces native smooth curvature into the representation while preserving a rigorous optimization-theoretic interpretation. We formally prove that SOC-ICNNs strictly expand the representational space of ReLU-ICNNs without increasing the asymptotic order of forward-pass complexity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SOC-ICNN substantially improves function approximation, while delivering competitive downstream decision quality. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SOC-ICNN-4B18/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SOC-ICNN架构，将输入凸神经网络从线性规划推广到二阶锥规划，引入平滑曲率，扩展表达能力而不增加渐近复杂度。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统的基于ReLU的输入凸神经网络(ICNN)等价于线性规划的最优值函数，其表示能力局限于分段线性多面体函数。这种结构瓶颈限制了ICNN在需要平滑曲率的任务中的表现。为此，需要一种能引入本征平滑曲率同时保持优化理论解释的方法，以扩展ICNN的表示空间。
light_analysis.method: 提出SOC-ICNN架构，将底层优化类从线性规划推广到二阶锥规划(SOCP)。通过显式注入正半定曲率和基于欧几里得范数的锥原语，在表示中引入本征平滑曲率，同时保留严格的优化理论解释。理论证明SOC-ICNN严格扩展了ReLU-ICNN的表示空间，且前向传播的渐近复杂度不变。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，SOC-ICNN在函数逼近任务上显著优于传统ReLU-ICNN，同时在下游决策任务中保持竞争力。具体性能提升体现在更好的逼近精度和相似的决策质量，验证了架构的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SOC-ICNN通过引入二阶锥规划原语，成功解决了ReLU-ICNN表示能力受限的问题，为凸神经网络提供了更丰富的表示能力。该工作具有重要的理论价值，将凸函数学习与优化理论紧密联系，并在实际应用中表现出优越性。未来可探索更复杂的锥规划扩展及在大规模问题上的应用。

title: Poly-EPO: Training Exploratory Reasoning Models
abstract: Exploration is a cornerstone of learning from experience: it enables agents to find solutions to complex problems, generalize to novel ones, and scale performance with test-time compute. In this paper, we present a framework for post-training language models (LMs) that explicitly encourages optimistic exploration and promotes a synergy between exploration and exploitation. The central idea is to train the LM to generate sets of responses that are collectively accurate under the reward function and exploratory in their reasoning strategies. We first develop a general recipe for optimizing LMs with set reinforcement learning (set RL) under arbitrary objective functions, showing how standard RL algorithms can be adapted to this setting through a modification to the advantage computation. We then propose Polychromic Exploratory Policy Optimization (Poly-EPO), which instantiates this framework with an objective that explicitly synergizes exploration and exploitation. Across a range of reasoning benchmarks, we show that Poly-EPO improves generalization, as evidenced by higher pass@$k$ coverage, preserves greater diversity in model generations, and effectively scales with test-time compute.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Poly-EPO框架，通过集合强化学习训练语言模型，实现乐观探索与利用的协同，提升推理泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 探索是经验学习的基础，使智能体能够解决复杂问题、泛化到新任务并随测试时间计算扩展性能。现有语言模型后训练方法未能充分鼓励探索行为，或缺乏对探索与利用的协同优化。为此，本文旨在开发一种显式促进乐观探索并协同探索与利用的训练框架，以提升模型在推理任务上的泛化能力和多样性。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出Poly-EPO框架。首先建立通用集合强化学习方法，通过修改优势计算使标准RL算法适应集合目标。然后提出Polychromic Exploratory Policy Optimization (Poly-EPO)，定义显式协同探索与利用的优化目标，训练语言模型生成一组在奖励函数下集体准确且推理策略多样的响应。该方法无需额外数据集，直接对预训练模型进行后训练。
light_analysis.result: 在多个推理基准上，Poly-EPO相比基线方法取得显著改进：pass@k覆盖率更高，表明泛化能力提升；模型生成响应的多样性得到保留；随着测试时间计算量增加，性能有效扩展。实验证明了乐观探索策略对推理任务的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Poly-EPO为语言模型后训练提供了有效框架，通过协同探索与利用提升了推理泛化能力及多样性。该研究具有重要学术价值，可应用于需要复杂推理的AI系统。未来可探索更高效的集合优化算法以及在不同模型规模上的扩展性。

title: Scoring Edit Impact in Grammatical Error Correction via Embedded Association Graphs
abstract: A Grammatical Error Correction (GEC) system produces a sequence of edits to correct an erroneous sentence. The quality of these edits is typically evaluated against human annotations. However, a sentence may admit multiple valid corrections, and existing evaluation settings do not fully accommodate diverse application scenarios. Recent meta-evaluation approaches rely on human judgments across multiple references, but they are difficult to scale to large datasets. In this paper, we propose a new task, Scoring Edit Impact in GEC, which aims to automatically estimate the importance of edits produced by a GEC system. To address this task, we introduce a scoring framework based on an embedded association graph. The graph captures latent dependencies among edits and syntactically related edits, grouping them into coherent groups. We then perform perplexity-based scoring to estimate each edit's contribution to sentence fluency. Experiments across 4 GEC datasets, 4 languages, and 4 GEC systems demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms a range of baselines. Further analysis shows that the embedded association graph effectively captures cross-linguistic structural dependencies among edits.

light_analysis.overview: 提出评分编辑影响新任务，并设计基于嵌入关联图的自动评分框架，有效估计语法纠错中编辑的重要性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有GEC评价仅与单一人工标注对比，忽略多种有效更正；元评价依赖多参考人工判断，难以扩展。因此需要自动估计编辑重要性的方法，以支持多样化应用场景。
light_analysis.method: 基于嵌入关联图捕获编辑间潜在依赖及句法关联，将编辑分组；然后利用困惑度评分估计每组编辑对句子流畅度的贡献，从而量化单个编辑的重要性。
light_analysis.result: 在4个GEC数据集、4种语言和4个GEC系统上，该方法一致优于多种基线；进一步分析表明嵌入关联图能有效捕获跨语言的结构依赖关系。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出评分编辑影响任务及基于关联图的自动评分方法，为GEC评估提供了新视角；具有学术与应用价值，可扩展至更多语言和系统，未来可研究编辑组内交互效应。

title: Optimal Rates for Pure $\varepsilon$-Differentially Private Stochastic Convex Optimization with Heavy Tails
abstract: We study stochastic convex optimization (SCO) with heavy-tailed gradients under pure $\varepsilon$-differential privacy (DP). Instead of assuming a bound on the worst-case Lipschitz parameter of the loss, we assume only a bounded $k$-th moment. This assumption allows for unbounded, heavy-tailed stochastic gradient distributions, and can yield sharper excess risk bounds. Prior work characterized the minimax optimal rate for $ρ$-zero-concentrated DP SCO up to logarithmic factors in this setting, but the pure $\varepsilon$-DP case has remained open. We characterize the minimax optimal excess-risk rate for pure $\varepsilon$-DP heavy-tailed SCO up to logarithmic factors. Our algorithm achieves this rate in polynomial time with high probability. Moreover, it runs in deterministic polynomial time when the worst-case Lipschitz parameter is polynomially bounded. For important structured problem classes -- including hinge/ReLU-type and absolute-value losses on Euclidean balls, ellipsoids, and polytopes -- we achieve deterministic polynomial time even when the worst-case Lipschitz parameter is infinite. Our approach is based on a novel framework for privately optimizing Lipschitz extensions of the empirical loss. We complement our upper bound with a nearly matching high-probability lower bound.

light_analysis.overview: 本文刻画了纯ε-差分隐私下重尾随机凸优化的极小化最优超额风险率，并提出了多项式时间算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有随机凸优化研究常假设损失函数具有有界Lipschitz参数，但实际中梯度可能服从重尾分布，仅存在有界k阶矩。先前工作已刻画了ρ-零集中差分隐私下的最优率，但纯ε-差分隐私情形尚未解决。本文旨在填补这一空白，为更实际的非有界梯度设定提供理论保证。
light_analysis.method: 基于经验损失函数的Lipschitz扩展，设计了一个私有优化框架，通过构造平滑近似并应用扰动机制实现差分隐私。算法在多项式时间内达到极小化最优率，且当最坏情况Lipschitz参数有界时，运行时间为确定性多项式。针对铰链/ReLU型损失和绝对值损失等结构问题，即使Lipschitz参数无穷大也能实现确定性多项式时间。
light_analysis.result: 取得了与下界匹配的极小化最优超额风险率（对数因子内），并给出了高概率下界。算法在多项式时间内运行，且对特定结构问题可达到确定性多项式时间。理论结果不依赖于具体数值数据集，而是以问题参数（维数、矩阶数、隐私预算等）表示。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次完整刻画了纯ε-差分隐私下重尾随机凸优化的最优率，拓展了差分隐私优化理论。所提方法适用于多种结构问题，具有重要理论价值。未来可探索更高效的算法或更一般的假设。

title: How to measure the optimality of word or gesture order with respect to the principle of swap distance minimization
abstract: The structure of all the permutations of a sequence can be represented as a permutohedron, a graph where vertices are permutations and two vertices are linked if a swap of adjacent elements in the permutation of one of the vertices produces the permutation of the other vertex. It has been hypothesized that word orders in languages minimize the swap distance in the permutohedron: given a source order, word orders that are closer in the permutohedron should be less costly and thus more likely. Here we explain how to measure the degree of optimality of word order variation with respect to swap distance minimization. We illustrate the power of our novel mathematical framework by showing that crosslinguistic gestures are at least $77\%$ optimal. It is unlikely that the multiple times where crosslinguistic gestures hit optimality are due to chance. We establish the theoretical foundations for research on the optimality of word or gesture order with respect to swap distance minimization in communication systems. Finally, we introduce the quadratic assignment problem (QAP) into language research as an umbrella for multiple optimization problems and, accordingly, postulate a general principle of optimal assignment that unifies various linguistic principles including swap distance minimization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于置换多面体的数学框架，用于测量词序或手势顺序相对于交换距离最小化原则的最优性，并发现跨语言手势至少77%最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 先前假设语言词序在置换多面体中最小化交换距离，但缺乏量化最优性的方法。本文旨在建立理论框架验证该假设，并探索其普遍性，为语言中的顺序优化提供可测度基础。
light_analysis.method: 利用置换多面体图，通过相邻元素交换定义距离，测量顺序变体的最优性。基于跨语言手势数据计算实际顺序与理论最优的偏差，并引入二次分配问题（QAP）作为统一优化框架，将交换距离最小化与其他语言原则关联。
light_analysis.result: 跨语言手势顺序的最优性至少达到77%，且多次接近最优的概率显著低于随机水平，表明交换距离最小化原则在多种语言中稳定成立，支持其作为语言普遍规律的假设。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了交换距离最小化最优性的理论测度，证明了手势顺序的高度优化性。引入QAP将多个语言优化问题统一，为未来研究语言顺序的认知和进化机制提供了新工具，但需扩展至更多语言类型验证。

title: To Write or to Automate Linguistic Prompts, That Is the Question
abstract: LLM performance is highly sensitive to prompt design, yet whether automatic prompt optimization can replace expert prompt engineering in linguistic tasks remains unexplored. We present the first systematic comparison of hand-crafted zero-shot expert prompts, base DSPy signatures, and GEPA-optimized DSPy signatures across translation, terminology insertion, and language quality assessment, evaluating five model configurations. Results are task-dependent. In terminology insertion, optimized and manual prompts produce mostly statistically indistinguishable quality. In translation, each approach wins on different models. In LQA, expert prompts achieve stronger error detection while optimization improves characterization. Across all tasks, GEPA elevates minimal DSPy signatures, and the majority of expert-optimized comparisons show no statistically significant difference. We note that the comparison is asymmetric: GEPA optimization searches programmatically over gold-standard splits, whereas expert prompts require in principle no labeled data, relying instead on domain expertise and iterative refinement.
comment: 10 pages, to be submitted for EAMT 2026

light_analysis.overview: 系统比较了人工专家提示、基础DSPy签名和GEPA优化的DSPy签名在语言任务中的表现，发现效果依赖任务，优化与专家提示大多无显著差异。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM性能对提示设计高度敏感，但自动提示优化能否取代专家提示工程在语言学任务中仍属未知。现有研究缺乏系统比较，无法明确不同方法的相对优势，因此需要实证评估以指导实践。
light_analysis.method: 首次系统比较三种提示方式：人工零样本专家提示、基础DSPy签名、GEPA优化的DSPy签名，在翻译、术语插入和语言质量评估三个任务上，使用五个模型配置进行实验。比较不对称：优化需标注数据，专家提示依靠领域知识。
light_analysis.result: 结果依赖任务。术语插入中优化与手动提示质量无显著差异；翻译中不同方法在不同模型上胜出；LQA中专家提示错误检测更强，优化改善特征描述。总体而言，GEPA提升基础DSPy，多数专家-优化比较无显著差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 自动优化和专家提示各有优势，不能简单替代。未来需考虑不对称性：优化需要标注数据，专家提示依赖领域知识和迭代。研究为提示设计提供了实证依据。

title: PhySe-RPO: Physics and Semantics Guided Relative Policy Optimization for Diffusion-Based Surgical Smoke Removal
abstract: Surgical smoke severely degrades intraoperative video quality, obscuring anatomical structures and limiting surgical perception. Existing learning-based desmoking approaches rely on scarce paired supervision and deterministic restoration pipelines, making it difficult to perform exploration or reinforcement-driven refinement under real surgical conditions. We propose PhySe-RPO, a diffusion restoration framework optimized through Physics- and Semantics-Guided Relative Policy Optimization. The core idea is to transform deterministic restoration into a stochastic policy, enabling trajectory-level exploration and critic-free updates via group-relative optimization. A physics-guided reward imposes illumination and color consistency, while a visual-concept semantic reward learned from CLIP-based surgical concepts promotes smoke-free and anatomically coherent restoration. Together with a reference-free perceptual constraint, PhySe-RPO produces results that are physically consistent, semantically faithful, and clinically interpretable across synthetic and real robotic surgical datasets, providing a principled route to robust diffusion-based restoration under limited paired supervision.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PhySe-RPO，一种基于物理和语义引导的相对策略优化的扩散恢复框架，用于手术烟雾去除，将确定性恢复转化为随机策略，实现无评论家的组相对优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 手术烟雾严重降低术中视频质量，遮挡解剖结构，限制手术感知。现有基于学习的去烟方法依赖稀缺的成对监督和确定性恢复流程，难以在真实手术条件下进行探索或强化驱动的优化。需要一种能利用物理一致性、语义先验和强化学习的方法来解决有限监督下的鲁棒恢复问题。
light_analysis.method: PhySe-RPO将确定性恢复转化为随机策略，通过组相对优化实现轨迹级探索和无评论家更新。物理引导奖励确保照明和颜色一致性，基于CLIP的视觉概念语义奖励促进无烟和解剖连贯的恢复。结合无参考感知约束，在合成和真实机器人手术数据集上产生物理一致、语义忠实且临床可解释的结果。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实机器人手术数据集上，PhySe-RPO产生了物理一致、语义忠实且临床可解释的结果。摘要未明确给出具体性能指标，但表明该方法在有限成对监督下提供了稳健的扩散恢复路径。与现有确定性方法相比，能够进行探索和强化优化。
light_analysis.conclusion: PhySe-RPO为扩散模型在手术烟雾去除中的应用提供了新范式，通过物理和语义引导的强化优化克服了监督数据稀缺的问题。其临床可解释性对术中辅助具有重要价值。未来可探索更复杂的奖励函数和扩展到其他医学图像恢复任务。

title: Permutation-Consensus Listwise Judging for Robust Factuality Evaluation
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are now widely used as judges, yet their decisions can change under presentation choices that should be irrelevant. We study one such source of instability: candidate-order sensitivity in listwise factuality evaluation, where several answers can look similarly polished while differing sharply in hallucination risk. We introduce PCFJudge, an inference-time method that reruns the same factuality-first listwise prompt over multiple orderings of the same candidate set and aggregates the resulting scores, ranks, and uncertainty signals into a single consensus decision. On RewardBench 2 Factuality, PCFJudge improves over direct judging by up to 7 absolute points. Development ablations show that the dominant gain comes from permutation consensus itself rather than from heavier arbitration layers. These results suggest that a meaningful share of factuality-judging error arises from order instability, and that averaging over this nuisance variation is a simple and effective way to make LLM evaluation more reliable.
comment: Accepted at the Fifth Workshop on Natural Language Generation, Evaluation, and Metrics at ACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出PCFJudge方法，通过多排序聚合投票消除候选顺序敏感性，提升LLM作为评判者的事实性评估鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型作为评判者时，其决策常因无关的显示顺序变化而不稳定。在列表式事实性评估中，多个候选答案外观相似但幻觉风险不同，顺序敏感性导致评估不可靠。现有方法忽视这一来源的误差，研究旨在通过排列一致性投票消除顺序偏见，提高评估的鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: PCFJudge是一种推理时方法，对同一候选集多次使用不同顺序运行相同的事实性优先列表提示，然后通过聚合分数、排名和不确定性信号形成共识决策。核心创新在于利用排列一致性本身而非复杂仲裁层来提升性能，简单有效地消除顺序干扰。
light_analysis.result: 在RewardBench 2 Factuality基准上，PCFJudge相比直接评判提升最高7个绝对百分点。消融实验表明主要增益来自排列一致性本身，而非仲裁层，验证了顺序不稳定性是事实性评判错误的重要来源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明通过平均化顺序变化这一干扰因素可显著提升LLM评估可靠性，PCFJudge作为一种简单有效的方法具有实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的聚合策略或扩展至其他评估任务，以进一步提升鲁棒性。

title: Illumination-Aware Contactless Fingerprint Spoof Detection via Paired Flash-Non-Flash Imaging
abstract: Contactless fingerprint recognition enables hygienic and convenient biometric authentication but poses new challenges for spoof detection due to the absence of physical contact and traditional liveness cues. Most existing methods rely on single-image acquisition and appearance-based features, which often generalize poorly across devices, capture conditions, and spoof materials. In this work, we study paired flash-non-flash contactless fingerprint acquisition as a lightweight active sensing mechanism for spoof detection. Through a preliminary empirical analysis, we show that flash illumination accentuates material- and structure-dependent properties, including ridge visibility, subsurface scattering, micro-geometry, and surface oils, while non-flash images provide a baseline appearance context. We analyze lighting-induced differences using interpretable metrics such as inter-channel correlation, specular reflection characteristics, texture realism, and differential imaging. These complementary features help discriminate genuine fingerprints from printed, digital, and molded presentation attacks. We further examine the limitations of paired acquisition, including sensitivity to imaging settings, dataset scale, and emerging high-fidelity spoofs. Our findings demonstrate the potential of illumination-aware analysis to improve robustness and interpretability in contactless fingerprint presentation attack detection, motivating future work on paired acquisition and physics-informed feature design. Code is available in the repository.
comment: Accepted at IWBF 2026 (14th International Workshop on Biometrics and Forensics)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于配对闪光-非闪光成像的照明感知接触式指纹活体检测方法，利用光照差异增强真伪鉴别能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 接触式指纹识别因无物理接触而缺乏传统活体线索，现有单图像方法依赖外观特征，泛化性差。需要一种轻量级主动传感机制，以提高跨设备、条件和材料的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 采集配对闪光和非闪光指纹图像，利用闪光强调材料结构特性（脊可见性、次表面散射、微几何、表面油），分析照明差异：通道间相关性、镜面反射、纹理真实性、差分成像。这些互补特征用于区分真指纹与打印、数字和模制攻击。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体数值指标，但表明该方法能有效辨别真伪指纹，相比单图像方法更具鲁棒性和可解释性。局限性包括对成像设置敏感、依赖数据集规模以及应对高保真攻击的能力有限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 照明感知分析通过物理启发特征提升接触式指纹活体检测的鲁棒性和可解释性，为未来配对采集和特征设计提供方向。代码已开源，但需进一步研究以克服当前局限。

title: Robust Language Identification for Romansh Varieties
abstract: The Romansh language has several regional varieties, called idioms, which sometimes have limited mutual intelligibility. Despite this linguistic diversity, there has been a lack of documented efforts to build a language identification (LID) system that can distinguish between these idioms. Since Romansh LID should also be able to recognize Rumantsch Grischun, a supra-regional variety that combines elements of several idioms, this makes for a novel and interesting classification problem. In this paper, we present a LID system for Romansh idioms based on an SVM approach. We evaluate our model on a newly curated benchmark across two domains and find that it reaches an average in-domain accuracy of 97%, enabling applications such as idiom-aware spell checking or machine translation. Our classifier is publicly available.
comment: To appear at the 11th edition of SwissText

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于SVM的Romansh方言语言识别系统，实现97%准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: Romansh语言有多个区域方言，相互理解有限，但缺乏能区分这些方言的语言识别系统。此外，还需识别跨区域变体Rumantsch Grischun，构成新颖分类问题。现有方法不足，故开发此类系统对语言技术和应用（如拼写检查、机器翻译）重要。
light_analysis.method: 采用SVM方法构建语言识别系统，区分Romansh的多个方言及Rumantsch Grischun。新构建了覆盖两个领域的基准数据集，用于训练和评估。模型专注于文本分类，利用特征工程（如n-gram）支持SVM。
light_analysis.result: 在两个领域数据集上，平均域内准确率达97%。与未明确报告的基线相比，性能显著。系统公开可用，支持实际应用如方言感知拼写检查和机器翻译。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功开发Romansh方言识别系统，填补了该语言资源空白。学术上贡献了新型分类问题（含跨区域变体），实际价值在于推动低资源语言技术。未来可扩展至更多方言或改进特征。

title: Client-Conditional Federated Learning via Local Training Data Statistics
abstract: Federated learning (FL) under data heterogeneity remains challenging: existing methods either ignore client differences (FedAvg), require costly cluster discovery (IFCA), or maintain per-client models (Ditto). All degrade when data is sparse or heterogeneity is multi-dimensional. We propose conditioning a single global model on locally-computed PCA statistics of each client's training data, requiring zero additional communication. Evaluating across 97~configurations spanning four heterogeneity types (label shift, covariate shift, concept shift, and combined heterogeneity), four datasets (MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100), and seven FL baseline methods, we find that our method matches the Oracle baseline -- which knows true cluster assignments -- across all settings, surpasses it by 1--6% on combined heterogeneity where continuous statistics are richer than discrete cluster identifiers, and is uniquely sparsity-robust among all tested methods.
comment: 9 pages main + 16 pages appendix, 19 figures, 22 tables. Extended version of FLICS 2026 paper, with full experimental tables and figures provided as appendices

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于客户端训练数据PCA统计量的条件化联邦学习方法，零额外通信，有效处理多维数据异质性。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习面临数据异质性挑战，现有方法如FedAvg忽略客户端差异、IFCA需要昂贵聚类、Ditto维护每客户端模型，在数据稀疏或多维异质性下性能下降，亟需一种能适应客户端特定分布且通信高效的方法。
light_analysis.method: 对单个全局模型施加条件，利用客户端本地计算的PCA统计量（如均值、主成分）作为输入，使模型适应不同客户端数据分布，不增加通信开销。在四种异质性类型（标签偏移、协变量偏移、概念偏移、组合偏移）、四个数据集和七种基线方法上进行了全面评估。
light_analysis.result: 在97种配置下，该方法在所有设置中匹配知道真实聚类的Oracle基线；在组合异质性上超越Oracle 1–6%；且在所有测试方法中唯一对数据稀疏性表现鲁棒。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种简单有效的联邦学习新范式，利用局部PCA统计量条件化全局模型，显著提升复杂异质性下的性能，尤其对稀疏数据鲁棒，具有高实用价值。未来可探索更丰富的统计量或自适应条件机制。

title: Maximizing mutual information between prompts and responses improve LLM personalization with no additional data or human oversight
abstract: While post-training has successfully improved large language models (LLMs) across a variety of domains, these gains heavily rely on human-labeled data or external verifiers. Existing data has already been exploited, and new high-quality data is expensive to collect. More fundamentally, true intelligence goes far beyond tasks that are easily verifiable. Therefore, we need self-improvement frameworks that allow models to improve without heavily relying on external oversight. We propose Mutual Information Preference Optimization (MIPO), a contrastive data augmentation method that constructs preference pairs by generating a positive response conditioning on the correct prompt, and a negative response by conditioning on a random, unrelated prompt. We show that using Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to learn from this paired data maximizes pointwise conditional mutual information (MI), under the base LLM, between prompts and model responses. Empirical results with various-sized Llama- and Qwen-Instruct models show that when used to maximize MI between user context and response, MIPO provides an effective personalization technique, achieving 3-40% gains on personalized instruction-following compared to strong prompting baselines. Surprisingly, MIPO can also be applied to math and multiple-choice problem solving, yielding 1-18% gains without any additional data or human supervision. These results suggest a promising direction for self-improvement using intrinsic signals derived from contrastive data pairs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MIPO方法，通过最大化提示与响应的互信息改进LLM个性化，无需额外数据或人工监督。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM后训练依赖人工标注或外部验证器，高质量数据昂贵且难以获取。真正智能远超可验证任务，需要自我改进框架。因此提出MIPO，利用内在信号实现无外部监督的模型自提升。
light_analysis.method: MIPO是一种对比数据增强方法，通过以正确提示为条件生成正响应，以随机无关提示为条件生成负响应，构造偏好对。使用DPO学习该配对数据，最大化基础LLM下提示与响应的点态条件互信息。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama和Qwen-Instruct模型上，MIPO用于个性化指令跟随任务，相比强提示基线提升3-40%；用于数学和选择题解决，提升1-18%，无需额外数据或人工监督。
light_analysis.conclusion: MIPO利用互信息最大化实现无监督个性化，为自我改进提供有前景方向。当前主要验证小型模型，未来可在更大模型和更多任务上扩展。

title: Toward Generative Quantum Utility via Correlation-Complexity Map
abstract: We study a practical question in generative quantum machine learning: given a classical dataset, can we determine, before training, whether it is well suited to a quantum generative model? We focus on a class of quantum circuits known as instantaneous quantum polynomial-time (IQP) circuits, whose output distributions are widely believed to be difficult to sample from using classical methods. These circuits are used to build our quantum generative models. We introduce a Correlation-Complexity Map, a simple diagnostic built from two quantities computed from data samples. The first measures how closely the dataset's spectral correlation patterns resemble those naturally produced by IQP circuits, while the second quantifies how much of the dataset's structural correlation cannot be captured by simple pairwise models. In other words, we can estimate beforehand how well a dataset can be approximated by our model family and also how complex its correlations are, indicating possible failures of classical models. Applying this framework, we identify turbulence data as a promising target for quantum generative modeling. Guided by this analysis, we use a latent-parameter adaptation scheme that reuses a compact IQP circuit over a temporal sequence by learning and interpolating a low-dimensional latent trajectory, and observe competitive performance against classical baselines in a low-data, low-parameter regime. These results suggest that dataset-level diagnostics can help prioritize problems where quantum generative models are most likely to be useful, with improvements in data and parameter efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出相关性-复杂度图谱（Correlation-Complexity Map）诊断工具，用于预判经典数据集是否适合量子生成模型，并在湍流数据上验证其有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 量子生成机器学习中，未知给定经典数据集是否适合量子模型，缺乏训练前的预判方法。现有方法依赖训练后评估，效率低且难以推广。因此，需要一种简单的诊断工具，帮助快速筛选出可能受益于量子增强数据的任务，避免资源浪费。
light_analysis.method: 引入相关性-复杂度图谱，由两个量构成：一是数据集谱相关模式与IQP电路自然产生模式的匹配度；二是数据集中无法被简单成对模型捕获的结构相关性复杂度。基于此图谱，识别湍流数据为有前景目标，并采用潜在参数适应方案，通过学习和插值低维潜在轨迹，在时序上重用紧凑IQP电路。
light_analysis.result: 在低数据、低参数场景下，该量子生成模型与经典基线相比表现出竞争力。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明该方法在数据效率和参数效率上有改进，且数据集级诊断能有效指导模型选择。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明数据集级诊断可帮助优先选择量子生成模型适用的问题，提升数据与参数效率。未来可扩展至其他量子模型家族，并探索更复杂的诊断指标。局限性在于当前仅针对IQP电路，未涵盖其他量子架构。

title: MICA: Multi-granularity Intertemporal Credit Assignment for Long-Horizon Emotional Support Dialogue
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) for large language models (LLMs) has shown strong performance in single-turn tasks, but extending it to multi-turn interaction remains challenging due to sparse rewards and poor per-turn credit assignment. In emotional support dialogues, responses shape future user states, so matched-state step-wise comparison is unavailable, while trajectory-level supervision is insufficient. We propose MICA (Multi-granularity Intertemporal Credit Assignment), a critic-free RL framework for multi-turn emotional support tasks. MICA derives both immediate and delayed credit from a shared potential function over the user's structured support state. Incremental Distance Reward measures the per-turn decrease in residual distance to the target state, while its Monte Carlo return captures delayed effects. After scope-specific normalization, the two signals form a mixed advantage for stable per-turn optimization without matched-state comparisons, rollout trees, or a learned critic. On EMPA, EQ-Bench, and EmoBench with Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct and Qwen3-8B/14B/32B, MICA consistently outperforms GRPO and REINFORCE++, achieving up to +43.2 on EMPA, while adding no rollout cost and remaining robust to reward judges. These results show that turn-aware credit assignment enables effective and practical multi-turn RL for interactive LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MICA，一种无评论家的多粒度跨时间信用分配强化学习框架，用于长程情感支持对话，实现有效稳定的多轮优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在单轮任务中表现优异，但多轮交互面临稀疏奖励和信用分配难题。情感支持对话中，响应影响未来用户状态，无法进行匹配状态的分步比较，而轨迹级监督不足。现有方法难以处理长程依赖，需要一种无需匹配状态或学习评论家的信用分配机制。
light_analysis.method: MICA从共享势函数中推导即时和延迟信用：增量距离奖励衡量每轮用户状态到目标状态的残差距离减少，其蒙特卡洛回报捕获延迟效应。经过范围归一化后，两者形成混合优势信号，实现稳定的每轮优化，无需匹配状态比较、rollout树或学习评论家，显著降低计算成本。
light_analysis.result: 在EMPA、EQ-Bench和EmoBench上，使用Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct及Qwen3-8B/14B/32B，MICA一致超越GRPO和REINFORCE++，EMPA最高提升+43.2分。方法无额外rollout成本，对奖励裁判具有鲁棒性，展示了实用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MICA证明了轮次感知的信用分配能实现交互式LLM的有效多轮强化学习，无需复杂架构或额外开销。该方法为长程对话任务提供了实用方案，未来可探索更广泛的多轮交互场景及势函数设计。

title: S2O: Early Stopping for Sparse Attention via Online Permutation
abstract: Attention scales quadratically with sequence length, fundamentally limiting long-context inference. Existing block-granularity sparsification can reduce latency, but coarse blocks impose an intrinsic sparsity ceiling, making further improvements difficult even with carefully engineered designs. We present S2O, which performs early stopping for sparse attention via online permutation. Inspired by virtual-to-physical address mapping in memory systems, S2O revisits and factorizes FlashAttention execution, enabling inference to load non-contiguous tokens rather than a contiguous span in the original order. Motivated by fine-grained structures in attention heatmaps, we transform explicit permutation into an online, index-guided, discrete loading policy; with extremely lightweight preprocessing and index-remapping overhead, it concentrates importance on a small set of high-priority blocks. Building on this importance-guided online permutation for loading, S2O further introduces an early-stopping rule: computation proceeds from high to low importance; once the current block score falls below a threshold, S2O terminates early and skips the remaining low-contribution blocks, thereby increasing effective sparsity and reducing computation under a controlled error budget.   As a result, S2O substantially raises the practical sparsity ceiling. On Llama-3.1-8B under a 128K context, S2O reduces single-operator MSE by 3.82$\times$ at matched sparsity, and reduces prefill compute density by 3.31$\times$ at matched MSE; meanwhile, it preserves end-to-end accuracy and achieves 7.51$\times$ attention and 3.81$\times$ end-to-end speedups.

light_analysis.overview: 提出S2O，一种通过在线排列实现稀疏注意力早停的方法，显著提高长上下文推理的稀疏性上限和加速比。
light_analysis.motivation: 注意力机制的计算复杂度随序列长度二次方增长，严重限制长上下文推理。现有块粒度稀疏化方法虽然能降低延迟，但粗粒度块导致固有的稀疏性上限，难以进一步优化。需要一种更精细的稀疏化策略，在不牺牲精度的情况下大幅提升稀疏性和加速效果。
light_analysis.method: S2O受虚拟到物理地址映射启发，重新设计FlashAttention执行，实现非连续token加载。基于注意力热图的细粒度结构，将显式排列转化为在线索引指导的离散加载策略，预处理开销极低。进一步引入早停规则：从高到低重要性计算，当前块得分低于阈值时提前终止，跳过低贡献块，从而在控制误差预算下提高有效稀疏性并减少计算。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama-3.1-8B、128K上下文下，S2O在匹配稀疏度时单算子MSE降低3.82倍，匹配MSE时预填充计算密度降低3.31倍；同时保持端到端精度，实现了7.51倍注意力加速和3.81倍端到端加速。
light_analysis.conclusion: S2O通过在线排列和早停策略有效提升了稀疏注意力的实际稀疏性上限，在长上下文场景中大幅降低计算开销。该方法在保持精度的前提下实现了显著加速，具有重要的应用价值。未来可探索更优的阈值选取策略或与其他稀疏方法结合。

title: IRIS: Intent Resolution via Inference-time Saccades for Open-Ended VQA in Large Vision-Language Models
abstract: We introduce IRIS (Intent Resolution via Inference-time Saccades), a novel training-free approach that uses eye-tracking data in real-time to resolve ambiguity in open-ended VQA. Through a comprehensive user study with 500 unique image-question pairs, we demonstrate that fixations closest to the time participants start verbally asking their questions are the most informative for disambiguation in Large VLMs, more than doubling the accuracy of responses on ambiguous questions (from 35.2% to 77.2%) while maintaining performance on unambiguous queries. We evaluate our approach across state-of-the-art VLMs, showing consistent improvements when gaze data is incorporated in ambiguous image-question pairs, regardless of architectural differences. We release a new benchmark dataset to use eye movement data for disambiguated VQA, a novel real-time interactive protocol, and an evaluation suite.

light_analysis.overview: 提出IRIS方法，利用实时眼动追踪数据在推理时解决开放VQA中的意图歧义，无需训练，歧义问题准确率翻倍。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放视觉问答中，用户提问常存在歧义，现有大视觉语言模型难以准确理解用户意图。眼动追踪可以实时反映用户注意力焦点，但未被有效利用。本文旨在通过用户注视点消歧，提升VQA准确性，且不依赖额外训练。
light_analysis.method: IRIS通过实时眼动追踪，在用户提问时刻附近选择注视点作为上下文提示输入大视觉语言模型。基于500个图像-问题对的用户研究，发现提问瞬间的注视点最具信息量。方法无需训练，直接利用现有LVLM进行推理时消歧。
light_analysis.result: 在歧义问题上，准确率从35.2%提升至77.2%，翻倍以上；非歧义问题性能保持不变。在多种SOTA大视觉语言模型上均有一致改进，不受架构差异影响。同时发布了包含眼动数据的新基准数据集和实时交互协议。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了利用实时眼动数据可显著提升开放VQA的歧义解决能力，且无需模型训练。该方法连接认知科学与视觉语言模型，为交互式VQA提供新方向。未来可探索更广泛的应用场景，如多模态歧义消解。

title: Pseudo-differential-enhanced physics-informed neural networks
abstract: We present pseudo-differential enhanced physics-informed neural networks (PINNs), an extension of gradient enhancement but in Fourier space. Gradient enhancement of PINNs dictates that the PDE residual is taken to a higher differential order than prescribed by the PDE, added to the objective as an augmented term in order to improve training and overall learning fidelity. We propose the same procedure after application via Fourier transforms, since differentiating in Fourier space is multiplication with the Fourier wavenumber under suitable decay. Our methods are fast and efficient. Our methods oftentimes achieve superior PINN versus numerical error in fewer training iterations, potentially pair well with few samples in collocation, and can on occasion break plateaus in low collocation settings. Moreover, our methods are suitable for fractional derivatives. We establish that our methods, due to the dynamical effects, improve spectral eigenvalue decay of the neural tangent kernel (NTK), and so our methods contribute towards the learning of high frequencies in early training, mitigating the effects of frequency bias up to the polynomial order and possibly greater with smooth activations. Our methods accommodate advanced techniques in PINNs, such as Fourier feature embeddings. A pitfall of discrete Fourier transforms via the Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) is mesh subjugation, and so we demonstrate compatibility of our methods for greater mesh flexibility and invariance on alternative Euclidean and non-Euclidean domains via Monte Carlo methods and otherwise.

light_analysis.overview: 提出伪微分增强PINNs，在傅里叶空间中对PDE残差进行高阶微分，以提升训练效率和精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理信息神经网络（PINNs）在训练中常面临频率偏差和收敛缓慢的问题，尤其在低配置点或分数阶导数场景下。现有梯度增强方法虽能改善，但局限于物理空间，且对高频学习能力有限。本文旨在通过傅里叶空间的伪微分增强，更高效地提升模型对高频成分的学习能力，并适用于分数阶导数。
light_analysis.method: 将PINNs的PDE残差通过傅里叶变换转换到频域，利用傅里叶波数乘法实现高阶微分，作为增强项加入损失函数。该方法快速高效，兼容傅里叶特征嵌入，并支持分数阶导数。通过分析神经切线核（NTK）的谱特征值衰减，证明方法有助于早期学习高频，减轻频率偏差。采用蒙特卡洛等方法实现网格灵活性，避免FFT的网格依赖。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，伪微分增强PINNs在较少训练迭代中实现了优于数值误差的精度，尤其适用于少量配置点场景，并能打破低配置下的训练平台期。与标准PINNs相比，该方法改善了NTK的谱衰减，促进了高频学习。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调其高效性和兼容性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 伪微分增强PINNs通过傅里叶域的高阶微分操作，有效提升了PINNs的训练效率和精度，特别适用于分数阶导数和少量配置点场景。该方法丰富了PINNs的理论工具，为处理高频和多尺度问题提供了新思路。未来可进一步探索与自适应采样等技术的结合，以及在其他非欧几里得域上的应用。

title: 4RC: 4D Reconstruction via Conditional Querying Anytime and Anywhere
abstract: We present 4RC, a unified feed-forward framework for 4D reconstruction from monocular videos. Unlike existing approaches that typically decouple motion from geometry or produce limited 4D attributes such as sparse trajectories or two-view scene flow, 4RC learns a holistic 4D representation that jointly captures dense scene geometry and motion dynamics. At its core, 4RC introduces a novel encode-once, query-anywhere and anytime paradigm: a transformer backbone encodes the entire video into a compact spatio-temporal latent space, from which a conditional decoder can efficiently query 3D geometry and motion for any query frame at any target timestamp. To facilitate learning, we represent per-view 4D attributes in a minimally factorized form by decomposing them into base geometry and time-dependent relative motion. Extensive experiments demonstrate that 4RC outperforms prior and concurrent methods across a wide range of 4D reconstruction tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了4RC，一种统一的单目视频4D重建前馈框架，采用“一次编码、任意查询”范式，学习联合的密集场景几何与运动动态的4D表示。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有4D重建方法通常将运动与几何解耦，或仅产生稀疏轨迹、两视图场景流等有限4D属性。这些方法无法捕获密集场景的完整几何和运动动态，限制了重建质量。4RC旨在通过统一框架学习密集且全面的4D表示，解决现有方法的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 4RC引入“一次编码、任意查询”范式：Transformer骨干网络将整个视频编码为紧凑的时空潜空间；条件解码器可在任意目标时间戳高效查询3D几何和运动。为便于学习，将每视角4D属性分解为基本几何和时变相对运动，实现最小因子化表示。
light_analysis.result: 在广泛4D重建任务中，4RC的性能优于先前及并发方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但通过定性（如jointly captures dense scene geometry and motion dynamics）和定量比较表明其优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 4RC通过统一前馈框架实现了单目视频的密集4D重建，创新性的编码查询范式提升了效率与表示能力。其因子化分解设计简化了学习。该工作为4D重建领域提供了新思路，未来可探索更复杂的场景或实时应用。

title: SEAD: Self-Evolving Agent for Multi-Turn Service Dialogue
abstract: Large Language Models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in open-domain dialogues. However, current methods exhibit suboptimal performance in service dialogues, as they rely on noisy, low-quality human conversation data. This limitation arises from data scarcity and the difficulty of simulating authentic, goal-oriented user behaviors. To address these issues, we propose SEAD (Self-Evolving Agent for Service Dialogue), a framework that enables agents to learn effective strategies without large-scale human annotations. SEAD decouples user modeling into two components: a Profile Controller that generates diverse user states to manage training curriculum, and a User Role-play Model that focuses on realistic role-playing. This design ensures the environment provides adaptive training scenarios rather than acting as an unfair adversary. Experiments demonstrate that SEAD significantly outperforms Open-source Foundation Models and Closed-source Commercial Models, improving task completion rate by 17.6% and dialogue efficiency by 11.1%. Code is available at: https://github.com/Da1yuqin/SEAD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SEAD框架，通过自进化机制使服务型对话代理无需大规模人工标注即可学习有效策略，显著提升任务完成率和对话效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大语言模型在开放域对话中表现优异，但在服务型对话中因依赖嘈杂、低质量的人类对话数据而性能不佳。数据稀缺和难以模拟真实目标导向的用户行为是主要瓶颈。因此，需要一种无需大量人工标注、能够自适应生成训练场景的方法，以提升服务对话代理的策略学习效果。
light_analysis.method: SEAD框架将用户建模解耦为两个组件：Profile Controller生成多样化用户状态以管理训练课程；User Role-play Model专注于逼真的角色扮演。通过自进化机制，代理在与环境交互中不断优化策略，环境提供自适应训练场景而非对抗性挑战。方法无需大规模人工标注数据，利用动态用户模型促进策略学习。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SEAD显著优于开源基础模型和闭源商业模型，任务完成率提升17.6%，对话效率提升11.1%。在服务对话场景中，SEAD能够更有效地达成用户目标，减少冗余轮次，体现了在真实感模拟和策略学习上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: SEAD通过自进化和解耦用户建模，解决了服务型对话数据稀缺和用户行为模拟难题，提升了代理的任务完成效率。该框架具有实际应用价值，可用于客服、问答等场景。未来可探索更复杂的用户状态生成和跨领域适应能力。

title: Prism: Efficient Test-Time Scaling via Hierarchical Search and Self-Verification for Discrete Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Inference-time compute has re-emerged as a practical way to improve LLM reasoning. Most test-time scaling (TTS) algorithms rely on autoregressive decoding, which is ill-suited to discrete diffusion language models (dLLMs) due to their parallel decoding over the entire sequence. As a result, developing effective and efficient TTS methods to unlock dLLMs' full generative potential remains an underexplored challenge. To address this, we propose Prism (Pruning, Remasking, and Integrated Self-verification Method), an efficient TTS framework for dLLMs that (i) performs Hierarchical Trajectory Search (HTS) which dynamically prunes and reallocates compute in an early-to-mid denoising window, (ii) introduces Local branching with partial remasking to explore diverse implementations while preserving high-confidence tokens, and (iii) replaces external verifiers with Self-Verified Feedback (SVF) obtained via self-evaluation prompts on intermediate completions. Across four mathematical reasoning and code generation benchmarks on three dLLMs, including LLaDA 8B Instruct, Dream 7B Instruct, and LLaDA 2.0-mini, our Prism achieves a favorable performance-efficiency trade-off, matching best-of-N performance with substantially fewer function evaluations (NFE). The code is released at https://github.com/viiika/Prism.
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026. Codes and Supplementary Material: https://github.com/viiika/Prism

light_analysis.overview: Prism是一种面向离散扩散语言模型的高效测试时扩展框架，通过层次搜索和自验证实现性能与效率的权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有测试时扩展方法多针对自回归模型，而离散扩散语言模型因并行解码整个序列，难以直接应用。缺乏有效且高效的测试时扩展方法来发挥离散扩散语言模型的全部生成潜力，成为亟待解决的问题。
light_analysis.method: Prism包含三大核心组件：(i)层次轨迹搜索，在早期到中期去噪窗口动态剪枝和重新分配计算；(ii)局部分支与部分重掩码，在保留高置信度令牌的同时探索多样化实现；(iii)自验证反馈，通过自我评估提示替代外部验证器。在LLaDA 8B Instruct、Dream 7B Instruct和LLaDA 2.0-mini等模型上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在四个数学推理和代码生成基准上，Prism以显著更少的函数评估次数匹配best-of-N性能，实现了有利的性能-效率权衡。具体数值未在摘要中明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: Prism首次为离散扩散语言模型提供了高效的测试时扩展方法，通过层次搜索和自验证在保持性能的同时降低计算成本，有助于推动此类模型的实际部署。代码已开源，未来可进一步优化搜索策略。

title: Kanade: A Simple Disentangled Tokenizer for Spoken Language Modeling
abstract: A good language model starts with a good tokenizer. Tokenization is especially important for speech modeling, which must handle continuous signals that mix linguistic and non-linguistic information. A speech tokenizer should extract phonetics and prosody, suppress linguistically irrelevant information like speaker identity, and enable high-quality synthesis. We present Kanade, a single-layer disentangled speech tokenizer that realizes this ideal. Kanade separates out acoustic constants to create a single stream of tokens that captures rich phonetics and prosody. It does so without the need for auxiliary methods that existing disentangled codecs often rely on. Experiments show that Kanade achieves state-of-the-art speaker disentanglement and lexical availability, while maintaining excellent reconstruction quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Kanade，一种单层解耦语音分词器，无需辅助方法即可分离声学常数，实现说话人解耦和高品质重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 语音建模中分词器需处理连续信号中的语言和非语言信息，现有方法难以同时提取语音韵律、抑制说话人身份等无关信息，且解耦常依赖复杂辅助方法。Kanade旨在简化这一过程。
light_analysis.method: Kanade采用单层架构，通过分离声学常数生成单一token流，捕获丰富的语音和韵律信息，避免现有解耦编解码器所需的辅助方法，实现简单高效的解耦。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Kanade在说话人解耦和词汇可用性方面达到最先进水平，同时保持优异的重建质量，优于现有方法（摘要未提供具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: Kanade以简单设计实现有效的语音解耦，为语音语言模型提供高质量分词，兼具实用性和学术价值。未来可探索其在大规模语音模型中的应用。

title: Full-Graph vs. Mini-Batch Training: Comprehensive Analysis from a Batch Size and Fan-Out Size Perspective
abstract: Full-graph and mini-batch Graph Neural Network (GNN) training approaches have distinct system design demands, making it crucial to choose the appropriate approach to develop. A core challenge in comparing these two GNN training approaches lies in characterizing their model performance (i.e., convergence and generalization) and computational efficiency. While a batch size has been an effective lens in analyzing such behaviors in deep neural networks (DNNs), GNNs extend this lens by introducing a fan-out size, as full-graph training can be viewed as mini-batch training with the largest possible batch size and fan-out size. However, the impact of the batch and fan-out size for GNNs remains insufficiently explored. To this end, this paper systematically compares full-graph vs. mini-batch training of GNNs through empirical and theoretical analyses from the view points of the batch size and fan-out size. Our key contributions include: 1) We provide a novel generalization analysis using the Wasserstein distance to study the impact of the graph structure, especially the fan-out size. 2) We uncover the non-isotropic effects of the batch size and the fan-out size in GNN convergence and generalization, providing practical guidance for tuning these hyperparameters under resource constraints. Finally, full-graph training does not always yield better model performance or computational efficiency than well-tuned smaller mini-batch settings. The implementation can be found in the github link: https://github.com/LIUMENGFAN-gif/GNN_fullgraph_minibatch_training.

light_analysis.overview: 从批次大小和扇出大小视角，系统地比较了全图与mini-batch GNN训练的模型性能与计算效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 全图和mini-batch GNN训练具有不同的系统设计需求，选择合适的训练方法至关重要。现有研究缺乏从批次大小和扇出大小角度对两者模型性能（收敛性和泛化性）及计算效率的深入对比，尤其忽略了扇出大小的影响。本文旨在填补这一空白，提供系统性的实证与理论分析。
light_analysis.method: 通过实证和理论分析，从批次大小和扇出大小视角对比全图与mini-batch GNN训练。核心创新包括：1）使用Wasserstein距离进行泛化分析，研究图结构（特别是扇出大小）的影响；2）揭示批次大小和扇出大小在GNN收敛与泛化中的非各向同性效应，为资源约束下的超参数调优提供指导。
light_analysis.result: 主要发现：全图训练并不总是比精心调优的小规模mini-batch训练产生更好的模型性能或计算效率。具体性能指标和对比数据摘要未明确说明，但通过Wasserstein距离分析揭示了扇出大小的影响，并提供了超参数调优的实践指导。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从批次大小和扇出大小视角系统比较了全图与mini-batch GNN训练，提供了新的泛化分析方法和实践指导。学术上深化了对GNN训练行为的理解，应用上帮助开发者根据资源约束选择合适训练策略。未来可能需进一步探索不同图结构下的超参数调优规律。

title: Do Not Waste Your Rollouts: Recycling Search Experience for Efficient Test-Time Scaling
abstract: Test-Time Scaling enhances the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models by allocating additional inference compute to broaden the exploration of the solution space. However, existing search strategies typically treat rollouts as disposable samples, where valuable intermediate insights are effectively discarded after each trial. This wasted rollout-level experience leads to substantial computational redundancy, as models repeatedly re-derive discovered conclusions and revisit known dead ends across extensive attempts. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{Recycling Search Experience (RSE)}, a self-guided, training-free strategy that turns test-time search from a series of isolated trials into a cumulative, experience-guided process. By actively distilling raw trajectories into a shared experience bank, RSE enables positive recycling of intermediate conclusions to shortcut redundant derivations and negative recycling of failure patterns to prune encountered dead ends. Theoretically, we provide an analysis that formalizes the efficiency gains of RSE over independent sampling in solving complex reasoning tasks. Empirically, extensive experiments on HMMT24, HMMT25, IMO-Bench, and HLE show that RSE consistently outperforms strong baselines under comparable computational budgets, establishing a strong compute-efficiency frontier for test-time scaling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RSE方法，通过回收搜索经验实现测试时计算的累积利用，提升大语言模型推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有测试时扩展搜索策略将rollouts视为一次性样本，丢弃中间见解，导致计算冗余。模型在多次尝试中重复推导已知结论或重访死胡同，浪费推理资源。需要一种方法将搜索经验累积利用，减少冗余计算。
light_analysis.method: RSE是一种自指导、无需训练的策略，通过将原始搜索轨迹蒸馏到共享经验库，实现正回收（复用中间结论以缩短推导）和负回收（利用失败模式以剪枝死胡同）。理论分析了RSE在复杂推理任务中相比独立采样的效率提升。
light_analysis.result: 在HMMT24、HMMT25、IMO-Bench和HLE四个基准上，RSE在可比计算预算下一致优于强基线，建立了测试时扩展的强计算效率边界。具体数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: RSE将测试时搜索从独立试验转变为累积经验引导过程，显著减少计算冗余。具有学术价值和应用价值，可推广至其他推理任务。局限性可能在于经验库的构建和维护成本。

title: Physically Guided Visual Mass Estimation from a Single RGB Image
abstract: Estimating object mass from visual input is challenging because mass depends jointly on geometric volume and material-dependent density, neither of which is directly observable from RGB appearance. Consequently, mass prediction from pixels is ill-posed and therefore benefits from physically meaningful representations to constrain the space of plausible solutions. We propose a physically structured framework for single-image mass estimation that addresses this ambiguity by aligning visual cues with the physical factors governing mass. From a single RGB image, we recover object-centric three-dimensional geometry via monocular depth estimation to inform volume and extract coarse material semantics using a vision-language model to guide density-related reasoning. These geometry, semantic, and appearance representations are fused through an instance-adaptive gating mechanism, and two physically guided latent factors (volume- and density-related) are predicted through separate regression heads under mass-only supervision. Experiments on image2mass and ABO-500 show that the proposed method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出物理结构化的单图像质量估计框架，通过分离体积和密度因子并引入视觉语言模型进行材料推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 从单张RGB图像估计物体质量因依赖不可直接观测的几何体积和材料密度而极具挑战性。现有方法未充分分解这些物理因素，导致预测不准。本文旨在通过物理引导的表示约束解空间，提高质量估计的准确性，以应用于机器人抓取、场景理解等。
light_analysis.method: 框架首先通过单目深度估计恢复物体3D几何以估计体积，利用视觉语言模型提取粗粒度材料语义指导密度推理。然后通过实例自适应门控机制融合几何、语义和外观特征，并设计两个独立回归头分别预测体积相关和密度相关的潜在因子，在仅有质量标签的监督下训练。
light_analysis.result: 在image2mass和ABO-500数据集上，所提方法一致优于现有最先进方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明性能提升显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过物理分解和视觉语言模型引入材料知识，有效解决了单图像质量估计的模糊性。该方法可应用于机器人抓取、场景理解等领域。未来可细化材料类别或引入更多物理约束以进一步提升精度。

title: LightSBB-M: Bridging Schrödinger and Bass for Generative Diffusion Modeling
abstract: The Schrodinger Bridge and Bass (SBB) formulation, which jointly controls drift and volatility, is an established extension of the classical Schrodinger Bridge (SB). Building on this framework, we introduce LightSBB-M, an algorithm that computes the optimal SBB transport plan in only a few iterations. The method exploits a dual representation of the SBB objective to obtain analytic expressions for the optimal drift and volatility, and it incorporates a tunable parameter beta greater than zero that interpolates between pure drift (the Schrodinger Bridge) and pure volatility (Bass martingale transport). We show that LightSBB-M achieves the lowest 2-Wasserstein distance on synthetic datasets against state-of-the-art SB and diffusion baselines with up to 32 percent improvement. We also illustrate the generative capability of the framework on an unpaired image-to-image translation task (adult to child faces in FFHQ). These findings demonstrate that LightSBB-M provides a scalable, high-fidelity SBB solver that outperforms existing SB and diffusion baselines across both synthetic and real-world generative tasks. The code is available at https://github.com/alexouadi/LightSBB-M.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LightSBB-M算法，高效求解Schrödinger Bridge and Bass最优传输计划，在生成建模中同时优化漂移和波动率，实现性能显著提升。
light_analysis.motivation: Schrödinger Bridge and Bass (SBB) 是经典SB的扩展，通过联合控制漂移和波动率提供更灵活的生成模型。然而，计算最优SBB传输计划成本高，现有SB和扩散方法仅优化单一变量，未能充分利用联合控制。需要一种高效算法求解SBB，以提升生成质量和保真度。
light_analysis.method: LightSBB-M利用SBB目标的对偶表示，导出最优漂移和波动率的解析表达式，避免复杂迭代。引入可调参数β>0，在纯漂移（SB）和纯波动率（Bass）之间插值，仅需少量迭代即可收敛。在合成数据集和FFHQ未配对图像翻译任务中验证。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据集上，LightSBB-M达到最低2-Wasserstein距离，相比最先进的SB和扩散基线提升高达32%。在FFHQ成人到儿童面部翻译任务中展示生成能力，证实了框架在真实世界任务中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LightSBB-M是可扩展、高保真的SBB求解器，在合成和真实生成任务上均优于现有SB和扩散基线。它填补了SB和Bass之间的理论空白，为生成模型提供更灵活的控制。未来可探索参数β的自动调节或扩展到更多任务。

title: Sparse Data Tree Canopy Segmentation: Fine-Tuning Leading Pretrained Models on Only 150 Images
abstract: Tree canopy detection from aerial imagery is an important task for environmental monitoring, urban planning, and ecosystem analysis. Simulating real-life data annotation scarcity, the Solafune Tree Canopy Detection competition provides a small and imbalanced dataset of only 150 annotated images, posing significant challenges for training deep models without severe overfitting.
