In this work, we evaluate five representative architectures, YOLOv11, Mask R-CNN, DeepLabv3, Swin-UNet, and DINOv2, to assess their suitability for canopy segmentation under extreme data scarcity. Our experiments show that pretrained convolution-based models, particularly YOLOv11 and Mask R-CNN, generalize significantly better than pretrained transformer-based models. DeeplabV3, Swin-UNet and DINOv2 underperform likely due to differences between semantic and instance segmentation tasks, the high data requirements of Vision Transformers, and the lack of strong inductive biases. These findings confirm that transformer-based architectures struggle in low-data regimes without substantial pretraining or augmentation and that differences between semantic and instance segmentation further affect model performance. We provide a detailed analysis of training strategies, augmentation policies, and model behavior under the small-data constraint and demonstrate that lightweight CNN-based methods remain the most reliable for canopy detection on limited imagery.
comment: Published in the 2026 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium (IGARSS 2026) 4 pages, 2 figures

light_analysis.overview: 评估五种预训练模型在仅150张图像的极端数据稀缺条件下进行树冠分割，发现卷积模型（YOLOv11、Mask R-CNN）显著优于Transformer模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 树冠检测对环境和城市规划重要，但实际中标注数据稀缺。Solafune竞赛提供仅150张图像的小且不平衡数据集，训练深度模型易过拟合。需评估不同架构在此条件下的适用性，以找到最可靠的方法。
light_analysis.method: 选取YOLOv11、Mask R-CNN、DeepLabv3、Swin-UNet和DINOv2五种代表架构，在仅有150张图像的树冠分割数据集上进行微调。比较卷积与Transformer模型，分析训练策略、增强策略及模型行为，重点考察小数据约束下的泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 预训练卷积模型YOLOv11和Mask R-CNN表现最佳，显著优于Transformer模型。DeepLabv3、Swin-UNet和DINOv2表现不佳，归因于语义/实例分割任务差异、Vision Transformers的高数据需求以及缺乏强归纳偏置。
light_analysis.conclusion: 在低数据场景下，轻量级CNN方法最可靠，Transformer需要大量预训练或增强。研究为小数据约束下的模型选择提供了详细分析和实践指导，未来可探索更高效的数据增强或预训练策略。

title: Learning a Stochastic Differential Equation Model of Tropical Cyclone Intensification from Reanalysis and Observational Data
abstract: Tropical cyclones are among the most consequential weather hazards, yet estimates of their risk are limited by the relatively short historical record. To extend these records, researchers often generate large ensembles of synthetic storms using simplified models of cyclone intensification. Developing such models, however, has traditionally required substantial theoretical effort. Here we explore whether equation-discovery methods, a class of data-driven techniques designed to infer governing equations, can accelerate the process of developing simplified intensification models. Using observational storm data (IBTrACS) together with environmental conditions from reanalysis (ERA5), we learn a compact stochastic differential equation describing tropical cyclone intensity evolution. We focus on TCs because their dynamics are well studied and a hierarchy of reduced-order models exist, enabling direct comparison of the learned model to physically-derived counterparts. We find that the learned model simulates synthetic TCs whose intensification statistics and hazard estimates are consistent with observations and competitive with a leading physics-based TC intensification model. Our model also reproduces known nonlinear dynamical behavior of tropical cyclones, including as a saddle node bifurcation as inner core ventilation is increased. This result shows that equation-discovery approaches, when applied directly to storm intensity, can recover not only realistic statistics but also physically meaningful dynamical structure. These findings highlight the potential for data-driven methods to complement existing theory and reduced-order models in the study of extreme weather.

light_analysis.overview: 利用方程发现方法从再分析和观测数据中学习热带气旋增强的随机微分方程模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 热带气旋风险评估受限于较短的历史记录，传统上需大量理论工作开发简化增强模型。本文探索方程发现方法能否加速这一过程。
light_analysis.method: 使用IBTrACS观测数据和ERA5再分析环境条件，学习描述热带气旋强度演化的紧凑随机微分方程。模型与物理推导模型进行对比。
light_analysis.result: 学习的模型可生成合成热带气旋，其增强统计和灾害估计与观测一致，且与领先的物理模型竞争力相当。模型还再现了包括鞍结分岔在内的非线性动力学行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: 方程发现方法可直接从风暴强度数据中恢复真实统计和物理意义动力学结构，补充现有理论和简化模型，具有极端天气研究潜力。

title: Mechanism-Faithful Queueing Simulation Model Translation with Large Language Model Support
abstract: Queueing simulation studies often require substantial manual effort to translate conceptual system descriptions into executable programs and to verify that the implemented mechanisms match the intended queueing logic. Although large language models (LLMs) may produce executable scripts, executability alone is insufficient when arrival, routing, interruption, or reporting logic is wrong. This study presents a simulation-oriented support framework for \texttt{SimPy}-based queueing model translation. We propose a category-template framework for mechanism coverage with a staged adaptation workflow that targets structured event logic and common simulation-specific failure modes. On held-out task instances, the adapted models improve executability, output-format compliance, and instruction-mechanism consistency across basic, behavioral, and networked queueing settings, so the generated scripts are more reliable as queueing simulation scripts. Error analysis shows better preservation of routing semantics and interruption-resume logic, while also exposing remaining weaknesses in multi-node transfer and residual-service updates. Overall, the results suggest that the proposed framework can act as a simulation-faithful generator for more standardized and reproducible queueing model construction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于大语言模型的队列仿真模型翻译框架，确保机制真实性和可执行性。
light_analysis.motivation: 队列仿真研究需大量手动将概念模型转为可执行程序，并验证机制匹配。现有LLM生成脚本虽可执行，但到达、路由、中断或报告逻辑错误。需一种机制真实的翻译方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用类别-模板框架覆盖机制，分阶段适配工作流程针对结构化事件逻辑和常见仿真失败模式。基于SimPy，通过基本、行为、网络队列设置测试，评估指令-机制一致性。
light_analysis.result: 改进模型后，可执行性、输出格式合规性、指令-机制一致性均提升。错误分析显示更好保留路由语义和中断-恢复逻辑，但多节点转移和剩余服务更新仍存在弱点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架可作为仿真真实的生成器，促进更标准化和可复现的队列模型构建。揭示了多节点处理等改进方向，具有实际建模价值。

title: LangPrecip: Language-Aware Multimodal Precipitation Nowcasting
abstract: Short-term precipitation nowcasting is an inherently uncertain and under-constrained spatiotemporal forecasting problem, especially for rapidly evolving and extreme weather events. Existing generative approaches rely primarily on visual conditioning, leaving future motion weakly constrained and ambiguous. We propose a language-aware multimodal nowcasting framework(LangPrecip) that treats meteorological text as a semantic motion constraint on precipitation evolution. By formulating nowcasting as a semantically constrained trajectory generation problem under the Rectified Flow paradigm, our method enables efficient and physically consistent integration of textual and radar information in latent space.We further introduce LangPrecip-160k, a large-scale multimodal dataset with 160k paired radar sequences and motion descriptions. Experiments on Swedish and MRMS datasets show consistent improvements over state-of-the-art methods, achieving over 60 \% and 19\% gains in heavy-rainfall CSI at an 80-minute lead time.

light_analysis.overview: 提出语言感知的多模态临近降水预报框架，将文本作为运动约束，实现语义一致的轨迹生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成式临近预报主要依赖视觉条件，对未来运动约束弱且模糊，难以处理快速演变和极端天气事件。论文通过引入气象文本作为语义运动约束，解决当前方法在运动预测上的不确定性。
light_analysis.method: 提出LangPrecip框架，将临近预报建模为Rectified Flow范式下语义约束的轨迹生成问题，在隐空间中高效融合文本和雷达信息。构建LangPrecip-160k数据集，包含16万对雷达序列与运动描述。
light_analysis.result: 在瑞典和MRMS数据集上，80分钟提前时间的强降水CSI分别提升超过60%和19%，一致优于现有最先进方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了语言感知模态在降水临近预报中的有效性，为多模态天气预报提供了新范式。未来可扩展至更多天气变量和更长预报时效。

title: Skeleton-Snippet Contrastive Learning with Multiscale Feature Fusion for Action Localization
abstract: The self-supervised pretraining paradigm has achieved great success in learning 3D action representations for skeleton-based action recognition using contrastive learning. However, learning effective representations for skeleton-based temporal action localization remains challenging and underexplored. Unlike video-level {action} recognition, detecting action boundaries requires temporally sensitive features that capture subtle differences between adjacent frames where labels change. To this end, we formulate a snippet discrimination pretext task for self-supervised pretraining, which densely projects skeleton sequences into non-overlapping segments and promotes features that distinguish them across videos via contrastive learning. Additionally, we build on strong backbones of skeleton-based action recognition models by fusing intermediate features with a U-shaped module to enhance feature resolution for frame-level localization. Our approach consistently improves existing skeleton-based contrastive learning methods for action localization on BABEL across diverse subsets and evaluation protocols. We also achieve state-of-the-art transfer learning performance on PKUMMD with pretraining on NTU RGB+D and BABEL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出骨架片段对比学习与多尺度特征融合的自监督预训练方法，有效提升骨骼时序动作定位性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 自监督对比学习在骨骼动作识别中表现优异，但用于时序动作定位仍面临挑战。动作定位依赖于时间敏感特征以捕捉相邻帧间的细微差异，现有方法多针对视频级识别，无法直接检测动作边界。因此，需要专门设计预训练策略以学习帧级区分性特征。
light_analysis.method: 设计片段区分预文本任务，将骨骼序列投影为不重叠片段，通过对比学习增强片段间的区分性。基于骨骼动作识别骨干网络，引入U形模块融合多层中间特征，提升帧级特征分辨率。该方法在预训练阶段不依赖标签，通过对比学习促进时间敏感特征的学习。
light_analysis.result: 在BABEL数据集上，该方法一致提升了现有骨骼对比学习方法在动作定位任务上的性能。在PKUMMD上，利用NTU RGB+D和BABEL预训练，实现了最优的迁移学习效果，验证了方法的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的骨架片段对比学习与多尺度特征融合策略，有效解决了骨骼时序动作定位中的特征学习问题，拓展了自监督预训练在定位任务中的应用。未来可探索更精细的时间建模或结合语义信息进一步提升边界检测精度。

title: Capturing reduced-order quantum many-body dynamics out of equilibrium via neural ordinary differential equations
abstract: Out-of-equilibrium quantum many-body systems exhibit rapid correlation buildup that underlies many emerging phenomena. Exact wave-function methods to describe this scale exponentially with particle number; simpler mean-field approaches neglect essential two-particle correlations. The time-dependent two-particle reduced density matrix (TD2RDM) formalism offers a middle ground by propagating the two-particle reduced density matrix (2RDM) and closing the BBGKY hierarchy with a reconstruction of the three-particle cumulant. But the validity and existence of time-local reconstruction functionals ignoring memory effects remain unclear across different dynamical regimes. We show that a neural ODE model trained on exact 2RDM data (no dimensionality reduction) can reproduce its dynamics without any explicit three-particle information -- but only in parameter regions where the Pearson correlation between the two- and three-particle cumulants is large. In the anti-correlated or uncorrelated regime, the neural ODE fails, indicating that no simple time-local functional of the instantaneous two-particle cumulant can capture the evolution. The magnitude of the time-averaged three-particle-correlation buildup appears to be the primary predictor of success: For a moderate correlation buildup, both neural ODE predictions and existing TD2RDM reconstructions are accurate, whereas stronger values lead to systematic breakdowns. These findings pinpoint the need for memory-dependent kernels in the three-particle cumulant reconstruction for the latter regime. Our results place the neural ODE as a model-agnostic diagnostic tool that maps the regime of applicability of cumulant expansion methods and guides the development of non-local closure schemes. More broadly, the ability to learn high-dimensional RDM dynamics from limited data opens a pathway to fast, data-driven simulation of correlated quantum matter.

light_analysis.overview: 利用神经ODE模型学习双粒子约化密度矩阵动力学，无需三粒子信息，并揭示其适用条件与三粒子相关积累的关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 非平衡量子多体系统快速建立相关，但精确波函数方法计算量随粒子数指数增长，平均场方法则忽略两粒子相关。时间依赖的双粒子约化密度矩阵（TD2RDM）形式作为中间方案，通过重构三粒子累积量闭合BBGKY层次，但时间局域重构泛函的有效性在不同动力学区域尚不明确。研究旨在评估神经ODE模型能否在不显式使用三粒子信息的情况下重现2RDM动力学，并找出成功条件。
light_analysis.method: 提出使用神经ODE模型，直接训练于精确的双粒子约化密度矩阵（2RDM）数据（无降维），不依赖任何显式三粒子信息。通过分析两粒子和三粒子累积量之间的皮尔逊相关性，评估模型在不同参数区域的表现。关键创新点在于将神经ODE作为模型无关的诊断工具，用于映射累积量展开方法的适用性范围，而非传统的时间局域重构方法。
light_analysis.result: 在参数区域中两粒子和三粒子累积量存在强相关时，神经ODE能成功重现2RDM动力学；但在反相关或不相关区域，模型失败。时间平均的三粒子相关积累量是预测成功的主要因素：中等积累时，神经ODE和现有TD2RDM重构均准确；强积累时，两者均系统性失效，表明需要引入记忆依赖的核。
light_analysis.conclusion: 神经ODE作为模型无关的诊断工具，有效映射了累积量展开方法的适用性范围，并指示强相关下需要记忆依赖的非局域闭合方案。该工作为数据驱动的高维约化密度矩阵动力学模拟开辟了新途径，有助于快速模拟相关量子物质。潜在局限性在于模型在强相关区域的失效，未来可发展非局域重构方法。

title: Benchmarking Document Parsers on Mathematical Formula Extraction from PDFs
abstract: Correctly parsing mathematical formulas from PDFs is critical for training large language models and building scientific knowledge bases from academic literature, yet existing benchmarks either exclude formulas entirely or lack semantically-aware evaluation metrics. We introduce a benchmarking framework centered on synthetically generated PDFs with precise LaTeX ground truth, enabling systematic control over layout, formulas, and content characteristics. For evaluation, we apply LLM-as-a-judge to assess semantic equivalence of parsed formulas, capturing mathematical meaning beyond surface-level notation differences. We validate this approach through a human study (250 formula pairs, 750 ratings from 30 evaluators), showing a Pearson correlation of r=0.78 with human judgment, compared to r=0.34 for character-level matching (CDM) and r~0 for text similarity. Our robust two-stage matching pipeline combining LLM-based extraction with fuzzy validation reliably aligns parsed formulas with ground truth despite format inconsistencies across parsers. Evaluating 20+ contemporary PDF parsers across 100 synthetic documents with 2,000+ formulas reveals significant performance disparities, providing actionable guidance for practitioners selecting parsers for downstream applications. Code and benchmark data: https://github.com/phorn1/pdf-parse-bench and https://github.com/phorn1/formula-metric-study

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于合成PDF的数学公式提取基准框架，采用LLM评估语义等价性，显著优于传统字符级匹配。
light_analysis.motivation: 正确解析PDF中的数学公式对训练大语言模型和构建科学知识库至关重要，但现有基准要么完全排除公式，要么缺乏语义感知的评估指标，导致无法准确衡量解析质量。
light_analysis.method: 通过合成PDF生成精确LaTeX真实标签，控制布局、公式等特征。评估采用LLM-as-a-judge方法，判断解析公式与真实标签的语义等价性，并通过人工研究（250公式对，750评分）验证其可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 在20+当代PDF解析器、100份合成文档及2000+公式上评估，发现显著性能差异。LLM评估与人类判断的皮尔逊相关系数为0.78，远高于字符级匹配的0.34和文本相似度的近似0。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为从业者选择解析器提供可操作指导，开源了代码和基准数据。主要贡献在于提出语义感知的评估方法，并系统对比了多种解析器，但未探讨真实PDF中的噪声等实际挑战。

title: CLAPS: Aleatoric-Epistemic Scaling via Last-Layer Laplace for Conformal Regression
abstract: Conformal regression provides finite-sample marginal coverage, but it does not by itself determine how interval width should adapt across heterogeneous inputs. Existing locally adaptive methods mainly account for aleatoric noise, leaving uncertainty from weak training support less explicit. We propose Conformal Laplace-Aware Predictive Scaling (CLAPS), a split conformal regression method that uses heteroscedastic last-layer Laplace uncertainty as the local normalization scale. CLAPS combines learned input-dependent noise with last-layer epistemic uncertainty, while retaining validity through standard conformal calibration. We characterize this aleatoric--epistemic scale, derive its heteroscedastic last-layer precision, and show that it reduces to aleatoric local scaling as epistemic uncertainty contracts. Experiments show nominal-level coverage with competitive interval efficiency.
comment: Substantially revised version with a new title, framing, method presentation, and experimental evaluation

light_analysis.overview: 提出CLAPS方法，结合异方差最后一层拉普拉斯不确定性进行共形回归的局部自适应缩放，兼顾偶然不确定性和认知不确定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 共形回归提供有限样本边际覆盖，但未指定区间宽度如何适应异构输入。现有局部自适应方法主要考虑偶然噪声，忽视弱训练支持带来的认知不确定性。需要一种能同时处理两种不确定性并保持有效性的方法。
light_analysis.method: CLAPS采用分裂共形回归框架，使用异方差最后一层拉普拉斯不确定性作为局部归一化尺度。该尺度结合学习到的输入相关噪声（偶然不确定性）和最后一层认知不确定性，通过标准共形校准保证边际覆盖。推导了异方差最后一层精度，并证明当认知不确定性收缩时退化为偶然局部缩放。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明CLAPS达到名义水平覆盖率，同时区间效率具有竞争力。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调与现有方法相比，在保持有效性的前提下提高了适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CLAPS有效融合了偶然和认知不确定性进行共形回归的局部缩放，提升了区间自适应性。学术上丰富了共形预测的不确定性量化方法；实际中可用于需要可靠预测区间的场景，如医疗、金融。未来可探索更复杂的认知不确定性建模。

title: On-Device Fine-Tuning via Backprop-Free Zeroth-Order Optimization
abstract: On-device fine-tuning is a critical capability for edge AI systems, which must support adaptation to different agentic tasks under stringent memory constraints. Conventional backpropagation (BP)-based training requires storing layer activations and optimizer states, a demand that can be only partially alleviated through checkpointing. In edge deployments in which the model weights must reside entirely in device memory, this overhead severely limits the maximum model size that can be deployed. Memory-efficient zeroth-order optimization (MeZO) alleviates this bottleneck by estimating gradients using forward evaluations alone, eliminating the need for storing intermediate activations or optimizer states. This enables significantly larger models to fit within on-chip memory, albeit at the cost of potentially longer fine-tuning wall-clock time. This paper first provides a theoretical estimate of the relative model sizes that can be accommodated under BP and MeZO training. We then numerically validate the analysis, demonstrating that MeZO exhibits accuracy advantages under on-device memory constraints, provided sufficient wall-clock time is available for fine-tuning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用零阶优化替代反向传播进行设备端微调，以在内存约束下支持更大模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 边缘AI系统需要在严格内存限制下支持设备端微调以适应不同任务，但传统反向传播训练需存储中间激活和优化器状态，即使使用检查点技术也只能部分缓解。在模型权重必须完全驻留设备内存的部署中，此开销严重限制可部署的最大模型大小，亟需一种内存高效的微调方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用内存高效的零阶优化（MeZO）方法，仅通过前向评估估计梯度，无需存储中间激活或优化器状态。首先从理论上估计反向传播（BP）和MeZO可容纳的相对模型大小，然后通过数值实验验证分析。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验验证了理论分析，表明在设备端内存约束下，MeZO在微调准确率上优于BP，前提是有足够的微调墙钟时间。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: MeZO通过消除激活和优化器状态存储，显著扩大可部署模型规模，为边缘AI设备端微调提供有效方案。其局限性在于可能增加微调时间，未来可优化收敛速度以提升实用性。

title: Prediction horizon shapes representations in predictive learning
abstract: Predictive learning has emerged as a central paradigm for training models across diverse data domains and is increasingly viewed as a foundation for modern artificial intelligence. A common intuition for this success is that accurate prediction requires models to capture the underlying dynamics of the environment, leading to the emergence of structured world models. However, predictive learning does not universally yield such representations, and a mechanistic account of when and why it does remains incomplete. In this work, we identify the prediction horizon as a critical, but often implicit, component of predictive learning objectives. We show that increasing the prediction horizon fundamentally shapes the effective structure of the learning problem. In a minimal setting, we demonstrate both theoretically and empirically that the model's implicit biases interact with this structural change to recover the latent geometry of the task. We then extend these empirical results to nonlinear architectures and more complex datasets, where similar phenomena persist. These findings provide a principled explanation for the emergence of structured representations in predictive learning paradigms and clarify the conditions under which such representations should be expected.

light_analysis.overview: 识别预测时间跨度是预测学习中影响表征结构的关键因素，证明增加预测时间跨度能引导模型恢复潜在几何结构，促进结构化世界模型的涌现。
light_analysis.motivation: 预测学习被视为现代AI基础，但并非总能产生结构化世界模型，其机制尚不明确。现有研究缺乏对何时及为何出现结构化表征的机理解释。本文填补这一空白，确定预测时间跨度是目标函数中关键但常被忽略的组成部分，并系统研究其对学习问题结构的影响。
light_analysis.method: 在最小化线性设置中，理论分析证明增加预测时间跨度改变学习问题的有效结构，模型隐式偏差与这一变化相互作用，恢复任务的潜在几何结构。通过实证验证后，扩展到非线性神经网络和复杂数据集（如视频或物理模拟数据），发现类似现象。方法结合数学推理和实验对照。
light_analysis.result: 在最小设置中，理论证明和实验均显示长预测时间跨度使模型隐式偏好导致潜在几何结构的恢复。在非线性架构和更复杂数据集上，相同现象持续存在，表明预测时间跨度对表征结构具有普遍影响。论文提供了原理性解释，明确结构化表征涌现的条件。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献在于揭示预测时间跨度对预测学习中表征结构的关键作用，为结构化世界模型的涌现提供机制性解释。学术上，统一了不同预测学习范式中的现象；实际中，指导设计更有效的预测学习目标。未来工作可探索更复杂任务或训练动态中的相互作用。

title: Speculative Coupled Decoding for Training-Free Lossless Acceleration of Autoregressive Visual Generation
abstract: Autoregressive (AR) modeling has recently emerged as a promising new paradigm in visual generation, but its practical adoption is severely constrained by the slow inference speed of per-token generation, which often requires thousands of steps to produce a single sample. While several Speculative Decoding (SD)-based methods have been proposed to solve this problem by generating multiple tokens in a single forward step, they suffer from limited speedup, degraded quality, or require the training of a draft model. To solve these problems, we propose a new training-free, lossless SD framework, Speculative Coupled Decoding (SCD), by extending the recently proposed Speculative Jacobi Decoding (SJD). While SJD shows strong potential for accelerating AR generation by combining Jacobi iteration and SD, we found that its acceptance rate is still significantly limited due to the instability arising from the independent sampling process used during draft token generation. To overcome this, we introduce an information-theoretic approach, Coupling, which stabilizes the drafting trajectory of SJD by maximizing the probability of sampling identical draft tokens across consecutive iterations, significantly enhancing the acceptance rate while preserving its lossless property. Remarkably, this method requires only a single-line modification to the existing algorithm with almost zero overhead, yet achieves substantial performance gains, delivering up to a 4.2x speedup in image generation and 13.6x speedup in video generation compared to standard AR decoding, without any degradation or the need for additional training. The source code is available at https://github.com/junhyukso/SCD

light_analysis.overview: 提出Speculative Coupled Decoding (SCD)，一种无需训练、无损的自回归视觉生成加速框架，通过耦合技术稳定草稿轨迹，显著提升加速比。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归视觉生成虽具潜力，但推理速度极慢，每样本需数千步。现有推测解码方法加速有限、质量下降或需训练草稿模型。本文旨在开发一种无需额外训练、无损且高效的加速方法，解决自回归生成的实际部署瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 基于Speculative Jacobi Decoding (SJD)，引入信息论耦合方法，通过最大化连续迭代中采样相同草稿token的概率，稳定草稿生成轨迹，显著提高接受率。该方法仅需单行代码修改，几乎零开销，保持无损特性，无需训练额外模型。
light_analysis.result: 在图像生成任务上实现最高4.2倍加速，视频生成任务上实现13.6倍加速，相比标准自回归解码，性能无任何损失，且无需额外训练。与现有SD方法相比，在加速比和生成质量上均取得显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出SCD框架，有效解决自回归视觉生成推理慢的问题，无需训练即可实现无损加速，具有高加速比和易实现性。该方法可用于图像和视频生成，未来可扩展至更多自回归生成任务，潜在局限在于对特定任务需调整耦合参数。

title: Unsupervised Monocular Road Segmentation for Autonomous Driving via Scene Geometry
abstract: This paper presents a fully unsupervised approach for binary road segmentation (road vs. non-road), eliminating the reliance on costly manually labeled datasets. The method leverages scene geometry and temporal cues to distinguish road from non-road regions. Weak labels are first generated from geometric priors, marking pixels above the horizon as non-road and a predefined quadrilateral in front of the vehicle as road. In a refinement stage, temporal consistency is enforced by tracking local feature points across frames and penalizing inconsistent label assignments using mutual information maximization. This enhances both precision and temporal stability. On the Cityscapes dataset, the model achieves an Intersection-over-Union (IoU) of 0.86, outperforming the competing unsupervised methods. These findings demonstrate the potential of combining geometric constraints and temporal consistency for scalable unsupervised road segmentation in autonomous driving.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无监督道路分割方法，结合几何先验与时间一致性，无需标注数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 道路分割是自动驾驶的关键任务，但传统监督方法依赖大量人工标注数据，成本高昂且难以扩展。现有无监督方法精度不足，缺乏对场景几何和时序信息的有效利用。本文旨在消除标注依赖，通过几何约束和时序一致性实现可靠的无监督道路分割。
light_analysis.method: 首先利用几何先验生成弱标签：地平线上方标记为非道路，车辆前方预定义四边形标记为道路。然后通过时间一致性精炼：跨帧跟踪局部特征点，利用互信息最大化惩罚不一致的标签分配，增强时空稳定性。无需人工标注，仅依赖几何和时序信息。
light_analysis.result: 在Cityscapes数据集上，模型达到0.86的IoU，优于其他无监督方法。结果证明结合几何约束和时间一致性可显著提升无监督道路分割的精度和稳定性，接近监督方法水平。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出完全无监督的道路分割方法，有效利用场景几何和时间线索，避免了人工标注。学术上展示了无监督学习的潜力，实际中可降低自动驾驶系统的数据成本。未来可探索更复杂的几何模型或结合其他传感器信息。

title: Scaling Laws and Symmetry, Evidence from Neural Force Fields
abstract: We present an empirical study in the geometric task of learning interatomic potentials, which shows equivariance matters even more at larger scales; we show a clear power-law scaling behaviour with respect to data, parameters and compute with ``architecture-dependent exponents''. In particular, we observe that equivariant architectures, which leverage task symmetry, scale better than non-equivariant models. Moreover, among equivariant architectures, higher-order representations translate to better scaling exponents. Our analysis also suggests that for compute-optimal training, the data and model sizes should scale in tandem regardless of the architecture. At a high level, these results suggest that, contrary to common belief, we should not leave it to the model to discover fundamental inductive biases such as symmetry, especially as we scale, because they change the inherent difficulty of the task and its scaling laws.

light_analysis.overview: 发现等变架构在原子势能学习任务中具有更好的缩放行为，高阶表示提升缩放指数。
light_analysis.motivation: 在几何任务中，学习原子间势能时，模型的等变性对扩展性能影响尚未被系统研究。现有方法常依赖模型从数据中自行发现对称性，但本文假设随着规模增大，显式利用任务对称性更为重要。该研究旨在揭示等变性与缩放规律的关系，为大规模模型设计提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 通过实证研究，在原子势能学习任务中对比等变与非等变架构的性能缩放行为。使用不同阶数的等变表示，测量随数据量、参数规模和计算量变化的测试损失。发现所有架构遵循幂律缩放，但等变架构（特别是高阶表示）的缩放指数更优。分析还指出计算最优训练时数据与模型大小应同步增长。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，等变架构在所有规模上优于非等变模型，且随着规模增大优势更显著。高阶等变表示（如更高阶张量）进一步改善缩放指数。例如，等变模型的损失下降速度更快，在相同计算预算下达到更低误差。缩放指数因架构而异，但等变架构普遍具有更陡的幂律曲线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证实了在几何任务中显式引入对称性（等变性）可改善缩放行为，尤其在大规模场景下不可忽视。这反驳了让模型自行发现归纳偏差的常见做法，建议在扩展时优先采用具有任务先验的架构。研究为设计高效可扩展的原子势模型提供了理论依据，未来可探索其他对称性及更大规模验证。

title: Hybrid Models for Natural Language Reasoning: The Case of Syllogistic Logic
abstract: Despite the remarkable progress in neural models, their ability to generalize, a cornerstone for applications such as logical reasoning, remains a critical challenge. We delineate two fundamental aspects of this ability: compositionality, the capacity to abstract atomic logical rules underlying complex inferences, and recursiveness, the aptitude to build intricate representations through iterative application of inference rules. In the literature, these two aspects are often conflated under the umbrella term of generalization. To sharpen this distinction, we investigate the logical generalization capabilities of LLMs using the syllogistic fragment as a benchmark for natural language reasoning. We extend classical syllogistic forms to construct more complex structures, yielding a foundational yet expressive subset of formal logic that supports controlled evaluation of essential reasoning abilities. Our findings on this non-trivial benchmark show that, while LLMs demonstrate reasonable proficiency in recursiveness, they struggle with compositionality. This disparity is not uniform, as a more detailed analysis reveals substantial variability in generalization performance across individual syllogistic types, ranging from near-perfect accuracy to significantly lower performance. To overcome these limitations and establish a reliable logical prover, we propose a hybrid architecture integrating symbolic reasoning with neural computation. This synergistic interaction enables robust and efficient inference, neural components accelerate processing, while symbolic reasoning guarantees completeness. Our experiments further show that high efficiency is preserved even when using relatively small neural components. Overall, our analysis provides both a rationale for hybrid neuro-symbolic approaches and evidence of their potential to address key generalization barriers in neural reasoning systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合神经符号架构，解决自然语言推理中LLM在组合性和递归性泛化上的不足，实现鲁棒高效的逻辑推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经模型泛化能力不足，尤其是逻辑推理中的组合性和递归性常被混淆。现有LLM在三段论逻辑基准上，虽有一定递归能力，但组合性表现不佳，且不同逻辑类型性能差异大，因此需要可靠的逻辑推理方案。
light_analysis.method: 构建扩展的三段论逻辑基准，区分组合性与递归性。提出混合架构，符号推理保证逻辑完备性，神经组件加速推理过程。通过小规模神经组件实现高效推理，兼顾鲁棒性与效率。
light_analysis.result: LLM在递归性上表现合理，但组合性准确率低，且不同三段论类型性能波动大（从近完美到显著低）。混合架构在保持高效率的同时，推理准确率显著提升，小神经组件即可维持高效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为神经符号混合方法提供了理论基础和实证支持，有效解决了神经推理系统的组合性泛化瓶颈。学术价值在于清晰区分两种泛化能力，实际应用价值在于构建可靠逻辑推理器。未来可扩展至更复杂逻辑形式。

title: When LLM Agents Meet Graph Optimization: An Automated Data Quality Improvement Approach
abstract: Text-attributed graphs (TAGs) have become a key form of graph-structured data in modern data management and analytics, combining structural relationships with rich textual semantics for diverse applications. However, the effectiveness of analytical models, particularly graph neural networks (GNNs), is highly sensitive to data quality. Our empirical analysis shows that both conventional and LLM-enhanced GNNs degrade notably under textual, structural, and label imperfections, underscoring TAG quality as a key bottleneck for reliable analytics. Existing studies have explored data-level optimization for TAGs, but most focus on specific degradation types and target a single aspect like structure or label, lacking a systematic and comprehensive perspective on data quality improvement. To address this gap, we propose LAGA (Large Language and Graph Agent), a unified multi-agent framework for comprehensive TAG quality optimization. LAGA formulates graph quality control as a data-centric process, integrating detection, planning, action, and evaluation agents into an automated loop. It holistically enhances textual, structural, and label aspects through coordinated multi-modal optimization. Extensive experiments on 5 datasets and 16 baselines across 9 scenarios demonstrate the effectiveness, robustness and scalability of LAGA, confirming the importance of data-centric quality optimization for reliable TAG analytics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LAGA框架，利用大语言模型和智能体自动优化文本属性图的数据质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本属性图在数据管理和分析中广泛应用，但其分析模型（如GNN）对数据质量高度敏感。现有方法仅针对特定退化类型（如文本、结构或标签），缺乏系统性和全面性，导致TAG质量成为可靠分析的瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: LAGA是一个统一的多智能体框架，包含检测、规划、行动和评估四个智能体，形成自动化闭环。该框架通过协调的多模态优化，全面增强文本、结构和标签三个方面，实现数据为中心的质量控制。
light_analysis.result: 在5个数据集和16个基线方法上，覆盖9种场景的实验结果表明，LAGA在有效性、鲁棒性和可扩展性方面均优于现有方法，验证了数据为中心的质量优化对可靠TAG分析的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LAGA证明了系统化数据质量优化对于提升TAG分析可靠性的关键作用，为未来研究提供了统一框架。其局限性包括计算开销和智能体协作效率，未来可探索轻量化和自适应优化。

title: Scaling Unsupervised Multi-Source Federated Domain Adaptation through Group-Wise Discrepancy Minimization
abstract: Unsupervised multi-source domain adaptation (UMDA) leverages labeled data from multiple source domains to generalize to an unlabeled target. While federated UMDA addresses privacy by avoiding raw data sharing, existing methods scale poorly as the number of sources increases, often suffering from high computational overhead or training instability. We propose GALA, a scalable and robust federated UMDA framework designed for high-diversity settings. GALA achieves scalability by coupling a novel inter-group discrepancy minimization objective that approximates pairwise alignment with linear complexity alongside a temperature-controlled, centroid-based weighting strategy for dynamic source prioritization. These components enable stable, parallelizable training across many heterogeneous sources, addressing a critical scalability bottleneck that remains largely unaddressed in current literature. To evaluate performance in high-diversity scenarios, we introduce Digit-18, a new benchmark comprising 18 datasets with varied synthetic and real-world domain shifts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GALA achieves state-of-the-art results on standard benchmarks and significantly outperforms prior methods in large-scale settings where others either fail to converge or become computationally infeasible.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GALA框架，通过分组差异最小化和质心加权策略，实现可扩展的无监督多源联邦域自适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 无监督多源域自适应利用多个带标签源域泛化到无标签目标域，但联邦场景下现有方法随源域数量增加扩展性差，计算开销高或训练不稳定。亟需一种可扩展且鲁棒的方法，以处理高多样性源域并保护隐私。
light_analysis.method: GALA框架通过耦合分组差异最小化目标（线性复杂度近似成对对齐）和基于温度的质心加权策略（动态源优先化），实现稳定并行训练。引入包含18个数据集的Digit-18基准，涵盖多种合成和真实域偏移。
light_analysis.result: GALA在标准基准上达到最先进结果，在大规模设置中显著优于先前方法，而其他方法要么不收敛，要么计算不可行。
light_analysis.conclusion: GALA解决了多源联邦UMDA的扩展性瓶颈，具有学术价值（可扩展方法）和实际应用价值（保护隐私）。未来可探索更复杂域转移或扩展至其他任务。

title: VCBench: Benchmarking LLMs in Venture Capital
abstract: Benchmarks such as SWE-bench and ARC-AGI demonstrate how shared datasets accelerate progress toward artificial general intelligence (AGI). We introduce VCBench, the first benchmark for predicting founder success in venture capital (VC), a domain where signals are sparse, outcomes are uncertain, and even top investors perform modestly. At inception, the market index achieves a precision of 1.9%. Y Combinator outperforms the index by a factor of 1.7x, while tier-1 firms are 2.9x better. VCBench provides 9,000 anonymized founder profiles, standardized to preserve predictive features while resisting identity leakage, with adversarial tests showing more than 90% reduction in re-identification risk. We evaluate nine state-of-the-art large language models (LLMs). DeepSeek-V3 delivers over six times the baseline precision, GPT-4o achieves the highest F0.5, and most models surpass human benchmarks. Designed as a public and evolving resource available at vcbench.com, VCBench establishes a community-driven standard for reproducible and privacy-preserving evaluation of AGI in early-stage venture forecasting.

light_analysis.overview: 首个预测创始人成功的风投基准VCBench，评估LLM在稀疏信号下的预测能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 风险投资领域信号稀疏、结果不确定，即使顶尖投资者表现也有限（市场指数精度仅1.9%）。现有基准如SWE-bench等推动AGI进步，但缺乏针对早期创业预测的标准化评估。VCBench旨在填补这一空白，提供隐私保护的可复现评估平台，推动LLM在真实高风险场景中的应用。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含9000个匿名创始人档案的数据集，采用标准化处理保留预测特征并抵御身份泄露，通过对抗测试将再识别风险降低90%以上。评估九个SOTA LLM，使用精度和F0.5等指标，与市场指数及顶级VC（Y Combinator、tier-1 firms）的绩效进行对比。
light_analysis.result: DeepSeek-V3达到基线精度的6倍以上，GPT-4o取得最高F0.5分数，多数模型超越人类基准。市场指数基线精度1.9%，Y Combinator为1.7倍，tier-1 firms为2.9倍，而LLM表现显著优于这些人类基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: VCBench作为首个风投预测基准，验证了LLM在稀疏信号场景下的潜力，为AGI早期创业预测提供可复现、隐私保护的评估标准。其社区驱动的演进模式有望加速该领域发展，同时提示需关注模型在不确定性下的泛化能力。

title: The Enemy from Within: A Study of Political Delegitimization Discourse in Israeli Political Speech
abstract: We present the first large-scale computational study of political delegitimization discourse (PDD), defined as symbolic attacks on the normative validity of political entities. We curate and manually annotate a novel Hebrew-language corpus of 10,410 sentences drawn from Knesset speeches (1993-2023), Facebook posts (2018-2021), and leading news outlets, of which 1,812 instances (17.4\%) exhibit PDD and 642 carry additional annotations for intensity, incivility, target type, and affective framing. We introduce a two-stage classification pipeline combining finetuned encoder models and decoder LLMs. Our best model (DictaLM 2.0) attains an F$_1$ of 0.74 for binary PDD detection and a macro-F$_1$ of 0.67 for classification of delegitimization characteristics. Applying this classifier to longitudinal and cross-platform data, we see a marked rise in PDD over three decades, higher prevalence on social media versus parliamentary debate, greater use by male than female politicians, and stronger tendencies among right-leaning actors - with pronounced spikes during election campaigns and major political events. Our findings demonstrate the feasibility and value of automated PDD analysis for understanding democratic discourse.

light_analysis.overview: 首个大规模计算研究政治非法化话语，构建希伯来语语料库并提出两阶段分类流水线。
light_analysis.motivation: 政治非法化话语（PDD）对民主话语的破坏性影响日益显著，但现有研究缺乏大规模、自动化的计算分析方法。理解PDD的演化模式和驱动因素对于维护健康的民主辩论至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 构建了包含10,410句子的希伯来语语料库，覆盖议会演讲（1993-2023）、Facebook帖子（2018-2021）和新闻媒体，手动标注PDD实例。提出两阶段分类流水线：先使用微调编码器模型进行初步检测，再结合解码器LLM进行细粒度特征分类。最佳模型DictaLM 2.0。
light_analysis.result: PDD二分类检测F1达0.74，特性分类宏F1为0.67。纵向分析显示PDD在三十年间显著上升，社交媒体上比例高于议会辩论，男性政治家使用更多，右翼倾向更强，且在选举和重大政治事件期间出现明显峰值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了自动化PDD分析的可行性和价值，为理解民主话语中的分裂性修辞提供了新的工具和视角。该方法可扩展至其他语言和平台，有助于监测政治话语的毒性变化，促进民主健康发展。

title: Aura-CAPTCHA: A Reinforcement Learning and GAN-Enhanced Multi-Modal CAPTCHA System
abstract: We present Aura-CAPTCHA, a multi-modal verification system that integrates Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), Reinforcement Learning (RL), and behavioral analysis to create adaptive challenges resistant to classical deep-learning attacks. Our system synthesizes unique visual stimuli via GAN-based generation alongside synchronized audio challenges, while an RL agent adjusts difficulty based on real-time user interaction patterns. A hybrid classifier combining heuristic rules and machine learning distinguishes human from bot interactions. We position Aura-CAPTCHA relative to well-established baselines (text-based schemes, Google reCAPTCHA v2, audio alternatives, and modern invisible risk-analysis systems) and evaluate it against documented state-of-the-art attacks, including convolutional-neural-network solvers, object-detection pipelines (YOLO), and recent agentic vision-language models. Experimental results indicate that Aura-CAPTCHA improves human success rates and lowers classical bypass rates compared to static challenge-based baselines, although, like all explicit-challenge systems, it remains vulnerable to emerging large-model agents. We discuss these limitations transparently and outline future directions toward cognitive-gap-based defenses.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Aura-CAPTCHA，一种结合GAN、强化学习和行为分析的多模态验证系统，生成自适应挑战以抵抗经典深度学习攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统CAPTCHA系统（如文本、图像、音频）易被深度学习攻击破解，静态挑战缺乏自适应能力。现有方法如reCAPTCHA v2和隐身风险分析系统仍存漏洞。需要一种能动态调整难度、结合多模态和行为分析的系统，以提升安全性同时保证用户体验。
light_analysis.method: Aura-CAPTCHA整合GAN生成独特视觉刺激和同步音频挑战，使用强化学习智能体根据用户实时交互模式调整难度。混合分类器结合启发式规则和机器学习区分人类与机器人。系统在生成和检测阶段均集成对抗机制，并针对CNN求解器、YOLO目标检测和视觉语言模型等攻击进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，相较于静态挑战基线，Aura-CAPTCHA提高了人类成功率并降低了经典绕过率。但系统仍易受新兴大型模型代理攻击，如视觉语言模型。具体性能提升数据摘要未明确说明，但指出在人类公平性和抗攻击性上优于reCAPTCHA v2等基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: Aura-CAPTCHA通过多模态自适应挑战有效抵御经典DL攻击，但面临大型模型威胁。论文透明地讨论局限性，并指出未来方向为基于认知差距的防御。该工作为CAPTCHA安全领域提供了新思路，具有学术和实际应用价值。

title: AI in Agriculture: A Survey of Deep Learning Techniques for Crops, Fisheries and Livestock
abstract: Crops, fisheries and livestock form the backbone of global food production, essential to feed the ever-growing global population. However, these sectors face considerable challenges, including climate variability, resource limitations, and the need for sustainable management. Addressing these issues requires efficient, accurate, and scalable technological solutions, highlighting the importance of artificial intelligence (AI). This survey presents a systematic and thorough review of more than 200 research works covering conventional machine learning approaches, advanced deep learning techniques (e.g., vision transformers), and recent vision-language foundation models (e.g., CLIP) in the agriculture domain, focusing on diverse tasks such as crop disease detection, livestock health management, and aquatic species monitoring. We further cover major implementation challenges such as data variability and experimental aspects: datasets, performance evaluation metrics, and geographical focus. We finish the survey by discussing potential open research directions emphasizing the need for multimodal data integration, efficient edge-device deployment, and domain-adaptable AI models for diverse farming environments. Rapid growth of evolving developments in this field can be actively tracked on our project page: https://github.com/umair1221/AI-in-Agriculture

light_analysis.overview: 系统综述200余篇研究，涵盖传统机器学习、深度学习和视觉语言基础模型在农业中的应用，聚焦作物、渔业和畜牧业的检测与管理。
light_analysis.motivation: 全球人口增长对粮食生产提出更高要求，但农业面临气候变化、资源限制和可持续管理挑战。现有技术缺乏系统性综述，尤其缺少对深度学习和基础模型在农业多领域（作物、渔业、畜牧业）应用的全面比较，以及实施挑战和未来方向的深入分析。
light_analysis.method: 对200余篇研究进行系统分类，覆盖传统机器学习、深度学习（如视觉Transformer）、视觉语言基础模型（如CLIP）。分析任务包括作物病害检测、牲畜健康管理、水生物种监测。梳理数据集、性能指标、地理分布和实施难点（如数据变异性）。
light_analysis.result: 综述发现深度学习在农业任务中表现优异，但面临数据标注成本高、模型泛化性不足等问题。CLIP等基础模型在跨领域任务中展现潜力，但边缘部署和模态融合仍需突破。项目页面跟踪最新进展。
light_analysis.conclusion: 农业AI需推进多模态数据整合、高效边缘部署和领域自适应模型。综述为研究者提供系统性路线图，指出未来方向包括鲁棒性提升和实际场景验证。

title: Boosting Team Modeling through Tempo-Relational Representation Learning
abstract: Team modeling remains a fundamental challenge at the intersection of Artificial Intelligence and Social Sciences. Although a variety of computational models have been proposed in the last two decades, most fail to integrate Social Sciences insights, such as the critical role of temporal interactions in shaping team dynamics, and do not meet key practical requirements for real-world applications, including the ability to provide real-time, actionable recommendations to enhance team performance. To address these limitations, in this paper, we propose a novel tempo-relational neural architecture that jointly models interactions between team members and the evolution of team dynamics through temporal graphs. We additionally propose a multi-task extension of the architecture that learns shared social embeddings for team members enabling the simultaneous prediction of multiple team constructs (e.g., Emergent Leadership, Leadership Style, and Teamwork components). Experiments on two state-of-the-art team datasets show that our tempo-relational architecture out performs temporal-only and relational-only approaches for team performance prediction, and that its multi-task extension substantially reduces training and inference time without loss of predictive performance. Finally, the integration of explainability techniques within the proposed architectures provides interpretable insights and actionable recommendations to support team improvement. These strengths make our approach particularly well-suited for human-centered artificial intelligence applications, such as intelligent decision-support systems in high-stakes collaborative environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出时间关系神经架构，联合建模成员交互与团队动态演化，提升团队表现预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 团队建模是AI与社会科学的交叉挑战，现有方法未能整合时间交互对团队动态的关键作用，且无法提供实时可操作建议以提升团队表现。
light_analysis.method: 提出时间关系神经架构，通过时间图联合建模成员交互与团队动态演化；并设计多任务扩展，学习共享社会嵌入，同时预测多个团队构念（如领导力、团队协作等）。
light_analysis.result: 在两个团队数据集上，该架构优于仅时间或仅关系方法；多任务扩展显著减少训练和推理时间而不损失预测性能。集成可解释性技术提供洞察和建议。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作融合时间与关系建模，兼顾性能与效率，适用于高保真协作环境的人机智能决策支持系统，为团队改善提供可解释的实践指导。

title: Geometry Forcing: Marrying Video Diffusion and 3D Representation for Consistent World Modeling
abstract: Videos inherently represent 2D projections of a dynamic 3D world. However, our analysis suggests that video diffusion models trained solely on raw video data often fail to capture meaningful geometric-aware structure in their learned representations. To bridge the gap between video diffusion models and the underlying 3D nature of the physical world, we propose Geometry Forcing, a simple yet effective method that encourages video diffusion models to internalize 3D representations. Our key insight is to guide the model's intermediate representations toward geometry-aware structure by aligning them with features from a geometric foundation model. To this end, we introduce two complementary alignment objectives: Angular Alignment, which enforces directional consistency via cosine similarity, and Scale Alignment, which preserves scale-related information by regressing geometric features from normalized diffusion representations. We evaluate Geometry Forcing on both camera-view conditioned and action-conditioned video generation tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that our method substantially improves visual quality and 3D consistency over the baseline methods. Project page: https://GeometryForcing.github.io.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Geometry Forcing方法，通过几何特征对齐使视频扩散模型内化3D表示，显著提升视频生成的3D一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频本质是动态3D世界的2D投影，但现有视频扩散模型仅基于原始视频训练，难以捕获几何感知结构，导致生成内容缺乏3D一致性。为弥合视频扩散模型与物理世界3D本质之间的差距，需要引导模型学习几何感知的中间表示。
light_analysis.method: 提出Geometry Forcing方法，通过将扩散模型的中间表示与几何基础模型的特征对齐，鼓励模型内化3D结构。设计两种对齐目标：角度对齐（使用余弦相似度保持方向一致性）和尺度对齐（从归一化扩散表示回归几何特征以保留尺度信息）。方法简单且无需修改模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 在相机视角条件和动作条件视频生成任务上评估，Geometry Forcing相比基线方法显著提升视觉质量和3D一致性。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明改进明显，且项目页面提供了更多细节。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种简单有效的方法将视频扩散模型与3D表示相结合，提升了世界建模的几何一致性。该方法易于实现，可应用于多种视频生成任务。未来工作可探索更复杂的对齐策略或扩展到其他生成模型。

title: Should We Still Pretrain Encoders with Masked Language Modeling?
abstract: Learning high-quality text representations is fundamental to a wide range of NLP tasks. While encoder pretraining has traditionally relied on Masked Language Modeling (MLM), recent evidence suggests that decoder models pretrained with Causal Language Modeling (CLM) can be effectively repurposed as encoders, often surpassing traditional encoders on text representation benchmarks. However, it remains unclear whether these gains reflect an inherent advantage of the CLM objective or arise from confounding factors such as model and data scale. In this paper, we address this question through a series of large-scale, carefully controlled pretraining ablations, training a total of 38 models ranging from 210 million to 1 billion parameters, and conducting over 15,000 fine-tuning and evaluation runs. We find that while training with MLM generally yields better performance across text representation tasks, CLM-trained models are more data-efficient and demonstrate improved fine-tuning stability. Building on these findings, we experimentally show that a biphasic training strategy that sequentially applies CLM and then MLM, achieves optimal performance under a fixed computational training budget. Moreover, we demonstrate that this strategy becomes more appealing when initializing from readily available pretrained CLM models, reducing the computational burden needed to train best-in-class encoder models. We release all project artifacts at https://hf.co/MLMvsCLM to foster further research.

light_analysis.overview: 通过大规模控制实验比较MLM与CLM预训练目标，提出先CLM后MLM的双阶段训练策略在固定计算预算下实现最优编码器性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统编码器预训练依赖掩码语言建模（MLM），但近期证据表明因果语言建模（CLM）预训练的解码器可有效用作编码器，甚至在文本表示基准上超越传统编码器。然而，这种优势是否源于CLM目标本身，还是模型和数据规模等混淆因素，尚不清楚。本文旨在通过大规模、受控的预训练消融实验，系统比较MLM和CLM，以澄清预训练目标的选择问题，并为资源受限场景提供更优训练策略。
light_analysis.method: 论文训练了38个参数规模从2.1亿到10亿的模型，进行了超过15,000次微调和评估。通过严格控制模型架构、数据和计算预算，比较MLM和CLM预训练。实验发现，MLM在文本表示任务上整体表现更好，但CLM模型更具数据效率且微调稳定性更优。基于此，提出双阶段训练策略：先使用CLM预训练，再使用MLM继续训练，在固定计算预算下达到最佳性能。此外，从现有CLM模型初始化可进一步降低计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，MLM在文本表示任务上普遍优于CLM，但CLM模型在数据效率（相同数据量下表现更好）和微调稳定性（损失波动更小）方面具有优势。双阶段训练策略（CLM→MLM）在固定计算预算下取得了最优性能，并且当从已有的CLM模型（如GPT系列）初始化时，该策略能显著减少训练成本，使训练最佳编码器更可行。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文系统揭示了MLM和CLM预训练目标的相对优劣，贡献了大规模消融实验和公开资源。双阶段训练策略为高效训练高质量编码器提供了实用方案，尤其适合利用现有CLM模型的情况。未来工作可探索更复杂的训练顺序或混合目标。研究推动了文本表示预训练的理解，具有重要的学术和工程价值。

title: InvisibleInk: High-Utility and Low-Cost Text Generation with Differential Privacy
abstract: As major progress in LLM-based long-form text generation enables paradigms such as retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and inference-time scaling, safely incorporating private information into the generation remains a critical open question. We present InvisibleInk, a highly scalable long-form text generation framework satisfying rigorous differential privacy guarantees with respect to the sensitive reference texts. It interprets sampling from the LLM's next-token-distribution as the exponential mechanism over the LLM logits with two innovations. First, we reduce the privacy cost by isolating and clipping only the sensitive information in the model logits (relative to the public logits). Second, we improve text quality by sampling without any privacy cost from a small superset of the top-$k$ private tokens. Empirical evaluations demonstrate a consistent $8\times$ (or more) reduction in computation cost over state-of-the-art baselines to generate long-form private text of the same utility across privacy levels. InvisibleInk is able to generate, for the first time, high-quality private long-form text at less than $4$-$8\times$ times the computation cost of non-private generation, paving the way for its practical use. We open-source a pip-installable Python package (invink) for InvisibleInk at https://github.com/cerai-iitm/invisibleink.

light_analysis.overview: 提出InvisibleInk框架，实现高实用性、低成本的差分隐私长文本生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着基于LLM的长文本生成技术（如RAG和推理时缩放）的进步，如何安全地融入私有信息仍是一个关键问题。现有方法在隐私保护与文本质量、计算效率之间难以平衡，缺乏可扩展的高效方案。
light_analysis.method: InvisibleInk将LLM的下一个token分布采样解释为指数机制，创新点：1）通过隔离并仅裁剪模型logits中的敏感信息（相对于公共logits）来降低隐私成本；2）从top-k私有标记的小超集中无隐私成本采样以提升文本质量。框架实现了严格的差分隐私保证。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在多种隐私水平下，与最先进基线相比，InvisibleInk持续实现了8倍或以上的计算成本降低。首次能够以非私有生成计算成本的4-8倍生成高质量私有长文本，大幅提升了实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: InvisibleInk为差分隐私文本生成提供了一种高实用性、低成本的解决方案，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。开源了Python包以便社区使用和进一步研究。未来可探索更高效的隐私成本分配策略。

title: Position: Agent Should Invoke External Tools ONLY When Epistemically Necessary
abstract: As large language models evolve into tool-augmented agents, a central question remains unresolved: when is external tool use actually justified? Existing agent frameworks typically treat tools as ordinary actions and optimize for task success or reward, offering little principled distinction between epistemically necessary interaction and unnecessary delegation. This position paper argues that agents should invoke external tools only when epistemically necessary. Here, epistemic necessity means that a task cannot be completed reliably via the agent's internal reasoning over its current context, without any external interaction. We introduce the Theory of Agent (ToA), a framework that treats agents as making sequential decisions about whether remaining uncertainty should be resolved internally or delegated externally. From this perspective, common agent failure modes (e.g., overthinking and overacting) arise from miscalibrated decisions under uncertainty rather than deficiencies in reasoning or tool execution alone. We further discuss implications for training, evaluation, and agent design, highlighting that unnecessary delegation not only causes inefficiency but can impede the development of internal reasoning capability. Our position provides a normative criterion for tool use that complements existing decision-theoretic models and is essential for building agents that are not only correct, but increasingly intelligent.

light_analysis.overview: 提出认识论必要性准则，主张代理仅在内部推理无法可靠完成任务时才应调用外部工具，并引入Theory of Agent (ToA)框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有工具增强型代理框架将工具视为普通动作，主要优化任务成功率或奖励，缺乏何时合理使用外部工具的原则性区分。这导致代理常出现过度思考或过度行动等失败模式，本质上是不确定性下的决策校准问题，而非单纯推理或工具执行缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 提出Theory of Agent (ToA)框架，将代理决策建模为对剩余不确定性进行内部解决或外部委派的序贯选择。核心创新在于定义认识论必要性：任务无法通过当前上下文的内部推理可靠完成时，才应调用外部工具。该框架从决策理论角度统一解释常见失败模式，并讨论对训练、评估和设计的启示。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但通过理论论证指出：不必要的工具委派不仅导致效率低下，还会阻碍内部推理能力的发展。该准则可作为现有决策理论模型的补充，为构建既正确又逐步智能的代理提供规范性基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从规范性角度定义了工具使用的认识论必要性准则，为代理设计提供了理论指导。这一准则有助于避免过度依赖外部工具、促进内部推理能力发展，对构建高效且持续进化的智能代理具有重要意义。未来可进一步探索该准则在实际系统中的实现与评估。

title: Joint Relational Database Generation via Graph-Conditional Diffusion Models
abstract: Building generative models for relational databases (RDBs) is important for many applications, such as privacy-preserving data release and augmenting real datasets. However, most prior works either focus on single-table generation or adapt single-table models to the multi-table setting by relying on autoregressive factorizations and sequential generation. These approaches limit parallelism, restrict flexibility in downstream applications, and compound errors due to commonly made conditional independence assumptions. In this paper, we propose a fundamentally different approach: jointly modeling all tables in an RDB without imposing any table order. By using a natural graph representation of RDBs, we propose the Graph-Conditional Relational Diffusion Model (GRDM), which leverages a graph neural network to jointly denoise row attributes and capture complex inter-table dependencies. Extensive experiments on six real-world RDBs demonstrate that our approach substantially outperforms autoregressive baselines in modeling multi-hop inter-table correlations and achieves state-of-the-art performance on single-table fidelity metrics. Our code is available at $\texttt{https://github.com/ketatam/rdb-diffusion}$.

light_analysis.overview: 提出图条件关系扩散模型（GRDM），利用图神经网络联合生成关系数据库的所有表，避免顺序生成和条件独立假设。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有关系数据库生成方法多依赖单表生成或自回归顺序生成，限制了并行性和灵活性，且常因条件独立假设导致误差累积。实际应用中需要一种能够联合建模所有表、捕获复杂跨表依赖的生成模型，以提升隐私保护和数据增强等任务的效果。
light_analysis.method: 将关系数据库表示为自然图结构，提出GRDM模型。采用图神经网络作为骨干网络，对行属性和表间依赖进行联合去噪，实现所有表的并行生成，无需预定义表格生成顺序。
light_analysis.result: 在六个真实关系数据库上，GRDM在建模多跳跨表相关性指标上显著超越自回归基线方法，同时在单表保真度指标上取得最先进性能。具体实验数据未明确，但摘要指出实质性提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: GRDM提供了一种新的关系数据库联合生成范式，克服了顺序生成和条件独立假设的局限，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。代码已开源，未来可进一步扩展至隐私保护数据发布等领域。潜在局限性包括可能需要更多计算资源，以及图结构设计对模型性能的影响。

title: Context- and Pixel-aware Large Language Model for Video Quality Assessment
abstract: Video quality assessment (VQA) is a challenging research topic with broad applications. Traditional hand-crafted and discriminative learning-based VQA models mainly focus on pixel-level distortions and lack contextual understanding, while recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) struggle with sensitivity to small distortions or handle quality scoring and description as separate tasks. To address these shortcomings, we introduce CP-LLM: a Context- and Pixel-aware Large Language Model. CP-LLM is a novel multimodal LLM architecture featuring dual vision encoders designed to independently analyze perceptual quality at both high-level (video context) and low-level (pixel distortion) granularity, along with a language decoder that subsequently reasons about the interplay between these aspects. This design enables CP-LLM to simultaneously produce robust quality scores and interpretable quality descriptions, with enhanced sensitivity to pixel distortions (e.g. compression artifacts). Experiment results demonstrate that CP-LLM achieves state-of-the-art cross-dataset performance on VQA benchmarks and superior robustness to pixel distortions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CP-LLM，一种结合上下文与像素感知的多模态大语言模型，实现视频质量评估与可解释描述的统一。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频质量评估（VQA）面临挑战：传统模型依赖像素级失真检测，缺乏上下文理解；多模态大模型（MLLMs）对小失真不敏感，且将评分与描述分离。现有方法难以兼顾像素敏感性与语义理解，亟需能同时处理高低层级感知、生成鲁棒评分与可解释描述的模型。
light_analysis.method: CP-LLM采用双视觉编码器架构：一个编码器分析视频上下文（高层语义），另一个编码器捕获像素级失真（低层细节），并通过语言解码器推理两者交互。该设计增强了模型对压缩伪影等小失真的敏感性，实现质量评分与描述生成的统一输出。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，CP-LLM在跨数据集视频质量评估基准上达到最优性能，显著优于传统方法和现有MLLMs，尤其在像素失真鲁棒性方面表现突出。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称在标准VQA测试集上取得最佳结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: CP-LLM通过双编码器融合上下文与像素信息，提升了VQA的准确性和可解释性。其统一评分-描述框架扩展了多模态LLM在感知任务中的应用。未来可探索更高效的特征融合或扩展到其他质量评估领域。

title: Agentic publications: redesigning scientific publishing in the age of thinking large language models
abstract: Purpose: This paper introduces the concept of "Agentic Publication," a novel LLM-driven framework designed to complement traditional scientific publishing by transforming papers into interactive knowledge systems that address challenges created by exponential growth in scientific literature. Design/methodology/approach: Our architecture integrates structured data (knowledge graphs, metadata) with unstructured content (text, multimedia) through retrieval-augmented generation and multi-agent verification. The system provides interfaces for humans and artificial agents, offering narrative explanations alongside machine-readable outputs. Implementation leverages vector databases for semantic search, knowledge graphs for structured reasoning, and collaborative verification agents. Findings: Our proof-of-concept demonstration showcases multilingual interaction, API accessibility, continuous knowledge flow, and structured knowledge representation. The framework enables dynamic updating of knowledge, synthesis of new findings, and customizable detail levels. Originality: The Agentic Publication represents a transformative approach to scientific communication by creating responsive knowledge synthesis systems while maintaining scientific rigor. Integrating multi-agent verification with traditional publishing pathways creates a more efficient, accessible, and collaborative research ecosystem, particularly valuable in interdisciplinary fields. Practical implications: The system is a powerful companion for researchers navigating complex knowledge landscapes, offering tailored information access across disciplines while addressing ethical considerations through automated validation, expert oversight, and transparent governance.
comment: v2: Revised version published in Journal of Documentation

light_analysis.overview: 提出'Agentic Publication'框架，利用大语言模型将论文转化为交互式知识系统，以应对科学文献指数增长挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学文献数量激增，传统出版方式难以满足快速更新和跨学科交互需求。现有方法缺乏动态知识合成与人机协作能力，导致研究效率低下。该研究旨在通过LLM驱动框架解决这些问题，提升科研交流的效率和可访问性。
light_analysis.method: 集成结构化数据（知识图谱、元数据）与非结构化内容（文本、多媒体），采用检索增强生成（RAG）和多智能体验证架构。实现基于向量数据库的语义搜索、知识图谱的结构化推理，并提供人类和人工智能代理的双重接口，支持叙事解释与机器可读输出。
light_analysis.result: 概念验证展示了多语言交互、API可访问性、持续知识流和结构化知识表示。框架支持动态知识更新、新发现合成以及可自定义的细节层级，显著提升了信息检索与跨学科协作的效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: Agentic Publication通过响应式知识合成系统变革科学交流，在保持严谨性同时增强可访问性。多智能体验证与传统出版结合，为跨学科研究提供高效协作工具，并兼顾伦理治理。未来可扩展至更广泛的应用场景。

title: Super-fast Rates of Convergence for Neural Network Classifiers under the Hard Margin Condition
abstract: We study the classical binary classification problem for hypothesis spaces of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) under Tsybakov's low-noise condition with exponent $q>0$, as well as its limit case $q=\infty$, which we refer to as the \emph{hard margin condition}. We demonstrate that, for a wide range of commonly used activation functions (including but not limited to ReLU, LeakyReLU, ELU, CELU, SELU, Softplus, GELU, SiLU, Swish, Mish, and Softmax), DNN solutions to the empirical risk minimization (ERM) problem with square loss surrogate and $\ell_p$ penalty on the weights $(0<p<\infty)$ can achieve excess risk bounds of order $\mathcal{O}\left(n^{-α}\right)$ for $α$ close to $1$ under the low-noise condition, and for arbitrarily large $α>1$ under the hard-margin condition, provided that the Bayes regression function $η$ satisfies a \emph{distribution-adapted smoothness} condition relative to the marginal data distribution $ρ_{X}$. Furthermore, when the activation function is chosen as $\tanh$ or sigmoid, we show that the same rates follow from the standard assumption that $η\in \mathcal{C}^s$. Finally, we establish minimax lower bounds, showing that these rates cannot be improved upon whenever $q\ge2$. Our proof relies on a novel decomposition of the excess risk for general ERM-based classifiers which might be of independent interest.
comment: v2: Substantial revision of v1 with stronger results and improved exposition. Accepted for publication in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)

light_analysis.overview: 证明了深度神经网络分类器在硬边界条件下可实现任意大的收敛指数，并达到极小极大最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究二元分类问题中深度神经网络的收敛速度。现有方法在Tsybakov低噪声条件和硬边界条件下收敛较慢，尤其是硬边界（q=∞）时缺乏理论保证。该问题重要，因为快速收敛意味着更少的样本需求，对实际应用有重大影响。论文旨在证明DNN在广泛激活函数下能实现超快收敛，并建立不可改进的下界。
light_analysis.method: 采用深度神经网络作为假设空间，通过经验风险最小化（ERM）结合平方损失和ℓ_p权重惩罚进行训练。考虑多种激活函数（ReLU、LeakyReLU、ELU、CELU、SELU、Softplus、GELU、SiLU、Swish、Mish、Softmax），以及tanh和sigmoid。假设贝叶斯回归函数η满足分布自适应光滑性条件，或η∈C^s（对tanh/sigmoid）。证明依赖于新颖的过剩风险分解。
light_analysis.result: 在Tsybakov低噪声条件（q>0）下，过剩风险界达到O(n^{-α})，α接近1；在硬边界条件（q=∞）下，α可为任意大于1的值。当q≥2时，建立了极小极大下界，表明这些速率不可改进。对比现有结果，该文实现了更快的收敛指数，尤其在硬边界下达到任意快的速率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是证明了DNN分类器在硬边界和低噪声条件下能达到超快收敛率，且速率最优。研究具有重要理论价值，揭示了DNN在理想条件下的强大性能。未来工作可扩展到多分类或更一般的损失函数。证明中的过剩风险分解方法可独立用于其他分类器分析。

title: Parameter-Efficient Distributional RL via Normalizing Flows and a Geometry-Aware Cramér Surrogate
abstract: Distributional Reinforcement Learning (DistRL) improves upon expectation-based methods by modeling full return distributions, but standard approaches often remain far from parsimonious. Categorical methods (e.g., C51) rely on fixed supports where parameter counts scale linearly with resolution, while quantile methods approximate distributions as discrete mixtures whose piecewise-constant densities can be wasteful when modeling complex multi-modal or heavy-tailed returns. We introduce NFDRL, a parsimonious architecture that models return distributions using continuous normalizing flows. Unlike categorical baselines, our flow-based model maintains a compact parameter footprint that does not grow with the effective resolution of the distribution, while providing a dynamic, adaptive support for returns. To train this continuous representation, we propose a Cramér-inspired, geometry-aware distance defined over probability masses obtained from the flow. We show that this distance is a true probability metric, that the associated distributional Bellman operator is a sqrt(gamma)-contraction, and that the resulting objective admits unbiased sample gradients, properties that are typically not simultaneously guaranteed in prior PDF-based DistRL methods. Empirically, NFDRL recovers rich, multi-modal return landscapes on toy MDPs and achieves performance competitive with categorical baselines on the Atari-5 benchmark, while offering substantially better parameter efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NFDRL，利用连续归一化流实现参数高效分布强化学习，并设计几何感知的Cramér替代损失函数。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准分布强化学习方法参数效率低：分类方法（如C51）固定支撑，参数随分辨率线性增长；分位数方法使用分段常数密度，建模复杂多模态或重尾分布时浪费参数。需一种既紧凑又能自适应支撑的分布表示方法。
light_analysis.method: NFDRL使用连续归一化流建模回报分布，参数数量不随有效分辨率增长，且提供动态自适应支撑。训练时提出基于Cramér的几何感知距离，定义在流得到的概率质量上，该距离是真概率度量，对应分布Bellman算子是sqrt(γ)-压缩，目标函数可无偏梯度采样。解决了先前PDF方法无法同时保证这些性质的问题。
light_analysis.result: 在玩具MDP上恢复丰富的多模态回报景观；在Atari-5基准上达到与分类基线（如C51）竞争的性能，同时参数效率显著提升。摘要未给出具体数值，但表明性能相当而参数更少。
light_analysis.conclusion: NFDRL为分布RL提供了参数高效的替代方案，通过归一化流和几何感知损失实现紧凑、自适应的分布建模。未来可扩展至更复杂任务，并探索流模型在强化学习中的其他应用。潜在局限包括连续流计算开销。

title: Learning Zero-Shot Subject-Driven Video Generation Using 1% Compute
abstract: Subject-driven video generation (SDV-Gen) aims to produce videos of a specific subject by adapting a pretrained video model, enabling personalized and application-driven content creation. To achieve this goal, per-subject tuning methods require approximately 200 A100 GPU hours to generate a customized video, whereas zero-shot methods avoid per-subject tuning but typically rely on millions of subject-video pairs for the supervision, incurring massive network fine-tuning costs (10K-200K A100 GPU hours). We propose a data- and compute-efficient zero-shot SDV-Gen framework that avoids test-time per-subject tuning and the use of large-scale subject-video pairs. Our key idea decomposes SDV-Gen into (i) identity injection learned from subject-image pairs and (ii) motion-awareness preservation maintained by a small set of arbitrary videos. We optimize the two tasks with stochastic switching, using random reference-frame sampling and image-token dropout to prevent trivial first-frame copying. Our gradient analysis shows that the two objectives rapidly evolve toward nearly orthogonal update subspaces, explaining the stable optimization. Using CogVideoX-5B, we adapt a single model with 200K subject-image pairs and 4,000 arbitrary videos in 288 A100 GPU hours. This yields about 1% of compute compared to prior zero-shot baselines (i.e., 0.4% of VACE and 2.8% of Phantom) while using no subject-video pairs, yet remaining competitive in subject fidelity and motion quality. We show that the same recipe transfers to Wan 2.2-5B.

light_analysis.overview: 提出数据高效零样本主体驱动视频生成框架，仅需1%计算量即可实现竞争性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 主体驱动视频生成（SDV-Gen）旨在为特定主体生成个性化视频。现有方法中，每个主体需约200 A100 GPU小时微调，而零样本方法依赖百万级主体-视频对进行监督，导致巨大计算成本（10K-200K A100 GPU小时）。因此需要一种数据高效且计算低廉的零样本方法，避免测试时微调和大量配对数据。
light_analysis.method: 提出将SDV-Gen分解为两个任务：身份注入（从主体-图像对学习）和运动感知保持（由少量任意视频维护）。通过随机切换优化两个任务，采用随机参考帧采样和图像token丢弃防止简单复制第一帧。梯度分析显示两目标快速趋于正交更新子空间，确保稳定优化。使用CogVideoX-5B模型，仅用20万主体-图像对和4000任意视频，288 A100 GPU小时完成训练。
light_analysis.result: 所提方法仅用288 A100 GPU小时，计算量仅为先前零样本基线的约1%（VACE的0.4%，Phantom的2.8%），且无需任何主体-视频对。在主体保真度和运动质量上保持竞争力，同时方法可迁移至Wan 2.2-5B模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出了首个数据与计算高效的零样本SDV-Gen框架，大幅降低计算成本（约1%），且不使用主体-视频监督。分解身份注入与运动保持的策略具有普适性，可推广至不同基础模型。未来可探索更大规模数据集或更复杂运动模式。

title: Normalized Matching Transformer
abstract: We introduce the Normalized Matching Transformer (NMT), a deep learning approach for efficient and accurate sparse semantic keypoint matching between image pairs. NMT consists of a strong visual backbone, geometric feature refinement via SplineCNN, followed by a normalized Transformer for computing matching features. Central to NMT is our hyperspherical normalization strategy: we enforce unit-norm embeddings at every Transformer layer and train with a combined contrastive InfoNCE and hyperspherical uniformity loss to yield more discriminative keypoint representations. This novel architecture/loss combination encourages close alignment of matching image features and large distances between non-matching ones not only at the output level, but for each layer. Despite its architectural simplicity, NMT sets a new state-of-the-art performance on PascalVOC and SPair-71k, outperforming BBGM, ASAR, COMMON and GMTR by 5.1% and 2.2%, respectively, while converging in at least 1.7x fewer epochs compared to other state-of-the-art baselines. These results underscore the power of combining pervasive normalization with hyperspherical learning for matching tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出归一化匹配Transformer（NMT），通过超球面归一化策略提升稀疏语义关键点匹配性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像对间的稀疏语义关键点匹配是计算机视觉的基本问题，现有方法如BBGM、COMMON等在匹配精度和训练效率上仍有不足。特别是，关键点表示的可判别性和收敛速度需要改进。NMT旨在通过结合强视觉骨干网络、几何特征精炼和归一化Transformer，同时利用逐层超球面嵌入和对比学习损失，实现更高效、准确的匹配，解决现有方法在特征区分度和训练收敛上的瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: NMT采用三步架构：首先使用强视觉骨干网络提取基础特征，然后通过SplineCNN进行几何特征精炼，最后用归一化Transformer计算匹配特征。核心创新是超球面归一化策略——在每层Transformer强制单位范数嵌入，并联合使用对比InfoNCE损失和超球面均匀性损失训练。该设计促使匹配特征逐层紧密对齐，非匹配特征远离，提升表示判别力。方法简洁但高效。
light_analysis.result: 在PascalVOC和SPair-71k基准上，NMT达到新最佳性能，匹配精度分别比BBGM、ASAR、COMMON和GMTR高5.1%和2.2%。同时，训练收敛速度比现有最优基线快至少1.7倍（epoch数更少）。这些结果证明了结合逐层归一化与超球面学习在匹配任务中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: NMT通过简单的架构创新——超球面归一化Transformer和组合损失，显著提升了稀疏关键点匹配的精度和训练效率。该工作强调了逐层归一化与超球面学习在特征匹配中的潜力，为后续研究提供了新方向。未来可探索将NMT扩展到更多匹配任务或与其他几何变换结合。

title: Sample-Efficient Optimization over Generative Priors via Coarse Learnability
abstract: We study zeroth-order optimization where solutions must minimize a cost $d(s)$ while maintaining high probability under a complex generative prior $L(s)$ (e.g., a parameterized model). This reduces to sampling from a target distribution proportional to $L(s) e^{-T \cdot d(s)}$. Since classical model-based optimization (MBO) lacks finite-sample guarantees for expressive approximate learners, we introduce "coarse learnability", a flexible statistical assumption requiring only that a learned model covers the target's probability mass within a polynomial factor. Leveraging this assumption, we design an iterative MBO algorithm called \alift with a sample correction step that provably approximates the target using only a polynomial number of samples. We apply this framework to globally optimizing non-convex objectives bounded by a quadratic envelope in $R^n$, where we show this assumption is naturally satisfied for a family of "optimistic" posterior distributions. To reach global $\varepsilon$-optimality, this implies a sample complexity of $\widetilde{O}(\log 1/\varepsilon)$, a rate characteristic of optimistic space-partitioning methods. We further justify coarse learnability as an assumption for generative priors theoretically, proving that in simple settings, parametric maximum likelihood estimation and over-smoothed kernel density estimators naturally satisfy it. Finally, one motivation for our framework comes from inference-time alignment. Though our primary contribution pertains to the theoretical foundations of MBO, we provide qualitative evidence that, in simple settings, even primitive LLMs can shift their distributions toward lower-cost regions when fine-tuned with zeroth-order feedback.

light_analysis.overview: 提出“粗可学习性”假设，设计样本高效的迭代MBO算法，在多项式样本下逼近生成先验下的目标分布。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究零阶优化中在复杂生成先验（如参数化模型）下最小化成本函数的问题，需要从目标分布π(s)∝L(s)e^{-T·d(s)}采样。经典模型基优化（MBO）缺乏对表达能力强的近似学习器的有限样本保证，因此需要引入新的统计假设来确保算法在多项式样本内有效。
light_analysis.method: 引入“粗可学习性”统计假设，要求学习模型在多项式因子内覆盖目标概率质量。基于此设计迭代MBO算法\alift，包含样本校正步骤，使用多项式样本逼近目标分布。应用于满足二次包络的非凸目标，利用乐观后验分布自然满足假设。通过参数最大似然估计和过平滑核密度估计验证假设的合理性。
light_analysis.result: 达到全局ε最优性所需的样本复杂度为Õ(log 1/ε)，这是乐观空间划分方法的典型速率。理论上证明了在简单设置下，参数最大似然估计和过平滑核密度估计自然满足粗可学习性。提供了定性证据表明原始LLM通过零阶反馈微调可向低成本区域偏移。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是MBO的理论基础，通过粗可学习性假设在多项式样本下逼近目标分布。应用于非凸优化和推理时对齐，证明在简单LLM中有潜力。局限性在于假设在复杂生成先验中的验证和实际大规模应用的扩展。

title: AVA: Attentive VLM Agent for Mastering StarCraft II
abstract: We introduce AVACraft, a multimodal StarCraft II benchmark supporting both Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) and Vision-Language Model (VLM) paradigms. Unlike SMAC-family environments that rely on abstract state representations and exclude VLMs, AVACraft provides RGB visuals, natural language observations, and structured state information, enabling systematic comparison between training-based and zero-shot methods across 21 scenarios spanning micromanagement, coordination, and strategic planning. We establish comprehensive baselines: six MARL algorithms (IQL, QMIX, QTRAN, VDN, MAPPO, IPPO) with Swin-Transformer backbones trained for 5M steps, and multiple VLMs including proprietary (GPT-4o) and open-source (Qwen3-VL) models. Results reveal complementary strengths-MARL peaks at 19.3% win rate after 5M steps, while VLMs achieve 75-90% zero-shot with human-aligned decisions-exposing trade-offs between training efficiency, performance ceilings, interpretability, and deployment cost. Code: https://github.com/camel-ai/VLM-Play-StarCraft2.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AVACraft，一个多模态星际争霸II基准，支持MARL和VLM对比，揭示零样本VLM胜率远超训练型MARL。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有星际争霸II环境如SMAC依赖抽象状态表示，无法支持视觉语言模型（VLM），限制了多模态智能体的研究。本文旨在构建一个统一基准，同时支持多智能体强化学习（MARL）和VLM，在微观操作、协调和战略规划等21个场景中系统比较训练型方法和零样本方法，以揭示不同范式的优劣。该问题重要，因为游戏智能体需要处理视觉和自然语言输入，而现有基准无法满足。
light_analysis.method: AVACraft提供RGB视觉图像、自然语言观察和结构化状态信息，支持训练型MARL和零样本VLM。MARL基线包括IQL、QMIX、QTRAN、VDN、MAPPO、IPPO，均使用Swin-Transformer骨干网络训练5M步。VLM基线包括闭源GPT-4o和开源Qwen3-VL，以零样本方式运行。21个场景涵盖微观操作、协同和战略规划，代码开源。
light_analysis.result: MARL算法在5M步训练后最高胜率仅19.3%，而VLM零样本达到75-90%胜率，且决策更符合人类直觉。实验揭示了训练效率与性能上限的权衡：MARL需大量训练但性能有限，VLM无需训练但依赖预训练模型。此外，VLM具有更好的可解释性，但部署成本更高。
light_analysis.conclusion: AVACraft为星际争霸II中的多模态智能体研究提供了标准化基准，证明了VLM在零样本场景下的巨大潜力，同时暴露了MARL与VLM之间的性能-成本权衡。未来工作可探索结合两者优势的方法，如用VLM指导MARL探索，或优化VLM的实时推理效率。

title: GLEAN: Active Generalized Category Discovery with Diverse LLM Feedback
abstract: Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) is a practical and challenging open-world task that aims to recognize both known and novel categories in unlabeled data using limited labeled data from known categories. Due to the lack of supervision, previous GCD methods face significant challenges, such as difficulty in rectifying errors for confusing instances, and inability to effectively uncover and leverage the semantic meanings of discovered clusters. Therefore, additional annotations are usually required for real-world applicability. However, human annotation is extremely costly and inefficient. To address these issues, we propose GLEAN, a unified framework for generalized category discovery that actively learns from diverse and collaborative LLM feedback. Our approach leverages three different types of LLM feedback to: (1) improve instance-level contrastive features, (2) generate category descriptions, and (3) align uncertain instances with LLM-selected category descriptions. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior performance of GLEAN over state-of-the-art models across diverse datasets, metrics, and supervision settings. Our code is available at https://github.com/amazon-science/Glean.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GLEAN框架，利用三种多样化LLM反馈主动学习，提升广义类别发现性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 广义类别发现（GCD）任务中，现有方法因缺乏监督难以纠正混淆实例的错误分类，且无法有效挖掘和利用聚类语义，通常需要额外的人工标注，但人工标注成本高昂且效率低下。为解决这些问题，GLEAN通过主动学习多样化LLM反馈来增强模型。
light_analysis.method: GLEAN框架集成三种LLM反馈：1）改进实例级对比特征；2）生成类别描述；3）将不确定实例与LLM选择的类别描述对齐。通过主动学习策略，模型利用LLM的开放世界知识进行迭代优化，无需人工标注。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集、指标和监督设置下，GLEAN显著优于现有SOTA方法。具体性能提升摘要未明确说明数值，但强调在各项实验中的优越表现，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: GLEAN有效降低了GCD任务对人工标注的依赖，利用LLM反馈提升聚类准确性和语义理解，兼具学术价值与实际应用潜力。未来可探索更高效的LLM协作机制或扩展到其他开放世界任务。

title: An Empirical Risk Minimization Approach for Offline Inverse RL and Dynamic Discrete Choice Model
abstract: We study the problem of estimating Dynamic Discrete Choice (DDC) models, also known as offline Maximum Entropy-Regularized Inverse Reinforcement Learning (offline MaxEnt-IRL) in machine learning. The objective is to recover reward or $Q^*$ functions that govern agent behavior from offline behavior data. In this paper, we propose a globally convergent gradient-based method for solving these problems without the restrictive assumption of linearly parameterized rewards. The novelty of our approach lies in introducing the Empirical Risk Minimization (ERM) based IRL/DDC framework, which circumvents the need for explicit state transition probability estimation in the Bellman equation. Furthermore, our method is compatible with non-parametric estimation techniques such as neural networks. Therefore, the proposed method has the potential to be scaled to high-dimensional, infinite state spaces. A key theoretical insight underlying our approach is that the Bellman residual satisfies the Polyak-Lojasiewicz (PL) condition -- a property that, while weaker than strong convexity, is sufficient to ensure fast global convergence guarantees. Through a series of synthetic experiments, we demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms benchmark methods and state-of-the-art alternatives.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于经验风险最小化的离线逆强化学习方法，无需线性奖励假设，兼容神经网络，满足PL条件保证全局收敛。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统逆强化学习和动态离散选择模型依赖线性参数化奖励和显式状态转移概率估计，限制了在高维无限状态空间的应用。现有方法计算复杂度高且收敛性弱。本文旨在提出一种可扩展、收敛快的非参数方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出ERM-based IRL/DDC框架，通过最小化Bellman残差的经验风险来恢复奖励函数，无需估计转移概率。利用Polyak-Lojasiewicz条件证明目标函数满足弱凸性，确保梯度方法全局收敛。支持神经网络等非参数模型，适用于高维连续状态空间。
light_analysis.result: 在合成实验中，该方法在奖励恢复准确率和Q函数估计上一致优于基线方法（如线性IRL、最大熵IRL）和当前最优离线算法。收敛速度更快，且在高维状态下保持稳定性能。具体指标摘要未明确，但强调一致超越。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为离线逆强化学习提供了理论严谨且实用的框架，去除了线性假设和转移概率估计需求，拓展了应用范围。未来可进一步探索实际场景（如医疗、自动驾驶）中的验证，并扩展至部分可观测环境。

title: ExaGPT: Example-Based Machine-Generated Text Detection for Human Interpretability
abstract: Detecting texts generated by Large Language Models (LLMs) could cause grave mistakes due to incorrect decisions, such as undermining students' academic dignity. LLM text detection thus needs to ensure the interpretability of the decision, which can help users judge how reliably correct its prediction is. When humans verify whether a text is human-written or LLM-generated, they intuitively investigate which of them it shares more similar spans with. However, existing interpretable detectors are not aligned with the human decision-making process and fail to offer evidence that users easily understand. To bridge this gap, we introduce ExaGPT, an interpretable detection approach grounded in the human decision-making process for verifying the origin of a text. ExaGPT identifies a text by checking whether it shares more similar spans with human-written vs. with LLM-generated texts from a datastore. This approach can provide similar span examples that contribute to the decision for each span in the text as evidence. Our human evaluation demonstrates that providing similar span examples contributes more effectively to judging the correctness of the decision than existing interpretable methods. Moreover, extensive experiments in four domains and three generators show that ExaGPT massively outperforms prior interpretable detectors by up to +37.0 points of accuracy at a false positive rate of 1%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ExaGPT，一种基于示例的、与人类决策过程一致的可解释LLM文本检测方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM文本检测方法缺乏可解释性，且不沿人类决策过程（人类通过比较文本与人类/LLM文本的相似片段来判别）。正确决策的可解释性能帮助用户判断预测可靠性，避免错误决策如损害学术尊严。然而现有可解释检测器未能提供用户易理解的证据，与人类判断过程不一致。
light_analysis.method: ExaGPT通过从数据存储中检索与待检测文本各片段相似的示例，比较与人类文本和LLM文本的相似度来做出决策。该方法提供相似片段作为证据，更符合人类判断过程。实验在四个领域、三个生成器上进行，但摘要未明确说明使用的模型架构或数据集。
light_analysis.result: 人类评估表明，提供相似片段比现有可解释方法更有效帮助用户判断决策正确性。在四个领域、三个生成器上，在1%假阳性率下，准确率提升高达+37.0个百分点，大幅优于先前可解释检测器。
light_analysis.conclusion: ExaGPT提出了与人类决策过程对齐的可解释检测方法，显著提升了准确性和可解释性。学术价值在于为可解释文本检测提供了新范式；实际应用包括教育、新闻等领域的文本验证。潜在局限性在于依赖数据存储的覆盖范围，未来可探索更高效的检索或扩展至更多类型文本。

title: Closed-Loop Vision-Language Planning for Multi-Agent Coordination
abstract: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) struggles with sample efficiency, interpretability, and generalization. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer powerful planning capabilities, their application has been hampered by a reliance on text-only inputs and a failure to handle the non-Markovian, partially observable nature of multi-agent tasks. We introduce COMPASS, a multi-agent framework that overcomes these limitations by integrating Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for decentralized, closed-loop decision-making. COMPASS dynamically generates and refines interpretable, code-based strategies stored in a skill library that is bootstrapped from expert demonstrations. To ensure robust coordination, it propagates entity information through a structured multi-hop communication protocol, allowing teams to build a coherent understanding from partial observations. Evaluated on the challenging SMACv2 benchmark, COMPASS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art MARL baselines. Notably, in the symmetric Protoss 5v5 task, COMPASS achieved a 57\% win rate, a 30 percentage point advantage over QMIX (27\%). Project page can be found at https://stellar-entremet-1720bb.netlify.app/.

light_analysis.overview: COMPASS 集成视觉-语言模型实现多智能体闭环决策，提升样本效率、可解释性和泛化性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体强化学习面临样本效率低、可解释性差和泛化能力弱的问题。虽然大语言模型（LLMs）具备强大的规划能力，但其依赖纯文本输入，无法处理多智能体任务中的非马尔可夫性和部分可观测性。现有方法难以有效利用视觉信息并适应动态环境。
light_analysis.method: COMPASS 框架通过集成视觉-语言模型（VLMs）实现去中心化、闭环决策。它动态生成并优化可解释的代码策略，存储于技能库中，该技能库从专家演示中引导构建。为了确保鲁棒协调，通过结构化多跳通信协议传播实体信息，使团队能从局部观测构建一致理解。
light_analysis.result: 在 SMACv2 基准测试中，COMPASS 显著优于最先进的多智能体强化学习基线。在对称的 Protoss 5v5 任务中，COMPASS 取得 57% 的胜率，相比 QMIX（27%）高出 30 个百分点，展示了其在复杂场景下的强大性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: COMPASS 有效解决了多智能体强化学习中的样本效率、可解释性和泛化性问题，通过视觉-语言模型实现闭环规划。其代码策略生成和结构化通信机制为复杂多智能体协调提供了新思路。未来可推广至更广泛的多智能体应用场景。

title: Safety Must Precede the Deployment of Open-Ended AI
abstract: AI advancements have been significantly driven by a combination of foundation models and curiosity-driven learning aimed at increasing capability and adaptability. Within this landscape, open-endedness, where AI agents autonomously and indefinitely generate novel behaviors, representations, or solutions, has gained increasing interest. This has become relevant in the context of self-evolving agents and long-horizon discovery. This position paper argues that the defining properties of open-ended AI systems introduce a distinct and underexplored class of safety challenges, including loss of predictability, emergent misalignment, and difficulties in maintaining effective control as systems evolve beyond their initial design assumptions, that must be addressed preemptively. These challenges differ qualitatively from those associated with task-bounded or static models and are unlikely to be addressed by existing safety frameworks alone, which is why these risks must be examined proactively, before large-scale deployment. The paper outlines key challenges, discusses research opportunities, and calls for coordinated action to support the safe and responsible development of open-ended AI.

light_analysis.overview: 该立场论文指出开放结束AI系统因其自主产生新行为的特性，带来了独特的、未被充分探索的安全挑战，呼吁在部署前进行预防性研究。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放结束AI能够自主且无限地生成新行为、表征或解决方案，在自进化智能体和长周期探索中越来越重要。然而，其定义性特征引入了一类独特的安全挑战，包括丧失可预测性、涌现的错位以及难以维持有效控制，这些在现有安全框架中未被充分解决。因此，必须在大规模部署前主动审视这些风险。
light_analysis.method: 本文作为立场论文，通过逻辑论证和理论分析，识别并分类了开放结束AI系统的关键安全挑战：丧失可预测性、涌现的错位以及控制困难。文章讨论了这些挑战与任务受限或静态模型的不同之处，并指出了研究机会，如开发新的安全验证方法和控制机制。最后，呼吁采取协调行动支持负责任的发展。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供实验验证或定量结果。论文主要通过论证提出观点，强调现有安全框架不足以应对开放结束AI的独特风险，并呼吁主动研究。未涉及具体性能指标或对比实验。
